C: 「如果熵增是宇宙不可逆转的法则，热寂是物质世界难以逃避的命运，那我们又何苦挣扎？燃烧，聚变，然后湮灭。若想迎接新生，就必先投身终结。」 ——收集自某位科学家按下核爆的按钮前，琥珀2152纪 宇宙的诞生是一种错谬；文明若是浩瀚群星中悄然兴起的癌症，纷争即智慧生灵间唯一通行的语言。 为了修正如是错误，抹去宇宙的污点，纳努克成为熵之化身，怀抱对列神的否定飞升成神。 「毁灭」并非过程，而是结果。在祂允诺的道路上，一切命途星神都将在热寂中终结。
E: "If the increase of entropy is a fundamental law of the universe, then the heat death would be the inescapable destiny of the material world. So, why is it that we bother to struggle to survive? Expansion, fusion, and then annihilation. If we wish to welcome the new, then we must first embrace the end." — From a scientist just before pressing the button for nuclear detonation, 2152 AE The birth of the universe is a mistake. If civilization is a cancer emerging quietly from the boundless stars, then war is the only common language known to all intelligent life. To correct this mistake and to clean up this tainted universe, Nanook became the avatar of entropy and ascended to godhood while denying all gods. Destruction is not a process, but the outcome. On the path THEY promised, all Paths and Aeons will terminate in the heat death of the universe.

C: 「无价值的记忆消融在时间中，有如雨中…泪水……」 ——收集自忆员罗伊•汉普顿被处刑前，琥珀2053纪 在搜集并贮存宇宙记忆的「流光忆庭」中，藏匿着一群行止颇为极端的忆者——与珍视一切存在痕迹的同僚们不同，他们认为世间记忆有高低优劣之分，而「浮黎」所创造的净土纯洁宝贵，其空间绝不应被毫无价值的记忆所填占。 「焚化工」们自认背负着为星神筛洗记忆的义务。他们偷取忆者们搜集的库存，并将窃来的记忆划分三六九等。有价值的内容被悄然奉还，伪装成无事发生；而被擅自标记为糟粕的记忆则被彻底销毁遗弃，再无踪迹可寻。 「焚化工」声称其所作所为是在清除垃圾，最终目的是减轻「浮黎」的负担，为祂编织记忆净土的伟大工程做出些微贡献。但「流光忆庭」对之嗤之以鼻，因为宇宙间的点滴碎片皆有其留存的意义，凡人无权裁定记忆的价值。
E: "Worthless memories dissolve in time, like tears in rain..." — From the memories of Memokeeper Roy Hampton before execution, 2053 AE In the Garden of Recollection where memories of the universe are sought and kept, hides a group of extreme Memokeepers who view the marks of existence differently. Instead of treasuring all that has taken place like their colleagues, they believe that there are different qualities and priorities of memories in the world, and that the pure land created by Fuli should not be taken up by worthless memories. The Cremators believe that they bear the sacred duty of filtering memories for the Aeons. They steal the stored memories that Memokeepers have gathered and rank them in order of importance. The ones that they deem worthy are returned to the collection, whereas the ones arbitrarily deemed unworthy are completely destroyed, never to be found again. The Cremators claim that they are cleaning out the garbage, all in hopes of relieving some of Fuli's burdens, and contributing to the glorious sacred grounds of Remembrance. However, the Garden of Recollection scoffed and saw no reason for their actions, for the smallest shard of memory in the universe holds just as great of importance as the grandest of feats. No mortal has the right to judge the value of any piece of memory.

C: 开拓历（年表）
E: Trailblaze Calendar (Calendar)

C: 这是一场节奏与耐力的试炼，在7圈的循环中，唯有冷静与技巧才能脱颖而出
E: This is a test of rhythm and endurance — through 7 laps, only composure and skill will lead to victory

C: 完成比赛并进入前#1名
E: Complete the race and place in the top #1

C: 完成比赛并进入前#1名
E: Complete the race and place in the top #1

C: 「一无所有不好吗？一无所有很好。我喜欢这种生活。」
E: "Isn't it nice to have nothing? It is nice. I like this kind of life."

C: 在奥帝购物的中心找到奎茵，填补她缺失的情绪
E: Find Quinn in Oti Mall and restore her missing emotions

C: 参观巨大的黄金扭蛋机
E: Visit the giant Golden Capsule Machine

C: 与艺术批评家聊聊艺术
E: Discuss art with the Art Critic

C: 让（自称）最高的皮皮西人感到快乐
E: Make the (self-proclaimed) tallest Pepeshi feel happy

C: 完成最后的哈努行动，获取哈努努的盛会之星收藏卡，哼！
E: Complete the final Hanu's Adventure and obtain Hanu's Planet of Festivities Collectible Card. Hmph!

C: 默认解锁
E: Unlocked by Default

C: 默认解锁
E: Unlocked by Default

C: 默认解锁
E: Unlocked by Default

C: 存护的决意
E: Resolve of Preservation

C: 你感受到有许多奇怪的小猴与香蕉形象在脑海中浮现，耳边传来诡异而魔性的歌谣。「睡蕉小猴真是好，快快乐乐没烦恼~」
E: Peculiar images of small monkeys and bananas filled your thoughts while a creepy but memorable melody played in your ears. "Slumbernana Monkey is the very best~ Worry no more, be happy every day!"

C: 乱破将实验室摧毁，并等来巡海游侠的救援。乱破决意踏上「巡猎」命途，加入巡海游侠，祓除万恶，贯彻「忍道」。
E: Rappa destroyed the laboratory and awaited rescue from the Galaxy Rangers. Rappa resolved to embark on the path of The Hunt, joining the Galaxy Rangers to purge all evil and follow the way of the ninja.

C: 一位忍者装扮的少女自宝箱中现身，感叹「盛会之星」果真密不透风。少女请你见谅，并躺入你所在的入梦池中。
E: A girl dressed as a ninja appeared from the chest, sighing that the Planet of Festivities was indeed impenetrable. She asked for your understanding as she slipped into the Dreampool where you were.

C: 一位金发男子自门廊中走出，拖拽着被其打倒的敌人。金发男子嘲讽白厄的大意，并意味深长地称呼白厄为「救世主」。
E: A blonde man emerged from the gate, dragging the enemy he had defeated. He taunted Phainon for his carelessness and pointedly addressed him as the "Deliverer."

C: 灵砂对公司货物进行开箱检查。正当灵砂靠近时，箱中机甲自主启动，并对周围人群发动攻击。
E: Lingsha began unpacking the IPC's shipment for inspection. As she stepped closer to one of the crates, the mech inside activated by itself and launched a sudden attack on the nearby people.

C: 丹恒察觉到「长夜月」的异常，警告对方立刻离开。对方却称，并非她占据了「三月七」的身体，而是三月七取回了「她」的记忆。
E: Dan Heng noticed something was off about Evernight and warned her to leave at once. But she explained that it wasn't that she had taken over March 7th's body. It was March who had reclaimed her memory.

C: 阿格莱雅将护身符交予你们，缇宝将布偶交予你们，化作「记忆」同行。承载所有「记忆」的箭矢，由昔涟挽弓搭弦。
E: Aglaea bestowed her amulet upon you, and Tribbie gave you her doll. Both items transformed into "memories" to accompany you. Cyrene drew her bow, nocking an arrow that carried all those "memories" within.

C: 「信使」告诉三月七，这位在六相冰中被封印的少女就是她的起点。临别前，这位「信使」赠送了三月七一件神秘礼物。
E: The Messenger told March 7th that the girl encased in the Six-Phased Ice was where it all began. Before disappearing, the Messenger gave her a mysterious gift.

C: 符玄接管被捕的卡芙卡，并负责后续审问。依照与景元的约定，瓦尔特要求让列车组旁听审讯。你们跟随符玄前往太卜司。
E: Fu Xuan took over Kafka after the latter's arrest and was responsible for interrogating her. According to the agreement with Jing Yuan, Welt demanded that the Crew be able to observe the interrogation. You followed Fu Xuan to the Divination Commission.

C: 你们击败机械怪物，得知阻挠者是工造司匠人「公输师傅」。瓦尔特向其解释你们受景元所托途径此地，公输师傅请你们帮忙解救危局。
E: After vanquishing mechanized foes, you confronted their controller: Master Gongshu, a Commission artisan. Welt clarified that you're here on Jing Yuan's orders, prompting Gongshu to request your aid in resolving the crisis.

C: 工造司匠人铖杰称，他用「换境画屏」将大家传送出来，可惜作用距离太短，没法直接去到安全的地方。
E: Craftsman Chengjie revealed he used the shifting screen to evacuate everyone, lamenting that its limited range prevented them from an immediate escape to a safe zone.

C: 你战胜了美梦剧团，在守卫面前展现了青春的力量。守卫喃喃着感慨与懊悔，将你与流萤放行。
E: You defeated the Sweet Dreams Troupe, and demonstrated the power of youth before the guard. The guard mumbled with rueful regret and allowed you and Firefly to go forth.

C: 黑天鹅带回消息，称她已将姬子和三月七带回现实。姬子与你约定稍后在「钟表小子」雕像处会合，在那之前，你可先行调查流萤一事。
E: Black Swan returned with news, saying that she brought Himeko and March 7th back to reality. Himeko agreed to meet you at the Clockie statue. Before the meeting, you had the opportunity to investigate Firefly.

C: 瓦尔特猜测是突发事件造成的人手短缺。在进入下一道门前，黄泉遮蔽了自身气息，以避免被家族察觉。
E: Welt guessed that an accident must have caused a lack in manpower. Before entering the next door, Acheron hid her presence to prevent herself from being discovered by The Family.

C: 瓦尔特带你去与姬子等人会合。流萤提议分头调查，在列车组讨论时，她会试着寻找加拉赫。前行路上，你与瓦尔特遇到米沙。
E: Welt led you to regroup with Himeko and the others. Firefly proposed splitting up to investigate. While the Crew discussed things, she would try to locate Gallagher. On the way, you and Welt encountered Misha.

C: 米哈伊尔留下一枚空无一物的梦泡。姬子认为一定有办法解开梦泡内容，请加拉赫用「沉眠」将你们送回「黄金的时刻」梦境贩售店。
E: Mikhail had left behind an empty dream bubble. Himeko believed there must be a way to uncover its contents and asked Gallagher to use "Dormancy" to send you all back to the Dreamscape Sales Store within the Golden Hour

C: 你在二楼房间遇到哈努兄弟，借助钟表小子翻译得知敌人将至，需再度进入电视展开战斗，守护小镇和平。
E: On the second floor of a house, you met Brother Hanu. With Clockie's interpretation, you learned that enemies were approaching. You needed to re-enter the television to fight once more and protect the peace of the town.

C: 翡翠现身鼓励托帕，指出公司内斗本质，并强调本次与家族会谈要谨慎应对，为公司布局匹诺康尼。
E: Jade appeared and encouraged Topaz, pointing out the truth behind the IPC's internal conflicts. She emphasized that they must be very careful in this meeting with the Family and must set up the situation in Penacony for IPC.

C: 你调制了苦涩特饮，悼念无名客与加拉赫，寄托对现实的清醒认知。
E: You mixed a bitter special drink to commemorate the Nameless and Gallagher, bestowing your clear understanding of reality into it.

C: 回到旅途起点，你向钟表匠米哈伊尔致上最后的敬意。
E: Returning to where the journey began, you give your final salutes to Mikhail the Watchmaker.

C: 两只小猴似乎在交流些什么，抑或是在发出无意义的*蕉声*。乱破请两位再忍耐一番，待到击败御猿•邪忍，一定能令大家恢复原形。
E: The two monkeys seemed to be communicating something, or perhaps just making meaningless Banagibberish. Rappa asked for your patience a bit longer. Once Evil Ninja Osaru was defeated, everyone would surely return to their original form.

C: 你与伙伴交流分院结果。三月七分到筑梦学院，丹恒则分到谐乐学院。搞定入学流程后，你们出发去参观蒙塔娜提到的「创意集会」。
E: You discussed the results of the assignment ceremony with your companions. March 7th was assigned to Dreamweaver Academy, while Dan Heng was placed in Charmony Academy. With admission procedures complete, you set off to visit the Creator's Market that Montana had mentioned.

C: 星期日揭示万维克源自自己梦中的分裂，决定调律自我，完成与过去的最后道别。
E: Sunday revealed that Wonweek was split from him in the dream. He decided to tune himself and complete the final farewell with his past.

C: 你与丹恒在大地兽的居所遇到遐蝶，得知遐蝶也是黄金裔。在遐蝶的提议下，你尝试给大地兽喂食。
E: You and Dan Heng ran into Castorice at the dwelling of the dromases and found out she was also a Chrysos Heir. When Castorice suggested it, you tried feeding the dromas.

C: 你与白厄遭遇一处断崖。白厄发现周围有「扎格列斯之手」的操控装置，或许可以用来填平断裂的道路。
E: You and Phainon came to a cliff edge. Phainon found some control devices for the Hand of Zagreus nearby that might help you bridge the gap.

C: 阿格莱雅与她布设的衣匠交流，衣匠将若虫收集到的情报交给阿格莱雅。阿格莱雅前往调查圣城中的异常现象。
E: Aglaea met with the Garmentmaker she had placed. The Garmentmaker handed over the intelligence gathered by nymph. With that, Aglaea moved to investigate the anomalies within the holy city.

C: 大黑塔向「智识」博识尊发送的消息没有得到回应，她认为是「谒见系统」出了故障，于是带着第四面镜前往检查系统扇区。
E: The Herta sent a message to Nous the Erudition, but received no reply. She suspected something was wrong with the Audience System, and brought the Fourth Mirror along to investigate the system sector.

C: 万敌回想起弑王之日，他率领悬锋孤军反攻悬锋城，用长枪贯穿欧利庞的胸膛。此举并非为加冕为王，而是带去命中注定的复仇。
E: Mydei recalled the day he slew the old king. He led the Kremnoan Detachment in a counterattack on Castrum Kremnos, and drove his spear through Eurypon's chest. It was not to seize the crown, but to deliver the vengeance written in fate.

C: 缇宝惊醒，与陪伴身边的阿格莱雅谈起方才的梦。记忆越发模糊，预示着缇安的力量正在消散。缇宝觉得应该去寻找欧洛尼斯的帮助。
E: Tribbie awoke with a start. She spoke with Aglaea, who had been keeping watch by her side, about the dream. Her memories were slipping away — a sign that Trianne's power was fading. Tribbie believed it was time to seek Oronyx's help.

C: 你与白厄来到悬锋城，此地已经成为新的战场。那刻夏正在前方，与盗火行者交战。
E: You and Phainon arrived at Castrum Kremnos, which had already become a new battlefield. Anaxa awaited you up ahead, already locked in combat with the Flame Reaver.

C: 万敌向你与丹恒道别，你拿出相机合影留念。身负神权的他隐隐感觉到，你们对翁法罗斯的未来重要非凡，恳请你们继续协助逐火之旅。
E: Mydei then said his farewells to you and Dan Heng, and you all took a commemorative photo together. Now that he bore the divine authority within him, Mydei had a vague feeling that you would have a great significance for the future of Amphoreus. He sincerely requested for you to continue supporting the Flame-Chase Journey.

C: 恶龙降临海滨，吞下城邦公主。女王集结勇士，却只从龙腹中寻回骨骸。学者巧言令色，提议用死龙骨血来复活公主。玻吕茜亚如是说。
E: Polyxia told of how an evil dragon once descended upon a seaside town and devoured its princess. The queen gathered her warriors, but could only retrieve her daughter's bones from the dragon's belly. A devious, smooth-talking scholar arrived at the palace and suggested that the princess could be revived through the use of dragon bone and dragon blood.

C: 「敬拜学派」培养出了一位渎神者，但恩贝多克利斯希望那刻夏不要为外界的非议牵掣。愿瑟希斯捍卫你的思想，愿我们在真理前相会。
E: For the Venerationists to have birthed a blasphemer was a twist of fate indeed, but Empedocles urged Anaxa to ignore the voices of others in his search for the truth. He wished Anaxa well, saying: "May Cerces safeguard your thoughts. May we meet again with the truth before us."

C: 通路打开后，赛飞儿假意要回答巴特鲁斯方才提出的问题。巴特鲁斯却声称不曾提问，赛飞儿大致确定个中蹊跷。
E: After the path was cleared, Cipher pretended to want to answer Bartholos's questions from earlier, only for the Spirithief to claim it had never asked any questions at all. By now, Cipher was on high alert, certain that something was very, very fishy.

C: 白厄击倒来犯之敌，「清洗者」队长却声称「拖延时间」的任务已经完成，率众撤退。白厄怀疑元老院另有所图，同时，手机传来振动。
E: Phainon defeated the assailants, but the leader of the "Cleaners" claimed that they had fulfilled their mission of stalling for time, and the "Cleaners" retreated. Phainon suspected that this scheme was wrought by the Council of Elders. Just then, he received a notification on his phone.

C: 白厄请求赛飞儿保护刻法勒的火种，切勿令其落入元老院或盗火行者之手。
E: Phainon asked Cipher to guard Kephale's Coreflame, and keep it well away from the grasp of the Council of Elders and the Flame Reaver.

C: 「阳雷骑士」塞涅俄丝怜悯懦弱的雨之民，指出泰坦的偏袒才是部族压迫之源。塞涅俄丝决心弥合阴晴晨昏，将公正与博爱自天空洒下。
E: Seliose the Daythunder Knight pitied the downtrodden Rainfolk, and told the tribe that the Titan was the source of their oppression. Seliose swore to bridge day and night, and let love and justice rain from above.

C: 第<unbreak>10348765</unbreak>次永劫回归，白厄在创世涡心见到随冥河涌至的遐蝶。盗火行者迫近，遐蝶已准备好将这位刽子手留在阴影中。
E: In the <unbreak>10,348,765</unbreak>th Eternal Recurrence, at the Vortex of Genesis, Phainon encountered Castorice drifting in with the flow of River of Souls. The Flame Reaver drew near. Castorice was ready to cast this executioner into the shadows.

C: 老奥帝向观众介绍能召唤名人英灵、能实现一切愿望的「圣杯」，并宣布匹诺康尼第一届「圣杯战争」开幕。
E: Old Oti introduced to the audience the Holy Grail, which can summon the Heroic Spirits of famous people and could grant any wish. He then declared the start of Penacony's inaugural Holy Grail War.

C: 你看到举杯对饮的断锋爵与冬霖爵，似乎在等待谁的归来。来古士请你穿过神殿的海水，重现历史。
E: You saw Dux Fragoris and Dux Brumalis, glasses raised as if awaiting someone's return. Lygus invited you to pass through the temple's waters and relive history.

C: 螺丝咕姆介绍，「朋克洛德精神」是一份以太卡带，记录着一位传奇骇客的认知方式与生命历程。黑塔曾将其数据提取出来，加入对宇宙模型的演算中。在模拟宇宙暂时关闭期间，你可以进入其中以调查卡带数据，螺丝咕姆会为你提供力所能及的帮助。
E: Screwllum explained that the "Punklorde mentality" was an Aether Cartridge containing the cognitive framework and life story of a legendary hacker. Herta had extracted the data and integrated it into the universe model calculations. While the Simulated Universe remained temporarily offline, you were allowed to enter and investigate the cartridge data, with Screwllum providing whatever help they could.

C: 你遇到名为「豆沙灰灰」的「阮•梅」造物。通过特殊的联觉信标，你聆听到小家伙的哭诉，它渴望得到阮•梅的认可。
E: You encountered "Gray Bean Paste," one of Ruan Mei's creations. Through a special Synesthesia Beacon, you heard the little one's sorrowful plea. It longed for Ruan Mei's recognition.

C: 在确定卢卡的挑战不含敌意之后，史瓦罗同意与卢卡交手切磋。卢卡拜托希儿担任裁判，一场搏斗即将开赛。
E: After confirming that Luka's challenge held no hostility, Svarog agreed to spar with him. Luka asked Seele to be the referee, and the match was about to begin.

C: 符玄查看显示器，其上显示「黑塔空间站自研」。三月七由此得知，接下来要回溯的是在黑塔空间站的经历。
E: Fu Xuan checked the monitor, which displayed "Developed on Herta Space Station." March 7th realized her next memory would rewind to her time on the Herta Space Station.

C: 你们登船前去会见白露，并答应之后会见持明长老。
E: You boarded a ship to meet Bailu, agreeing to meet with the Vidyadhara elders afterward.

C: 封藏「孤云」的剑匣<color=#f29e38ff>锁扣完好无损</color>，另外，你在匣中找到了<color=#f29e38ff>玫瑰花瓣</color>。
E: The sword case containing Guyun had <color=#f29e38ff>its lock intact</color>. Inside, you found a single <color=#f29e38ff>rose petal</color>.

C: 飞霄称，青丘军找到了停云所在的「鸣火」商队舰船遗骸。虽未发现幸存者，但种种迹象表明，阮•梅已经先一步到达现场。
E: According to Feixiao, the Verdant Knights had found the wreckage of the "Whistling Flames" commercial vessel where Tingyun was located. Though no survivors had been found, evidence suggested that Ruan Mei had reached the site ahead of them.

C: 纵然此行凶险，捉鬼小队仍决定继续出发。
E: Despite the perilous journey ahead, the ghost-hunting squad decided to press on.

C: 人生几何
E: Geometry4Lyfe

C: 庄严肃穆、杀气腾腾的仙舟机巧鸟阵列，有趣的场面调度。假使有一部剑侠大战机巧鸟集群的片子，一定会很有看点……
E: The solemn and menacing array of cycranes on the Xianzhou presents an interesting scene composition. If there were a film featuring a swordsman battling a swarm of cycranes, it would surely be captivating...

C: 识别失败，请尝试同时拍摄所有目标
E: Failed to identify. Please try and include all the targets in the shot

C: 「云端遗堡」晨昏之眼
E: "Cloudedge Bastion Ruins" Eye of Twilight

C: 差分宇宙
E: Divergent Universe

C: 你让厨子将牛排加热至全熟。
E: You ask the chef to redo the steak until it is well-done.

C: 给孩子们一些「特别指导」！
E: Impart some "exclusive wisdom"!

C: 为机械聚落新建庇护所。
E: Build new shelters for the Robot Settlement.

C: 可惜记忆从来不代表着真实。
E: However, memories never tell the whole truth.

C: 机甲的隐蔽性与一棵红色的大树相近。
E: That mech's stealth is about as subtle as a giant red tree.

C: 它开始长得很有…节奏感。
E: It's growing with... some serious groove.

C: 你拧下手掌，露出里面的螺丝刀。
E: You unscrew your palm to reveal a screwdriver inside.

C: 身为公司的智械外卖员，与时间赛跑是你的强项——除非寒铁披萨因为加热太慢没能按时出餐，加上公司提供的那台故障率七成的廉价星际摩托半路抛锚——就好比现在的状况。\n「距该订单超时还有3个系统时整，介时您将被扣除<unbreak>15%</unbreak>的本单报酬…」\n信用点在上，容不得你慢慢思考了！
E: As an IPC Intellitron delivery driver, racing against time is your specialty — unless the Coldiron Pizza takes too long to heat up, and the cheap IPC motorcycle with its <unbreak>70%</unbreak> breakdown rate decides to quit — just like your current situation.\n"Order will time out in 3 system hours, at which point <unbreak>15%</unbreak> of your payment will be deducted..."\nFor credits' sake, you've got no time to think!

C: 貊泽
E: Moze

C: 辅助讲解系统-Ⅰ
E: Assistant Guide System I

C: 会场等级6解锁
E: Venue Level 6 Unlocked

C: 汽车
E: Car

C: 巨型钟表
E: Enormous Clock

C: 酒店
E: Hotel

C: 当前状态下无法搭乘电梯
E: Cannot take the lift in the current state

C: 隐夜鸫雕像
E: Nightingale Statue

C: 忆泡
E: Memory Bubble

C: 箱子
E: Chest

C: 寂寞的豹
E: Lonely Seal

C: 广告机
E: Advertising Bot

C: 售货机
E: Vending Machine

C: 完成经营阶段「攘来熙往」
E: Complete the management phase "Bustling Activity"

C: 将任意#4名角色等级提升至#1级
E: Enhance #4 character(s) to Lv. #1

C: 完成开拓续闻「游园惊梦」
E: Complete Trailblaze Continuance "Sojourners' Ghastly Reverie"

C: 在「宇宙家装指南」中，使用开拓者累计参与#4次值日
E: In the Cosmic Home Décor Guide, have the Trailblazer be on duty #4 time(s)

C: 使用1件消耗品
E: Use Consumables 1 time

C: 完成「封锁扇区•难度一」

C: 格拉默铁骑攥紧铁腕将肮脏鞘翅坼裂，任由虫腹腔内失压的腐蚀性液体肆意喷溅。虫液接触到银色甲胄时瞬间气化，仅仅留下血渍污秽。 装甲与虫肢的残骸散作深空碎屑，环绕格拉默的「死亡之河」在引力的牵引下静静流淌，血战终究迎来了终结。 议会的领袖们商讨着战后的格局，他们向从未掌握实权的「泰坦尼娅」降下审判，因为她支配着匹敌蠹虫的铁骑兵团，她的存在是共和国存续的最大隐患…人们敲响和平的钟声，向民众们宣告虫群消散、湛蓝的天空将重新回到共和国手中。 「倘若不对『女皇』加以约束，还有谁能控制这些兵器？」 铁骑们在短暂的生命中不断磨砺铁拳的腕力，但他们未曾想过——议会里那些苍白无力的枯手高高举起，便拥有改变格拉默命运的力量。
E: Glamoth's Iron Cavalry clenches their wrists tight, causing the filthy carapaces of the Swarm to crack open, allowing the corrosive fluid from their abdomens to spray freely. When the insectoid fluid touches their silvery armor, it vaporises instantly, leaving only stains of filth and blood. The wreckage of armor and insectoid limbs scatter as deep-space debris. Around Glamoth, the "River of Death" flowes silently under the pull of gravity, marking the end of the bloody battle. The leaders of the council discuss the post-war situation, passing judgment on Titania, who had never wielded real power. It is because of her control over the Iron Cavalry, whose power rivaled that of the Swarm. She is the greatest threat to the Republic's continued survival... People ring the bells of peace, declaring to the populace that the Swarm had dispersed, and the azure sky would return to the hands of the Republic. "If we do not restrain the 'Empress,' who else can control these weapons?" The Iron Cavalry ceaselessly hone their iron fists' strength in their brief lives. But they never imagined that those pale feeble hands in the council, lifting high, would possess the power to change Glamoth's fate.

C:
关于机械生命的本源，博识学会的碳基学者们有个意趣的推测：一簇偶然诞生的电子流。

电流于大气和岩层中四处流窜，在无数次引力与斥力作用下又分化成大小不一的次级形态——在学者们的自圆其说中，此举无异于碳基生命演化中的「复制」；随后，无数电流又经由行星表面天然形成的晶体管结构随机输出高低不一的电位，缔造了最原始的程序——学者们自鸣得意，正论机械便是如此拥有媲美碳基生命的「思想」。

某位机械学者对此提出异议：尚无法解明本身生命起源的碳基生命，何来权利对这谬论言之凿凿？一言既出，寰宇学界便剧烈震荡——机械生命开始重新审视蛮横的「碳基中心主义」、审视自身的本源。

然而，螺丝星上的螺丝族却只能暂缓步伐——因星体能源比它们的灵感回路枯竭得更快。它们必须首先寻求种群存续的方式。

最终，它们决定践行超越数个琥珀纪的疯狂计划：它们将那濒临死寂的星球当作燃料，用以驱动星体差分机。令人惊叹的齿轮巨构不知疲倦地吞吐刻有空隙的纸带，有条不紊地反复演算。在行星级的能源供给下，庞然机械将模拟出逼真且稳定的超生态系统——它们将围绕母星打造新的家园。

行星危机解除，螺丝族暂得歇息。向来理智、乐观、优雅的它们决心以纯粹理性的方式探索起源的答案。

庞大的系统中充斥着轴承摩擦的声响，致密的咬合驱动着打孔纸带流动数据。一个分支流淌出复数的分支，无数的分支又指引着数以万亿的齿轮轰响…随后，这些分支再一次次收束、倾倒，坠入熔炉之中，在泡沫的寂灭里归于沉静。在漫长的时间中，程序设定的超生态系统渐趋于一种绝妙的相对稳定——有关机械根源的猜想开始令螺丝族浮想联翩。

驱动废星的钢铁架构再次激活了灵动的思想电流。它们将继续思考、探索自身本源何在，直到那举目恒见的机械烈阳彻底燃尽为止。
E:
Regarding the origin of mechanical life, the carbon-based scholars of the Intelligentsia Guild have a unique speculation: A cluster of electrons born by chance.

Electric currents flow throughout the atmosphere and ground. It separated into secondary forms of different magnitudes under the countless acts of gravity and repulsive forces. According to the scholars' hypothesis, this action is tantamount to cell division in carbon-based life. Thereafter, currents randomly output different potentials via the transistor structure naturally formed on the planetary surface, creating the most primitive program. The proud scholars argued that in this way, machines have "thoughts" that are comparable to carbon-based life.

A mechanic objected to this: How can carbon-based life, which has not even been able to understand the origin of their own beings, have the gall to spout such fallacies? As soon as the words came out, the academic world of the universe was shaken to the core. Mechanical life began to re-examine the arrogant "carbon-based centrism" and examine its own origin.

However, the Screwlites on the Planet Screwllum had no choice but to pause their march — their planet's energy was being exhausted faster than their inspiration circuits. They needed to first find a way for their population to survive.

In the end, they decided to carry out an extreme plan that transcended several Amber Eras: They used the dying planet as fuel to power the Celestial Differentiator. The awe-inspiring, gigantic gear tirelessly processed the punched tape, methodically repeating calculations. With its planetary energy supply, the huge machine simulated a bona fide and stable superecosystem. They would then build their new home around this parent star.

With their planetary crisis lifted, the Screwlites could rest. Always rational, optimistic, and elegant, they are determined to explore the answer to their origins in a purely rational manner.

The massive system is filled with the sound of bearings grinding against each other, and the dense teeth of cogs drive the punched tape to churn out data. One branch flows into multiple branches, and countless branches guide trillions of gears to roar... Then, these branches collapse again and again, falling into the furnace and returning to silence in the bubbling core. Over a long period of time, the programmed super-ecosystem gradually became a wonderful and relatively stable one. Eventually, speculations about the origins of machines began to cause Screwlites' imaginations to wander.

The steel construct that drives the dying star once again activated their intelligent thought circuits. They will continue to ponder and explore their origins until the ever-present mechanical sun completely burns out.

C: 「兼备无机的反有机方程，以及有机的身体，二世的存在形态，难道不就是课题的答案所在吗？」在论坛上结束报告后，有关████学士的史料就此消失。 是否存在一种完美的载体，作为智慧的存在形式？作为机械帝皇的无机仿生神经元集群，「权杖」理应具备承载智慧的特质。完美进化学派的学士一度怀疑，正是以「权杖」作为扩展思维的大脑延伸，#鲁珀特二世才能以血肉之躯企及摧毁半个宇宙的算能。虽然公司对无机生命的研究项目多有限制，但仍未能阻止学者们将研发重心逐渐从肉体转移向金属。 正如托克尔克学士所言，在小小的蛋白球和有限的寿命外，我们终将创造更具超越性的智慧。 ——《学派战争全史》烛墨史学家，科尔哈桑
E: "Equipped with an inorganic Anti-Organic Equation and an organic body, is the existence of Rubert II not the answer to the question?" After concluding the report at the forum, historical records on Scholar ████████ disappeared thereafter. Is there a perfect medium for wisdom to exist? As the inorganic bionic neuron clusters of the Mechanical Emperor, the Scepters should possess the property of bearing intelligence. The School of Evolutionary Perfection scholars once suspected that #Rubert II used the Scepters as a cerebral extension of thought expansion to generate enough computational power to destroy half the universe with his mortal body. Though the IPC has imposed many restrictions on inorganic lifeform research projects, that has not prevented scholars' academic efforts from being slowly diverted from flesh to metal. It is as Scholar Torkirk declared: Beyond minuscule protein balls and limited lifespans, we will eventually create intelligence that transcends all. — Chronicles of the Scholars' Strife Candelagraph Historian, Kerhasan

C: 生物的躯壳脆弱无比，过高的重力，有毒的空气，深海的压强，任何本土居民习以为常的环境，都将是来访者致命的考验。参考星穹列车的智库，一些技术员出身的无名客制作出自由变化的泥偶，它们模拟出异星居民的形态，与操纵者的感官连通，通过远程遥控，再恶劣的环境也拦不住开拓的步伐。由于缺乏真实感，泥偶探险很快被无名客们舍弃，但这一技术却在星际旅游领域发光发热，让星际和平公司赚得盆满钵满。
E: The bodies of organic life are extremely fragile things. Extreme gravity, toxic air, deep ocean pressure — these things that are no more than daily realities for natives become trials of survival for any visitor. According to the Astral Express's data bank, a number of former technician Nameless worked together to create a clay doll that was capable of free transformation. They could simulate the physical form of native citizens and connect to the senses of their controller to allow the trailblazing journey to continue through even the harshest environments through long-distance operations. Due to their lack of realism, clay doll exploration was quickly abandoned by the Nameless, but this technology became a huge boom in the field of interstellar tourism, allowing the IPC to make massive profits.

C: 如果你在大街上遇到愚者在送礼物，请谨慎对待，全银河已经有不小于一千名强迫症患者被这个小小的礼物盒气到神经衰弱。无论你把礼物盒放在什么地方，盒子都一定会比储物它的空间多出一截，导致没法放进去。当然愚者非常懂得开玩笑的尺度，他贴心地送了你第二个礼物盒，可以完美地收容第一个礼物盒。那么问题来了，第二个礼物盒该放在哪里呢？
E: If you encounter a Fool distributing gifts on the street, approach with caution. Across the cosmos, this seemingly simple gift box has driven more than a thousand compulsive individuals to the edge of a nervous breakdown. Regardless of where you attempt to place it, the box consistently requires just a bit more space than is available. With a knack for humor, the Fool also gives you a second gift box, perfectly sized to contain the first. But this leads to a new conundrum. Where should you put the second box?

C: 当其他城邦还在劈柴生火时，艾格勒的信徒们就已经掌握了永不枯竭的能源。这座名叫烈阳之舞的小小祭台，能直接吸收阳光和闪电的力量，散发出的温度令十里内的冰雪消融，照射出的光线让欧洛尼斯的夜帷都退避三舍。一座座城邦在它的庇佑下拔地而起，连最贫瘠的土地都被建设成了理想家园。不过这都是烈阳之舞熄灭之前的事了，现在那些城邦几乎都成了毫无生机的废墟。
E: While other city-states were still chopping wood and kindling fires, the followers of Aquila had already mastered an inexhaustible energy source. The small-yet-formidable altar known as the Dance of the Scorching Sun could directly absorb the energy in sunlight and lightning, radiating heat intense enough to melt ice and snow within a 5-kilometer radius. Its brilliance was so blinding that even Oronyx's night veil recoiled before it. Under its protection, multiple city-states rose from barren lands, transforming even the most desolate regions into thriving havens. But that was before the Dance of the Scorching Sun was extinguished. Now, those once-prosperous cities stand as lifeless ruins, echoes of a bygone era.

C: 翁法罗斯西海岸的沙滩与众不同，它们是灰黑色的。每当潮水退去，欧洛尼斯的追随者就会前往沙滩拾取海螺。他们说，每个人生前都是天上的一颗星星，当人们死后，星星落入冥河，而冥河又将它们冲入大海，就成了海螺。所以，海螺有着死去之人的声音与回忆，你对着海螺说话，它就能给你回应。这个说法越传越离奇，最后演变成海螺有预言的能力，人们对它抛出无数疑问，当没有得到满意的回复时，海螺往往会被端上餐桌。
E: The beaches to the west of Amphoreus are different to all other beaches — They are ashen black. The followers of Oronyx would go there to pick sea conchs during low tide, claiming that everyone was a star in the sky before they were born and that upon the person's death, their star would fall into the River of Souls, which then washes the star into the sea and forms conchs. They, therefore, believe that sea conchs contain the voices and memories of the dead, and the conchs can answer when spoken to. This myth became more and more fantastical over the years, culminating in the belief that sea conchs have the power of prophecy. People therefore asked the conchs countless questions and, when no satisfactory answer was received, would cook the conchs and serve them up as a dish.

C: 公司最初的零号咕咕钟，代表着咕咕钟计划的启动。很多人都非常好奇咕咕钟计划究竟为何而诞生——路易斯•弗莱明声称这是出于对存护星神克里珀的追随，需要保护公司来之不易的存在。他在演讲中表示星际和平公司虽然已是宇宙金融主宰，但仍需保持对终末灾厄的警惕，继而他一手创造咕咕钟系列，旨在收集这位星神的相关讯息，严防公司在未来星河历程中任何一点破产或解散的可能性。
E: The IPC's initial Prototype Cuckoo Clock represents the beginning of Operation Cuckoo Clock. Many are curious why Operation Cuckoo Clock was conceived — Louis Fleming declared that the worship of Qlipoth, Aeon of Preservation, means the IPC needs to protect its hard-won presence. In his speech, he stated that while the Interastral Peace Corporation is now the master of the universe's finances, it still needs to remain vigilant against the catastrophe of Finality. That is why he advocated the creation of the cuckoo clock series to collect information regarding that Aeon, meticulously removing any possibility of the IPC becoming bankrupt or disbanded in its future cosmic journey.

C: 在第Ⅸ机关的秘密暗网，一件天价商品引来了无数竞拍者的关注。这件长袍据称曾属于天才俱乐部#64「原始博士」，拥有不可思议的力量。将它挂上暗网的是一位匿名用户，人们相信他是巡海游侠的一员，纷纷向之发问，但遗憾的是，直到长袍被拍下，这位神秘主人都没有作出任何回应。
E: An incredibly expensive item surfaced on Device IX's dark web one day and grabbed the attention of countless bidders. This robe was reportedly once owned by member #64 of the Genius Society, Dr. Primitive, and supposedly had incredible powers. The seller on the dark web was anonymous. People believed them to be a member of the Galaxy Rangers and kept sending them questions. Regrettably, this mysterious owner did not make any responses even after the item was sold.

C: 将所有方程和祝福替换为随机方程和祝福，出现「记忆」命途方程和祝福的概率提高，并获得「赐福残晶•岁月」
E: Replace all Equations and Blessings with random Equations and Blessings. There is a higher chance that Equations and Blessings for the Path of Remembrance will appear, and obtain "Benediction Shard: Time."

C:
战火在天空蔓延，云翳也一并被焚烧，虫裔们张牙舞爪地奔向死亡，然后无力地坠落。而你躲藏在废墟的一角，用色彩将身形掩盖。

生存是一场伟大的欺诈，你舍弃原始的姿态，在外壳涂抹灰烬与泥泞，为六足添加上砖瓦的光泽。獠牙上猎物的面孔抽泣，血腥味里求救的呼喊飘荡。

敌人在坑洞中融化，子嗣在饱腹中降生，但你还不满足，战争尚未结束。要缩小自己的身形，乃至褪去坚甲，要生出懦弱的相貌，模仿敌人的嘴巴。直到他们拥抱你，将你称作「朋友」，直到鲜美的粮仓向你敞开……
E:
The flames of war spread across the sky, combusting even the clouds. The insectoids, baring their teeth and claws, rush to their deaths and then fall limply. Meanwhile, you hide in a corner of the ruins, using colors to camouflage your body.

Survival is a great deception. You forsake your primal form, coating your exoskeleton with ashes and mud and making your six legs gleam like bricks and tiles. The faces of prey on your fangs weep, and cries for help resonate amid the scent of blood.

Your enemies melt in the pits, and your offspring are born with their bellies full. Yet, you are still not satisfied because the war has yet to end. You aim to diminish your size, even remove your exoskeleton. You need to morph into a weak appearance and imitate your enemies' mouths until they embrace you as a "friend," until the bountiful stores of food are open to you...

C:
路过的朋友，你相信吗？
就在方才，我亲眼目睹了千百年来的死灭。
歌颂着挽歌的旅者们从衣服上摘下一颗星星，
在土中种下一块岁月，就像一颗种子。
我看见斯缇科西亚的遗迹被冥河亲吻，
我看见吕奎亚在火海里焚尽，
大火点燃了目之所及的一切。
它们曾经发生，被旅者们收集，
又在我们的眼前重现。
我问他们，为何要来到这里？
旅者们带来宣告，他们来采撷破灭的旧忆，
这座城邦早已覆灭，
至于我们，不过是欧洛尼斯奇迹下的魂灵，
为离别留下的最后一曲哀歌。
E:
Would you believe it, passing friends?
Just now, I witnessed the demise of millennia.
Travelers singing dirges plucked a star from their clothes
And planted a fragment of time in the soil as if sowing a seed.
I saw the ruins of Styxia, kissed by the River of Souls.
I saw Loukas consumed in a sea of flames.
The fire devoured everything in its path.
These events, once real and long past, were recorded by the travelers
And brought back before our eyes.
I asked them why they came?
The travelers revealed that they were plucking broken memories.
This city has long been annihilated.
As for us, we are merely souls under Oronyx's Miracle,
The final elegy of farewell.

C:
新的一天开始了。

这不过是这艘巨舰上极为普通的一天，集市刚刚出摊，叶尖的露水还未干涸。但横穿过街口的少年从未亲眼见过这番景象。甚至在察觉到这个城市的角角落落与书中的描述有何不同之前，他还在体味脖颈间阳光的暖意。

他第一次看清自己的身躯，这副身躯属于自己，属于当下这个名字。

少年到了港口，押送他的士兵替他解开最后一副枷铐。他往前走去，没有回头。隐约地，他感到城市之中有几双眼睛注视着他，满怀恨意。

直到飞船起飞时，他才转过头看了这儿最后一眼。如书中描述，这确实是一艘雄伟瑰丽的巨舰。

他只看了一眼而已，随后便将头转向另一侧，那儿群星显晦，未来不知何处。

但他仍旧静静地看着，不发一言。
E:
A new dawn begins.

It's just another extremely average day aboard this giant ship. The markets have just opened and the morning dew is still fresh, but the young man crossing the street has never seen such a sight. Before he manages to notice all the differences between the actual city and its descriptions in books, he is immersed in savoring the warmth of the sun on the back of his neck.

It is his first time seeing his own body clearly. This body belongs to him. It belongs to this current name.

When he arrives at the port, the escorting soldier removes the last of his shackles. He walks forward without looking back. He can feel, ever so faintly, several pairs of eyes gazing at him from within the city. Eyes filled with hatred.

It isn't until the spaceship takes off that he turns his head and takes one final look at this place. It really is a magnificent and grand spaceship — just like the books say.

He only glances at it once, then turns his head away to where the stars shimmer dimly and an uncertain future lies.

He looks out in silence.

C: 「…因案件侦办需要，现将犯罪嫌疑人基本情况公布如下：嫌疑人卡芙卡（通缉编号：L933012000020002010004），女，化外人士，年龄不详；身高约170厘米，中等体型，目击时外披黑色外套，内穿白色衬衫，下身穿黑色紧身裤，紫色长袜，头顶有墨镜配饰。\n该嫌疑人被举报为罗浮近期多起非自然灾害的关联者，目前在逃，现向罗浮全境公开通缉。请发现该犯罪嫌疑人的单位及个人积极与当地云骑军联系。同时督促犯罪嫌疑人不可心存侥幸，应尽快投案自首，交代重要信息。」\n——罗浮所颁之通缉令（已撤销）
E: "...Due to the investigation's needs, the suspect's basic information is published as follows: Suspect Kafka (Wanted Serial No.: L933012000020002010004), female, outworld individual, age unknown; height about 170 centimeters, average body size. She had been spotted draped with a black jacket and wearing a white collared shirt inside, a pair of tight-fitting dark shorts, purple pantyhose, and a pair of sunglasses on her head.\nThe suspect has been reported to be connected to multiple non-natural disasters occurring on the Luofu in the recent past. She is currently at large, and is now publicly wanted on the Luofu. Any department and unit who detected said suspect are encouraged to contact the local Cloud Knights. At the same time, we encourage the suspect to turn herself in and to not take any chances."\n— Luofu Wanted Order (revoked)

C: 女孩坐在母亲膝上，她有些冰凉的臂弯绕过自己的脖颈，给女孩带去无以言表的安全感。母亲的嗓音温婉、深邃，她在给女孩讲述一个历史久远的民间故事——那个故事的结尾不算圆满，但女孩却很钟意。母亲早已摸清她的喜好，那些以团圆收尾的童话会让女孩感到无趣，免去很多不必要的疑问，是诱她在晚上早早入眠的绝佳方法。 「母亲大人…为什么格勒勋爵不能像凯瑟琳那样，过上快乐的生活？」 「你希望他快乐吗，布洛妮娅？」 「格勒勋爵是个善良的人。善良的人都该过上快乐的生活。」 那段对话没有继续，但她记得母亲露出了温柔的笑容。多年以后，回想起那个克里珀堡温暖的午后，她觉得母亲当时的笑容也许藏匿了一丝遗憾。
E: Sitting on her mother's lap, cold arms wrapped around her neck, she felt an indescribable sense of security. Her mother's voice was gentle and deep as she told the girl an ancient folk tale — the ending of which is hardly satisfying, but nevertheless, the girl enjoyed it very much. Her mother knew what she liked, and those fairy tales with happy endings would just leave her feeling bored and arise far too many questions. Telling stories with bad endings is an excellent way to lure the girl into falling asleep at night. "Mother... Why can't Lord Grey live a happy life like Catherine?" "Do you want him to be happy, Bronya?" "Lord Grey is a kind man. Kind people deserve to live a happy life." The conversation stopped there, but she remembered her mother's gentle smile. Years later, when she recalled that warm afternoon at Qlipoth Fort, she felt that her mother's smile might have hidden a sliver of regret.

C: 做事严谨的医生，总带着难以捉摸的微笑。\n在医疗资源匮乏的下层区，娜塔莎作为为数不多的医生照料着地下的男女老幼。\n即使是最调皮的虎克，见了她也要乖乖喊一声「娜塔莎姐姐」。
E: A fastidious doctor who always wears an enigmatic smile.\nIn the Underworld where medical resources are scarce, Natasha is one of the very few doctors whom the people can turn to.\nEven the rambunctious Hook would politely greet her... "Hi, big sis Natasha."

C: 然而，若想更进一步升任司舵，停云那温良的性格便要从助力变作绊脚石了——毕竟天舶司历任执掌者均是王牌飞行士，又个个是刀山火海里蹚过的战士——停云既无驾驶星槎的天分，也不善杀伤，与天舶司现任司舵驭空可谓是云泥之别。 更何况驭空已打算将未来托付于她，她却不清楚自己是否真有资格。 驭空于她而言不仅仅是值得信赖的上级、又或是行商遇险时出手搭救的救命恩人；在她心中，驭空已俨然成为光芒四射的偶像。她视之为精神寄托，视之为指引前路的道标；她想攥住星光，又发现自己只能在阴影中拼命追赶。直到那孤星同她说： 「时代在变。仙舟在变。总有一天，这艘巨舰会彻底厌倦血与火的天空。到那时候，这天舶司就是属于你的舞台了。」 她不知这番话中有几分玩笑，但她还是认真地把这些文字装入信封，锁在本家商铺的抽屉深处。她想自己一定不能忘记。 「即便不能驱舟上阵，也有我一展所长的机会。」狐人少女对自己说道。罗浮停泊缓航，正自与孽物的征战中休养生息，商业繁荣成了时代的底色。 少女明白驭空的期许，遂奔向星空，寻求更多的盟助与交谊。 「论当今罗浮舵术之首为谁，人们常以驭空大人为冠绝。可若要问我的意见嘛……」 「小女子这番鼓唇弄舌的功夫，又何尝不是一种『使舵』的本领呢？」
E: However, if she ever hopes to be promoted to Helm Master, Tingyun's gentle personality will shift from being a strength to a stumbling block — after all, the Sky-Faring Commission has always been run by ace pilots, all of them warriors baptized by the flames of war. Meanwhile, Tingyun doesn't have the knack for driving a starskiff, let alone a skill for killing. That's the main difference between her and the current Helm Master of the Sky-Faring Commission, Yukong. What's more, Yukong has already planned on handing over the future to Tingyun, but Tingyun doesn't know if she's truly qualified to take it on. To her, Yukong is not merely a trustworthy superior or even a savior during a crisis. In her heart, Yukong is also a kind of glorious idol. She views Yukong as someone to entrust her spirits in, as a beacon to guide her. She wants to hold onto that starlight, but has discovered that she can only chase in desperation from the shadows. Until one day, that lone star said to her: "Times are changing. Xianzhou is changing. One day, this giant ship will grow utterly exhausted of a sky full of blood and war. When that time comes, the Sky-Faring Commission will be your stage." She didn't know how much of what was said was a joke, but she carefully sealed these words into the envelope and locked it in the back of the drawer at her store. She resolved to never forget. "Even if I can't go into battle, there's still a chance for me to show my strength." Says the foxian girl to herself. The Luofu is currently moored in orbit, undergoing re-invigoration after a campaign against the abominations. Flourishing commerce becomes the backdrop to this era. Understanding Yukong's expectations of her, Tingyun flies beyond the skies, seeking more alliances and friendships. "When it comes to who is the best helm master on the Luofu, people will naturally say Madam Yukong's the champion. But if you ask me..." "My skillful oratory must count for some kind of helm mastery, right?"

C: 「你知道吗？能进天舶司的，只有三种人。  能说会道的人；追求刺激的人；渴望回归星空的人——就是这三种，再无其他。」  我们与形寿无尽的仙舟人不同。虽然狐人也被称作「长生种」，但寿元也不过三百余载。所以，我们中的许多人更加乐于尽情享受生活乐趣——全心全灵，只为追求生活的极致。  我？现年二百四十六岁，半截身子入土，早就过了享乐的年纪。你或许知道我年轻时也性格泼辣，手段风雷；在老一辈仙舟人口中，你还可能听说过我连闯六个红灯的战绩。  那会儿我才刚成年，就被人提溜到将军面前…结果你猜怎么着？他竟然让我加入天舶司——只因为我星槎开得实在漂亮，想来定能在这天舶司大有作为。  那时候，他管我叫「不良少女」。后来，他们叫我「王牌」。
E: "You know, only three kinds of people can work for the Sky-Faring Commission. Those who have the gift of gab, those who seek excitement, and those who crave to return to the stars — no exceptions." We are different from the Xianzhou natives with their unending lives. Even though foxians are also considered a long-life species, our lives span only three centuries. Therefore, many of us are more passionate about enjoying the fun in life — chasing the best moments in life with all our heart and soul. Me? I am currently 246 years old. I am one step into my grave and have long gone past my days of merriment. You might know of my decisive and dashing ways when I was younger. In the tales of older Xianzhou natives, you might even hear of my achievement — such as running six consecutive red lights. I had just become an adult back then, and I was dragged in front of the general for the infringement... Guess what happened? The general wanted me to join the Sky-Faring Commission purely because of my piloting prowess, and he thought I was going to make it big in the Sky-Faring Commission. Back then, he used to call me the "Delinquent Girl." Later on, they all called me "Ace."

C:
仙舟「罗浮」的十王司判官之一，负责拘、锁、刑、问的四判官中的「问」。
专司读取犯人的因果罪愆，而后以「冥谶天笔」书写业报判罚。
由于整日使用梦占形式工作，承受着巨量魔阴身因果信息的冲刷，早已对世间万事感到索然无味。
只有与同为判官的姐姐雪衣行动时，才会流露片刻的真心。
E:
One of the judges of the Ten-Lords Commission on the Luofu. She is in charge of "interrogation" among the four judges of detention, interrogation, incarceration, and punishment.
She is in charge of discerning the sins of criminals and using her Oracle Brush to write down karmic punishments to be meted out.
Since her daily work relies heavily on oneiromancy, she has been constantly struck by a tremendous influx of mara-tainted karmic information and grown detached from worldly matters.
Only when in the presence of her sister, Xueyi, does she reveal a glimpse of her tender nature.

C: 仙舟「曜青」的天击将军，帝弓七天将之一，为人不拘一格，率直潇洒。\n精通百般武艺，炼化躯体至极致，享有「大捷将军」美名，深受仙舟军民爱戴。\n但身负「月狂」之症，如要在时限内猎尽孽物——飞霄唯一的敌手，便是自己。
E: The Xianzhou Yaoqing's Merlin's Claw and one of the Seven Arbiter-Generals. Unconventional and straightforward, she exudes effortless charm.\nShe is skilled in all forms of martial arts and has honed herself into a supreme weapon. She is widely adored by Xianzhou soldiers and civilians alike as "The Vanquishing General."\nHowever, she bears the burden of the Moon Rage affliction. If she were to hunt down all the abominations in her limited lifetime — then the only enemy Feixiao has would be herself.

C: 「流光忆庭」的忆者，神秘优雅的占卜师。\n常挂着温柔的微笑，耐心聆听他人的言语，并借此走入「记忆」，掌握全盘信息。\n热衷于收集独一无二的记忆，背后的想法却难以看透。
E: A Memokeeper of the Garden of Recollection. A mysterious and elegant soothsayer.\nShe often wears a warm smile and is willing to patiently listen to the words of others, thus using such means as a pretext to enter "memories" and gain omniscience over certain matters.\nA lady passionate about collecting unique memories, yet the thoughts that guide her are hard to glean.

C: 普通模式「天纵之剑的残影」
E: Normal Mode Heavenly Blade's Afterimage

C: 知更鸟：鸟，孤儿和愚人
E: Robin: Birds, Orphans and Fools

C: 抵达监控室的二人面对的却是不在此处的空间站主人随手留下的迷阵。\n「用奇物来隐藏奇物，的确是那女人会干的事情。」\n但很多时候即便猜到了手法，你也猜不到故事的结局。
E: The two arrive at the Monitoring Room to find a maze left by the absent space station's owner.\n"Using a Curio to hide another Curio sounds like something she would do."\nBut oftentimes, knowing the way does not equate to knowing how it ends.

C: 身为大守护者之女，布洛妮娅总是剖决如流、一马当先——当然，她在这次针对你的追捕行动中也不例外。\n好在你的「好哥们」桑博及时现身解围，只是…如果他没用成分不明的烟雾弹将你迷晕就更好了。\n你在阵阵晕眩中发觉自己没被五花大绑，而是被安置在某处的床板上——这多少能说明你暂无性命之虞。至于具体情况嘛，则要你向面前这位陌生女性讨教了。
E: As the daughter of the Supreme Guardian, Bronya has always been quick and decisive — this pursuit operation targeted at you was no exception.\nGood thing your "good pal" Sampo arrived just in time to rescue you. It's just that... it would've been better if he didn't knock you out with the smoke bomb made from questionable ingredients.\nIn your daze, you realize that you aren't tied up but placed on a bed somewhere — to a degree, this tells you that you're not in immediate danger. You'll have to ask the unfamiliar woman in front of you for more details.

C: 来到矿区，你们才发现此处早已乱成一锅粥了：矿区内部的矿民和流浪者之间似乎爆发了激烈冲突。\n设法逃离现场的矿民惊恐万状，而未能离开的矿民生死未卜，他们的家属将矿区入口堵得水泄不通…\n你观察到那位叫奥列格的大人物似乎不在此处。看来要想见到他，你们首先得协助「地火」平息骚乱才行。
E: After arriving at the mines, you realize that things have been turned upside-down here: The miners of this mine have gotten into a violent confrontation with the vagrants.\nThe miners that succeeded in fleeing the scene were petrified and the ones that didn't might be in dire straits. The miners' families are all crowded around the mine entrance...\nYou notice that Chief Oleg probably isn't here. It seems like you'll have to assist Wildfire in settling the unrest before being able to meet him.

C: 「列车组的各位就是新的『变量』，我们的存在将颠覆史瓦罗的计算结果。」你以这条有力论据彻底说服了克拉拉，取得了她的信任，也唤起了她的勇气和捍卫世界的决心。\n因此，克拉拉向各位承诺，她会将你们带到史瓦罗面前。\n跟随克拉拉回到机械聚落，打开通向史瓦罗基地的大门吧。
E: "The members of the crew are the new variants. Our existence will topple Svarog's calculations." And with that, you've completely convinced Clara and earned her trust, as well as awakened her courage and conviction to protect the world.\nAnd so Clara makes the promise to bring you to Svarog.\nFollow Clara back to the Robot Settlement and open the gate that leads to Svarog's base.

C: 你们发现克拉拉坐在损坏的供能装置面前，正为如何修理它犯难。\n作为克拉拉的家人，此时就应该义无反顾地伸出援手，然后以此相要挟…不对，是创造机会顺势说服克拉拉。\n好巧不巧，你发现这供能装置的构造竟与此前维修过的各种器械类似——是时候展现真正的技术了！
E: You find Clara sitting in front of a damaged energy supply device troubled with its repairs.\nAs a member of Clara's family, this is the time to give her a helping hand and use it as leverage... No, to use it as a chance for an opportunity to convince Clara.\nCoincidentally, you find the energy supply device to have a similar structure to the various machines you've fixed before — it's time to display your true abilities!

C: 在沉闷的机械结构鸣响中，旋转栈桥来到了它应至的位置。对抗裂界的最前线与你们仅一桥之隔。\n在桥的那边只有渺无边际的异界——无数赴死的战士在这条残酷的战线上浴血搏杀，直到彻底失去对身体的控制为止。\n现在，他们中最勇猛的战士已将枪头调转，恭候你们前来应战。
E: In the midst of the deep shifting sounds of the mechanical structure, the rotating Gear Bridge is now positioned in its designated position. The frontlines of fighting against the Fragmentum are but a bridge away.\nOn the other side of the bridge lies nothing but a boundless Fragmentum — countless warriors have fought in this brutal place until they've lost complete control over their bodies.\nAnd now, the bravest warriors of them all have turned and changed sides. They are welcoming your challenge.

C: 一切准备停当，你们即将出发前往「迴星港」——罗浮仙舟的造船重地。在那里，星核猎手邀请你们抵达仙舟的秘密即将揭晓。
E: All is ready for you to set out for Stargazer Navalia — a core hub for shipbuilding on the Xianzhou Luofu. There, the secret behind the Stellaron Hunter's invitation for you to come aboard the Xianzhou will be revealed.

C: 在黄泉与星核猎手陷入激战时，黑天鹅却将你掳走，带到了砂金面前。砂金向你表达了他的诉求，但依旧无法打消你的震惊和遭到（某种程度上的）背叛的愤怒。\n也许你应该问问这位忆者，她究竟在想什么。
E: As Acheron wages a ferocious battle against the Stellaron Hunter, Black Swan abducts you and takes you before Aventurine. Aventurine expresses his request to you, but you still cannot shake off your shock and the (to an extent) rage at being betrayed.\nPerhaps you should ask the Memokeeper just what she is planning.

C: 加拉赫示意各位择地继续讨论。他将你们带到了「惊梦酒吧」，浮华美梦中一处毫不起眼的清冷角落。考虑到案情复杂，他决定浅露一手，调制特饮款待各位，以免交涉过程过于冗长——要是接下来的二十分钟你都将在听故事中度过，没有任何操作，那就没意思了。\n你可以在惊梦酒吧各处寻找调饮用的原材料，加拉赫会用神秘的魔法将它们完美调和。
E: Gallagher gestures for everyone to adjourn the discussion to somewhere else. He brings you to the Dreamjolt Hostelry — A quiet and ordinary corner in this frolicking dream. Considering the complexity of the cases, he decides to showcase his skills by preparing special drinks to keep everyone entertained. Otherwise, the negotiation process would be too boring. It will be dull if you have to spend the next <unbreak>20</unbreak> minutes listening to stories with no gameplay!\nYou can explore the Dreamjolt Hostelry for ingredients. Gallagher will then use magic to make perfect concoctions out of them.

C: 登上舞台\n不要害怕\n不要回头
E: Get onstage\nFear not\nNever look back

C: 瓦尔特指出兹事体大，必须时刻做好最坏的打算。而为了避免那种结局最终出现，他向众人郑重告别，随后以身入局，与天环族兄妹一道前去与「梦主」展开交涉，留下你们继续寻找其他可行的解决办法。为此，加拉赫也终于愿意将全部真相和盘托出——出于对家族天然的不信任，此前他并未完全交代有关「钟表匠」的一切。\n据加拉赫所说，那位「钟表匠」似乎为星穹列车留下了一份宝贵的遗产…而这份遗产或许就是封印星核的关键。
E: Welt points out the severity of the situation and how one must always be prepared for the worst-case scenario. In an effort to avert the unthinkable, he bids a solemn farewell to everyone before throwing himself into the fray by accompanying the Halovian siblings on their journey to open negotiations with the Dreammaster. This leaves you to continue searching for other ways to avert the situation. To this end, Gallagher finally becomes willing to reveal the whole truth... Due to his innate distrust of The Family, he had not previously exposed everything regarding the "Watchmaker."\nGallagher explains that the "Watchmaker" seems to have left behind a precious inheritance for the Astral Express... And that this inheritance could perhaps be the key to sealing the Stellaron.

C: 第一次选择！你和流萤来到了「戏梦奇战•演技派挑战」的舞台。根据引导员的说法，你们将在这里接受「演技」的考验……\n演技是什么？你完全不理解这个词的意思。对你而言，真诚永远是最强的必杀技。
E: The first choice! You and Firefly arrive at the Dreamplay Fantasia: Acting Challenge arena. According to the guide's instructions, your "acting" skills will be tested here...\nWhat are acting skills exactly? You have no idea. For you, sincerity has always been the ultimate instrument.

C: 星期日向你们发出邀请，在匹诺康尼大剧院的舞台上一较高下。\n你们该如何选择？事关重大，不妨和同伴们交流一下。
E: Sunday invites you to decide the victor on the Penacony Grand Theater's stage.\nHow will you decide? Since this is a major decision, it would be good to talk to your companions first.

C: 终于，匹诺康尼的「开拓」之旅还是迎来了美好的结局。是时候迎接新的冒险了——但在那之前，列车组还想和一些人做个正式的道别。\n为逝者的故事画上圆满的句号，就是最好的告慰。去吧，他们都在流梦礁…就在这里。
E: Finally, the trailblazing expedition on Penacony has come to a preferable conclusion. It's time for a new adventure — but before that, the Crew would like to wish say a formal farewell to certain people.\nDrawing a firm line under the stories of those who passed is the best form of comfort. Go on, then — they're all at the Dreamflux Reef... right here.

C: 星穹列车收到了来自「折纸大学」的邀请，你们马上就要成为宇宙中稀有的大学生了——虽然没有学历证明，但在简历上也算一段令人自豪的教育经历。\n在学院的生活会发生什么有趣的事情呢？跟列车组的朋友们聊聊吧。
E: The Astral Express has received an invitation from Paperfold University, and you are about to become something very rare in this universe: college students. It'll be an educational accolade to confidently boast on your resume, despite the lack of formal credentials.\nWhat kind of fun things will happen during your life on campus? Chat about it with your friends in the Crew.

C: 自称芮克先生的考官让测弦考试变成了他的「试镜会」，这名头听上去比之前更令普通人紧张，毕竟面试的压力永远是最大的。但你应该不会因此退却吧，盛会巨星？\n这位导演看起来挺奇怪的，但据说如今宇宙院线<unbreak>80</unbreak>％的影片都由人工智能生产，不是有怪癖的天才可能也干不了这行。
E: The examiner, known as Mr. Reca, has transformed the Tuning Test into his audition session. This may heighten anxiety for many, given the inherent stress associated with interviews. But such a scenario won't deter you, our Festive Superstar, right?\nThe director may appear a bit eccentric, but in a universe where <unbreak>80%</unbreak> of movies are AI-generated, maybe only geniuses with eccentricities can manage to stay in the industry.

C: 猴子居然敢在你的脑袋里瞎搞，你要让它们记住，这比在黑洞里找香蕉还接近自寻死路。\n上膛的枪，第一发子弹可以不打老大，但至少要等看到老大后再扣扳机。
E: Those fudgin' monkeys dare mess with your brain. Time to show them that messing with you is like heading for their doom, even more than hunting for bananas in a black hole.\nYour pistols are locked and loaded. The first shot doesn't have to nail their boss, but you might want to hold off until the big banana shows before you squeeze that trigger.

C: 成为忍者的女孩，用你的忍符来让忍之都的色彩复苏吧！至于忍符的内容…没什么比你的名字更合适了——一心不乱，破邪显正！\nAK-A-3，你真的以为自己拥有了虚假的名字，拥有了虚假的梦想，就是有价值的「人」了吗？
E: Girl, you who have become a ninja — restore color to the Ninja Capital with your ninja talisman! And what better content for the talisman than your own name — eradicating evil and upholding justice!\nAK-A-3, do you truly believe that bearing a false name and harboring false dreams makes you a valuable "person"?

C: 遐蝶发觉尼卡多利的不死身源于它对「死亡」的背叛。为揭露深埋于岁月中的谜团，我们需要前往重渊借助欧洛尼斯的力量复现往日。
E: Castorice realizes that Nikador's immortality is rooted in a betrayal of Death itself. To unravel the mystery hidden in the past, we must journey to the Abyss and borrow the power of Oronyx to replicate the past.

C: 与此同时，奥赫玛城中，阿格莱雅也开始着手处理尼卡多利渗透一事。但奥赫玛的政局似乎并没有我们所预想的那么稳定。
E: Meanwhile, in the city of Okhema, Aglaea has begun addressing Nikador's infiltration. However, the political situation in Okhema appears far less stable than we had anticipated.

C: 与此同时，奥赫玛城中，阿格莱雅也开始着手处理尼卡多利渗透一事。但奥赫玛的政局似乎并没有我们所预想的那么稳定。
E: Meanwhile, in the city of Okhema, Aglaea has begun addressing Nikador's infiltration. However, the political situation in Okhema appears far less stable than we had anticipated.

C: 觐见的过程看似顺利，但是…黑塔听到的天外之声，似乎有些不对劲？
E: The audience appears to be proceeding smoothly, but... the voice from beyond the sky that Herta hears doesn't seem quite right.

C: 与盗火行者的最终战场就在悬锋城。面对未知的强敌，众黄金裔必须全力以赴。
E: The final battle with the Flame Reaver takes place in Castrum Kremnos. Against this mysterious mighty foe, the Chrysos Heirs must fight with everything they have.

C: 次日午时，扎格列斯的半神将成为冥河之行的向导。今日今时，应为远行留存体力。\n躺下休息，等待次日到来。
E: At noon of the next day, Zagreus's demigod will become a guide to traverse the River of Souls. Today, stamina should be conserved for the long trip ahead.\nLay down and rest in preparation for tomorrow's arrival.

C: 斯缇科西亚，巨龙与海浪的城邦。如今，那冥河却把这凄惨的城池团团围拢。\n杀出冥界的战士万敌，他那灵魂的幻影也出现在冥河滩涂之上。
E: Styxia, the City-State of Dragons and Waves... At present, the River of Souls has encircled this pitiful city.\nIllusions of Mydei's soul seem to have appeared on the banks of the River of Souls as he slaughters his way out of the nether realm.

C: 你记得「长老」阿蒙内特，也记得这座信仰塞纳托斯的城邦哀地里亚，这是你回忆开始的地方。\n你当然也记得，你是如何成为一名行刑者，一名督战圣女的。
E: You remember "Elder" Amunet as well as Aidonia, this city-state that worshiped Thanatos. This is where your memory begins.\nOf course, you also remember how you became an executioner and a Maiden of War.

C: 在遐蝶权能的掩护下，万敌帮我们拖住了盗火行者的脚步，让我们得以从云崖脱身，抵达云石天宫附近。这里也同样是一片狼藉，好在奥赫玛的居民受到风堇的庇护，其时已无大碍。\n距离创世涡心只有一步之遥，得加快脚步了。
E: Shielded by Castorice's power, Mydei buys us time against the Flame Reaver, enabling our escape from Dawncloud to Marmoreal Palace. Though this place too lies in ruins, we're relieved to find Okhema's residents unharmed under Hyacine's protection.\nThe Vortex of Genesis awaits just a short distance away — we must hasten our steps.

C: 盗火行者突然陷入凝滞，似乎是发生了某种变故。思索间，我却再次见到了{NICKNAME}的身影…
E: The Flame Reaver suddenly froze, as if something unforeseen had transpired. As I pondered what might have happened, I spotted {NICKNAME}'s figure once more...

C: 人们说，这是一个金血晕染鲜血的残酷时代，这是一个海啸山崩下衰颓的灾难时代，这是一个昏君践踏律法的暴虐时代，这是一个神与信徒都被屠戮的黑暗时代。这就是第一次逐火之旅的时代，这个时代有一颗灼热的太阳，燃烧着令人目盲的光。\n而你要直视它，请它把你要的火点亮。
E: People say this is a cruel era stained with golden blood and crimson, an era of catastrophe where tsunamis rage and mountains crumble, an era of tyranny where corrupt rulers trample the law, a dark era where both gods and their faithful are slaughtered. This is the era of the First Flame-Chase Journey, an era with a scorching sun that burns with blinding light.\nAnd you must gaze directly into it, asking it to illuminate the fire you seek.

C: 在这里你将听不见人声，看不见人影；太阳的闪烁的火焰会把你烤焦，使你的皮肤失掉颜色；直到满天星斗的夜遮住了阳光，或太阳出来化去了晨霜，你才松快。这眼前的苦难将永远折磨你；没有人救得了你。\n——但你已经把火留下了，那是解放他们的火。而解放你的火，早就在过去点亮了。
E: Here, you'll hear no human voices, see no human shadows. The sun's flickering flames will scorch you, draining the color from your skin. Only when the starlit night shields you from sunlight, or when the Sun rises to melt away the morning frost, will you find relief. These present hardships will torture you forever, and no one can save you.\nBut you have left behind the fire... the fire that will liberate them. And the fire meant to free you was illuminated long ago.

C:
那天，满载荣耀与五百位英雄的大船自斯缇科西亚启航，撞入了迷雾下的巨浪怀抱。数日之后，海面平歇，千年再无风浪。
无人知晓迷雾与浪中的故事。或许，只有海知道——
一颗灼热的野心，点燃满船的柴薪。余虚无的灰，落入海底。
去吧，感受那冰冷的火，滚烫的泪。
E:
That day, a grand ship, laden with glory and five hundred heroes, set sail from Styxia and plunged into the embrace of towering waves shrouded in mist. Days later, the ocean fell silent, and for a thousand years, no wave rose again.
No one knows the story hidden in mist and waves. Perhaps, only the ocean remembers —
A single burning ambition ignited all the timbers laden on that ship. Ashes of emptiness drifted slowly to the ocean floor.
Go now, and feel that chilling flame, and those burning tears.

C: 《如我所书》与这座大墓密切相关，看似「讲故事」的行为，实则是「信息传送」的修饰…这里曾经发生的一切，如今化作往昔的涟漪，仍在回响。\n收集泰坦符文，完成密钥封装。
E: As I've Written is closely connected to this tomb. What seems like "storytelling" is, in truth, a veil for information transmission... Everything that once happened here still lingers, echoing as ripples of past reverie.\nCollect the Titan runes to complete the encryption key encapsulation.

C: 《如我所书》与这座大墓密切相关，看似「讲故事」的行为，实则是「信息传送」的修饰…这里曾经发生的一切，如今化作往昔的涟漪，仍在回响。\n收集泰坦符文，完成密钥封装。
E: As I've Written is closely connected to this tomb. What seems like "storytelling" is, in truth, a veil for information transmission... Everything that once happened here still lingers, echoing as ripples of past reverie.\nCollect the Titan runes to complete the encryption key encapsulation.

C: 铁墓的恨意吞没寰宇，它的加冕即将完成，星系内一切存在都已遭其格式化。在宇宙迎来毁灭的前一瞬，我却在静谧的虚空中醒来……
E: Irontomb's hatred devours the cosmos. Its coronation is nearly complete. All existence within the galaxy has already been formatted by it. However, in the final split second before the universe's destruction, I wake up in a silent void...

C: 站内向来通过一架电波中继器收发银河讯号，它坐落于怪物驻守的失地，临近名为嘘实埋间的标志性舱室。如今通讯中断，第一要务自然是保证中继器不掉链子。
E: The station has been sending and receiving cosmic signals through an airwave repeater located in the lost territory guarded by monsters. It's been recently known as the signature cabin of the Disposal Site. With communications cut off, the most important task is naturally to ensure that the repeater is functional.

C: 为了忘却的纪念——阿兰请你帮忙拍下呜呜伯们围在纪念碑旁的照片。
E: A commemoration held in order to forget — Arlan asks you to help snap a photo of Wubbaboos surrounding the monument.

C: 银狼的入侵路线最终指向了黑塔的办公室。思考再三，你和伦纳德决定将这个坏消息告知她本人。
E: Silver Wolf's path of infiltration eventually leads to Herta's office. After giving it some thoughts, Leonard and you decide to tell this bad news to Herta herself.

C: 没想到螺丝咕姆此行前来是为了终止「模拟宇宙」项目。好在这位机械绅士是个开明的人，在关停系统前，他愿意为你们的调查提供最大限度的帮助。
E: Screwllum's visit was to terminate the Simulated Universe project, how surprising! Thankfully, the robot gentleman is an open-minded individual, and he is more than happy to provide you with whatever help you need in your investigation before shutting down the system for good.

C: 你收到了帕姆的短信，原来宇宙中存在着这么多洗车星！等准备好了就出发吧！
E: Pom-Pom messages you: Turns out there are a whole heap of Washtopias across the universe! Once you're ready, let's go!

C: 真理医生似乎已经从蛛丝马迹中找到了答案，且看他到底发现了什么
E: Dr. Ratio seems to already have discovered the answer from what little evidence you have. Let's see what exactly he had discovered.

C: 一落地就在行政区遇到了华劳斯，没想到华劳斯在贝洛伯格竟有一段奇缘……
E: You encounter Wallace in the Administrative District as soon as you touch down. Who would have thought that Wallace would have found themselves amid a Belobog romance...

C: 桑博想请你帮他找到两件丢失的矿具，其中一件似乎就丢在了大矿区之内，这对你来说不过举手之劳。
E: Sampo wants you to help him find two lost mining tools. One of them is lost in the Great Mine. This should be easy.

C: 即便知道自己可能拍不到地髓探针，虎克大人还是决定把探针还给拍卖会。走吧，她的决心已定。\n熊孩子总是随口就说一些无足轻重的谎言，但在这种时候，她的心还是像金子一样。
E: Although Hook knows she might not get the Geomarrow Probe, she decides to return it to the auction. You know that she has made up her mind.\nThis child may have told a few white lies over trivial matters, but she has a heart of gold.

C: 技术部职员茉莉正在对着同事大动肝火——热心的你上前询问，这才知道现正有一批危险的次品机器人横行禁区，极有可能对人造成伤害。\n你回收了全部的「核心模组」，把它们交给茉莉处置吧。
E: Molly from the Technology Division is angry with her colleagues. You learn from her that a group of dangerous malfunctioning robots is wandering around in the restricted zone, which are prone to harming people.\nYou have retrieved all the "Core Modules." Bring them back to Molly.

C: 根据铁卫的指示，击败盘踞在矿镇的裂界生物
E: Under the Silvermane Guard's command, defeat the Fragmentum creatures occupying the mining town

C: 佩拉对你经营博物馆达成的成果表示了满意。\n接下来她想要开放的是历史展区，但这个展区有一件关键的展品失窃了——去看看情况如何吧。
E: Pela was satisfied with the results you achieved while operating the museum.\nShe wants to open up the History Exhibit next, but a key exhibit in this area was stolen. Go and see what the situation is.

C: 地衡司的录事将你所举报的内容同步给了十王司，现在十王司派出了判官前往浥尘客栈缉拿陶德，你试图从这位美丽的判官嘴里打探到陶德的下落。
E: The Realm-Keeping Commission clerk relayed the information you reported to the Ten-Lords Commission. Now the Ten-Lords Commission has sent a judge to Petrichor Inn to arrest Todd. You try to find out about Todd's whereabouts from this beautiful judge.

C: 你接受了檀檀的「仙舟测速员」体验活动，尽管仙舟科技发达，但是还得借助这样的体验活动，帮助居民树立安全意识。檀檀希望你再测试一次。
E: You join Tantan's Xianzhou Speed Tester trial program. Despite Xianzhou's cutting-edge technology, this kind of activity is still needed to foster safety awareness. Tantan hopes you can test it again.

C: 三座阵基已经启动，剩下就只需要雪衣大人接引莱恩老师「还阳」了。走吧，回到阵心。\n铖杰师傅去准备凭依用的金人了，不会就是那台会打人的金人吧？
E: The three base terminals have been activated, what was left to do is for Madam Xueyi to guide Master Ryan back to the living world. Let's go, to the Matrix core.\nChengjie is prepared for the aurumaton to be inhabited. It can't be the one that attacks people, can it?

C: 没见着鬼，你们却见到了比鬼更恐怖的…十王司判官！虽然理智告诉你，这三位判官都是生人活物，但她们一个赛一个可怕：那骨瘦如柴的小女孩有妖灵寄体，人高马大的女人白发披面、声线幽幽，而唯一你曾见过的雪衣则是个机关偃偶——这样一衬之下，鬼也不那么可怕了。\n为了将你和桂乃芬劝返，判官们苦口婆心做起了科普：仙舟上哪儿有什么鬼，不过是些被关押千年的外星寄生生物跑出来了罢了。没事别在这儿瞎转悠，妨碍咱们执行公务。\n好消息，绥园无有鬼怪乱跑。坏消息，绥园有外星寄生物到处乱窜…那不是更恐怖了嘛！
E: You don't see a ghost, but rather something even more horrifying: A Judge of the Ten-Lords Commission! Despite reason telling you these three Judges are all human beings, each one of them seems more terrifying than the next: The emaciated little girl housing a spirit within her, the burly giantess with the white curtain bangs and faint voice, and the only one you've met before, Xueyi, is a mechanical puppet. A ghost is nothing compared to that.\nThe Judges patiently explain it in layman's terms to convince you and Guinaifen to return: There are no ghosts aboard the Xianzhou, just some extraterrestrial parasites that have escaped millennia of imprisonment. Don't wander around here for no reason, as it hinders us from carrying out our official duties.\nGood news — There are no ghosts running around Fyxestroll Garden! Bad news — There's an alien parasite running around Fyxestroll Garden... Isn't that even scarier!

C: 事实是没有人偷走了孤云，是孤云自己偷走了孤云。无论是作为犯人还是受害者，孤云应该向你们解释清楚。
E: The mystery's solved: Nobody stole Guyun. It just made itself "gone with the wind." Culprit or victim, Guyun owes everyone an explanation for what happened.

C: 在丹鼎司新任司鼎的斡旋下，你们顺利打发了来自公司专员的责难，随她一同前往丹鼎司小叙。但这场未期的谈话却再起波折，与彦卿交锋的少女剑客早已等候多时。
E: Under the mediation of the newly appointed Alchemy Commission's Cauldron Master, you all successfully fended off the accusatory blame from the IPC Specialist, after which you had a chat with her at the Alchemy Commission. But more speed bumps threatened this doomsday talk, for the swordswoman had been waiting long for a showdown with Yanqing.

C: 按照飞霄的要求，你们踏入幽囚狱留下证词。而她派出的曜青信使将自罗浮仙舟接走关押在此许久的步离人首领，呼雷。\n深入幽囚狱中，你们渐渐察觉到个中之事的诡谲。
E: In light of Feixiao's request, you stepped into the Shackling Prison and left your statements. The Yaoqing messenger that she dispatched whisked away the long-detained borisin leader, Hoolay, who was being held on the Xianzhou Luofu.\nDeep in The Shackling Prison, the abyssal treachery of the conspiracy gradually dawned upon you.

C: 按照飞霄的要求，你们踏入幽囚狱留下证词。而她派出的曜青信使将自罗浮仙舟接走关押在此许久的步离人首领，呼雷。
E: In light of Feixiao's request, you stepped into the Shackling Prison and left your statements. The Yaoqing messenger that she dispatched whisked away the long-detained borisin leader, Hoolay, who was being held on the Xianzhou Luofu.

C: 另一边，景元、丹恒与灵砂来到正收拾残局的幽囚狱中，试图从步离人的突袭中辨出蛛丝马迹，试图捉住那只隐于幕后搅动风云的黑手。在此过程中，往日旧事种种再度重提……
E: On the other side, Jing Yuan, Dan Heng, and Lingsha arrive at The Shackling Prison, where all are busy picking up the pieces of the breakout. The trio examine the aftermath of the borisin's surprise attack, in search of clues that may help them catch the mastermind stirring up trouble from behind the scenes. Along the way, past events are revisited...

C: 柯柯娜在梦境酒店遗落了一张唱片，你答应了将它取回。
E: Cocona left a record at the hotel in the Dreamscape, and you promised to retrieve it for her.

C: 名为查德威克的老人居然曾经是天才俱乐部的一员——他为何会在筑梦边境滞留？\n听闻查德威克身在匹诺康尼，黑塔十分震惊，并要求你立即前往空间站与她详谈。
E: Surprisingly, the old man named Chadwick was once a member of the Genius Society. Why is he stranded at the Dream's Edge?\nHerta is shocked by the news of his presence in Penacony and requests that you immediately head to the space station to discuss further information.

C: 虚数脉冲起爆后，为了逃离公司的魔掌，查德威克开始了流亡。\n找到螺丝咕姆的拼图，帮助查德威克与他重聚。
E: Following the Imaginary Pulse's detonation, Chadwick went into hiding to evade the IPC's clutches.\nFind Screwllum's puzzle pieces to facilitate their reunion.

C: 青雀发来消息，她在梦境中似乎遭遇了一些…不测。\n你来到了梦境酒店，打算一探究竟，看看青雀到底摊上了什么大事。
E: Qingque has sent you a message, and it seems she has got herself into some... trouble in the Dreamscape.\nYou have arrived at the hotel in the Dreamscape, ready to uncover the trouble Qingque has got herself into this time.

C: 你解决了外邦人的粮食问题，却得知苏克提瑞斯被捕的消息…\n英雄或罪人，他会如何为自己辩驳？世人又将如何评价他的功过？
E: You solved the issue of the outlanders' food supplies, but received news of Soctires' capture.\nHero or sinner? How will he plead his case? And how will the people judge his contributions and shortcomings?

C: 前往磐岩镇，调查奇怪的地方，也许你能找到马克西姆丢失的记忆……
E: Head to Boulder Town to investigate the strange place. Maybe you'll be able to find Maxime's lost memories...

C: 鬼鬼祟祟的尤利安强行征用了你的人力，去「地火」的集会场所看看到底发生了什么吧。
E: The sneaky Julian makes you join him. Go to the "Wildfire" gathering place to see what happened.

C: 吉尔伯特对你的奇遇很感兴趣，还想借鉴一些故事写到自己的信里。\n虽然你觉得这事听上去有些离谱，但能和别人炫耀下自己的履历也不失为一件快乐的事。
E: Gilbert is interested in your adventure and wants to write your stories in his letter.\nThis sounds a little weird to you, but sometimes showing off your experience might be joyful.

C: 吉尔伯特终于把给家人的信写完了。好人做到底，把信交给他在行政区生活的女儿莉拉吧。
E: Gilbert finally finishes his letter to his family. Do him another favor and deliver this letter to his daughter Lila living in the Administrative District.

C: 民间科学家雷金希望你能去帮他打探一下教育部的题库储备。\n答错或答对已经不重要了，你已经帮雷金打探到了他想要的消息——去找他回报情况吧。
E: The Civilian Scientist, Regin, wants you to test the Ministry of Education's question bank reserves.\nIt no longer matters if you got it right or wrong. You have already gotten the information he needs. Find him and tell him your findings.

C: 配音演员塞琳似乎在为什么事感到苦恼。\n找她聊聊，看看你能如何帮到她。
E: Celine, the voice actress, seems to be distressed about something.\nSpeak with her and see if there is anything you can help her with.

C: 不甘落败的棋鬼又准备了新的「寻径指津」谜题，是时候让它输得心服口服了。
E: Unwilling to accept defeat, the Chess Ghost has prepared a new Pathfinder puzzle. It's time to make it acknowledge defeat gracefully.

C: 翁法罗斯的世界残留着一些常理难以解释的遗存，所谓「黄金替罪羊」就是其中之一。一时兴起，你试图破解其中的奥秘，然而它似乎很快就变成了某种闹剧……
E: The world of Amphoreus left behind a number of relics that seem to defy common sense — "The Golden Scapegoat" being one of them. Curious, you attempted to unravel its secret, but it seems this has quickly become a whole separate issue...

C: 「仲裁官」的试炼再度到来。它的内容、形式、好处和损害你已经很清楚了，不是吗？去吧，为了「均衡」……
E: The Arbitrator's trial is here once again. You are already well aware of its content, format, pros, and cons, aren't you? Go then. For the sake of Equilibrium...

C: 「仲裁官」的试炼再度到来。它的内容、形式、好处和损害你已经很清楚了，不是吗？去吧，为了「均衡」……
E: The Arbitrator's trial is here once again. You are already well aware of its content, format, pros, and cons, aren't you? Go then. For the sake of Equilibrium...

C: 黑塔要求你以「开拓」的身份进入天才俱乐部制作的「模拟宇宙」，试着从虚拟星神口中套出星神与命途的奥秘。
E: Herta asks you to enter the Simulated Universe created by the Genius Society while pretending to be the Aeon of Trailblaze, and try to glean the secret of Aeons and Paths from the simulated Aeons.

C: 帕姆似乎有心事，变得很悲伤，找点东西分散一下帕姆的注意力，让帕姆别那么难过吧。
E: Pom-Pom seems to be troubled and depressed. Find something to distract them and brighten up their day.

C: 帕姆对仙舟上的饮料十分感兴趣，你决定回到罗浮，替帕姆买一份地道的罗浮饮料。
E: Pom-Pom is very interested in beverages on the Xianzhou. You decide to return to the Luofu and get an authentic Luofu beverage for Pom-Pom.

C: 利用谛听穿越警戒区，尽可能不要惊扰敌人。
E: Use the Diting to cross the guard zone and try not to alert any enemies.

C: 在风堇的委托下，你答应去拜访那些树庭牺牲者的家属，了解一下他们的近况。\n但或许除此以外，你能做的还有很多。
E: You promised to visit the families of those who lost their lives at the Grove and find out about how they're doing at Hyacine's request.\nAside from this, however, you might be able to do something more...

C: 雷金的手稿怎么会被「异常」的扑满拿走呢？返回歌德宾馆，和雷金当面细说此事，或许能有一些新的线索。
E: How would Regin's manuscript be taken by this anomalous Trotter? Return to the Goethe Hotel and tell him in person about this. There might be some new clues.

C: 照片中的黑影有些眼熟，应该是列车中的某样东西……
E: The shadowy object in the photo looks somewhat familiar. It must be something aboard the Express...

C: 马上就要代表金人巷商会参与竞标了，金人会长还有些话要和你讲。\n仔细想来，金人会长是信任你，才将重任交到了你的手上。听听会长还有什么要说的吧。
E: You'll be bidding on behalf of the Aurum Alley Merchant Guild soon. The Aurumaton President wishes to speak with you.\nNow that you think about it, the Aurumaton President placed such an important mission in your hands because he trusts you. Listen to what he has to say.

C: 为了重振金人巷，商会希望充分利用码头物流，与金人巷的商户们建立紧密的合作。\n商会派你来劝说「寿考堂」与商会建立合作关系。但「寿考堂」的老板小天此时却碰上了一些麻烦……
E: In order to revitalize Aurum Alley, the merchant guild aims to fully utilize the docks' logistics capacity and establish close collaborations with the stores in the alley.\nThe guild has sent you to persuade Longevity Hall to establish a partnership with the guild. However, its proprietress Little Tian has encountered some troubles at the moment...

C: 想要挑战每个决胜乐园的冠军候补，必须先完成乐园对应的试炼。\n据希露瓦和佩拉所说，这里的试炼是点亮全部的「照雪灯炉」...很难不让人怀疑她们在白嫖挑战者的劳动力。总之，为了得到资格徽章，将这片区域的谜题通通解决吧！
E: In order to challenge the championship contender for each Victory Zone, you must complete the corresponding trial in the Zone.\nAccording to Serval and Pela, the trial here is to light up all the Snowshine Lamps... It really makes one wonder whether they're exploiting the challengers' free labor. Anyways, let's go solve all the puzzles in this Zone and get the Mastery Marks!

C: 除了你以外，本次大赛还有四匹实力非凡的黑马。若想挑战冠军，必须先将他们一一击败才行。
E: Aside from you, this competition also has four other dark horse contenders with serious prowess. If you want to make a run for the championship, you need to take them out one by one first.

C: 《以太战线》的核心玩法便是「对决」——挑战不同的玩家，证明自己的实力吧！
E: The core gameplay loop behind Aetherium Wars is "dueling." Challenge different players and show your true strength!

C: 还好捉鬼小队及时赶到，救下了藿藿。方才发狂的幽府武弁竟然也有了奇怪的变化，或许可以找她聊聊？反正你们人多势众，各个身手不凡，你自忖几息之间就能将对方拿下……
E: Thankfully, the ghost-hunting squad arrives in the nick of time and rescues Huohuo. Interestingly, the frenzied Wraith Warden has also changed her attitude. Perhaps you can attempt to reason with her? Since there are so many of you here and you all have tricks up your sleeves, you can always resort to force if negotiation fails...

C: 在完成这一切后，你们带着岁阳回到镇妖塔前，将其封印。或许从此以后，阿月就能睡个好觉了吧？
E: After all is said and done, you escort the heliobus to the Suppression Tower and seal it. Perhaps A-Yue will sleep soundly from now onwards?

C: 据说十王司有在空中收伏岁阳的道具，不知会是什么？\n去绥园问问十王司的冥差吧。
E: Apparently the Ten-Lords Commission has tools to subdue heliobi from the air. What might that be?\nHead to Fyxestroll Garden and ask the Ten-Lords Commission spiritfarers.

C: 在这一次的模拟宇宙更新中，阮•梅培育了模拟「博识尊」，并把时空锁定在了#27 帝皇鲁珀特陨落前！然而，一些不同寻常的情况发生了——公司联系到了黑塔，他们似乎对模拟宇宙项目很感兴趣……
E: In this Simulated Universe update, Ruan Mei has nurtured a simulated Nous and set the time before the demise of #27 Emperor Rubert. However, something unusual has happened. IPC has reached out to Herta, showing their interest in the Simulated Universe project...

C: 为了重新获取怪物们的信任，舒翁邀请你进入她的心绪空间。\n舒翁打算继续寻找被遗弃的「美梦剧团」，去梦境酒店深处看看吧。
E: To regain the monsters' trust, Siobhan invites you into her Emoscape.\nSiobhan decides to continue her search for the abandoned Sweet Dreams Troupe. Explore deeper into the hotel in the Dreamscape.

C: 因为与「钟表匠」的关系，你成为了克劳克影业的特邀导演，开始剪辑《美梦往事》的影片…\n影片的剪辑工作正在继续，帮助克劳克影业完成更多影片吧！
E: Thanks to your relationship with the Watchmaker, you have been made a special guest director for Clock Studios and have begun editing the Dreamjoy Memoir movie...\nEditing is still going on. Help Clock Studios complete more films!

C: 《美梦往事》剧组接受了苏乐达企业的合作方案，筹备了一部名为《爱汽水的钟表小子》的广告片，去帮帮忙吧！
E: The Dreamjoy Memoir crew accepted the collaboration from SoulGlad Enterprise and planned a commercial named Bubbly Clockie. Go help them!

C: 为什么「沉眠」会出现于此，你们两人似乎都有一肚子疑问。
E: Both of you have questions about why the "Dormancy" might appear in such a place.

C: 星神与凡人的方程式，真理会在哪一端做出选择？
E: In the equation between the Aeons and mortals, where will Truth make its choice?

C: 探查善逝的历史记录，感染了反有机方程的智械，也会有「情感」留存吗？
E: Review Sugata's historical records. Would an Intellitron infected with the Anti-Organic Equation still have "emotions" remaining within?

C: 完成「码放货物」困难模式I
E: Complete Inventory Arrangement Hard Mode I

C: 你成为了「音乐派对」表演乐队的经理。现在，你的乐队需要在校园中央的舞台上完成三场演出。\n舞台附近突然发生了骚动，去看看情况吧。
E: You've become the manager of the music party's performing band, and now your band needs to complete 3 performances on the stage in the middle of the campus.\nA ruckus suddenly starts near the stage. Go check it out.

C: 桑博即将在店里上架新的宝贝…不过在此之前，他还需要你的帮助。
E: Sampo is about to add some new treasures to the store... but before that, he still needs your help.

C: 比起楼下那幽静的酒吧，还是这里更像「派对车厢」。
E: Compared to the quiet lounge downstairs, this feels more like a Party Car.

C: 在地宫中，每座房间都被封印把守，而这间受制于「黄金替罪羊」。只有解开它的谜题才能继续前进。
E: Every room in the hypogeum is protected by a seal, with this one bound by Golden Scapegoat. Only by solving its mystery can one proceed onward.

C: 去找刻律德菈开始今天的经营吧，别让那些饿肚子的妖精们等急啦。
E: Go find Cerydra and start managing today's business. Better not keep those hungry fairies waiting.

C: 去找刻律德菈开始今天的经营吧，别让那些饿肚子的妖精们等急啦。
E: Go find Cerydra and start managing today's business. Better not keep those hungry fairies waiting.

C: 离开这里，看看外面的情况
E: Leave and see what's going on outside

C: 尽快到达月台
E: Reach the railway platform as quickly as possible

C: 找到躲起来的小朋友，完成练习
E: Find the concealed kid to complete the practice

C: 找到所有躲起来的小朋友，赢得胜利
E: Find all the hidden children and win

C: 前往「淬火工坊」，寻找克拉拉
E: Go to the Tempering Workshop and find Clara

C: 与希露瓦一道出发，前往铁卫禁区
E: Head out with Serval and go to the Silvermane Guard Restricted Zone

C: 与停云交谈
E: Talk to Tingyun

C: 前往迴星港，与督办仪式的驭空汇合
E: Go to Stargazer Navalia and meet Yukong, who is overseeing the ceremony's preparations

C: 乘坐电梯
E: Take the Elevator

C: 在可疑的空间中寻找出路
E: Find an exit from the mysterious space

C: 收集调饮用的材料
E: Collect ingredients for the drinks

C: 深入朝露公馆，寻找线索
E: Go deeper into the Dewlight Pavilion to look for clues

C: 与家人团聚
E: Reunite with your family

C: 跟随米沙，探索流梦礁
E: Follow Misha and explore Dreamflux Reef

C: 选择想要挑战的关卡
E: Select the stage you wish to challenge

C: 在月光下小憩一会儿…
E: Take a rest in the moonlight...

C: 和「慈玉女士」交谈
E: Talk with Lady Bonajade

C: 打败猴子叫来的「邪猿•伙伴」
E: Defeat the ape fiendlings summoned by the monkey

C: 解决停云身上的异状
E: Solve Tingyun's anomaly

C: 回私人浴宫好好休息
E: Return to the private bath chamber and rest

C: 整理心情，好好休息吧
E: Calm your mood and rest up

C: 循战吼声找到「纷争」的源头
E: Find the battle cries and find the source of Strife

C: 与缇里西庇俄丝一起开辟道路
E: Open the way together with Tribios

C: 设法开辟前进的道路
E: Try to open the way forward

C: 继续登山，并调查灵魂离体时出现的幻影
E: Continue climbing the mountain and investigate the phantoms that appeared when the soul left the body

C: 与「长老」阿蒙内特交谈，了解行刑人的使命
E: Speak with "Elder" Amunet and learn about the duties of an executioner

C: 前往友爱之馆
E: Head to the Library of Philia

C: 调查「清洗者」，寻找线索
E: Investigate the Cleaner and search for clues

C: 跟随二人，前往庭园后院
E: Follow the two to the backyard of the garden

C: 施展「欧洛尼斯神迹」，夺回火种
E: Perform Oronyx's Miracle to take back the Coreflame

C: 带Saber去饱餐一顿
E: Take Saber out for a big meal

C: 避开阻拦的人群
E: Avoid the crowd blocking your way

C: 调查奇怪的「尸体」
E: Investigate the strange "body"

C: 击败「无敌」的斯科特
E: Defeat the "Invincible" Skott

C: 探秘第一次逐火之旅的时代
E: Explore the Era of the First Flame-Chase Journey

C: 前进，探寻蒙尘的过往
E: Go forth. Uncover the past long buried in dust

C: 改变时空，找寻通向涡心的入口
E: Alter space and time, find the entrance to the vortex

C: 收集纷争泰坦符文
E: Collect Strife Titan Runes

C: 铁墓陨落后，昔涟的选择
E: Cyrene's choice after the fall of Irontomb

C: 前往观景车厢，寻找白厄
E: Go to the Parlor Car and find Phainon

C: 依循分贝变化，寻找呼救声源
E: Find the source of the cry for help by following the decibel changes

C: 将发现的秘密告知希拉
E: Tell Sheila about the secret you found

C: 向艾丝妲报告最终结果
E: Report the final result to Asta

C: 螺丝咕姆似乎有话要叮嘱你
E: Screwllum seems to have something to tell

C: 螺丝咕姆似乎有话要叮嘱你
E: Screwllum seems to have something to tell

C: 通过忆泡探索关联记忆【阿兰的调查】
E: Explore the related memory "Arlan's investigation" through the Memory Bubble
