C: 我们其实是行侠仗义的宇宙侠客！
E: So we're like a chivalrous band of cosmic knights!

C: 好啊，{NICKNAME}！咱们又能联手出击啦～
E: Awesome! We get to work as a team again, {NICKNAME}!

C: 如何，「跃迁」还适应吗？
E: Are you doing okay after your first jump?

C: 而且，在四十五系统时前，一颗星核在罗浮上…爆发了。
E: Not to mention, <unbreak>45</unbreak> system hours ago... a Stellaron burst occurred on the Luofu.

C: 总觉得她是故意的。
E: It seemed like she was avoiding it.

C: 人咱已经叫出来啦，发生的事也跟他讲了一遍。喂，说好了啊，待会儿咱们统一投反对票！我才不想听那个女人的指示哩。
E: I just gave him the low-down. Hey, remember what I said, okay? We're gonna vote against it! I'm not gonna take orders from that woman.

C: 我想投赞成票。
E: I want to vote in favor.

C: 嗯，三月七告诉我了…若是别的仙舟或许还好，「罗浮」…我不能去。
E: Mm, March told me... *sigh* If it were one of the other ships it might've been okay, but I can't go to the Luofu.

C: 我不想去了…
E: I don't wanna go...

C: 气色不错，{NICKNAME}。
E: You're looking well, {NICKNAME}.

C: 暂时无法离开当前场景，需要完成开拓任务「星间流浪」
E: Unable to leave the current area, please complete Trailblaze Mission "Drifting Between the Stars"

C: {NICKNAME}——关于和「大守护者」的最后一战、还有「星核」的情况，我猜你心底还藏着不少疑问吧？
E: {NICKNAME}, about your battle against the Supreme Guardian and the whole Stellaron situation, you must have a lot of unanswered questions, I suppose?

C: 借着强烈的「存护」执念，贝洛伯格的筑城者们坚持了数百年的时间。但随着裂界的腐蚀逐渐深入，本就脆弱的信仰也出现了裂痕。
E: Determined to preserve the world they love, the Architects held on for hundreds of years. But as the Fragmentum continued to advance, their already wavering faith started to show some cracks.

C: 我想谢谢你提供的支援。
E: I was meant to thank you for your support during the battle.

C: 希望你们的探索有所进展，{NICKNAME}，也希望病痛远离你们的旅程。
E: I hope your exploration will make progress, {NICKNAME}, and your journey will be free of pain.

C: 那个传说中制造了博识尊的人？
E: The one who supposedly created Nous?

C: 如果您正在遭遇：无心工作、实验遇阻、科研受挫——请勿释放负能量影响其他科员。
E: If you are experiencing: Lack of motivation to work, setbacks in your experiments or frustration in your research, please do not allow your negativity to disturb other researchers.

C: 如遇自称科研人员的可疑人士邀请您加入他的奇物实验团队，并向您索要奇物研究押金，请务必谨慎，切记：不听不信不转账。
E: If you encounter a suspicious self-proclaimed researcher inviting you to his Curio research team and asking for an upfront deposit, please be careful and remember these words: Don't listen and don't transfer.

C: 我知道，银狼。再一会儿，就一会儿。
E: I know, Silver Wolf. Just give me another minute.

C: 返回主控舱段。艾丝妲站长和及时疏散的研究员都在那里。
E: Back to the master control zone. Asta and the other researchers have gathered there.

C: …真的吗？总感觉你在骗我。
E: ...Really? Feels like you're tricking me...

C: 我听闻黑塔女士的藏品中有一颗「星核」。
E: I heard there's something called a Stellaron in Madam Herta's collection.

C: 空间站当下情况如何？
E: What is the current situation on the space station?

C: 会好起来的。
E: Things will get better.

C: 一起来！保护奇物权益——
E: All together! Protect rare item rights...!

C: 定分枪的眼睛看着卢卡：「<unbreak>75</unbreak>分！」它宣布。
E: The Rating Pistol gazes at Luka: "<unbreak>75</unbreak> points!" it announces.

C: 这、这也太大了…喂，我叫你下来你就下来啊？！
E: I—It's bigger than I thought... Hey you, I was just joking! Leave us alone, shoo!

C: 「裂界」会产生什么影响？
E: What are the effects of the Fragmentum?

C: 你和三月七交换了手机号码。
E: You exchanged your cell phone number with March 7th.

C: 当然能呀，我还等着你呢——噢，你说的「回」是——噢，倒也不是不行。
E: Of course, I'll still be here waiting for you, eh... and the space station will be waiting for you. Returning... it's not impossible.

C: 我决定留在太空站。
E: I've made up my mind. I'll stay.

C: 不过，那已经与你无关了。
E: But those stories are no longer for you.

C: 讲几个好玩的？
E: Any fun ones?

C: （不知道他是不是只有这一种款式的衣服……）
E: (I wonder if this is the only style of clothes he owns...)

C: 星穹列车是「开拓」阿基维利制造的工具，用于承载祂与无名客进行星际旅行。据传这样的载具不止一台，但列车里没有其它的纪录。
E: The Astral Express was a tool created by Akivili the Trailblaze, who used it to transport THEMSELF and the Nameless across the galaxy. It is rumored that there are other vehicles like it, but the Express has no such records.

C: 那是一种非常特殊的冰块，叫做「六相冰」，是遵循虚数法则的造物，不会因外界干扰而转变形态。
E: It was a unique type of ice known as Six-Phased Ice — a substance that adheres to Imaginary Law, meaning that external forces cannot change its form.

C: 列车长帕姆的玩偶，有点掉色。
E: A doll in the form of Conductor Pom-Pom. Its colors are a bit faded.

C: （噢，那他干嘛要跟我们说这些啊？）
E: (Uh-huh, so why is he telling us all this?)

C: 「大守护者」？
E: The supreme guardian?

C: 我们来开拓这颗星球。
E: We've come to trailblaze this planet.

C: 「大守护者」似乎对你们青睐有加。我得到命令，不必再限制你们的行动。
E: It seems that the supreme guardian holds you in high regard. I have received orders that your movements are no longer to be restricted.

C: 还是先跟他们走吧…
E: We should probably go with them...

C: 要回报他们已经失踪或死亡吗？
E: Should we report them as missing or deceased?

C: 这条巷道里是什么？
E: What's down there?

C: 你再等等，让我再体验一下……体验完了，走吧。
E: Wait! I haven't finished yet... Alright, let's go.

C: 青山不改绿水长流，回列车！
E: Home is where the heart is. Back to the Express!

C: 你们可以信任我，虽然只有一面之缘，但直觉告诉我你们不是恶人。哈，我的直觉可是很准的喔。
E: You can trust me. I know our paths have only crossed once before, but my intuition tells me you guys are good people. And I've got good intuition by the way, haha.

C: 铁卫禁区？
E: Silvermane Guard Restricted Zone?

C: 嗐，也别这么悲观！我干公职的时候常在北边转悠，跟前线的士兵军官混得可熟了。
E: Hey, enough pessimism! Back in my "official capacity" days, I spent a lot of time in the north — I got to know the soldiers and officers on the front line very well.

C: 小杰杰，翅膀硬了啊…看不起我这个庶民姐姐了……
E: Lil' Geppie... So grown up now... Looking down on his civilian sister...

C: 才没有呢——你这家伙，老姐在你眼里到底是什么形象？
E: Am not — how dare you! What do you take your sister for?

C: 蓄谋颠覆筑城者，阴谋破坏贝洛伯格。
E: They're plotting to overthrow the Architects and bring harm to the city.

C: 哈哈，被我们打服了吧？
E: Ha! Didn't expect to get wrecked, huh?

C: 啊…你们这么快就要走了吗？
E: Huh...? You're leaving so soon?

C: 都需要大守护者签署。
E: All requires the signature of the Supreme Guardian.

C: 没问题，让我看看…
E: No problem, let me have a look...

C: 只能说，多亏你们刻意留手，没有让他落下大碍。
E: He wasn't in bad shape when we found him. Thank you for holding back.

C: 有幸待在室内的行李架。
E: The luggage rack that has the privilege of staying indoors.

C: 虽然《星尘玫瑰》在逻辑上漏洞百出，但你也知道没人是奔着剧情来的。梦幻的时光稍纵即逝，在剧院里悄然度过显然是最好的选择。
E: Although Stardust Rose is full of plotholes, you know that no one is watching it for the plot. The dreamlike times are transient and fleeting, and spending it quietly in the theatre is clearly the best choice.

C: 几本书、一盆花和些许文件，展示了办公桌主人的兴趣。
E: A few books, a potted flower, and some documents showcase the interests of the desk's owner.

C: 垃圾分类的知识涌入你的脑海。
E: Garbage-sorting knowledge comes flooding into your brain.

C: 平平无奇的垃圾桶。
E: A trashcan, not remarkable in any way.

C: 桑博告诉我你们晕倒了，没说细节，多半是他搞的鬼吧，他经常鼓捣些奇奇怪怪的玩意儿。
E: Sampo just told me that you lost consciousness. He didn't say why. Still, I'll wager it had something to do with him — he's always tinkering with his devices.

C: 那么，第一千七百五十八届搏击擂主挑战赛半决赛，现在开始！
E: And so, let the semifinals of the <unbreak>1758</unbreak>th Fighting King Challenge... begin!

C: 少拿「地火」吓唬咱！他们忙着跟史瓦罗的喽啰玩儿呢，哪有空管你们？不想身上多个窟窿，就把带的物资跟装备都交出来！
E: Haha, empty threat! Wildfire are stuck dealing with Svarog's minions — how are they gonna help you now? Unless you're planning on taking a bullet, hand over the supplies and equipment!

C: 这群机器人想干什么？
E: What do those robots want?

C: 你…什么时候来的？
E: You... When did you get here?

C: 但他们说，想知道就得加入什么「鼹鼠党」，要加入鼹鼠党，就得一起玩游戏，赢了才能证明我的实力…这样你明白了吧？
E: But they said I had to join "The Moles" or something if I wanted to find out... and to do that, I had to prove my strength by winning a game of hide-and-seek... do you get it?

C: 敏锐的直觉告诉我这个人不大对劲，但是……
E: My instincts are telling me something's not right with this guy, but...

C: 是是是，咱俩是最佳拍档～
E: Yeah, yeah, you're in the footnote somewhere~

C: 我们也不知道…
E: Doesn't ring a bell...

C: 靠近点看看情况吧？
E: Let's get closer and take a look.

C: 这姑娘性子直，能处。你听见她痛骂银鬃铁卫了吗？哈哈，真解气，我觉得跟她能聊得来。
E: She says what she thinks — I like her. And did you hear what she said about the Silvermane Guards? Haha, sounded like she'd been waiting a long time to say it. I think I'd get along with her.

C: 谁跟你出生入死。
E: We haven't been through thick OR thin... pal.

C: 地上裂界的怪物活动加剧，前线战事吃紧，筑城者们不得不将所有的铁卫抽调到前线，用来抵御怪物入侵。
E: Fragmentum monster activity on the surface intensified, and hostilities on the front line were critical. To resist the invasion, the Architects had no choice but to redeploy the Guards to the front line.

C: 上层的士兵不会到下面来吗？
E: Do soldiers from the Overworld ever come down here?

C: 我们要和「地火」联手吗？
E: Do we need to ally with Wildfire?

C: 不过问我的话，只能说「防人之心不可无」。
E: But if you ask for my opinion, it's better to be safe than sorry.

C: 矿区之所以流浪者越来越多，就是因为裂界在地下蔓延，到处都是游荡的怪物，每个镇子都深受其扰。
E: As the Fragmentum spreads underground, more monsters go roaming around causing trouble for all the towns. That means more vagrants in the mines.

C: 赖以为生的物资设备都被裂界吞掉了，想从里边捞点东西出来，都得冒生命危险！
E: The towns' resources have been swallowed up by the Fragmentum. To get anything now, people have to risk their lives!

C: 抱歉，下层区的生活很艰辛，我不该说得这么轻描淡写。
E: Oh! No, sorry. Life in the Underworld is difficult, I shouldn't be speaking about it so lightly.

C: 有些人会羡慕这样的生活，但是我却有些…不自在。一辈子都重复着同样的几件事，所有的目标都由别人为你设立…这种感觉，你大概没法想象吧？
E: ...Some may envy this kind of life, but I have felt... trapped. When every choice and every goal has already been made for you... You probably can't imagine how that feels.

C: 布洛妮娅先回去了。她跟那位「大守护者」的关系你们也知道，有些事情她必须自己解决。
E: She already went back. As you know, she has some things to settle with the Supreme Guardian.

C: 希望布洛妮娅别出意外。
E: I hope nothing happens to Bronya.

C: 我们想休息一下。
E: We would like to have a rest.

C: 诶嘿嘿…
E: Hee-hee...

C: 哪有什么不良影响，我说过了，我身体好得很，状态也很不错…咳…还能继续打拳。
E: There are no adverse effects. As I said, I'm in good health, and good shape... *cough* I can continue to fight.

C: …这么巧？能给我看看吗……
E: ...really? Please show me...

C: 哈，一看你就不关注拳赛！「怪物盔甲」被五冠王收拾得体无完肤，场面惨烈得很。
E: Ha! You obviously don't pay much attention to our boxing matches, do you? He was beaten so badly by the five-time champ. It was such a one-sided fiasco.

C: 虽然我不赞成他这样不要命的做法…但是能做到这种程度，他的意志力一定很强大。
E: I never approved of how he risked his life like that. I can't imagine how strong-willed he must be to manage to do all this in his condition.

C: 丹恒，要不还是你说吧…
E: Do you feel like recounting the story, Dan Heng...?

C: 带孩子们去呼吸新鲜空气吧。
E: Time to take the kids out for some fresh air.

C: …谢谢妈妈，那我们就一言为定啦。
E: ...Deal! Thanks, mommy.

C: 我还想和你们再多聊聊，但还有部分伤员没有得到妥善处置，我得继续照顾他们才行。
E: *sigh* I'd love to sit down and chat with all of you, but I still have a backlog of patients to see.

C: 谢谢你的这些话，杰帕德大人。我和齐诺都会记在心里的。
E: Thank you, Captain Gepard. Zino and I will remember your words.

C: 我没见过脸皮这么厚的大人。你还是去看看《冒险鼹鼠队》吧。
E: Hmph, you are such a cheeky grownup. You should do better and read The Adventurous Moles.

C: 别装了，你其实根本没有看过《冒险鼹鼠队》对吧？不然，你告诉我书里的三个主人公都是谁？
E: Stop pretending. You haven't actually read it at all, have you? Tell me who the three protagonists are in the book.

C: 意外的羊皮纸？
E: The Unexpected Parchment?

C: 一位科学家曾经说过：当垃圾箱盖紧紧关闭的时候，它同时处于有垃圾和没有垃圾的叠加态。
E: A scientist once said, "When a dumpster is shut tight, it exists in a superposition of states where it is both devoid of trash and full of trash at the same time."

C: 开采工具散乱地堆放在诊所门口。
E: Mining tools are scattered around the clinic's entrance.

C: 没问题，你想做什么都行：瞧！垃圾箱盖在你绝对的意志下开启，里面空空如也，什么都没有，但看看好的一面！你强力地展示了权威。玩游戏的时候，这是最重要的！
E: Of course, you can do whatever you want: Look! The dumpster lid opens under your absolute will. There is nothing inside, absolutely nothing, but look on the bright side! You have imposed your might unto it. This is the most important aspect in any game!

C: 崇高道德很伤心，但你的手段确实不赖：现在，当盖子反弹时，箱底的两包菜油就会疯狂喷涌。那个倒霉蛋得额外再洗一件衣服了。阿哈会很喜欢你的恶作剧的。
E: The High Morals are sad, but admittedly, your trick is quite brilliant. Now, when the lid bounces back, The two packs of oil will be split all over the unlucky person's clothes. Aha would applaud such a prank.

C: 只是一个被切开脑袋的垃圾桶罢了——这种事宇宙里可多的是。「何必和垃圾桶较劲呢？」你如是想着，同伙伴一起离开了。
E: It is just a lobotomized trashcan, there are many of them across the universe. "What do I have against trashcans?" You find yourself thinking before leaving with your comrades.

C: 下面让我们回顾在<unbreak>2157</unbreak>琥珀纪发生了哪些重大事件：
E: Let's take a moment to look back at some of the biggest happenings in <unbreak>2157</unbreak> AE.

C: 此前报导过，「星核猎手」入侵了天才俱乐部的螺丝咕姆星球，与星球的主人螺丝咕姆爆发了冲突。
E: As we previously discussed on our program, the Stellaron Hunters illegally gained access to Planet Screwllum, which is under the purview of the Genius Society, and clashed with the head of the planet, Screwllum.

C: 博识学会武装考古学派首席学士艾伦•琼斯主持发掘潜在灾害评级为Ω的古代遗迹「械皇遗冢」。
E: The head of the Armed Archaeologists of the Intelligentsia Guild, Allen Jones, personally oversaw the excavation of the ancient tomb of Emperor Rubert I. The ruins rank as a Category Omega site on the Potential Disaster Index.

C: 盛会之星「匹诺康尼」遭遇一场突如其来的星核袭击，致使谐乐大典意外中断。
E: The Planet of Festivities "Penacony" has been hit by an abrupt Stellaron incursion, leading to the unforeseen interruption of the Charmony Festival.

C: 据悉，近三个琥珀纪以来，精神疾病已成为许多世界首要关心的问题。
E: Reports indicate that in the last three Amber Eras, mental illnesses have emerged as a top concern across numerous planets.

C: 好耶，逛街咯！
E: Nice! Let's have a look around the city.

C: 歌以咏志！
E: Would that this occasion had come sooner!

C: 仙舟既不愿让外人插手「星核」灾害，又为何在「星核猎手」一事上如此大度？
E: The Xianzhou is reluctant to involve outsiders in the Stellaron disaster, so why is it so keen on letting us capture a Stellaron Hunter?

C: 驭空大人正在调度。
E: Madam Yukong is tweaking it.

C: {NICKNAME}，你们看，那是…？
E: {NICKNAME}, look! Is that a...?

C: 没多久…但本姑娘从小就接受严格的云骑式训练了！
E: Not that long ago... but I've been receiving strict Cloud Knight military training since I was a child!

C: 是个…狐人？
E: She's... foxian?

C: 停云小姐…是这儿的老板娘？
E: Miss Tingyun... is your boss?

C: 毕竟是被星际和平公司重金悬赏，却永远没人能把她归案的通缉犯啊。我们倒像是成了被她暗中观察的猎物。
E: Don't forget, she's on the IPC's most-wanted list — a fugitive that nobody can seem to pin down... and now we've become her prey while she stalks us in the shadows.

C: 不行呀，我讨厌按别人的步调做事。
E: Oh thanks, but no thanks. I can't stand moving at someone else's pace.

C: 传说中的「掉书袋」吧…
E: She's just showing off with some big and fancy words.

C: 暂不动身
E: Remain for now.

C: 准备好了。
E: Ready.

C: 太卜，容我向您展示「仙人」们曾做到的事情。
E: Master Diviner, allow me to show you what the celestials were capable of.

C: 我嘛，是最不喜欢亲手制造毁灭的了……
E: They have no qualms about dealing out destruction by their own hand...

C: 与此同时，载着丹恒、素裳与罗刹的小舟姗姗来迟，停靠此处…
E: Meanwhile, the ship carrying Dan Heng, Sushang, and Luocha finally arrives nearby...

C: 别担心。等战事落定，我亲自送你和罗刹先生回家～
E: Don't worry. Once the fight is over, I'll personally escort you and Mr. Luocha home~

C: 哈哈，龙师不必紧张，我与十王司只是走走形式罢了。
E: Haha, don't be nervous sir, this is a mere formality for me and the Ten-Lords Commission.

C: …丹枫说，只有龙尊才能进入这里啊。
E: ...Dan Feng said only the high elder can enter here.

C: 看来咱们过去的默契还没有消失啊……
E: ...And it would seem the two of us can still coordinate our efforts.

C: 我本不欲大动干戈，但眼下别无他法…抱歉。
E: *long sigh* I didn't wish to harm anyone... But there's no other way. Forgive me.

C: 喔？是「不朽」的龙裔么？
E: Oh? A Scion of Permanence?

C: 接下来，要请各位欣赏这死前最后的盛景。
E: Before your demise, I invite you to enjoy one last spectacle.

C: 统计伤亡损失，遣人追剿药王残党，向六御说明战况…怪不得景元说「坐这把交椅，如坐刀山」。
E: Collating casualties and losses, dispatching forces to round up the remnants of the Disciples, submitting battle reports to the Six Charioteers... Now I know what Jing Yuan meant when he said "the highest throne faces the strongest winds."

C: 驭空大人想必已经听说了，停云小姐……
E: Madam Yukong must have heard about Miss Tingyun...

C: 这是停云小姐送我的…？
E: Something from Miss Tingyun for me...?

C: 列车什么时候有了这样的轮替值班制度？
E: ...Since when did the work roster just change like that?

C: 下次你可要把丹恒先生也带来，咱们几个可以一起喝喝茶聊聊天。
E: You should bring Dan Heng along next time, we can chat over some tea.

C: 哎…这以后可怎么办啊，不会真要改邪归正了吧？
E: *sigh* What do we do now? We don't really have to turn over a new leaf, do we?

C: 你自己说说看吧，应该怎么赔偿我们？
E: So tell us — how much compensation are you gonna give?

C: 我来解释吧。
E: Allow me to explain.

C: 我也很激动！
E: I'm excited, too!

C: {NICKNAME}乘客，你怎么了？为、为什么突然哭了？
E: {NICKNAME}, what's wrong? Wh—Why are you crying all of a sudden?

C: 星核很稳定。
E: The Stellaron is stable.

C: 这是我的房间，你怎么在这？
E: This is my room. What are you doing here?

C: 我警告你，离开这里。
E: I'm warning you, you need to leave now.

C: （出示筑城者的骑枪…）
E: (Show Architect's lance...)

C: …我承认。
E: ...Yes, I plead guilty.

C: （重申——我不会对这枚梦泡的内容作出任何解释性或暗示性的评论。）
E: (Let me reiterate that I won't make any explanatory or leading comments on the content of this dream bubble.)

C: 别慌，别慌！让我老桑博想想办法…哦，有了！
E: Just stay cool! Let me think of something... Got it!

C: 没事。
E: I'm alright.

C: 当然可以，爱德华医生欢迎追寻刺激的客人！就读取您的梦境可以吗，先生？
E: Be my guest! Dr. Edward welcomes anyone who's ready for some excitement! How about we use your Dreamscape, sir?

C: 咦？你认识她吗？
E: Eh? Do you know her?

C: <color=#ff3a3e>与你分别后不久，我在酒店邂逅了一位身披黑纱的女士。她也是受邀前来的客人，向我提起盛会的话题，我们便举起酒杯…相谈甚欢。</color>
E: <color=#ff3a3e>Shortly after we parted ways, I met a lady wearing a black veil who was also a guest at the hotel. We had a good time talking about the event over drinks.</color>

C: 先跟我说说发生了什么事吧。
E: Please fill me in on what's going on first.

C: 而且你是美梦小镇的客人，石头老板没料到你的存在！如果你出手，那个大坏蛋一定被打得措手不及！
E: Also, you're a new visitor to this world, which means we have the element of surprise! If you take action now, we can catch him off guard!

C: …但能给我们一些私人空间吗？
E: ...But, can we have some privacy, please?

C: 谢谢你们的好意…
E: I appreciate the gesture...

C: 噢，他的样子可真让人伤心，就连美梦小镇的守护者也快要哭出来啦。
E: Oh, he's crying so hard. Even I, the guardian of the Dreamville, am nearly moved to tears.

C: 我先做个示范——刚开始会有点黑，你要跟紧哦。
E: Let me show you how to do it. It's going to be very dark at first, so you'll have to stay close to me.

C: 哪来的游客…我不管你们怎么溜进来的，现在别烦我——要是我没法按时交付，准没你们好果子吃！
E: Why are there guests here... You know what, I don't care how you snuck in, just leave me alone. If you prevent me from finishing my work on time, I'm going to make you pay for it!

C: 我也打算返回现实休息了…走吧，我们就在「黄金的时刻」分别。
E: I feel like going back to reality and resting too... Come on, let's say goodbye at Golden Hour.

C: 这里是游客不会踏足的拓荒地，所以不像市中心那样热闹…但我很喜欢这种僻静的气氛。
E: These areas are not developed yet, so guests don't come here. It's not as lively as the town center here, but I relish the serene atmosphere.

C: 看，匹诺康尼大剧院——从这里望去，同样一览无余。
E: Look, that's the Penacony Grand Theater over there.

C: 这里也是死路…你看房间的构造，不会是要我们从墙壁上绕过去吧？
E: Dead-end here too... Given the layout of the room, are they really suggesting we maneuver around using the walls?

C: 米哈伊尔？
E: Mikhail?
█said███do█not█ ██ █open the box██...

C: 人呢？人都哪去了？
E: Where is everyone?

C: 我听不懂你说的谜语…
E: You're speaking in riddles...

C: 你看着垃圾桶们兴奋地挤进「宝库」，撕扯开一袋又一袋垃圾，将它们尽数倒进自己的桶身……
E: You watch the trashcans excitedly crowd into the "treasure trove," tearing open bag after bag of garbage and pouring the contents into their torso...

C: {NICKNAME}就拜托你了…黄泉小姐。
E: I'll leave {NICKNAME} to you... Miss Acheron.

C: 啊，抱歉。我忘记你才刚回来，应该不知道这件事。
E: Ah, I'm sorry. I forgot you just came back. You probably wouldn't know about it.

C: 好呀～那就安心去睡吧，我会好好陪着你的。
E: All right. Drift peacefully off to sleep, and I'll be right with you.

C: 我知道你对忆质比较敏感，比其他人更容易受到梦境的影响，这也是我需要特别陪同你的原因。
E: I know you're more sensitive to memoria, thus more easily affected by the Dreamscape than others. This is also why I have to accompany you.

C: <color=#ff3a3e>匹诺康尼坊间流传着一些飞语，涉及钟表匠、遗产、噩梦等隐秘的话题。我好奇是谁在散布消息，就照着流言中的方法试验了下…竟真的来到了这里。</color>
E: <color=#ff3a3e>Penacony's rife with rumors now, about the Watchmaker, a legacy, nightmares and other mysterious tales. I was curious as to who was spreading them, and tested the method as described in the rumors... To think I actually ended up here...</color>

C: 他是从大堂那一侧的门进来的，朝着酒店更深处前进了，既然如此…他应该看到了此前发生的一切……
E: He entered through the door from the lobby, and went farther into the hotel. If that's the case... he should have seen everything that happened here...

C: 忆庭的视线无处不在。如果他想对你动手，就得做好与忆者为敌的准备——这点我已经提醒过他了。
E: The Garden of Recollection has eyes everywhere. If he wants to hurt you, he'll have to fight against the Memokeepers — I've warned him about that.

C: 好可疑…哪有这么凑巧的事，那女人绝对有问题。
E: Hmm, suspicious... Could it really just be a coincidence? I've got a funny feeling about that lady.

C: 你怎么…？！这和说好的不一样……
E: Why did you...!? This isn't what we agreed on...

C: 没事，你可以有自己的判断。培养信任总是需要时间，我愿意等待。
E: It's fine. Listen to your gut. Building trust always takes time, and I'm willing to wait.

C: 明哲保身是更好的选择。
E: Playing it safe seems to be the smarter move.

C: 就眼下的状况而言，确实。但长远来看呢？
E: Insofar as things are presently concerned, yes. But what about the long-term?

C: 「毁灭」是壮烈的一瞬。倘若卑劣求存…此生就太过漫长。
E: Destruction is intense but brief. To cravenly cling to life is to endure an endlessly prolonged existence.

C: 等等——
E: Hang on...

C: 你好，你不能通过这里。
E: Hello, you can't pass through here.

C: 总之，先试着搜集信息，罗列尽量多的可能性吧。再逐一将其中的矛盾排除，剩下的事实越少，便越有可能是真相。
E: Look, let's try to gather intel first and then list all the possible outcomes we can. Then we go through them, eliminating contradictions one-by-one. The fewer facts remaining, the closer we are to the truth.

C: 你在怀疑家族吗？
E: Do you think The Family is behind all this?

C: 你的确是。
E: Indeed.

C: 没有那个<color=#dbc291ff>弹珠机</color>模型——我们都得交待在这儿——！
E: Without that <color=#dbc291ff>Pinball machine</color>, neither one of us is going anywhere anytime soon.

C: 谢谢你，托帕小姐。我们正要找猎犬们打听案情，也许你已经和他们打过交道了？
E: Thank you, Miss Topaz. We're on our way to the Hounds to verify some intel. Perhaps you've had dealings with them?

C: 你、你们…一定要坚持这么做吗？
E: Y—You lot... insist on doing this?

C: …加拉赫先生似乎意有所指。
E: Mr. Gallagher seems to be getting at something.

C: 回来了啊，<unbreak>35</unbreak>号，喜欢你的护身符么？
E: So, No. <unbreak>35</unbreak>, you're back. Like your new lucky charm?

C: 你…哦，我懂了，这一定是什么整蛊节目吧！你肯定在那边的楼上架了摄影机，好拍下自己行善的过程，是不是？
E: You... Wait, I get it now! This is some sort of prank show, right? You must have some cameras set up around here to film yourself doing good deeds, right?

C: 越是有钱的人，在梦里玩得就越花，但主动给别人送钱的，我还是第一次见。
E: Wealthy people have fancy ways to enjoy this dream, but to be honest, I've never seen anyone who gives out money to others like you.

C: …哇，纸条上的字变了！
E: ...Whoa, the words on the note are changing!

C: 你将「一袋垃圾」放入了空杯里……
E: You put a bag of trash into the empty cup

C: 米哈伊尔临走前，他眼角的皱纹已经太深，如刀割般吓人。他嗫嚅着，气息弱到攀不上喉头，只能郁积在胸膛。但我能嗅到…那一晚的匹诺康尼散发着这种味道。
E: Before Mikhail left, the wrinkles at the corners of his eyes had deepened, like knife cuts. He mumbled, his breath too weak to climb up his throat, caught up in his chest. But I could smell it... the lingering scent of Penacony itself on that night.

C: …你做了什么？
E: ...What did you do?

C: 生命就像一场漫长的投资，选择正确的人，做出正确的事，抵达正确的结果，向世界展示自己的价值。
E: Life is like a long-term investment. Those who choose correctly, do the correct things, reach the correct outcomes, show the world their value.

C: 要想让自己不在人面前露馅，最高明的办法就是先骗过自己。
E: The best way to prevent others from seeing your true colors, is first being able to fool yourself.

C: 我以为你知道呢…你不是很懂我么？
E: I thought you knew... Didn't you say you had me pegged?

C: 掌声有请——「星核」{M#先生}{F#小姐}！
E: Everyone give it up for... {M#Mr.}{F#Miss} Stellaron!

C: 也许在你看来，我是一位隐藏身份的「令使」，但是……
E: Perhaps to you, I am just an Emanator who's hiding her identity, but...

C: 一场豪赌，不是么？但容我指出一个错误：公司并非稳操胜券，在一件至关重要的事上，我的确没有后手。
E: It's a huge gamble, isn't it? But, allow me to point out a mistake: The IPC's success is not guaranteed — I unfortunately have no contingencies for such an important matter.

C: 就算结局早已注定，那也无妨，人改变不了的事太多。
E: Even if the ending has been predetermined, that's fine. There are countless things that humans cannot change.

C: 你是…？
E: And you are...?

C: 迷宫一样的走廊和厅房，无处不在的陷阱机关…这大宅子的主人疑心病有点重啊。
E: Labyrinth-like corridors and halls, traps everywhere... The owner of this mansion must be a bit paranoid.

C: 当它们汇聚于一处时，无数细小的真实便编织成谎言——你从每个人身上采撷一缕认知，将它们据为己有，在梦境中*虚构*出了一个完整的「加拉赫」……
E: When they are gathered, countless tiny truths are woven together into a lie — you collected a small piece of each of them and claimed them for yourself. Then you invented this facade, a complete Gallagher...

C: 我这不还没劫持呢么，拿着枪和人聊聊天就算「劫持」？
E: I ain't hijacked anything! What, chatting with someone while holding a gun is considered a hijacking?

C: 噢。就是…那种常见的筹码，花花绿绿的，哗哗掉下来，像下雨一样。
E: Oh. It was just... those chips you normally see everywhere — the green ones — they fell from the sky, as if it were raining!

C: 为什么，因为这里是罪恶都市耶佩拉？
E: Why? Because this is Jepella, the city of sins?

C: 加拉赫应该就是幕后黑手。
E: It has to be Gallagher who's behind it all.

C: 真不知道该如何感谢你，知更鸟小姐，才短短几天，孩子们的进步就这么大了。
E: I can't thank you enough, Robin. These kids have made incredible progress in only a few days.

C: 这根本不是「以强援弱」，而是「以强制弱」。一个失去了平等的世界注定不会再受「同谐」眷顾，受祂赐福的声音…自然也无法歌唱了。
E: This is not "the strong defending the weak," but rather "the strong exploiting the weak." A world without equality won't ever be favored by the Harmony, and naturally, those voices blessed by THEM... have lost the ability to sing.

C: 怎么，站不稳，要我搀你一把？
E: You look a little unsteady. Need a hand?

C: 答案其实很简单，各位也非常熟悉，一切的根源…都是「星核」。
E: Well, it all boils down to something very familiar to all of you... the Stellaron.

C: 谢谢，谢谢！我会努力工作，争取早日把孩子们赎回来，加入家族…赞、赞美谐乐！
E: Thank you, thank you! I'll work my hardest to redeem my children and make them part of The Family... P—Praise the Harmony!

C: 三重面相的灵魂啊，敬请聆听我的发问……
E: O, revered Triple-Faced Soul, hear my doubts...

C: 是不是…只要我伸出手，就能把月亮抓在怀里了？嗯？对吧？
E: If I just reached out my hand... I could grab the moon, couldn't I?

C: 你说得对。虽然梦境里的时间不会流动，但常看常新…我每次都会有些新的感触。
E: You're right. Even though time stands still in this Dreamscape, it always feels fresh... I find something new every time.

C: 砰——会很刺激的！
E: And it'll be thrilling! Bang!

C: 这谐乐大典上肯定会有不少名流，我得好好结交一下。
E: Surely there'll be a lot of celebrities at the Charmony Festival. It's a great opportunity to make some valuable connections.

C: 接头暗号？
E: A secret signal?

C: 换我为你讲个故事吧……
E: Well, let me share a story with you...

C: 在那之前，我还有一个问题……
E: Before we part ways, I have one more question...

C: 四位选手，你们来这里是想获得什么？
E: Excuse me, you four, what are you hoping to get out of all this?

C: 无名客们，你们的到来让我想起匹诺康尼初建时的盛况。那时我还是个毛头小子，看见「钟表匠」的广告就凭着一腔热血离开家乡，来到这里挖掘人生的第一桶金。
E: Nameless, your arrival reminds me of the grand occasion when Penacony was first established. I was still a young bright-eyed lad back then, lured here by the Watchmaker's ads, full of zeal and ready to make my first fortune in life.

C: 哈哈，真不愧是勇往直前的开拓者！三月七小姐，你呢？
E: Haha, that's the Trailblazing spirit! How about you, Miss March?

C: 在「演技派」挑战中，您需要根据三份剧本完成表演，打动现场的评委；在「动作派」挑战中，您需要干净利落地战胜三组敌人，抵达终点。
E: In the School of Acting challenge, you have to complete three performances from three scripts and move the panel judges. In the School of Action challenge, you have to defeat three groups of enemies convincingly and reach the end.

C: 太感人了！故事继续发展，那场大雨令二位嗅到了商机，你们开始进军雨伞行业，可生意刚有起色，竞争对手就开始大量倾销低价商品挤占市场。
E: A tug at the heartstrings! The story continues to develop. The heavy rain leads you both to sense a business opportunity, so you start venturing into the umbrella industry. But just as the business begins to pick up, competitors start flooding the market with low-priced goods, squeezing your market share.

C: 欢迎来到最终舞台。其实你们方才经历的情节，全都出自电影《逐梦往事》。
E: Welcome to the final stage. Actually, all the scenarios that you previously encountered, were all from the film Once Upon a Time in Dreams.

C: 虽然通过了考验，但我们还是快走吧…星核要紧。
E: We've passed the test, but we ought to hurry up... The Stellaron is at stake.

C: 终于集齐拼图了…快回去吧。
E: Finally, that's all the jigsaw pieces... Let's hurry back.

C: 我忙着拯救世界，能让一让吗？
E: I'm busy saving the world. Could you please make way?

C: 但倘若你所言确实非虚…「纯美」在上，我们就借这场命中注定的对决检验你的能力吧！
E: But if what you say is true... In the name of Beauty, let us use this fated duel to test your mettle!

C: 枯燥的台词，僵硬的动作…远远谈不上「表演」二字！
E: Dull lines, stiff movements... this can scarcely be described as acting!

C: 多么动人的表情……
E: The expressiveness, the emotion, so touching...

C: 我们到了！缺失的零件就在对面…可是要怎样才能过去？
E: We're here! There's a missing part on the opposite side... But how do we get over there?

C: 有人吗啾？我要坚持不住了啾！
E: Is anyone there, tweet? I can't take it anymore, tweet!

C: 对于我们做出的选择…我深表遗憾。接下来，让我们进入第二个抉择吧。这次…是一位逐梦客的故事。
E: I deeply regret the choices we made... Next, let us head to the second decision. This time... it's the story of a Dreamchaser.

C: 「你知道么，这封信出自何人之手？」
E: "Do you know who wrote this letter?"

C: 在我看来，社会的理想制度应当是「七休日」。在星期日的明天，是第二、第三、乃至永远的又一个星期日——这就是新世界的面貌，无所事事的永恒安宁之日。
E: From where I stand, society's ideal system should be "seven rest days." Following Sunday, there should ensue a second, a third, and indeed an infinite procession of Sundays. This should be the face of the new world — idyllic, eternal, peaceful days.

C: 我不确定，但…试试看吧。
E: I... I'm not entirely sure, but... let's give it a try.

C: 列车的鸣笛声，它从房间的另一头响起……
E: The distant sound of a train whistle, echoing throughout the room...

C: 只要这一抹「红色」尚在，我就还有机会履行约定。它可以是燃烧的火，是盛放的花，是这岩洞里的一丛浆果…它就是生命本身，转瞬即逝、却足够夺目。
E: As long as this red color still lingers, I have a chance to fulfill that promise. It represents a burning fire, a blooming flower, the berries in this cave... and life itself, fleeting yet still dazzling.

C: 还记得那场古老的「寰宇蝗灾」么？「繁育」塔伊兹育罗斯给宇宙带来无尽浩劫，而这场浩劫最终却在混乱和迷茫中演变为列神之战。
E: Do you remember the ancient Swarm Disaster? Tayzzyronth the Propagation brought endless havoc to the universe, and it eventually evolved into a fierce battle among all Aeons.

C: 当然，你还是和小时候一样聪明。
E: Of course. You're still as clever as you were when you were a child.

C: 这些人偶是舞台上的布景吗？可即便如此，连前厅都完全不见人影，有些太过异常了。
E: Are these puppets part of the stage setup? Even so, it's so eerie that the entire front hall is empty.

C: 也是…我们决定匹诺康尼未来的死斗之地。
E: And... the very place where the future of Penacony shall be determined through conflict.

C: 上前觐见，行于死荫的迷途者！
E: O, lost souls! Come and meet your master!

C: …嗯，等一切尘埃落定，我再想办法回忆域里追溯一番好了。
E: ...Yes, when the dust settles, I'll just think of a way to recall it in the Memory Zone.

C: 倒是杨叔你怎么样了？听说那家伙连知更鸟小姐都没放过，把你们全都给关起来了……
E: What about you, Mr. Yang? I heard that even Miss Robin wasn't spared, and that guy locked you both up...

C: 将军，怎么叹气啊……
E: Why the sigh, General?

C: 希望这次旅行平安无事，希望这次旅行平安无事，希望这次旅行平安无事……
E: Please let this trip be uneventful. Please let this trip be uneventful. Please let this trip be uneventful...

C: 你现在感到十分放松了，对吧？那么……
E: You're feeling very relaxed now, aren't you? So then...

C: 嗯，虽然两位女士的「死亡」与最初的设想并不一致，但事到如今，这一事实与我们目前所知的信息也并不冲突。
E: Well, although the fake "deaths" of those two ladies don't align with our initial assumptions, this fact itself doesn't contradict the information we have so far.

C: {NICKNAME}
E: {NICKNAME}

C: 但他未能亲眼见证匹诺康尼的结局。
E: But he was unable to witness Penacony's end.

C: 发生了什么？
E: What happened?

C: 现在，我们还有一线生机。而要将它付诸现实…黑天鹅小姐，带我们去见见那些同样坚强的人吧。
E: We still have a chance, though. To make it happen... please, Black Swan, guide us to those with a strong will.

C: 鸟儿是因为想要飞翔，才生出了翅膀。哪怕有一天会跌落在地，我们也不该将它囚禁在笼中。
E: Birds have wings because they're meant to fly. Even if they may crash on the ground one day, they shouldn't be trapped in a cage.

C: 人固然有强大与弱小之分，倘若「开拓」是英雄的使命，那么「同谐」的责任便是以强援弱，因为匹诺康尼的救世主，只能是匹诺康尼人自己。
E: It's true that some people are born strong, and others are born weak. If the Trailblaze is the target of heroes, then the Harmony will guarantee that the strong help the weak. Only the people of Penacony themselves can be the saviors of their homeland.

C: 我会扼守通向「虚无」深渊的道路，引领每一个不愿堕入其中的生命…回到这边的世界。
E: I'm guarding the path to the abyss of the Nihility, guiding every soul reluctant to become one with it... back to this side.

C: 哼，好啊。那我就赌——他要把我升到P<unbreak>46</unbreak>了吧？
E: Well, alright. Then I'll guess... he's going to promote me to P<unbreak>46</unbreak>?

C: …什么都没有。空的。毫无疑问，这就是一枚*空梦泡*。
E: ...There is nothing and nothing is there. Indubitably, this is but an empty dream bubble.

C: 不过还是提醒一句：别忘了你依然在猎犬家系的通缉名单里，保持低调。
E: Just a heads-up, you're still on the Bloodhound Family's wanted list. So, keep a low profile.

C: 于是奥帝先生提议：不如将谐乐大典的举办场地搬至「晖长石号」，也正好借此机会宣布「晖长石号」重启巡航。
E: So Mr. Alfalfa suggested relocating the Charmony Festival to the Radiant Feldspar, taking this opportunity to announce the resumption of the airship's voyage.

C: 敏锐如你，一定早就看出来了吧？这次会面的真实用意。
E: As sharp as you are, I'm sure you've figured out the true purpose of this conference, right?

C: 自家族入驻匹诺康尼以来，「秩序」残党便一直以橡木家系为掩护潜伏其中，用星核的力量不断加强对美梦的控制，最后酿成了大祸。
E: Since The Family took up residence in Penacony, the Order has been hiding in plain sight under the guise of the Oak Family, using the Stellaron's power to strengthen their hold on the sweet dream, which eventually resulted in disaster.

C: 我们会的。
E: We will.

C: 这…这不可能！你之前明明都连着输给我十把了…我怎么可能在这种关键时刻失手？！
E: Th—This... this can't be! You lost to me ten times in a row... How could I possibly lose to you at such a crucial moment!?

C: 而我最擅长的事，恰巧就是等待。所以现在，你明白自己要付出什么了吗，萨缪尔小姐？还是说，我该称呼你为……
E: And patience happens to be one of my greatest strengths. So now, do you understand what you must give up, Miss Samuel? Or should I address you as...

C: …谁说我要和你赌了？
E: ...Who said I was betting with you?

C: 他们已经出发了。只有善良的本姑娘特地来喊你起床，还不快说声谢谢。
E: They've already left, leaving this kindhearted girl to wake you up. You owe her big time.

C: 这种日子就该撒开了玩——祝你玩得开心，匹诺康尼的大英雄！
E: It's time to let down our hair and enjoy ourselves on days like this — I hope you can enjoy yourself to the fullest, oh, great hero of Penacony!

C: 可惜当时我没法到场，否则肯定会助你们一臂之力。
E: Such a pity I couldn't be there, or else I would have lent a helping hand.

C: 你如何评价砂金？
E: How do you rate Aventurine?

C: 那你从一开始就不该骗我。
E: You shouldn't have lied to me in the beginning.

C: 这很重要吗？我甚至不是一颗真正的炸弹！
E: Is it really that important? I'm not even a real bomb!

C: 你好，我是一枚炸弹！距离我爆炸还有一段时间，你可以先到别处转转！
E: Hello, I'm a bomb! There's still some time before I explode, so you can take a look around first!

C: 我猜你也不是真正的炸弹。
E: I'm guessing you're also not a real bomb.

C: 你好，亲爱的演员。你可以叫我「导演」娃娃，这是我在片尾字幕常用的署名。
E: Hello, lovely actor. You can call me the Director Doll. I often use this name in film credits.

C: 米凯，还有流梦礁的各位住民，向你们致意，长梦的守夜人——
E: Micah, and residents of Dreamflux Reef, we raise a toast to you, watchers of the long dream...

C: 与加拉赫道别
E: Bid farewell to Gallagher

C: 是的，除了在场三位、姬子小姐、瓦尔特先生外，还有三天前已经入住的帕姆先生。
E: That's right. Besides the three of you, Miss Himeko, and Mr. Yang... Pom-Pom had already checked in three days ago.

C: {NICKNAME}忍者。
E: Ninja {NICKNAME}.

C: 我去，是睡蕉小猴！
E: Look, it's Slumbernana Monkey!

C: 那当然！
E: Of course!

C: 看这充满智慧的目光，光泽柔顺的皮毛，栩栩如生的神态，简直就和真正的睡蕉小猴一模一样！
E: Behold the intelligence in its eyes, its soft lustrous fur, and its lifelike appearance! It's just like having the real Slumbernana Monkey!

C: （歪嘴一笑）
E: (smirks)

C: 听到了吗？厉鬼啊，在我们的忍法面前化作飞烬吧！
E: Do you hear that? Evil spirit, be reduced to ashes before our ninjutsu!

C: 更何况我们也没胆量那么做，对吧，游侠先生？
E: And they certainly don't have the courage to do anything, anyway. Right, Mr. Ranger?

C: 在很长一段时间里，这里都是匹诺康尼仅有一处的自由之地，有些事是不该被改变的。
E: For a very long time, this was the only place in Penacony that had some freedom. Some things just shouldn't be changed.

C: <size=28>「放弃所有一切，眼前风光才能更好」~</size>
E: <size=28>"Life grows beautiful for those who will forfeit it all."</size>

C: 哪里，我才更应该道谢吧。感谢波提欧先生愿意伸出援手。巡海游侠的气度…果真名不虚传。
E: You're too kind. I should be thanking you instead. You have my gratitude for offering your assistance, Mr. Boothill. You live up to the name of a Galaxy Ranger indeed.

C: 善恶的事，我不怎么关心。接下来，在那小可爱社团里将要发生的，也和我在其他地方做的事差不多。
E: I don't give a rat's behind about people doin' good or evil. Whatever's about to unfold in that little club full of shirt-for-brains is no different from the usual stuff I do elsewhere.

C: 的确有一种办法，能让流梦礁在不被察觉的情况下，化解眼前的危机。
E: There is indeed a way to resolve the impending crisis without drawing The Family's eyes to Dreamflux Reef.

C: 枪已在手。
E: The gun is in hand.

C: 提前向你致谢，波提欧先生，但我得替翠丝提醒您一下，之前那七杯还没买单。
E: Thank you in advance, Mr. Boothill, but I'd like to remind you on behalf of Jessie that your seven cups from before haven't been paid yet.

C: 给它一拳
E: Punch it

C: 你一拳打在了这只猴子的脸上，柔软的触感包裹住了你的拳峰，猴子的面庞包容了你的戾气——你可算是打到棉花了。
E: You administer a swift punch to the monkey's face, its soft texture enveloping your fist. The monkey's visage accepts your anger — you definitely hit cotton.

C: 我将带来，属于流梦礁的声音。
E: I will bring forth Dreamflux Reef's very own sound.

C: 不不不，这位同学，筑梦和绘画完全不同，让我来做个示范吧蕉——
E: No, no. Dreamweaving is completely different from painting. Let me show you, bana—

C: 真够意思，走。
E: Great, let's head out.

C: 桶与猴的力量在你心中对抗、融合，最终汇聚在你指尖的颜料中，香蕉的气息与垃圾的气息在你的鼻腔交织，而你的脑海中浮现出了两种不同的画面……
E: The power of the can and the monkey battles and merges within you, ultimately channeling into the paint on your fingertips. The scents of bananas and garbage intertwine in your nostrils, while two distinct images emerge in your mind...

C: 这两只睡蕉小猴似乎正在交流些什么，但也有可能只是在发出无意义的*蕉声*。
E: The two Slumbernana Monkey seem to be communicating about something, but it's also possible that they're just making meaningless Banagibberish sounds.

C: 准备好了。
E: Ever-ready.

C: 美梦剧团质量太差了。
E: Sweet Dreams Troupe gotta up their game.

C: 蕉蕉蕉，当然是用睡蕉小猴为人们带来幸福蕉！
E: Bana mwuhaha! Why, spreading joy with Slumbernana Monkey, of course!

C: 呃，我说……
E: Uh, I think—

C: 我猜您之所以畏首畏尾，只想立刻求援，是认定这些由人类转变而来的小猴在失去心智后，是由我控制的。
E: Let me guess. You want to call for help right away because you're convinced these monkeys, formerly humans who have lost their minds, are under my command.

C: 依照记忆推算，这副模样距离他第一次对着土匪扣动扳机，至少还差着十年光阴。
E: If memory serves, this version of him is at least ten years removed from the older Boothill when he first fired a shot at a bandit.

C: 又见面了，先生。
E: We meet again, sir.

C: 当然是喝上一杯，对吧？此时此刻，您也是这么想的。
E: You'll want to get a drink before that, won't you? That should be the exact thought in your head right now.

C: 但区别在于，它的持续时间和影响规模，是吗？
E: But what differentiates this from other memetic viruses is the period and extent of its influence, is that right?

C: 你的旅程总是这样，被迫冒险、被迫努力、被迫解决麻烦，毫无自由可言。难道就不能让你真的选择一次「放弃」吗蕉？
E: Your journey always seems like this: forced to take risks, forced to strive, forced to solve problems, with no freedom at all. Can't you ever truly choose to "give the *banana* up"?

C: 走吧蕉！
E: Let's go, nana!

C: 「为了保护无助的弱者，拯救沉沦的忍之都。正义的忍侠狩猎着世间邪忍！」
E: "In order to protect the helpless weak and save the fallen Ninja Capital, the righteous Ninja Hero hunts down the world's Evil Ninjas!"

C: 但这世间的邪忍绝不止他，对吧？
E: But he's not the only Evil Ninja in this realm, right?

C: 谢谢，但嘉宝娜…是谁啊？
E: Thank you. But who is this... Gabbana?

C: 当然是凭借…「梦想」。
E: Of course, it's because of... my dreams.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>阴森恐怖的</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>Creepy or scary stuff</color>

C: 折纸大学的师生
E: Staff and Students of Paperfold University

C: 不能大家一起进去吗？
E: Can't we all go together?

C: 愚蠢的野蛮人，既然你急着寻死，我就成全你！
E: Foolish brute! I see you're eager to die. Very well then, I shall grant you just that!

C: 是说房间太冷了么？
E: Is the room too cold?

C: 看起来很有精神呢。那我们走吧。
E: I'm glad you're in good spirits. Alright, let's set off.

C: 这样啊……
E: I see...

C: 听闻各位在天界外兼行{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}与{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}之途，我想唯有如此直言相唤，方能略表敬意。
E: Through him, I've come to understand that you and your friends walk the paths of {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#} and Janus in places beyond the sky. Addressing you appropriately is the least I can do as a show of respect.

C: 尚显生机的时代里，但凡众城邦有幸起获之，无一例外将其视作宝藏，在邦交仪式中启封更象征着无上礼遇。
E: Back in the days of prosperity, cities fortunate enough to acquire it regarded it as one of the greatest treasures ever. Unsealing it during a ceremony held in honor of two cities' diplomatic ties was the highest form of respect one could show the other.

C: 你很敏锐，丹恒阁下。两位先前的作为已证明了自己的善意——我们愿以这樽神血蜜露为证，与开拓者们浅结盟谊。
E: Very perceptive, Mr. Dan Heng. Your heroic deeds have proven that you come in good faith. With the Dew of Divine Blood as testament, we wish to forge an alliance with the Trailblazers.

C: 呀，灰宝和丹宝还真是见微知著！很有加入「昏光庭院」的潜力喔。
E: Wow, Grayie and Dannie have sharp eyes indeed! You'd make outstanding members of the Twilight Courtyard!

C: 开个玩笑！不过，人家相信，这次来神悟树庭，一定也会收获满满。
E: I was just kidding! Anyway, I believe that this trip to the Grove of Epiphany will definitely be a fruitful one.

C: <size=36>有——人——吗——？</size>
E: <size=36>Helloooo? Is anyone thereeee?</size>

C: 啊…缇安来消息了！
E: Ah! Trianne just got in contact!

C: 也好。那缇安大人带上「引纬」吧，金丝在高处应该能发挥更大作用。
E: Good idea. In that case, please bring the Weft along with you, Lady Trianne. The golden thread will be much more effective from up above.

C: 又、又突然消失了？他说完了？
E: H—He disappeared again? Did he finish what he wanted to say?

C: …我会时刻盯着你的。
E: ...I'll keep my eyes on you at all times.

C: 也是喏…孤掌难鸣，量力而行吧。
E: Indeed... You can only do so much by yourself.

C: 恕我冒昧，剪接事实可也算是谎言。
E: With all due respect, omitting facts can also be considered deceit.

C: 人家现在热得发烫……
E: I'm burning hot right now...

C: 交给你们啦，人子们。祝君好运。
E: I'll leave it to you, children of humanity. May you be blessed with good fortune.

C: {RUBY_B#悬锋建城者}歌耳戈{RUBY_E#}之子，浴血代冠……
E: The son of {RUBY_B#Kremnos Founder}Gorgo{RUBY_E#}... will be crowned in blood.

C: 这一次的护送较量，白厄以<unbreak>27</unbreak>比<unbreak>25</unbreak>的惊人优势险胜。
E: This time, Phainon narrowly triumphed with a stunning <unbreak>27</unbreak> to <unbreak>25</unbreak> victory in terms of the number of trips safely escorted.

C: 你是对*我们*的事感到好奇吗，小风堇？
E: Are you curious about us, Hyacine?

C: 你还会写东西？
E: You can write?

C: 什…什么？老爷子他？
E: Wait, what? My old man died?

C: …老犟种！老倔牛！
E: ...That bullheaded old man! Stubborn as a mule!

C: 如今{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}火种缺位，黑潮卷土重来…作为对黑潮研究最深的学院城邦，树庭绝非不堪一击之辈，却在朝夕之间倾覆，徒留一城英灵血泪……
E: {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador's{RUBY_E#} Coreflame now sits vacant and the black tide has returned... The Grove is an academic city with the best understanding of the black tide. It shouldn't have fallen so easily, and yet it was taken overnight, leaving the city in blood and tears, haunted by the spirits of departed heroes...

C: 不，我不要王冠。听好了——倘若悬锋的王只有一种宿命，那它对我毫无意义……
E: No, I don't want the crown. Listen — If there's only one end for the kings of Kremnos, then the crown means nothing to me...

C: 不过…前提是{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}愿意帮助*我们*。
E: But... it all depends on whether {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#} is willing to help us.

C: …先不说这个，这封信为什么会出现在这里？缇安又是怎么感应到的……
E: ...Never mind that for now. Why is this letter here? And how did Trianne sense it?

C: …因为*我们*在发呆呢，缇安。别紧张。
E: ...We were just lost in our thoughts. Don't worry, Trianne.

C: 我猜猜…他们宁愿忍耐，也不愿求变？
E: Let me guess: They refused change and chose to put up with the situation instead?

C: …被悬锋族人猎捕，或沦为奴仆。没错，那亦是历史的一部分。
E: They were hunted by Kremnoans or enslaved. Indeed, that is undeniably also part of their history.

C: 这便是吉奥刻勒斯，他的功过自有人评说。但历史依然奉其为「开山者」，你觉得这是为何？
E: But that is Geocles for you. The merits of his actions — or the lack thereof — have been scrutinized by many, but historians nevertheless hail him as the Mountainbreaker. Why do you think that is?

C: 这道理再直白不过——<color=#dbc291ff>因为他行动了，用自己的双手刻写下变革。</color>他没有试图让所有人理解自己，也从未在两全其美的困境中蹉跎。
E: It's simply because <color=#dbc291ff>he took action and enacted change with his own hands.</color> He didn't try to make everyone understand him, nor did he even waste time trying to make everyone happy.

C: 不必再去追求缥缈的荣誉，也不用再把战死当成唯一的归宿。但你们必须改变，融入这座曾以冷眼注视的城邦。
E: You no longer need to chase fleeting honors or face death on the battlefield as if it were your sole destination. However, you must adapt to fit into this city that you once observed with indifferent eyes.

C: …你会这么想，我倍感荣幸。
E: ...I am truly honored to hear that.

C: 我将完成{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}未竟的事业，成为翁法罗斯最坚固的墙垣，抵御黑潮的袭击。
E: I shall see {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}'s aborted mission through to completion, and become the strongest bulwark for Amphoreus to defend against the black tide.

C: 并无所谓，称号。胜过所有旧王，你成就之事。
E: Matters not, the title. Surpassed all former kings, your achievements have.

C: 这个嘛……
E: Well...

C: 那就是你的母亲，迈德漠斯，你的守护者……
E: That of your mother, Mydeimos. Your guardian...

C: 我们誓死追随您。
E: We dedicate our lives to following you.

C: 可惜。
E: Pity.

C: 我们在千年前便已预见到离别的残酷，今日不过又品尝了一次它的滋味。
E: We foresaw this cruel parting a thousand years ago. Today is but a reminder of that bitter taste.

C: 别去…染指火种。这样，至少你依旧是…命运的宠儿。
E: Do not... get involved with the Coreflames. If you do that... You can still remain chosen by fate.

C: 你说得对，但至少得两遍。
E: I agree it's straightforward, but Mydei might need at least two shots at it.

C: 但为了体面，当权者还是稍微布置了一下。再加上有妈妈陪伴，*我们*的童年不算悲伤。
E: To maintain appearances, those in authority added some embellishments. And with Mother around, our childhood wasn't entirely without joy.

C: 也是。成为半神后，连时间观念都……
E: Right. Becoming a demigod sure changes how one lives through time...

C: 似乎是你们家乡的特产。
E: It looks like a specialty from your hometown.

C: 那就说明仪式已经成功，妈妈找到了赶走黑潮的办法，去到了彼岸那片崭新的天地。只是因为许多原因，妈妈没办法回过头，接上我的好女孩一起。
E: That means the ritual has succeeded. It means I've found a way to chase away the black tide and reached the new world on the other side. But for various reasons, I can't return to bring my sweet girl with me.

C: 嗯。毫不意外，一些人留意到了*我们*的企图，想要出手阻止……
E: Mmm, no surprise at all. Some people caught on to what we were planning and tried to intercept us...

C: <color=#dbc291ff>此乃——命运使然——</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>Such... is destiny —</color>

C: 我刚才就想问了…
E: I've been curious about that, too...

C: 门径之神，你在看着我吗？你未尽的道路…我会将其完成。
E: God of passages, can you see me? I will complete the path... that you started.

C: 人类的逐火之旅，正式开启。
E: Humanity's Flame-Chase Journey officially began.

C: 而是跨过门扉后，人们朝着花海的方向，自己踏出的小径。
E: But rather the paths that lead beyond the gate, where people tread toward the sea of flowers.

C: 没想到答案反而就在其中。哼，省了我不少力气，连那黑袍剑士的仪式剑都不需要了。
E: But I didn't expect the answer to be right within it. Hmph, that saved me a lot of trouble — I don't even need the black-robed swordmaster's ceremonial blade.

C: 老奥帝先生将这樽「圣杯」赠给了我，作为对参与圣杯战争的人的补偿。我希望将它摆放在晖长石号上，他本人也表示赞同，按照他的说法……
E: Old Oti gave me this "Holy Grail" as a token of gratitude for everyone who participated in the war. I wanted to display it on the Radiant Feldspar. He agreed wholeheartedly, saying...

C: 是「令咒」！
E: It's the Command Spells!

C: 嚯嗬嗬！真是俗不可耐的愿望，你甚至没想过要和「钻石」那样的大人物平起平坐……
E: Hohoho! What a delightfully mundane wish! You aren't even dreaming of rubbing shoulders with legends like "Diamond" or something...

C: 也正是这样一片土地，证明匹诺康尼并非梦国，它只是一处对现实的夸张投影。
E: This land proves Penacony isn't a dream kingdom, but an exaggerated reflection of reality.

C: 嘿，瞧您这话说的！我们流梦礁的消息最灵通了！
E: Oh, please! This is Dreamflux Reef, and news spreads like wildfire in this place.

C: 但能不能请你告诉我，这家店最招牌的菜品是什么？
E: Why don't you tell me this instead? What's the best dish on the menu?

C: ……生前的我并非什么了不起的人物，能被当作英灵召唤，我也感到很惊讶。
E: In life, I wasn't anyone special. So I'm quite surprised to have been summoned as a Heroic Spirit.

C: 匹诺康尼的人们没有脆弱到依靠「太一之梦」的拯救，我也自然不应该向圣杯祈求些什么。我更关心的是，老奥帝先生到底想利用圣杯做什么？
E: The people of Penacony are not so weak that they need "Ena's Dream" to save them. I shouldn't ask the Holy Grail for anything. What concerns me more is... what exactly does Old Oti want to use the Holy Grail for?

C: 不是啦…是让大家团结起来，暂时不要争斗。
E: No, no... We must unite everyone, temporarily setting aside any fighting.

C: 不，他是位老练的战士，绝对不会这么早就退场。但一定有人拿到了他的手机，想利用他的身份引诱我们前往克劳克影视乐园。
E: No, he's a seasoned warrior. There's no way he's out this early. But someone must've gotten their hands on his phone and is using his identity to lure us to Clock Studios Theme Park.

C: 我连困住刚才那名从者都力不从心，你居然想让我打败他们所有人？
E: I could barely restrain that one Servant, and now you expect me to take them all on?

C: 艾克托是谁？
E: Who's Ector?

C: 曾经，我也想成为某个人。我想挽救我脚下的这片土地和居住在其中的人们，免受化身为白龙的卑王伏提庚的荼毒，我想将人们从异族的铁蹄统治下解放出来。
E: Once upon a time, I also wanted to become a specific person. I wanted to save the land I stood on and the people who lived upon it. I wanted to repel the tyranny of King Vortigern the White Dragon. I wanted to deliver my people from the foreign invaders' hostile rule.

C: 但那不过是短暂的幻梦，麾下的骑士们离我而去，其中还有人向我兴兵挑战…不列颠又陷入了战火之中。
E: But that was all a fleeting dream. The knights who once served me abandoned me, and some even raised armies to challenge my rule... Britain was once again engulfed in war.

C: （这报表怎么好像无穷无尽的…而且，它们记录的东西也很奇怪。）
E: (These reports are endless... and the stuff written in there is really weird.)

C: 要多谢音符小姐那场梦境，让我看得更清楚了…<color=#dbc291ff>重要的是为了拯救什么、追逐什么而行走至今的过程</color>。
E: I must thank Miss Note's dream for showing me the truth... <color=#dbc291ff>What truly matters is not the ending, but the journey we've taken to chase something and to deliver it from destruction</color>.

C: 在你的梦境里，我看到了你的畏惧…但，御主，请不要在意自己身为人类应有的那些情感：对未知的惶惑，对失去的恐惧，还有对自己做不到某事的悔恨。
E: I saw your fears in your dream... but Master, don't be burdened by the emotions that come with being human: the fear of the unknown, the dread of loss, or the regret of what you couldn't achieve.

C: 呵，你们这群高高在上的干部，从来不把咱们这些底层员工当回事。一句话把我派去仙舟那样的蛮荒之地，又一句话调来匹诺康尼！我本来还以为这会是个美差……
E: Ha! You high and mighty executives have never treated us basic workers as people! You would send me to a primitive post like the Xianzhou with one word, and switch me over to Penacony with the next! I thought Penacony might be a juicy gig...

C: 你们难道没有发现，从刚才开始，我们开口说话时的声音不见了吗？
E: Haven't you noticed? Since earlier, our voices vanish when we speak.

C: 当心他的从者！那小子把这里改造成了——
E: Watch out for his Servant! That guy turned this whole place into—

C: 现在说这个是不是有点晚了？给我听好了，「此地——」
E: Isn't it a little late to say all that? Listen carefully, "This place—"

C: 这就是经费不足的悲哀，葛瑞迪，在你因自编自导自演而应接不暇的时候，片场的另一边，知更鸟小姐已经找到打破僵局的办法了。
E: That's what you get for cutting the budget, Grady. While you're busy writing, directing, and starring as yourself, Miss Robin already found the way out on the other side of the set.

C: Archer他恐吓我。
E: Archer's threatening me!

C: 领袖气质，朋友。
E: Call it leader charisma, my friend.

C: 呱？
E: Ribbit?

C: 那么反过来思考，你需要我修复这个机器，或者还原它的过程，对吧？
E: Then let's think in reverse. You want me to repair this machine or restore it to its original state, right?

C: 只要投身老奥帝麾下，替你们所有人实现愿望，也不无可能。这个道理，最精通投资的战略投资部高管，想必能做出合格的回答。我说的对吗，砂金先生？
E: Just pledge yourself to Old Oti, help grant everyone's wishes, and it's quite possible. Surely the Strategic Investment Department's top executive, who understands value, can give a proper answer. Right, Mr. Aventurine?

C: 你什么都不懂！我、我是梦泡电影的创造者，是我建立了匹诺康尼的第一家影视公司！如果不是我放弃了对电影技术的专利垄断，钟表匠和梅芙恩都不可能有后来的成就！
E: You know nothing! I—I am the creator of the dream bubble movie genre. It was I who established the first film company in Penacony! If I hadn't given up on my monopoly on film-making technology, the Watchmaker and Maeven would never have achieved what they did!

C: 不是，你之前这么锐评他…
E: Wait, weren't you the one who roasted him so hard before?

C: 人一死，似乎对什么都看得开了。
E: I've come to terms with that after dying.

C: 看来你知道不少内幕啊，那我倒好奇了……
E: Sounds like you've got insider intel. Now I'm curious...

C: 在一次平常的散步中，他临时起意，交予了我治理此地的权力。在他划定的方圆内，我的每一句话都将重如律法。
E: We were taking a walk in the park like any other day when he suddenly hit on the idea to have me manage the park. Within the domain he demarcated, my every word would hold the force of law.

C: 杨叔，你总算来了——大事不妙啦！
E: You're finally here, Mr. Yang! We have a huge problem!

C: 得请你做好被引力撕裂的准备了。
E: Brace yourself for gravitational disintegration.

C: 如此一来，我和那位行商便两清了。
E: With this, the debt between the traveling merchant and me is clear.

C: 不过，总有运气特别好的顾客。前不久，我刚收到一枚完美符合条件的梦泡。
E: That being said, there are always some lucky exceptions. Not long ago, I procured a dream bubble that sounds perfect for you.

C: 是什么让您不安呢？是天空的高远吗，还是未知？
E: What makes you feel this way? Is it because the sky is so far away, or because it's the unknown?

C: 甚至最坏的情况，如果希佩对此也听之任之，「以强援弱」又从何谈起？
E: In the worst-case scenario, if Xipe turned a blind eye, how could "the strong defending the weak" hold up?

C: 你辜负了许多人的信任。
E: You've disappointed many people.

C: 毕竟就算是星图上标注的世界，也会发生日新月异的变化。
E: Worlds that have been mapped on the astral charts also present new surprises from time to time.

C: 哎，你来得正好！我刚才打开相机，不知不觉就看起了以前的照片。
E: Hey, great timing! I just turned on my camera and was looking through some old photos.

C: 看样子，下一站已经决定了？
E: Looks like you've decided on your next stop?

C: 看吧，这就是那个与世隔绝，只能被忆庭之镜映照出的世界……
E: Here it is — the isolated world that can only be seen through the Garden's mirror...

C: 谁？列车组四个人都在啊。
E: Really? Who? All four of us are here.

C: 哎呀，可真是千钧一发…所以说，为什么这里会出现「记忆」的迷因？
E: Egads, what a close shave... But why are these Remembrance memes even showing up here?

C: 不对，二进制运算里怎么会出现「2」？
E: Wait, there shouldn't be a "2" in binary arithmetic!
Oof...

C: 那个白厄不简单。
E: There's more to this Phainon than meets the eye.

C: 刚才白厄阻止我向难民问话，又说那女孩会解答我们的疑问。意思很明显了。
E: Phainon interrupted me as I was trying to gather information from that refugee, and now he's saying the girl will answer our questions. His intent is obvious.

C: 先生，*我们*无比理解你对泰坦的信仰。也许在你看来，庇佑圣城的{RUBY_B#<color=#dbc291ff>负世之泰坦</color>}<color=#dbc291ff>刻法勒</color>{RUBY_E#}是异邦的神明。
E: Sir, we deeply understand your faith in the Titans. Perhaps in your eyes, {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#}, the protector of the holy city, is but a god from a foreign land.

C: 救救我们吧，万径之门……
E: Save us, Gate of Infinity...

C: 大地兽的脊背如同摇篮，你逐渐睡去，而商队经过一段时间的跋涉也即将抵达奥赫玛……
E: The back of a dromas is like a cradle. You gradually fall asleep, and the caravan will arrive at Okhema after some travel time...

C: 不必了…
E: No, thank you...

C: 你好，阿格莱雅女士。
E: Hello, Lady Aglaea.

C: {RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}，请回应吧……
E: {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}, please answer our calls...

C: 你的问句中夹杂着悲悯。内心深处，你或许已在宣判我们弱小无助。
E: I seem to hear a note of pity in that question. Perhaps you find us to be weak and defenseless.

C: 陷阱？当然不是。请把它当作一种交流的仪式。
E: Trap? Hardly. Think of it as a ritual that allows us to communicate.

C: 也许，你们就是黄金裔在等待的「援军」。
E: The two of you may be just the "reinforcements" that the Chrysos Heirs have been waiting for.
Ah...

C: 遐蝶没有骗你，这红土块的味道确实相当…苦涩。这种苦涩不同于任何烈性药物，它直击你心灵的绵软之处，令你开始质疑「开拓」的意义。
E: Castorice wasn't lying. The taste of this red clay is truly... bitter. It's a bitterness unlike any medicine. It strikes the softest part of your soul, making you question the very meaning of "Trailblazing."

C: 呜呜嗡嗡嗡…呜嗡嗡！
E: Grumphhhh... Grumphhh!

C: 好神秘的一位小姐…
E: What a mysterious lady...

C: 她不怎么温柔。
E: She's not that gentle.

C: 这就是个大号的「飞天坛递」，你是在自寻死路！
E: That is a giant Flying Amphora. You're going to fall to your death!

C: 既聪明又愚蠢，形容的就是这种人吧？
E: A clever fool. That's how to describe people like him, right?

C: 这是一条生命！没办法了，告诉他吧……
E: It's a human life after all! There's no choice. Let's just tell him...

C: 这些画家的速度真是惊人…和外面没什么不同。
E: The speed of the artists here is just as astonishing as everywhere else...

C: 这个砝码似乎被泰坦施加了祝福，无法使用变手抓取。
E: This weight seems to be blessed by the Titan and cannot be grabbed using a magic hand.

C: 金色的丝线剧烈地颤动。
E: The golden thread trembles violently.

C: 眼下奥赫玛正需要援手，我不想就这样失去两位盟友。
E: At present, Okhema is desperate for aid, and I am loath to lose two allies just like that.

C: 谁来救救——
E: Someone, anyone, save us...

C: 请你相信一名战士的直觉。
E: Please believe a warrior's intuition.

C: 我没有责怪你。
E: I don't blame you.

C: 丹恒将三月七的相机交给了你……
E: Dan Heng gives March 7th's camera to you...

C: 触景生情，想家了？
E: Is seeing all this making you homesick?

C: 拍就拍。
E: I'll take a photo of it then.

C: 哎哟，动作这么利索？
E: Whoa! You're nimbler than I thought!

C: 马上就要跟万敌汇合了，<color=#dbc291ff>要不要把这片区域清理干净，多收集些</color>{RUBY_B#<color=#dbc291ff>悬锋徽记</color>}<color=#dbc291ff>战利品</color>{RUBY_E#}<color=#dbc291ff>？</color>
E: We'll be meeting up with Mydei soon. <color=#dbc291ff>Want to clean up this area and increase our</color> {RUBY_B#<color=#dbc291ff>Kremnos crest</color>}<color=#dbc291ff>trophy</color>{RUBY_E#} <color=#dbc291ff>count?</color>

C: （泰坦的低语）
E: *Titan's murmurs*

C: 把炎枪和球棍放上去。
E: Place the flaming lance and the baseball bat on it.

C: 攻击天秤的托盘。
E: Attack the scale's weighing pan.

C: 如此一来，就算是通过了泰坦的考验。
E: If this is indeed the case, we will have passed the Titan's challenge.

C: 这到底…是怎么回事？
E: What exactly... is going on?

C: 接受欧洛尼斯的邀请。
E: Accept Oronyx's invitation.

C: …如果可以，这次不要乱斩牛杂了。
E: ...If possible, can we not have Beef Offal Stew for once?

C: 不存在的记忆开始降温，结霜…凝冻。
E: Nonexistent memories begin to cool, frost... then freeze.

C: 怎么了，你看起来…很紧张。
E: What's wrong? You seem... very nervous.

C: 我很高兴能有你在，{NICKNAME}。
E: I am glad to have you here, {NICKNAME}.

C: 你应该也会踏上做梦也想象不到的冒险吧？毕竟，你就是为冒险而生的。
E: You'll also embark on adventures beyond your wildest imagination. After all, you were born for adventure.

C: 漫长？你在说什么？
E: Long? What are you talking about?

C: 总算出来了…那遗迹里真是一团糟。
E: At last, we're out... That place was in total disarray.

C: 帮助我们吧，泰坦！为了防止这个世界因疯狂毁于一旦！
E: Help us, Titan! Help us prevent this world from being ruined by madness!

C: 这种时候就别说客气话了。你们找到解决方法了，对吧？
E: No need for formalities at a time like this. I trust that you have found a solution?

C: 缇宝老师，接下来我想兵分两路：由我立刻动身，赶往悬锋城支援万敌。
E: Tribbie, let's split up here. I'll make my way to Kremnos immediately to lend my support to Mydei.

C: 至少说明他们都还活着。
E: At least we know they're still alive.

C: …被万敌阁下杀死的结局。
E: ...He was killed by Lord Mydei.
Huh!?

C: 尚未安眠的亡魂，咳…你听到了什么？
E: O, restless soul... *cough* Tell us, what have you heard?

C: 实验品？
E: An experiment?

C: 我在聆听……
E: I am listening...

C: 不…我能唤来的，只有还未彻底死去的灵魂。
E: No... I can only summon souls that haven't fully passed on.

C: 这场仪式——有什么要注意的吗？
E: Is there anything we should know about this ritual?

C: 我没感觉到。
E: Pick up on what?

C: 也难怪，他要经历的事太过特殊。虽然泰坦只是翁法罗斯本地的神明，但要从「人」晋升为另一种存在…其中过程难以想象。
E: I guess it's understandable, seeing how he's about to experience something extraordinary. The Titans may only be local gods of Amphoreus, but a mortal ascending to something else altogether... sounds like a lot to take in.

C: 他已经提前打过招呼了，遐蝶小姐。
E: It's fine, Miss Castorice. He spoke to me already.

C: 奇迹渴慕的第七枚火种，曾属于伟大的「天谴之矛，{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}」。而于此交还它的，是我等黄金裔推举出的英雄：一位正直的公民，一名骁勇的战士，一个高尚的灵魂。
E: The seventh Coreflame needed for the miracle, that once belonged to the great Lance of Fury, {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}, shall now be returned by an elected hero of the Chrysos Heirs: An upstanding citizen, a valiant warrior, and a noble soul.

C: （泰坦的呓语）
E: (Titan's murmurs)

C: 你好像有些忧心忡忡。
E: You seem worried.

C: 人在自知时间所剩无多时，总能突破桎梏。问题层出不穷，反倒让我的阅读效率变得拔萃。
E: On the contrary. Knowing that time is limited can push one to overcome their limitations. The weight of these responsibilities seems to have enhanced my reading efficiency.

C: 这是把我架在火上烤啊？
E: Do I even have any say in this?

C: 归还仪式将近，早些休息吧，{NICKNAME}。
E: It's almost time for the ritual. Get some rest, {NICKNAME}.

C: 不必有负担，和「纷争」的试炼一样，缇宁和白厄会在外接应。一旦形势有变，他们会介入试炼将你救出。
E: Don't feel burdened. Just like during the trial of Strife, Trinnon and Phainon will be waiting for you outside. If something unforeseen were to occur, they will intervene in the trial and rescue you.

C: 「庄严的十二泰坦，支撑世界的支柱——」
E: "O majesty of the Twelve Titans, pillars of the world—"

C: 等我回来，朋友们。
E: Wait for my return, my friends.

C: 有什么未了的心事吗，大家伙？
E: What's troubling you, big fella?

C: 唔，别在意…{NICKNAME}只是有点紧张，觉得…对，进展太快！
E: Ahh, don't mind {M#him...}{F#her...} {NICKNAME} is just feeling a little nervous and thinks that... Right, {M#he}{F#she} thinks that things are moving a little too quickly!

C: 求求了，原谅人家吧！
E: I beg you, please forgive me!

C: 在吾看来，汝仅持这点便足以与凡夫划清界限哪。
E: From my perspective, this point alone was enough to separate you from the average person.

C: 所以，汝此行前来黎明云崖，莫不是仅为了寻求庇护吧……
E: Therefore, it seems that your journey to Dawncloud this time is not just to seek protection...

C: 她早就准备好对我处刑了。
E: She is prepared to execute me.

C: 优势在我，赢麻了。
E: The upper hand is ours. We thrashed them.

C: 我还什么都没有做呢。
E: Isn't it a little too soon to say that?

C: 明明都走过了如此漫长的旅途，我仍找寻不到生与死的答案，永远无可奈何……
E: Having walked such a long road, I am still unable to find the answer to life and death. I am resigned to eternal despair...

C: 还有我的神血蜜露！
E: And my Dew of Divine Blood!

C: 一段时间以前……
E: Some time ago...

C: …我们失去了缇安。
E: ...We lost Trianne.

C: 刽子手
E: You executioner!

C: 什么……
E: ...What?

C: 但您似乎…不以为意？这让我有些意外。
E: And yet, you seem to... not mind? This is quite surprising to me.

C: 在有些人看来…被我视作诅咒的力量，反而是一种「赐福」。
E: For some people... This power that I possess is a "blessing" rather than a curse.

C: 也正是带着这样的心愿，即便身陨，玻吕刻斯的灵魂仍旧盘桓人间，静静地注视并记录着有关至亲的一切……
E: That wish is the reason Pollux's soul still lingers in the mortal realm even after their fall, quietly watching and documenting every detail of their sister's life...

C: 在这场漫长的旅途中，我的肩头早已被强加过太多使命。我也曾迷茫，乃至愠怒过……
E: Too many responsibilities were forced upon me in the course of this long journey. I was once lost, even upset...

C: 请你完成这一世的试炼，赐我以「死亡」的拥抱，点燃「生命」的火苗。
E: Complete your trial in this life. Grant me the embrace of "Death" and light the spark of "Life" ablaze.

C: 有人来了，准备——
E: Someone's coming, ready...

C: 票总是要投的，否则这场大会不就毫无意义了？
E: Everyone must cast their vote, or this assembly would serve no purpose.

C: 请你告诉我：你确实如白厄所说，无论结果如何，都将捍卫本次大会庄严的决议么？
E: Will you, as Phainon has promised, stand by the decision made in the assembly, regardless of outcome?

C: 我敬爱你，老师。但你明白……
E: I respect you immensely, sir, but—

C: 别了，阁下。愿我们…在新世界再会。
E: Farewell, then. May we... reunite in the new world.

C: 还记得那句预言吗？「花海尽头，生者的魂灵将温暖汝之指尖。相拥之后，便是永恒的离别。」
E: Do you recall that prophecy? "At the end of the sea of flowers, the souls of the living shall warm thy fingertips, and after an embrace... there shall be eternal separation."

C: 介意让我共鸣你的火种么，阿格莱雅？
E: May I resonate with your Coreflame, Aglaea?

C: 灰黯之手，塞纳托斯，它已记起了昔日的名字。它从白昼中来，并在这里步入你们的行列，回到它芬芳的居室。
E: The Hand of Shadow, Thanatos, remembered their name from the past! From daylight they came and to their fragrant dwelling they return, to walk now among your ranks.

C: 时间紧迫，还是尽快动起来吧。且行且看。
E: The clock is ticking... I should search for clues as I move.

C: 连我也不知道，原来那刻夏老师进行过「天空」的研究。他从未提起此事。
E: This is new. I didn't know Professor Anaxa was researching the Sky. He's never mentioned anything about it.

C: 「敬拜学派」是…
E: Who are the Venerationists?

C: 一本被众多学者密密麻麻批注过的书，书名为《诡辩术：提升辩论技巧的四十种方法》。
E: A book covered in annotations from many scholars. Its title is The Art of Sophistry: 40 Ways to Improve Your Debating Skills.

C: 不用打开也知道，里头一定是「那刻夏不敬神明，其人的存在就是对社会秩序的威胁」…诸如此类。
E: I can already see what they must have written: "Anaxa has no respect for the gods! His very existence undermines order in our society!" ...They're probably all things like that.

C: 所以，他成功了？
E: Did he succeed?

C: 安静些，泰坦。继续欣赏这场美妙的戏剧，真相自然会水落石出。
E: Quiet, Titan. Continue to enjoy this splendid play, and the truth will naturally reveal itself.

C: 身为「死亡」的神选，却依旧不知该如何面对它啊……
E: Despite being Death's chosen one, it seems you still don't know how to face it...

C: 「以{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}之『勇气』为证：此子从未在战场上退缩过一步——」
E: "{RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}'s Courage is a testament that they have never once retreated from a battle."

C: 她已经…放弃我们了吗？
E: Has she... given up on us?

C: 我…没能做到。
E: I... failed to do so.

C: …它就在眼前了。
E: ...It's right in front of us.

C: 没时间给我们揣测了……
E: No time for speculation...

C: 我…知道……
E: I... know...

C: 我们都有必须活下去的理由——
E: We all have something worth living for —

C: 要抓住它亮起的时机，穿过大门！
E: We need to get through the doors when it lights up!

C: 要想办法浇灭这股热流！
E: We need to find a way to quench this heatwave!

C: 哎…来得还真快哪，那家伙…都不给我点时间做心理准备。
E: Ah... they're already here. Barely gave me a moment to catch my breath.

C: 唉，没想象中那么好玩…毕竟对面是个没理智的疯子，不擅长勾心斗角的游戏哪。
E: Sigh... Not as fun as I'd hoped. I guess a brainless brute isn't much fun when it comes to mind games.

C: （不过…真的甩不掉它吗？太不可理喻了。）
E: (I... seriously can't shake them off, huh... This is borderline impossible)

C: 直到…永远？
E: Until... forever?

C: 「支撑世界的支柱……」
E: "Pillars of the world..."

C: 可偏偏在一个无人在意的银河角落，竟然还有一台漏网之鱼仍在运转；又偏偏是它，最后成了孕育一名「绝灭大君」的摇篮……
E: Yet, in a forgotten corner of the cosmos, one slipped through the net and remained operational. And it was this machine that eventually became the cradle for the birth of a certain Lord Ravager...

C: 别、别这么轻易放弃呀！
E: D—Don't give up just like that!

C: 如果归还艾格勒的火种能令天空诅咒失效，那我们也不必费尽心思寻找归路了…只要专心帮助黄金裔们便是。
E: If returning Aquila's Coreflame can break the sky's curse, we won't have to exhaust ourselves searching for a way back. We can simply focus on aiding the Chrysos Heirs.

C: 假设，丹恒阁下，我能为两位开辟一条脱离翁法罗斯的通路，且能绕过艾格勒的神罚……
E: Hypothetically, Lord Dan Heng, if I could open up a path out of Amphoreus that circumvents Aquila's divine punishment...

C: 「<color=#dbc291ff>阳雷骑士塞涅俄丝击落晨昏之眼</color>，标志着尼卡多利与艾格勒之间以百年为单位的漫长神战落下帷幕……」
E: "<color=#dbc291ff>With Seliose, the Daythunder Knight, striking down the Eye of Twilight</color>, the divine war between Nikador and Aquila, which spanned centuries, came to an end..."

C: 嘻，小伊卡还是很喜欢听这些传说故事呢。你肯定也想象着，自己有朝一日能和英雄塞涅俄丝身边的翼兽一样威风吧？
E: Heh, Little Ica loves listening to the stories from the legends. I'm sure you're also imagining, one day, you'll be as awe-inspiring as the winged beasts by Seliose's side?

C: 呵…无礼的野猫。
E: Heh... Mind your manners, kitty.

C: 但我的金线…却没有丝毫震颤。
E: But my golden thread... doesn't tremble at all.

C: 这里现在应该安全了，快干活吧。
E: It should be safe here now. Get to work.

C: 我会给你衣服，帮你暖和起来。然后……
E: I'll give you clothes, warm you up, and...

C: …我不需要考问，也无需动用金线度量。我知道你所做的一切都是为了生存，不计代价。
E: ...I don't need to ask, nor do I need to use the golden thread. I know everything you do is for survival, at all costs.

C: 所以你才会频繁经过。所以你才会羞于停留，因为你害怕自己配不上「金织」的招牌。
E: That's why you keep coming by but also why you hesitate to stay longer. You worry you'll tarnish the "Goldweaver" name.

C: 不久以前，我在黎明云崖的公民大会上发表了一番讲话。
E: Not long ago, I spoke at the citizens' assembly at Dawncloud.

C: 还记得，那个时候…从这里往山下望，一眼就能辨认出「金织」的招牌。
E: I remember you could see the "Goldweaver" sign from here, all the way down the mountain.
...Erm.

C: 要是能让所有人都相信我就好了…我想让大家都认为，世界是个美好的地方…世上的人们都很单纯善良。
E: I just want everyone to believe that the world is beautiful and that everyone is simple and kind... If only I could get everyone to believe that...

C: 我说，救世小子，你是不是打心底觉得…我压根没有拒绝你的可能？
E: Hey, Deliverer. Do you honestly think that there's no way I'll turn you down?

C: 哈！什么糠包秘法，我动动手指就能破了它的机关。
E: Ha! Secret arts my foot. I could break those mechanisms with a flick of my finger.

C: 听闻如此噩耗，也没有公民有心情入浴了。
E: No citizen feels like bathing after hearing such terrible news.

C: 该不会是他们起了内讧…
E: Could it be that they're infighting...

C: 此刻…是我最好的离席时机。
E: Now... is the best time for my exit.

C: 我也和你一样没听懂呢，小伊卡。
E: Nope. I didn't understand that either, Little Ica.
Mmm...

C: 缇宝老师，还有…这位身形轻盈的女士，一定就是赛飞儿小姐吧？
E: Lady Tribbie, and... this graceful lady must be Miss Cipher.

C: 因为「天空」笼庇万物，它若分崩离析，世界也将被碾碎。所以，阿格莱雅大人才会将{RUBY_B#天空之泰坦}艾格勒{RUBY_E#}的火种作为征途的收尾。
E: It's because Sky shelters all beneath it. If it were to shatter, the world would fall apart with it. That's why Lady Aglaea made the Coreflame of {RUBY_B#Sky Titan}Aquila{RUBY_E#} the final step in our campaign.

C: 我从未想过这种情景…我本以为这一天来临时，我会为所有先祖感到释然。但现在……
E: I have never imagined this... I thought I would feel happy for all my ancestors when this day came, but now...

C: 咦，说到丹恒…他人在哪里呢？
E: Hey, speaking of Dan Heng... where is he?

C: 嗯，我已经记住啦。现在…我们试着唤醒它吧？
E: Yes, I already memorized it. Now... Shall we try to wake it up?

C: 你能搞定吗，风堇？
E: Can you handle it, Hyacine?

C: 但…很扭曲，又很黑暗…就像那些黑潮怪物一样…！
E: But... it's so twisted, and very shadowy... like those black tide creatures...!

C: 你好，天马姐姐。
E: Hello, Sister Pegasus.

C: 想阻挠我们吗，被囚禁的泰坦？
E: You think to hinder us, imprisoned Titan?

C: 它真长这样吗？
E: Do they really look like that?

C: 虽然形象上堪称天差地别，但说起来…小伊卡应该也是一只翼兽吧？
E: They look completely different, but... Little Ica should also be a winged beast, right?

C: 虽然形象上堪称天差地别，但说起来…小伊卡应该也是一只翼兽吧？
E: They look completely different, but... Little Ica should also be a winged beast, right?

C: 浑象仪在前方…被黑潮造物把守着。
E: The celestial globe is right ahead... but there are black tide creatures guarding it.

C: 也可能不是损坏，只是缺少了能源驱动。
E: Maybe it's not damaged, but is missing an energy source.

C: 嘟…嘟？
E: Doot... Doot?

C: 你会看到传说不为人知的一面，年轻的雅辛忒丝。面对尘封千年的真相，你的步伐还能否如此坚定？
E: You'll witness a side of the legend that's never been told, young Hyacinthia. With a truth hidden for a millennium before you, can you still walk with the same conviction?

C: 那些被世界遗忘的过往会在你眼前一一重现。牢牢抓住你那不可动摇的信念，你会需要它的支撑。
E: The forgotten past will reveal itself to you, one fragment at a time. Hold fast to your resolve — you'll need it to face what lies ahead.

C: 最近过得还好吗？距你离开奥莱诺斯已经过了几个月啦，*我们*很想念在一起的那段时光。
E: How have you been lately? It's been a few months since you left Oleinus, and we really miss the times we spent together.

C: …回到清醒的世界吧！
E: ...And return to your senses!

C: 我知道这很难接受…但即便要受一辈子埋怨，我也必须对你们负责。
E: I know this is hard to accept... but even if it means being resented for the rest of my life, I still have to be responsible for you.

C: 告诉你吧！本泰坦毕生所求…就是跟赛飞儿一起，编织出这世上最伟大的诡计！
E: Let me tell you then! My lifelong ambition... was to work with Cipher to conjure the greatest trick in the world!

C: 缇宝老师——请一定撑到我们回来！
E: Tribbie! Please hold on till we get back!

C: 但为人所不知的是：被遗忘的它们，仍在孜孜不倦地求解那神明的一问。那道穷尽战火与浩劫，无数天才——连同两位机械帝皇在内——都未能得证的难题……
E: But what nobody knows is that, though forgotten, they never stopped seeking the divine answer. A question that survived war and disaster, stumping even the greatest minds — including both Mechanical Emperors...

C: 我好像做了个怪梦。想不起来，先不管了。阳光正好啊！一天才刚开始呢。
E: What a strange dream I had. It's gone now though. But look! Perfect sunshine! The day's still young!

C: 咳，好吧。{F#她}{M#他}今天…人设应该还没想好。
E: *awkward cough* Well... {F#s}he hasn't decided on a character for today yet.

C: 孩子们要是抽到「君王」或「勇士」之类的好牌就欢呼雀跃，抽到「魔人」或者「酒鬼」就嚷嚷着这次不算，再来一次……
E: Yeah, all the kids would get so excited drawing cards like "Ruler" or "Warrior," but throw fits over "Devil" or "Drunkard" and demand a redo.

C: 我倒是还能想起几个地点…来，我们一起去看看吧？
E: I can think of a few spots... Let's go check it out.

C: 都是为了学生，累点也没关系。
E: Anything for my students. I don't mind the work.

C: 入口是在哪儿来着……
E: The entrance should be around here somewhere...

C: 就在这边～太久没去拜访小妖精们，连去迷境的路上都长满杂草，看不清了呢。
E: Right here~ The path to the Maze is hidden under all these weeds. It's been too long since we visited the fairies.

C: 齿轮一旦转动，就无法回头了…
E: Once the wheels start turning, there's no going back...

C: 小巧的「医师」牌，虽然是柔和的颜色，但其中蕴含的勇气不比任何一张牌少，甚至足以融化寒冷的坚冰。
E: The humble "Healer" may seem gentle in hue, but its courage matches any other, strong enough to melt even the coldest ice.

C: 呃…这个声音，怎么像是能预料到我们在说什么一样？
E: Wait, what's with that condescending tone? It's almost as if it knows what we're about to say.

C: 啊？我怎么了，有哪里不对吗？反倒是你这副上来就瞧不起人的口气……
E: What's that supposed to mean? And what's with that condescending tone...

C: 这，真是让人心情复杂…我能学会他身上那股自信的劲吗？
E: Well, that's... something. Could I ever be that sure of myself?

C: 就连泰坦也……
E: Not even Titans can...

C: 你在…对我说话…？
E: Are you... talking to me?

C: <color=#dbc291ff>是带着无法被改变的过往，背负它走向未来的决心。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>...Is the resolve to shoulder an immutable past, and carry it into the future.</color>

C: 为什么，是这种样子呢？
E: Why does it look like this?

C: 来吧：让我们拥抱神谕所言的奇迹，烧尽这世界上所有的污秽……
E: Come, let's claim the miracle we were promised, and burn away every last shadow in this world...

C: <color=#dbc291ff>…共计<unbreak>33550335</unbreak>次。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>...A total of <unbreak>33,550,335</unbreak> times.</color>

C: 忘了吗？我早已为真理献身，如今与你同行的，不过是你头脑中一道思想罢了。
E: Have you forgotten so quickly? I died for truth long ago. What walks with you now is but a thought in your mind.

C: 哈…哈哈……
E: Ha... Haha...

C: <color=#dbc291ff>名为「翁法罗斯」的永恒之地，正是那台权杖漫长而孤独的演算——</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>The Eternal Land known as "Amphoreus" is nothing more than the Scepter's endless, lonely extrapolation...</color>

C: 第 1 次永劫回归 尽头
E: The 1st Eternal Recurrence: End

C: 这就是你即将踏入的轮回次数。
E: This is the cycle you're about to enter.

C: >>>永劫回归#1：对象卡厄斯兰那成功说服十二黄金裔，以非暴力方法回收十二枚火种。经检验，该越权访问行为并未对实验进程产生实质性影响。
E: >>> Eternal Recurrence #1: Subject Khaslana persuaded the twelve Chrysos Heirs to recover all twelve Coreflames in a peaceful way. After verification, the unauthorized access did not have a substantive impact on the experimental process.

C: 你能理解…我的困境？
E: You know what I'm going through?

C: 你的意思是，刚才那些都是在骗人？他们想诱导我前进？
E: You mean those people, they're lying? Luring me into a trap?

C: 所以，既然这扇门背后就是翁法罗斯，那我没有理由不追上去。而只要我们三人整整齐齐，就没什么克服不了的困难。
E: That's why I need to go through... Amphoreus or not. When the three of us are together, there's nothing we can't handle.

C: 与其说「认识」，不如说是「记得」？
E: Rather than "knowing" you, it might be better described as... I "remember" you...?

C: 需要更多天外盟友的支援。
E: We need the help of more allies from beyond the sky.

C: 这…是不是有些大材小用了？丹恒嘱托过，不能让你使用那股力量。可千万不要冒险呀。
E: Wouldn't that... be a waste? Dan Heng specifically said not to let you use that power. Please don't take that risk.

C: 毕竟，留给您独自品赏的时光已然无几。
E: For you do not have much time left to enjoy such solitary delights.

C: 永劫回归已经上演了<unbreak>33550336</unbreak>次。而在这最后一次轮回中，我答应白厄接过「救世主」之名，代他拯救这个世界；而他则会完成无数个自己的夙愿：撕裂天空，与「毁灭」正面对决。
E: The eternal recurrences had already played out <unbreak>33,550,336</unbreak> times. In this final cycle, I promised Phainon to take on the title of "Deliverer" and save the world in his stead, while he would fulfill the wishes of the countless versions of himself: Tear the sky asunder and confront the Destruction head-on.

C: 接受我的坦诚——或承担违抗它的代价。
E: You can either accept my sincerity or face the consequences of defying it.

C: 「我们——即是浪潮！」
E: "We... are the rising tide!"

C: 怎么会这样，和过去三千万个翁法罗斯完全不同…是谁改变了历史？
E: How could this be so different from the previous thirty million Amphoreus cycles... Who altered history?

C: 就是这样，进退有度，从容自信。这才是人家熟悉的{NICKNAME}。
E: Calm and confident. That's the {NICKNAME} I'm familiar with.

C: 我们出发吧，伙伴？
E: Let's set off, my friend.

C: 为两位献上迟来的自我介绍：我名为海瑟音，是宣誓效忠凯撒的「剑旗爵」，奥赫玛盟军的骑士统领。
E: Please allow me to belatedly introduce myself. My name is Hysilens, and I am the Dux Gladiorum who swears fealty to the Imperator, as well as the Knight Commander of the Okheman Alliance.

C: 这是我们第一次踏上凯撒治下的土地。好惊人，奥赫玛比想象中还要宏伟好多…要是没有各位一路关照，我们恐怕早就晕头转向啦。
E: This is our first time in the Imperator's realm. Okhema is even more magnificent than we imagined... If you all weren't here to look after us, we'd be completely lost and confused.

C: 哼，凯撒大人也不怕脏了自己的手…可笑的排场。
E: Tch, so the Great Imperator isn't afraid of getting her hands dirty... What a ridiculous display.

C: 您的意思是……
E: You mean...

C: 首先排除机器头自己，祂主打一个事不关己高高挂起，不可能会亲自下场。但这家伙究竟是什么来头，我和螺丝还在逐一排除……
E: We can first exclude Droidhead THEMSELF. THEY specialize in minding THEIR own business and wouldn't intervene personally. But Screwy and I are still eliminating possibilities one by one...

C: 按照记忆中重复了许多次的步骤，你将脸浸入灵水盆中，合上双目，屏住呼吸。
E: Following the steps you've repeated countless times in your memory, you submerge your face in the spirit basin, close your eyes, and hold your breath.

C: 编造一个善意的谎言。
E: Make up a white lie.

C: 呀，两位，是来找*我们*的吗？我的意思是，找缇宝还是阿雅？
E: Ahh, dear guests. Are you here for us? I mean... are you here for Tribbie or Agy?

C: 果然，比起蜜酿，还是燕麦粥更适合*我们*。
E: Called it. Oatmeal suits us way better than honey brew.

C: 这是…凯撒的授意？
E: Is this... also what the Imperator wants?

C: 容我更正：<color=#dbc291ff>我会修正旧日「律法」中封闭翁法罗斯的条约，并将黑潮汇入再创世的涡流。</color>
E: Allow me to adjust my statement: <color=#dbc291ff>I will correct the regulations within the old "Law" that sealed off Amphoreus, and merge the black tide with the torrents of Era Nova.</color>

C: 真为难啊。无论如何布局，法吉娜这一战…牺牲在所难免。
E: What a difficult situation... No matter how we position our forces, this battle against Phagousa... will result in many casualties.

C: 若我没有记错，您因为献祭不足，在与{RUBY_B#律法之泰坦}塔兰顿{RUBY_E#}的对弈中已落败过一次……
E: If I recall correctly, you've already lost a bout against {RUBY_B#Law Titan}Talanton{RUBY_E#} due to offering insufficient sacrifices...

C: 而我身边的少女，昔涟…也同样肩负着沉重的宿命。
E: And Cyrene, the young woman standing beside me... also carries an equally heavy destiny.

C: 只为制衡双边，意图将鄙人和{M#他们}{F#她们}都变作你手中的棋子。
E: Where you would try to control both sides and turn both them and me into your pawns.

C: 对。恐怕小凯撒从未信任任何人，自始至终她只想看看，究竟哪边能献上更多诚意……
E: That's right. That little Imperator never trusted anyone. She was always trying to see which side had more sincerity...

C: 什么？这声音…是{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}？
E: What was that voice? Was it... {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}?

C: 我给予您的选择，简截了当：合作，或是毁灭，再无其他。
E: I am giving you a simple choice: To collaborate or to be destroyed. There is no other way.

C: <color=#eb4d3dff>{NICKNAME}——异常量已锁定。</color>
E: <color=#eb4d3dff>[Locked onto outlier: {NICKNAME}]</color>

C: …你放弃了。那狂乱的召唤过于诱人，以你的修为还无法完全与之抗衡。倘若在此刻坠入「毁灭」的黑渊…或许一切都将陷入万劫不复。
E: ...you gave up. The beckoning of the chaos was too tempting, and your current power level wasn't enough to fully resist it. If you were to fall into the black abyss of Destruction at this moment... perhaps everything would be lost to the void.

C: 为了取得你的信任，咱们就先自报家门——流光忆庭，你应该再熟悉不过了吧？
E: We'll introduce ourselves to gain your trust. We are the Garden of Recollection. You should be very familiar with that name by now.

C: 前进吧♭
E: Go forth ♭

C: 另外，能再帮我一个忙么？
E: By the way, can you do me another favor?

C: 海妖们前赴后继，寻找泰坦的碎片，直至身躯腐败，化作枯骨，只为能迎来允诺中的欢宴。
E: Sea sirens followed one after another, hunting for the Titan's fragments... until their flesh decayed and their bones crumbled, all for the promised final feast.

C: 「而勇士一生只死一回——这自有神明为她作证。」
E: "But the brave face death but once, which gods stand witness."

C: 看来，她也察觉到了你的造访，幻境的根基已经开始动摇……
E: It seems she's sensed your presence. The fantasia's foundation is starting to crack...

C: 暴君…我一定要亲手杀了她……
E: That tyrant... I swear I'll kill her with my own hands...

C: 我并非叙述者。你错过的那段历史，我没有义务，也无兴趣为你填补。
E: I'm no storyteller. I have no duty nor interest in filling in the history you've missed.

C: 啊…天外的救世主，我的行刑官。{M#他}{F#她}还要过多久才会来到此地？
E: Ah... Deliverer from beyond the sky. My executioner. How much longer until {F#s}he arrives here?

C: …呵呵，你找到的答案，仍是命途的意志吗？
E: ...Heh. Do you still choose the will of the Paths as your answer in the end?

C: 嗯，因为沉沦于美梦是看不到明天的，人们最终选择了从梦中醒来。
E: That's right. The people chose to wake up at the end. You can't see tomorrow when drowning in sweet dreams.

C: …明白了，我这就去安排。赴死者向您致敬！
E: ...Understood. I'll see to it. Those who are resolved to die, we salute you!

C: 「凯撒口中喃喃着她的征服。城中，她的死讯已然传扬开来。」
E: "The Imperator muttered about her conquests, and news of her death spread in the city."

C: （「岁月」的火种……）
E: (The Coreflame of Time...)

C: 这场战役关乎银河的命运，不是么？这是唯一的万全之法，它一定能战胜「毁灭」，为「开拓」写下浓墨重彩的一笔。
E: Isn't the fate of the entire cosmos hinged upon this fight? Then this is the best way to ensure everything works out. It will most certainly defeat the Destruction while composing an unforgettable chapter for the Trailblaze.

C: 这么做与来古士毫无区别。
E: Your plan is no better than Lygus's.

C: 你不是三月七，把她还回来！
E: You're not March 7th! Give her back!

C: 我们可以有很多、很多私人时间，而你无法拒绝我的邀请。
E: So much time, just the two of us. And guess what? You cannot refuse my invitation.

C: 那就来吧，献出「我」全部的记忆……
E: Then let's do it. Offer up all of "my" memories...

C: 恰好，和你提到的这两位有关。
E: And these circumstances have something to do with the two you just mentioned.

C: 你会亲眼看见，「记忆」在这个世界扮演着何其重要的角色……

C: 威胁似乎解除了…
E: Seems like the threat is gone...

E: <color=#dbc291ff>Is a data terminal that has been modified by the Remembrance</color>.

C: 如果我没猜错，刚才那一幕——还会不断上演。
E: If my hypothesis holds, then the scene we just saw will replay many more times.

C: 在这个古典的世界里，也有这样一座充满「未来」色彩的宫殿。
E: Even this classical world contains a "futuristic" palace like this.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>铁墓是一艘完美的航船</color>，若能暗中埋下种子，在「智识」被它引爆的瞬间，「记忆」也将遍布寰宇的每个角落。
E: <color=#dbc291ff>Irontomb is a perfect ark</color>. If a seed can be planted within, then the moment the Lord Ravager blows the Erudition to pieces, the Remembrance will be spread to every corner of the cosmos.

C: 后会有期，「长夜月」小姐。
E: Until we meet again, Miss "Evernight."

C: 也许可以，但那要付出多少代价？
E: Perhaps you can. But what will that cost?

E: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>> SkoPeo<unbreak>365</unbreak>, downloaded. Branch #1, archiving.</color>

C: 在你我易换身体的瞬间，你用稍纵即逝的最后一丝心识……
E: In that split second when we switched bodies... with your last flicker of consciousness...

C: 那就说说看吧，你有信心说服我的理由。
E: Go ahead. Tell me. Let's hear why you're so confident you can sway me.

C: 我醒着的时候，你一直都在沉睡。泛泛而谈，在你听来多半没有实感……
