E: While I was awake, you were always sleeping, so talking about this probably doesn't feel real to you...

C: 「照相机才是我的本体」——这句玩笑话，这次不就成真了嘛？
E: "The camera is my true form" That might've been a joke, but it came true this time!

C: 他们就这么你一言我一语，商量了好几个小时。
E: They went back and forth like that, discussing for hours.

C: 你说，对吧？
E: Isn't that right?

C: 嗯。但我还是决定，要先和你把心里话说开才行。
E: Yep. But I decided I needed to have a heart-to-heart with you first.

C: 快过来吧，{NICKNAME}。我们该决定下一站的目的地了。
E: Come on over, {NICKNAME}. It's time to choose our next destination.

C: 是呀。这段记忆无比真实，无比…沉重。
E: Yes. This memory is all too real... and so, so heavy.

C: 看不出来，那忆者还挺勇敢的。违反律令擅自行动……
E: I didn't see that coming... The Memokeeper is pretty courageous, choosing to defy the rules and take matters into her own hands.

C: 客房的房门纹丝不动…
E: The guest room door won't budge...

C: 原来如此，你准备和这个世界的水域共鸣。
E: I see. You plan to resonate with the waters of this world.

C: 来吧，伏地的巨兽：为此世生生不息——
E: Come, crouching beast! For the endless life of this world...

C: 明白！
E: Roger!

C: 桀桀桀！全程没有一只小奇美拉或小海豹受到伤害！
E: Hehehe! Not a single Little Chimera or baby seal was harmed in the process!

C: 好久不见，你…长高了？
E: Long time no see. Did you... get taller?

C: 他的造物再一次失去了控制？
E: Did his creation go out of control again?

C: 找到…我……
E: Find... my...

C: 然后呢，指望我会因此与你联手？
E: And? Do you expect me to join forces with you because of that?

C: 而这道创伤，将为您指明前行的方向。
E: And that scar... shall point the way forward for you.

C: 若你要驱散迷雾，找到那位「三月七」的所在，就上前去，唤醒他的怒火吧。
E: If you wish to dispel the fog and find that "March 7th," then go and awaken his fury.

C: 促成你们携手，于我百害而无一利。
E: I have nothing to gain from helping you two work together.

C: 久等了，各位。这边也有一则消息——
E: Sorry to keep you waiting, everyone. I also have some news to share.

C: 在「本能」驱使下，奇兽的身体——夺取了贤者的头颅。
E: Driven by instincts, the chimera's body... seized the sage's head.

C: 哈、哈哈哈哈哈！
E: Hah, hahahaha!

C: 保险起见，我再重复一遍计划：你们要进入翁法罗斯，与{RUBY_B#{NICKNAME}、三月七、丹恒}失散的三兄妹{RUBY_E#}汇合，设法从世界内部定位「铁墓」。
E: Let me go over the plan one more time, just in case: You'll enter Amphoreus, reunite with your {RUBY_B#{NICKNAME}, March 7th, Dan Heng}three separated companions{RUBY_E#}, and try to locate Irontomb from within the world.

C: 乐意效劳。但作为学术伙伴，我必须指出——
E: Always happy to help. But as your academic partner, I have to ask—

C: 星神计算中的时刻，就像一柄悬在银河头顶的利剑。人们做出的每一步抉择，都可能加速它的到来。
E: Every Instant in the Aeon's calculation is like a sword hanging over the cosmos. Every move humanity makes could speed up its arrival.

C: 在离开前，他提交了最后一行注释，似乎是留给我们的。
E: Before vanishing, it seems he left one last message for us.

C: {NICKNAME}的眼神，都闪闪发光啦……
E: {NICKNAME}'s eyes really lit up...

C: 拨动琴弦。
E: Pluck the strings.

C: {NICKNAME}身边的粉色哺乳动物。
E: The pink mammal beside {NICKNAME}.

C: 「但只需要一点点光，我们就能照亮孤独的世界。」
E: "But with just a glimmer of light, we can illuminate this lonely world."

C: <color=#dbc291ff>「律法的君主，刻律德菈——」</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>"Cerydra, Monarch of Law..."</color>

C: 哇！你、你是小小涟？
E: Wow! Y—You're Little Reney?

C: 记录着可怕内容的卷轴…一起看看吧，{NICKNAME}？
E: Scrolls filled with horrifying content... {NICKNAME}, shall we take a look?

C: 三千…什么？「他们」又是谁？
E: Thirty million... what? And who are "they"?

C: 它不会再妨碍你入睡了，孩子。
E: It won't disturb your sleep anymore, child.

C: 不必强迫自己给出答案，孩子。
E: You don't have to come up with an answer right now, child.

C: 就像他的心神，残破不堪。
E: Just like his mind, shattered and broken.

C: 求之不得。
E: That's all I've ever wanted.

C: 「快无法抑制了！保命要紧！撤离——」
E: "It's getting out of control! Run for your lives! Retreat..."

C: 「那就小憩一会儿吧，没人会指责你的。」
E: "Then take a break. No one's gonna blame you."

C: 「我们都清楚，你会做出何种决定。我也相信，剧本不会走向错误的结局。」
E: "We all know what kind of decision you'll make, and I believe the script will not progress toward the wrong ending."

C: 但它不在「无瑕」的花朵里，也不在妖精的眼睛里。
E: But that light wouldn't be found in the "flawless" flower, nor in the fairy's eyes.

C: 咕嘟…咕嘟……
E: Bloop... bloop...

C: 当场就被我识破了。
E: I saw through it right away.

C: 白厄阁下一直都这么…闲不下来，你应该也习惯啦，对吧？
E: Lord Phainon's always been... quite the restless one, but you're used to that by now, right?

C: 约好了，搭档。
E: That's a promise, partner.

C: 海瑟音小姐的祝词…真唯美呢。
E: Miss Hysilens's toast is... so poetic.

C: 那是当然~
E: Of course~

C: 「众人将与一人离别，唯其人将……」
E: "All shall bid farewell to one, and that person alone will..."

C: 果然…「因果」出现问题了。
E: "Causality" has gone wrong... just as I thought.

C: 所以，生物学上有种说法叫「木质化」，让嫩枝生出坚硬的表皮，与树干连为一体。
E: That is why there is a concept in biology called "lignification." Soft sprigs form a hardened shell and fuse with the trunk.

C: 我的…「记忆」？
E: My... "memory"?

C: 我就不多说什么了，免得破坏气氛。
E: I will say no more. I would rather not break the mood.

C: 一人留在过去……
E: One will remain in the past...

C: 创造「一页永恒」。
E: Create An Eternal Page.

C: 他就能守着一丝光明，成为熊熊燃烧的烈阳。
E: And he would guard that fragile light, until it turned into a blazing sun.

C: 那…就为他<color=#dbc291ff>留下「神谕」吧。</color>
E: So... let me <color=#dbc291ff>leave behind a "prophecy" for him</color>.

C: 即便小船的影子，很快就会消失……
E: Even if the boat's shadow fades quickly from sight...

C: 让我们一起…回家吧。
E: Let's go home... together.
Ahem...

C: 只剩颗脑袋了？你现实中的样子，还真落魄啊。
E: Nothing but a head left? Who'd have thought you'd look this bad in real life?

C: 记录。
E: Record.

C: >>>桃子。开心。
E: >>> Peach. Happy.

C: 又一次，史诗迎来了尾声。一切静悄悄的，就像此时此刻。
E: Once again, the saga comes to an end. Everything is deathly silent, just like this very moment.

C: 回想起来，过去有段时间，「我」似乎特别多愁善感呢……
E: Now that I look back, there was a period when "I" got really sentimental...

C: 真是个童话般的故事呀。
E: What a nice fairytale.

C: 嘻，但没关系。我可以学。对啦——查找：「昔涟♪」
E: Hehe, but it's fine. I can learn. Right! Query: "Cyrene ♪"

C: 而你会启程，捧住那颗星星，和{F#她}{M#他}一同，在最后一页种下无垠的花海。
E: While you will depart and hold that{F# final} star, planting a boundless sea of flowers on the final page with {M#him.}{F#her.}

C: 随后，PhiLia<unbreak>093</unbreak>完成了最后一次牺牲，化作一缕回忆，彻底消散；而星穹列车带来的另一枚星核，与被污染的权杖同频共振，吸引了懵懂的德谬歌……
E: Then, PhiLia<unbreak>093</unbreak> completed her final sacrifice, turned into a strand of memory, and completely dissipated. Meanwhile, the other Stellaron brought here by the Astral Express resonated with the contaminated Scepter, and attracted the naive Demiurge to them...

C: 呵，真是一场聒噪的聚会啊。
E: Heh. What a noisy gathering this is.

C: 我是█黑塔██已经和博识尊接轨█必须改写█第四时刻的锚点██
E: I'm █ Herta ██ Connection with Nous established█ Must rewrite █ Anchor of the Fourth Instant ██

C: 白厄，盗火行者
E: Phainon, Flame Reaver

C: 海列屈拉
E: Helektra

C: 总之现在这儿也安全了，待会我就去把奇物拿回来。
E: Anyway, it's safe here. I'll go and get the Curio soon.

C: 你别抢我的话。你说我是假的，你有证据吗？
E: Don't try to steal my words. You accused me of being fake, but do you have any proof to back up your claim?

C: 哈哈！我果然没有看错这位年轻人，火眼金睛，火眼金睛！
E: Haha! I knew I was right about you. Good choice, good choice!

C: 哈哈！你这{F#丫头}{M#小子}……
E: Haha! You little {F#brat}{M#brat}...

C: 我这儿虽然什么都缺，但可和你说好了，只要你来，<color=#dbc291ff>「卡利白」</color>就一定管够。
E: Although I don't have much of anything here, you and I have an agreement. Whenever you pop in, there will always be enough <color=#dbc291ff>Kapo-Kali</color> for you.

C: 如果你是自己人，你会知道上哪儿破译上方这一串密码。
E: If you are one of us, you will know where to decode the password above.

C: 「瓜农」只关心八卦，却不关心八卦背后的秘密。
E: Gossipmonger only concerns herself with gossip, not the secrets within.

C: 你这话题转得有点僵硬。
E: That's a very abrupt way to change the topic.

C: 去吧去吧，哎等等，密钥给我留下。
E: Go, go... Wait! Leave the encryption key here.

C: 董事会一直竭诚等待着您的回复。无论如何，欢迎回来——
E: The board of directors has been waiting eagerly for your reply. Anyway, welcome back—

C: 你不准帮他的忙！
E: Don't help him!

C: 发生甚么事了？
E: What happened?

C: 但是他们不能在一起。
E: But they can't be together.

C: 也许还有办法…
E: Maybe there are other ways...

C: 空间，可以逾越；但时间，触不可及！
E: We may transcend space, but time is beyond our reach!

C: 那么，这首诗送给你，再见了，我的朋友。
E: Well, this poem is for you. Goodbye, my friend.

C: 嗯，没错，是的，你说得对。
E: Yeah, you are right.

C: 这话听起来有故事。
E: Seems there's a story behind it.

C: 有了它，除开个别隐秘之地，<color=#dbc291ff>你就可以顺畅进出各舱室</color>。
E: With this, <color=#dbc291ff>you can travel between the various zones with ease</color>, except for certain hidden places.

C: 断断续续的宇宙无线电重复地叫着一个名字。没有回答。
E: Intermittently, a name is repeated on the cosmic radio. No answer.

C: 不，我确信自己在忘记一些最基本的东西。比如，上一次生日是什么时候。我有哪些朋友。又或是，我是怎么来到空间站的。
E: No, I've been forgetting basic things. Like, my birthday, who my friends are. Or how I came to the space station.

C: 希拉，祈祷。
E: Sheila, pray.

C: 没想到还能见到你。
E: I didn't expect to see you again.

C: 由于这几位可疑人员在空间站也待了一段时间，和防卫科员也算是熟稔了，可能存在被故意蒙混过去的情况。
E: Since these suspects have spent a fair bit of time in the space station, they are pretty familiar with the Security Department. They might have gotten away with their possible misconduct.

C: 啊，要能成为它们的奴仆该有多好…嘶——我再练练吧，这样下去迟早能……
E: Awww, how nice would it be if I can be their slave... Hiss. I just need to keep practicing, and one day I can...

C: 那么，接下来就拜托你了！
E: So... I will leave the rest to you!

C: 我就说她成天打瞌睡的人怎么会突然「洗心革面」，这样突然抹掉自己的习惯与喜好，实在是太可疑了。
E: I've always found it rather suspicious that she, a person who dozes off all the time, would have such a drastic change of personality and would quit all her habits and hobbies out of nowhere.

C: 受裂界影响，我没有办法远程解除封锁。想要通过，得先找到通行密钥。
E: Due to interference from the Fragmentum, I can't unlock them. You'll have to find the encryption key in order to get through.

C: 这里似乎没什么东西了。
E: There doesn't seem to be much here.

C: 这就是空间站「这位科员真绝了」大赛第一名的含金量啊。
E: Behold, the winner of the "Most Awesome Researcher" contest.

C: 咳咳嗯…阿兰！快来我办公室一趟！我的时间可是分分钟不等人，很昂贵的。
E: *cough* ...Arlan! Come to my office at once! My time is money and waits for no one.

C: 得和他好好谈谈，先找到阿兰吧。
E: I need to talk to him — let's hurry up and find him.

C: 少开这种玩笑，我只是帮阿兰个忙。你是来找他的吧？他在三月七那儿。
E: *sigh* I'm only helping Arlan. You're here to look for him, right? He's with March.

C: 证据就是……
E: And the evidence is...

C: 波少百科<unbreak>12.0</unbreak>。
E: Master Capote's Life Wiki version <unbreak>12.0</unbreak>.

C: 可是阿兰周围，只有我一个上司。除了是我，还会是谁呢？他为了能够学习化解压力，甚至都去求助三月七小姐了呀！
E: But Arlan doesn't have any other bosses — who else would it be? March, he asked to accompany you so he could learn how to manage his stress, right?

C: 抱歉小姐…我不想麻烦更多的人协助我修行，所以才没有告诉你。
E: I'm sorry, my lady... I didn't want to bother anyone, so I didn't mention it.

C: 那是你学艺不精罢了，连我都知道！
E: That's because you don't read. Even I know about it!

C: 她中间还说，跟「呜呜伯」熟得很…这两孩子，胆子可真够大的。
E: She even said they're very familiar with the Wubbaboos. These two kids are too brave for their own good.

C: 也不知道这位「荣仓终」怎么得罪它们了。
E: I don't know how this Eikura Shuu got onto their bad side.

C: 为什么这么说？难道你已经看过这几份资料？看来一路上是我疏忽了。
E: What makes you say that? Have you already seen these documents about him? I guess I missed it out somewhere along the way.

C: 我也这么认为…在外的游子，多数是抱着这样的心态，不愿远在天外的父母平添担忧。
E: I agree... Most people who left their homes carry that mindset because they don't want to worry their parents.

C: 我设计了一种解码程序，看——虽然长得像个相机，但这其实是个探测仪。透过它，我们就能看到一些被隐藏起来的痕迹。
E: I designed a decoding program. Look — it looks like a camera, but it's actually a detector. We should be able to find hidden clues with it.

C: 不过在修复过程中，我却发现了一些异常——访问记录显示，在主控系统瘫痪的那段时间，有「军团」以外的第三者入侵了这里。
E: But during the repair process, I discovered some anomalies. The access records show that a third party other than the Legion invaded while the master control system was paralyzed.

C: 我没有印象了。
E: I can't recall.

C: 难道…{NICKNAME}，我突然意识到一件事，我们得去趟另一侧的奇物收藏室。
E: Could it be that... {NICKNAME}, I just realized something. We need to go to the Curio collection room on the other side.

C: 正如你担心的那样，一阵光晕开，敌人出现了……
E: As you feared, a burst of light shines and the enemy appears...

C: 他们都是来迎接的？不像咱们空间站的风格啊，之前公司的事故核查部门过来都没这么大阵仗。
E: They're all here to welcome a guest? That's pretty strange for our space station. Even the IPC's Incident Inspection Department never received a welcome party like this.

C: 相反，我计划在这里驻留一段时间，近距离看看新的宇宙分支能带来怎样的惊喜。
E: On the contrary, I plan on staying here for a while to see up close what kind of surprises the new branch of the Universe has in store for me.

C: 我没有又哭又闹。
E: I am not throwing a tantrum.

C: 墙上的图案慢慢溶解、消失，至此便是结束了。
E: The image on the wall slowly dissolves and disappears... That's the end of it.

C: 呃，拜托，你认真一点…我看他也不像坏人嘛。你好，银枝！我是三月七。
E: ...Please don't do this. He seems like a good guy! Hi, Argenti! I'm March 7th.

C: …清醒点，{NICKNAME}，现在可不是陷进去的时候！找找别的地方吧。
E: Stay alert, {NICKNAME}. Now's not the time for relaxing! Let's check somewhere else.

C: 我来说明情况吧。
E: Let me explain the situation.

C: 这便是我身为纯美骑士的誓言。
E: This is my vow as a Knight of Beauty.

C: 请恕我在这之前冒犯激进，因为我知晓当这场战斗结束，就标志着——我将从列车的故事中退场，而现在终于来到了这一刻。
E: The end of our battle signifies my departure... the moment has finally arrived for me to bid farewell to the Express.

C: （这是与黑塔见面时的记忆，但有些细节想不起来了。）
E: (This is what I recall before I met Herta, but I can't remember some of the details.)

C: （咦，这里我说了什么？）
E: (Huh? What did I say?)

C: 行行行行行行行，咱们很熟吗？事儿办得怎么样了？
E: Alright, alright, alright. Cut the pleasantries and tell me how it's going.

C: （辛克尔之外的另一个人应该是<color=#dbc291ff>密卷科</color>的，快想想是谁……）
E: (The other person should be from the <color=#dbc291ff>Department of Insight</color>. I need to remember who it is...)

C: 正确的视角。
E: A correct observation, if I may add.

C: （两起事件没有关联？我不这么认为。证据应该是存在的，只要调查<color=#dbc291ff>某项记录</color>……）
E: (No connection? I disagree — there should be evidence linking them together. If I review <color=#dbc291ff>a certain record</color>...)

C: 这正是奇怪的地方。但眼下，这一信息还有更重要的意义。
E: That's what's so odd about it — but this information has an additional layer of importance.

C: 看来冥火大公并未亲临空间站，只是趁乱将一团冥火投入此地，让它四处游移，狩猎科员。若冥火熄灭，他的阴谋也将荡然无存。
E: It seems that Duke Inferno didn't deign to personally grace the space station. He merely cast infernal fire into our midst to wreak havoc among the researchers. When the fire fizzles out, his malevolent plans will vanish without a trace.

C: 能啊，你自己去找她。她一来就问我借走了相位灵火做研究，然后就找不着人了。
E: Of course, go find her yourself. She borrowed the Phase Flame to do some research as soon as she got here — haven't seen a trace of her since.

C: 你嘴角沾了点糕点渍…
E: There's a bit of cake on the corner of your mouth...

C: 正常人打听这个做什么…等等，是不是有人派你来套我话！
E: Why would anyone want to know that... Wait! Did someone send you here to try to get things out of me?

C: （…果然说不出任何和她有关的话了。）
E: (...So I really can't say anything about her.)

C: 上面这么写着：十克拉的灵性、一吨的练习、三十微粒的星震、一点点余清涂女士的毒酒。曾制造出不停说话的椅子：没什么本事，但嘴很毒，已经拆成木头烧火了。
E: It says: <unbreak>10</unbreak> carats of ingenuity, 1 tonne of practice, <unbreak>30</unbreak> particles of starquake, and a few drops of poisonous liquor from Madam Yu Qingtu. Rumor has it that it once created a talking chair! Not a particularly intelligent one, but boy did it have a sharp tongue — they dismantled it and used it for firewood. Can you believe it?

C: （呼噜呼噜…）
E: (Purring)

C: （我不是…阮•梅认可的作品…呜呜…）
E: (I'm not one of Ruan Mei's recognized works... *sob*...)

C: 嗯，我相信。
E: I believe you.

C: 其余暂无。
E: That is all.

C: 只有这种花，才能配得上著名女演员这种尊贵的身份。
E: Only a flower like that would be suitable for a distinguished actress.

C: 你和塞琳稍加等候，一个熟悉的身影出现了。
E: As you and Celine wait, a familiar figure soon appears.

C: 唉，经纪人在催了，我得出发了。等哪一天我发了个人专辑，第一时间寄给你们。
E: Ah, my agent is telling me I have to go. When I release my solo album, I'll send you a copy straight away!

C: 补给…是补给到了吗？
E: Supplies... Is it the supplies?

C: 我们是贝洛伯格的子民，大守护者派我们来找你——
E: We are Belobog citizens. The Supreme Guardian sent us to find you —

C: 呃，这事就别提了吧，反正着陆在没什么生物的地方就对了。
E: *sigh* Please stop bringing that up. Let's just say that landings and crowds don't mix.

C: 你为什么钻雪里？
E: Why were you hiding in the snow?

C: 说来，各位到底是什么来历啊？我可不是打听，就是关心关心朋友，不说也不要紧……
E: So whereabouts are you guys from, anyway? I don't mean to pry or anything, I just care about my friends! No pressure...

C: 话说回来，你上车这么久了，还一次都没跟姬子搭档旅行过吧？这可不行——走，咱们去找她聊聊！
E: You've been on the Express for a while now, but you've never gone on a trip with Himeko before, right? Well, now's your chance!

C: 丹恒就留在列车休整吧。
E: Dan Heng, stay on the Express and get some rest.

C: 和我的理解也差不多嘛。
E: I was thinking the exact same thing.

C: 雅利洛-Ⅵ的开拓印迹是由你们两个——啊，当然还有丹恒——亲自走出来的，你们也理应好好享受当地人的这份谢意。下次，下次我一定会腾出时间和你们同去的。
E: Make the most of the festivities — you've earned it! You two and Dan Heng did help save Jarilo-VI, after all. I'll be sure to join you guys next time.

C: 啊，原来你们已经开始谈合作了？正事要紧，要不我们一会儿再——
E: I guess you've already started your business talks. We'll get out of your way if—

C: ——他们找到了坚持驻守家园的「筑城者」，并向后者提供了一大笔资金，用于灾难避险。
E: They sought out Architects who refused to leave — those who insisted on defending their homes. The IPC provided these Architects with significant funds to aid them against the coming disaster.

C: 哼唧！呼噜，哼唧！
E: Oink! Oink oink!

C: 评估结果：失败。告诉我，使者——你打算如何说服公司的领导层？
E: Analysis: Failed. Tell me, emissary — how do you plan to convince the IPC leadership?

C: 仅靠贝洛伯格人的双手，你们需要跨越多少代人才能重回星空的怀抱？谁能保证未来的每一任守护者都和你一样审慎、开明？谁能断言类似星核的灾难不会再次降临？
E: How many generations of Belobogians will it take to embrace the stars again without assistance? Who can guarantee that every future Guardian will be as prudent and enlightened as you? How can you guarantee that a disaster such as the Stellaron Crisis will not descend upon Belobog yet again?

C: 至于给公司打工——嗐，人总归是要工作的，在哪儿干不是干？要是公司的家伙敢欺负到我们头上，到时候再群起反抗也不迟！
E: As for working for the company, pfft, people need to work no matter where they are, right? If the IPC tries to take too many liberties, we can always rise up against them!

C: 对哦，我都快忘了！咱们原本只是想来体验节日气氛的……
E: Right! I'd totally forgotten — that's the whole reason we came here in the first place!

C: 瞧一瞧，看一看嘞~
E: Come take a look!

C: 三月，还有{NICKNAME}？欢迎回到贝洛伯格。
E: It's you two! Welcome back to Belobog.

C: 嗯！明白啦！那就不打扰你们工作了，回头见！
E: Got it! We'll get out of your way, then. Bye!

C: 为什么会这么认为？
E: What makes you say that?

C: 你挺敏锐的嘛。
E: You're pretty sharp.

C: 啊，用不了那么久吧？水魈的寿命应该还挺长的…不过把精力聚焦在装置上，确实容易陷入被动，本末倒置。
E: Well, it won't take quite that long. The Xenohydro has a pretty long lifespan... But we probably shouldn't put ourselves in such a passive situation.

C: 这么简单？
E: That's it?

C: 对不起，{NICKNAME}…我就是那个与水魈合谋的共犯，我愿意接受处罚。
E: Sorry, {NICKNAME}... I'm the accomplice in collusion with the Xenohydro. I'm willing to accept my punishment.

C: 没意思，还是去找小阿德勒玩吧。
E: Nah. I should just go play with little Adler.

C: 但在接触到来前的一瞬间，一股巨大的斥力扇开了你的手掌——紧跟着的是一阵刺痛…酥麻，滚烫。
E: However, just before you reach her, a huge force repels your hand — followed by a tingling sensation, then a numbing burn.

C: 谢谢，我们接着出发吧。
E: Thank you. Let's keep going.

C: 虽然很不想承认…但以我的身型来说，穿越那些障碍绰绰有余。所以就让我一个人去吧。
E: Plus, all those obstacles are much easier for someone as small as me to pass through, even though I hate to talk about my size. Anyway, I can do it alone.

C: 小菜一碟。
E: A piece of cake.

C: 为什么旋转栈桥自己动起来了？
E: Why did the gear bridge move on its own?

C: 你这不是来了嘛，皆大欢喜。这附近我也仔细调查过了，茉莉小姐所说的「钥匙」就在这里——
E: But you came to help in the end and now all is well. By the way, I also found the "key" Miss Molly talked about. It's here.

C: 一束「球牡丹」。
E: A bouquet of Ball Peonies, please.

C: 这…我们也不清楚。
E: ...We don't know.

C: 球牡丹……
E: Ball Peonies...

C: 初雪八落……
E: First Snow...

C: 就像是静候着好心人将椅子放回原位，珍贵的宝物迫不及待地出现在你的眼前。
E: The precious treasure suddenly appears before your eyes, as if it was waiting for a well-meaning person to put the chair back in place.

C: …呀，吓我一跳！
E: Ah! Wh—

C: …不能这么说！这块石头承载的历史，对贝洛伯格来说无比重要。
E: Are you kidding!? The history that this stone carries is of incalculable importance to Belobog.

C: 克拉拉…
E: Clara...

C: 不过你看，这雕塑——如果不拿着设计蓝图细细比对上十几个小时，应该完全看不出和原件的区别吧？干得漂亮，{NICKNAME}！
E: ...but take a look — as long as you don't pull out the blueprints and spend a dozen hours comparing... this version is virtually indistinguishable from the original. Excellent work, {NICKNAME}!

C: 找回了「齿轮与智慧」这个门面，<color=#dbc291ff>工业展馆也就可以对公众开放了。</color>
E: With Gears and Wisdom back, <color=#dbc291ff>the Industrial Hall can reopen to the public</color>.

C: 历史区，顾名思义，保存着对于这座城市而言拥有重要历史意义的文物、复制品、还有各类文献。
E: You can probably guess from the name that the History-Culture Hall houses artifacts, replicas, and documents that are of great historical significance to Belobog.

C: 背后的家伙肯定不简单。
E: Whoever's behind this is one Smooth Criminal for sure.

C: 您说的这件事…和博物馆的展品失窃案有关系吗？
E: This incident... is it related to the museum thefts?

C: <color=#dbc291ff>不烤面包烤红肠</color>…好，记住了，记住了。
E: Got it, sir. <color=#dbc291ff>Roast the sausage, not the bread</color>.

C: 不煮皮蛋煮鱼汤。
E: Boil the fish, not the egg.

C: 这是什么情况，诺尔伯特？！你不是说过，安保工作万无一失吗？
E: What's going on here, Norbert!? Didn't you say your security was impenetrable?

C: 留在你眼前的选择有，且只有一个……
E: There is only one choice left in front of you...

C: 也怪不得他这段时间能把铁卫忽悠得团团转，让大家都以为他已经改头换面了…不过也有好处，以后他再也别想拿那些小花招骗过我们了，绝对别想！
E: He fooled the Silvermane Guards into thinking he'd changed... but we won't be falling for that act again any time soon!

C: 我会替你转交的。
E: I'll turn in the form for you.

C: 请再稍等我一会儿。
E: Please give me a moment.

C: 没关系，无伤大雅，佩拉小姐不必放在心上。让我们继续吧？
E: That's okay. It's no big deal — don't worry about it, Miss Pela. Shall we continue?

C: 那么，下一题……
E: Now, the next question...

C: 这…倒也没错啦……
E: Well... You're right in a sense...

C: 小偷到底会去哪呢？唔…虎克虎克，再努力想想……
E: Where could the thief have gone? Hmm... think, Hook, think...

C: 我只是想打一架。
E: I just wanted a fight.

C: 怎么了，年轻人？还有什么事吗？
E: What's wrong, young one? Is something else on your mind?

C: 太慢了！鼹鼠党荣誉队员{NICKNAME}，你应该比虎克先到才对！
E: Too slow, {NICKNAME}, Honorary Member of The Moles! You should have gotten here before Hook!

C: 真的吗？那你要老实回答我们几个问题！
E: Really? Then you better answer our questions honestly!

C: 案发当时你在干嘛？
E: What were you doing when the crime occurred?

C: 推理…结果错了，算什么推理嘛！
E: W— Well... you deduced wrong! What kind of reasoning are you even using!?

C: 之前怎么没见你这么机灵？
E: Why haven't I noticed you being this smart before?

C: 虎克…没太听明白。
E: Hook... doesn't really understand.

C: 地上还会长安全帽？
E: Do helmets grow from the ground now?
I... *sniff* *sob*

C: 「星核」就是这般残酷。至少和我们曾去过的某些星球相比，这里还有希望。
E: That's the cruelty of a Stellaron. Still, compared with some of the other planets we've visited, at least this one has hope.

C: 那…我们该把现在的状况告诉大家吗？
E: So... should we tell everyone the deal?

C: 让我和{NICKNAME}去开路吧，老…杰帕德！你还是坐镇后方……
E: Gepard, let me and {NICKNAME} clear the way for you. You should stay in your command post.

C: 好、好的…！谢谢你，谢谢你们！
E: O—Okay...! Thank you, thank you!

C: 我和{NICKNAME}会暂时代你战斗…直到你将自己的心结彻底解开为止。
E: Then {NICKNAME} and I will fight for you... until your heart is ready.

C: 可可利亚——咱们之间的陈年旧事，就在这里彻底清算吧！
E: Cocolia... let's settle this bad blood right here, right now!

C: （咦？暖炉怎么启动不了……）
E: (Huh? Why isn't the heater working...?)

C: （问问佩拉吧……）
E: (Alright. I'll ask Pela...)

C: …我、我也来！
E: ...I'll come with you!

C: 那…注意安全。
E: In that case... be careful.

C: 怎么了？
E: You found something?

C: 它不见了…玲宝，小心偷袭。
E: It disappeared... Lynxy, be on the lookout for an ambush.

C: 没，只是有点好奇。它以前受到惊吓时，好像也是通过这种奇妙的方式消失不见的。
E: No, just a bit curious. But these guys do disappear in a flash when they get scared.

C: …先不聊这个啦。天色不早了，我们开始做饭吧。
E: ...Never mind. It's getting late. Let's cook something.

C: 那我们一起等等佩拉吧——她就在整理间里面。
E: Then let's wait for Pela together. She's in the storage room.

C: 喂，小鬼！你怎么一个人跑到这儿来了，不知道这地方有多危险吗？
E: Hey, brat! How could you come here by yourself. Don't you know how dangerous this place is?

C: 希儿！够了，别再说了。
E: Seele! That's enough.

C: …你说是就是吧。不过没关系，人到了就行！
E: ...Okay, whatever you say. As long as you're here now, it's fine!

C: 总感觉…这里跟虎克印象中的铆钉镇很不一样。不会连孤儿院也变成这样了吧？
E: This doesn't feel like the Rivet Town I remember... Do you think the orphanage is like this now too?

C: 这就叫多此一举…
E: This is useless then...

C: 宝贝找到了，我们快离开这里吧！那些怪物让虎克心里有点发毛，怪可怕的！
E: We've found the treasure. Let's split! The monsters here give Hook goosebumps — too scary!

C: 刮骨去毒？
E: Sit down and shut up!

C: 半天不说话，原来你们是在想这事呀。嘿嘿，想变得跟我们一样厉害，虎克可要每天都坚持锻炼哦。
E: So that's why you were so silent! Hmph, if you wanna be as awesome as us, you better start training every day~

C: 这就是你偷零件的原因？
E: Is this why you've been stealing the parts?

C: 是的。但克拉拉觉得，动机大概是没办法直接问出来的……
E: Right. But I don't think Pascal will give us a straightforward answer on this one...

C: …你干嘛一直发出奇怪的声音？
E: ...You okay over there?

C: 呃，小朋友，应该是误会……
E: Uh, kiddo, I think there's been a misunderstanding...

C: 战、战斗模组？是不是哪里出了问题……
E: Combat module? This thing's faulty, right...?

C: 不错，还差两步，走走走。
E: Great, only two more steps to go. Let's move.

C: 她是史瓦罗的家人。
E: She's Svarog's family.

C: 抱歉…这件事，克拉拉真的帮不上忙。
E: I'm sorry... I really can't help you with this.

C: 史瓦罗呢，他怎么不出来帮你？
E: Why isn't Svarog helping you?

C: 有记载的历史中，人类曾数次尝试与「星核」接触。无一例外，他们出于人类的私欲，企图将该物质占为己用。
E: Historical records state that humanity has already made multiple efforts to engage with the Stellaron. Without exception, these efforts have been motivated by human greed — attempts to secure the article for a selfish end.

C: 怎么办怎么办？这情况看着不太妙啊！
E: What should we do? This is going from bad to worse!

C: 我们的实力得到认可了。
E: Our strength has been recognized.

C: 终于…终于到这个时候了。
E: Finally... We finally made it to this point.

C: 是，大人。
E: Yes, madam.

C: 从史瓦罗那儿得到的信息似乎对她造成了很大的冲击…但有希儿在她身边，她一定能缓过来的。
E: It seems like the intel we got from Svarog caused her a significant shock... but with Seele by her side, I know she'll recover.

C: 你在说什么呢，那也是我啊，是我面对病人的那一面。
E: What do you mean? That's me too, y'know. The "me" that my patients see, at least.

C: 娜塔莎的医用物资
E: Natasha's Medical Supplies

C: 无论是买家还是卖家，都需要到拍卖会上注册身份信息。卖家的每件商品信息也需要通过注册，确保质量过关。
E: Buyers and sellers must all register their personal information. To ensure the quality of items, the sellers must also register details for each item.

C: 原来如此，那虎克恐怕帮不上忙啦，因为虎克不会骗人！
E: Hmm, I won't be much help then. Hook never deceives anyone!

C: 哎哟，我可得好好感谢你们啊！
E: Oh my goodness! I can't even begin to express my gratitude!

C: 都是我们应该做的。
E: We had to intervene.

C: 你们真的把探针找回来了？太好了，太好了！
E: ...You got the probe back? Amazing! Fantastic!

C: 我也想要钱，你给我钱。
E: I want money. Give me money.

C: 的确如此呢。一根探针都能卖出七百五十冬城盾，真是难以想象。
E: It's true. It's ridiculous that a single probe can fetch <unbreak>750</unbreak> shield.

C: 叔叔阿姨们实在没办法，就来拜托史瓦罗先生调查这件事，但暂时也没查出任何结果…克拉拉自己也小小地调查了一下，还是没发现什么有用的线索……
E: The vagrants had no choice but to ask Mr. Svarog to look into it, but he still hasn't found anything... I investigated the matter myself, but I came up empty-handed...

C: {F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}也要来调查这件事吗？这样的话，或许能发现克拉拉没注意到的线索……
E: Are you also here to look into this case, {F#big sister}{M#big brother}? Perhaps if we work together we can uncover some clues that I missed...

C: 此处附近似乎很少有人到访，但地上却留下了一串奇怪的剐蹭痕迹，直朝前方蜿蜒而去。
E: Few people would come to this place, but you can see some scratches on the ground, snaking their way forward.

C: 啊，{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}，请等一下！你看它，似乎没打算逃跑，也不打算攻击我们……
E: Ah, wait, {F#big sister}{M#big brother}! Look! It doesn't appear to be trying to flee or attack us...

C: 噢噢噢噢——我要上了！
E: Chaaaaarge! Prepare to fight!

C: 我每天都在想办法修好它们，让小机器人们恢复正常的生活。只是…只有克拉拉和史瓦罗先生两个人，修复的效率还远远不够。
E: Every day, I try to figure out how to repair some of them and return the robots to normal. Except... there are a lot more than Mr. Svarog and I can handle on our own.

C: 真的吗？克拉拉好期待…！
E: Really? I can't wait!

C: 所以…你也不知道该怎么处理？
E: So, you don't know what to do either?

C: 史瓦罗先生总是能考虑到所有情况，合理地解决各种问题…克拉拉暂时还做不到这点。
E: Mr. Svarog always takes all factors into account and handles problems logically... I can't do that myself yet.

C: 这样的话，应该可以最大程度地保留帕斯卡习得的情感智能，也能避免它继续闯祸……
E: With this method, we might be able to retain as much of Pascal's emotional intelligence as possible while keeping him out of trouble...

C: （两人都已经给出了自己的解决方案……）
E: (Both have provided their solutions...)

C: 对于人类「共情」的行为，我尚且不能进行透彻的分析。但我理解尊重这种情感的重要性。
E: I am currently still unable to conduct a thorough analysis of human empathy. However, I recognize the importance of respecting such emotions.

C: 我会持续收集意见，尝试推导出新的结果。你有其他需要补充的信息吗，外来者？
E: I'll keep gathering information and calculating new possibilities. Do you have any other insights, outsider?
Waiting, furth█, instruct█, ██—

C: 请等一下——
E: Please wait...

C: 这个世界的「地狱」长什么样？
E: And what's this "hell" like exactly?

C: 都已经到这儿了…
E: We've come this far...

C: 请多关照。
E: Great seeing you.

C: 我们排查完就离开。
E: We'll be on our way after we run a check-up.

C: …对不起，希露瓦。别怪我！
E: ...I'm sorry, Serval. Forgive me!

C: 将你的解释留给审判官吧。现在，我以戍卫官的身份，下令捉拿破坏铁卫禁区的犯人！
E: Save your explanation for the judge. You are charged with sabotaging the Silvermane Guard Restricted Zone. In my capacity as captain, I hereby order that these fugitives be arrested!

C: 记性变差了啊，老弟？你忘了「筑城者」老早就把我开除了吗！
E: So much for your memory. Did you forget the Architects expelled me ages ago?

C: 这家伙…好扛打啊。我从没遇到过这么顽强的对手！
E: This guy... knows how to put up a fight. I've never come up against anyone this relentless!

C: 因为他是个一根筋！辩论也好打架也罢，只要他认定了一件事，是死也不会让步的…所以才不可爱啊，这家伙！
E: He's as stubborn as I am. It could be an argument or a fight — he'll do both to the death... That's why he bugs the heck out of me!

C: 再给我们点时间…
E: Give us a moment...

C: 我明白了。握紧武器，这肯定会是一场恶战。
E: Understood. Keep your weapons close. This will be a fierce fight.

C: 上吧，为了宇宙和平！
E: For universal peace!

C: 别、别生气嘛！我已经把这次事故整理成报告，向上级提交了…现在只等上头派人处理这事就行！
E: Don't get angry! I have written a report of this incident and submitted it to management...We just need to wait for them to send someone to deal with it!

C: 干等着？这件事如果不及时处理，迟早要闹出人命！这种状况下你难道坐得住吗？！
E: We can't just wait here and do nothing! There will be big trouble if we don't deal with this now! How can you just sit around so calmly!?

C: 我才不管你们用什么手段。电磁干扰，遥控，或者干脆把它们砸得稀巴烂——反正都是一堆劣质的玩意……
E: I don't care how you do it... Electromagnetic interference, remote control, or simply smashing them to pieces! They are useless anyway...

C: 啊，我知道了…行啊丫头，长本事了，还知道搬救兵了？
E: Oh... I get it! Good one, little girl... you found someone to help, did you?

C: …已经结束了吗？
E: ...Is it over?

C: （虽然外表是成年人…但她的思绪好像还是和上次一样混乱。）
E: (She may appear to be an adult... but her mind seems to be just as muddled as before.)

C: 你眨了一下眼，然后……
E: You blink, and then...

C: 所以…就到此为止吧。我会记住你的善意，但请你努力忘记这一切…忘记我。
E: So... let's stop there. I'll remember your kindness, but please try to forget all about this... all about me.

C: 怎么定位「星核」的位置？
E: How can we pinpoint the Stellaron?

C: 你闭上眼睛，对回忆并无指望。但那声音却适时闯入你的脑海……
E: You close your eyes but don't expect to remember anything. And yet, the voice comes to you...

C: 所有真相，我都告诉你了；有关与星核的交易，有关我向它许下的愿望。我们之间…再没有秘密了。
E: I have told you all the truths there are to tell: The deal with the Stellaron, the wish I made to it... There are no more secrets between us.

C: 可是…对不起，母亲。这最后一次，我不能站在你身边。
E: But... I am sorry, mother. On this, our final occasion, I cannot stand with you.

C: 结束了吗……
E: Is it over...?

C: 我来这里，是为了完成一场「告别演出」——
E: I wanted to come here to perform for Cocolia. To say goodbye...

C: 是你吗，希莉儿？
E: Is that you, Cyrille?

C: 当时他们通知我丢件之后，很快就发来了一封超级有诚意的道歉信，还给我安排了原路补发——比「星际和平家电」的服务可强太多啦。
E: After they notified me that my package went missing, they quickly sent out a super sincere apology letter and even arranged for a replacement. Their service is leaps and bounds ahead of "Interastral Peace Appliances."

C: 哔嘟…我要回「星际和平家电」门店！我要回「星际和平家电」门店！
E: Beep beep... Must return to Interastral Peace Appliances! Must return to Interastral Peace Appliances!

C: 没事儿，等你准备好，我们再开始。
E: No worries. We can start once you're ready.

C: 开始吧！
E: Let's start!

C: 是这样吗？我会考虑您的建议，让我再纠结纠结吧。
E: Is that so? I will take that into consideration. I guess I will stay in this dilemma for a while longer.

C: 原本是想还给你的。
E: I wanted to give it back to you.

C: 北口的机巧鸟。
E: Cycrane at the north entrance.

C: 这一次我就不问您了，我在刚才找到了自己的答案。
E: But this time I don't need to ask anymore. I already have the answer myself.

C: 魁首殉道了，莳者星散。我也不得不低调隐匿。
E: The master primus was martyred, and the disciples all scattered. I had no choice but to hide as well.

C: 我没有如期归去，那原本才是别离的意义。
E: I didn't go back as ordered, as therein lies the true meaning of separation.

C: 战争结束了，你不必再战斗了。
E: The war is over. You don't have to fight anymore.

C: 回家！现在，马上！
E: Come home! Now!

C: 写诗就写诗，小事一桩。
E: Go ahead and write it. It's not a big deal.

C: 流离宾至浮槎落，彷徨仙临徂逝川。罗浮亲友如相问，______。
E: I travel on a skiff as a wandering stranger, drifting along as on a divine river. Should those who know me on the Luofu query my life...

C: 啊，对呀，快给我看看《流云集》。
E: Oh, you're right. Let me take a look at the Drifting Clouds.

C: 小聪的情况很独特…
E: Cong's case is special...

C: 你还没和<color=#dbc291ff>温符瑞</color>聊吗？
E: You haven't talked with <color=#dbc291ff>Wen Furui</color>?

C: 没有告诉经纪人，这样的说法也不是不成立，不过理由又是什么呢？
E: Not telling her manager isn't completely unbelievable, but why?

C: 现在你知道了，我确实是一直在假扮美丽狐仙在网络上与人聊天，但是我没有做什么亏心事！
E: Well, now you know, I have been catfishing as a foxian beauty to chat with people online, but I have done nothing that goes against my conscience!

C: 你不会告诉我，你真的只是想聊天，没有其他的企图，比如骗钱什么的？
E: You won't tell me you're really just trying to make friends with people online and have no ulterior motives, such as cheating people's money or anything like that, will you?

C: 是啊，涉案金额已经过亿了。
E: Yeah, the money involved has exceeded one hundred million credits.

C: 好嘞！
E: Ya-hoo!

C: 我们还没相信你是黛青小姐姐的经纪人呢，除非……
E: We won't believe that you're actually Ms. Daiqing's manager, unless...

C: 仙舟上到处都是这样的狐人姐姐、狐人妹妹吗？
E: Are you saying foxian ladies like this are everywhere on Xianzhou?

C: 「你现在幸福吗？」
E: Are you happy right now?

C: …有什么想法写下来不就好了么？
E: ...Why don't you all just write down what you think?

C: （壮士挽弓，看上去似乎和仙舟历史有极强的关联，不知道这究竟是在讲述哪一段史实……）
E: (A warrior with a bow. It seems to have a strong association with Xianzhou's history, but I'm not sure which part it is referring to...)

C: 你哪位？
E: Who are you?

C: （就调查这么多好了。）
E: (I've done the checking.)

C: 这段证词，和这枚漂亮的徽章…没有产生什么矛盾。
E: The testimony doesn't seem at all at odds with the beautiful badge...

C: 可恶。真是治伤治病治不了人心险恶啊…还以为有人真心实意帮我逃出丹鼎司。
E: Ugh... Treating wounds and diseases is one thing, but curing the evils of humanity...? There I was thinking someone helped me escape the Alchemy Commission because they genuinely wanted to help me.

C: 我剩下的时间已不多了，但你问吧……
E: I don't have much time left, but go ahead...

C: 如果是公事公办的话，请到公廨内部，大毫、松烟他们应该就在里面…我只是一个小小勤务，涉及龙女大人的事情，只能说是爱莫能助。
E: If it's official business you're here about, you'll need to go to the chancery — Dahao and Songyan should be there. I'm just an orderly... As for anything concerning the Dragon Lady, I'm sorry, but there's nothing I can do.

C: 我本来以为自己已经获得「长生」了，可惜，事情并没有这么简单。
E: I thought I'd gained immortality, but unfortunately things were not that simple.

C: 是不是这样？
E: Is that okay?

C: 这么一想，长生种的日子还真是没有盼头啊…他们是怎么忍受几百年如一日无休无止的重复生活的？
E: Thinking about it like this, doesn't living like a long-life species seem hopeless... How can they put up with the endless repetition of life for hundreds of years?

C: 他比长生种有趣得多…
E: He's much more interesting than a long-life species...

C: …就按白露大人说的做吧。
E: ...Let's do what Lady Bailu suggested.

C: 怎么会这样……
E: How is that possible...?

C: 可惜了，我还一直在等着她，没想到她还是没能走开。她有没有说有什么东西要带给我？
E: What a shame — I've been waiting for her for so long... I can't believe she couldn't make it. Did she ask you to bring me anything?

C: 随后，白露又不情不愿地治好了这名化外民的病症，相比魔阴身，这不过是举手之劳。
E: Then, Bailu healed the Outworlder begrudgingly again. Compared to being Mara-struck, his illness is but a common disease.

C: 按照持明轮回再世的生理，我该成为全新的个体。而以法度论，前世罪业应一笔勾销。
E: Based on the physiological principles of Vidyadhara reincarnation, I ought to have been an entirely new entity... and in view of the law, all crimes from my previous incarnation should have been wiped clean...

C: 我们不必在此逗留。
E: We shouldn't linger here.

C: 有孽龙——救命——
E: There's a draconic abomination! Help me...!

C: 嗯，您帮了地衡司很多，随时欢迎您调阅行动档案。
E: Alright. Since you've helped the Realm-Keeping Commission on many occasions, you are welcome to access our operation archives any time.

C: 杨叔你不也跃跃欲试的嘛…旅行这么久，还没查过案呢！我的聪明才智终于有用武之地啦！
E: Hmph, you're the one getting excited... My first detective case! Finally, my intelligence and wisdom have a chance to shine!

C: （帕姆说话时真的会带那么多「帕」吗？）
E: (I'm not sure Pom-Pom is the best casting choice for a gang boss...)

C: 为什么不直接问当事人？
E: Why don't you just ask him?

C: 我想再看一下视频。
E: I wanna see the videos again.

C: 我看了一下地图，这片空地似乎有一扇门…你们看，穿过这扇门，后面有一个码头。他可能搭乘星槎离开了。
E: I checked the map and found a gate in this open area... Look, there's a small dock on the other side. He may have left on a starskiff.

C: 为什么要从这么偏僻的小码头离开长乐天？这也太可疑了吧？
E: Why would he leave Exalting Sanctum via a secluded dock? That's so suspicious!

C: 辛苦你了。那么残存的影像中是否有值得关注的内容呢？
E: Thank you. Did you find anything in the remaining footage worth paying attention to?

C: 是啊，这人也太坏了！
E: Right? Outrageous!

C: 会不会是旅费全部用来买星芋啵啵，没钱住旅店了？
E: Maybe he spent all his money on startaro bubble tea and couldn't afford a hotel room!

C: （对啊，「饮茶会」的成员，名字当然是各种茶啦。）
E: (That's right. He's a member of the Tea Society, so, naturally, he chose a type of tea as his alias.)

C: 比如，如果罗刹是乘坐星槎从码头逃走的，又怎么会在两小时后出现在机巧鸟的影像里？
E: For example, if Luocha took flight from the dock, how could he appear in cycrane footage two hours later?

C: 不要紧…我会解决的。
E: Worry not... I'll handle it.

C: 对、对不起！
E: Th—That bad? Sorry!

C: 唉，自己喜欢的东西，果然并不是每个人都能接受的呀，就像飞行一样……
E: But I guess not everyone can accept what I like. *sigh* Just like flying...

C: 去问问景元？
E: Like Jing Yuan?

C: 去天舶司问问？
E: We could ask around the Sky-Faring Commission?

C: {F#她}{M#他}开玩笑的。这件圣物一直存放在驭空司舵随身携带的挂饰中，晴霓小姐暂时交给了我们。
E: ...{F#She's}{M#He's} kidding. This object has been stored inside Helm Master Yukong's personal trinket all along — Miss Qingni lent it to us.

C: 别啊，算我求您了，和我一起看吧。总要有个人帮我出出主意吧。
E: C'mon, pleeeease look at it with me? I need someone to give me some advice.

C: 还是问点别的吧，问点我能回答的。
E: Just ask some other questions. Ones I can answer.

C: 纸鸢…一些私人书信…还有一本《厌作人间语》。原来妈妈平时喜欢这种小说，还以为她会看更加「豪迈」的东西。
E: A paper kite... personal letters... and a copy of Otherworldly Delights? So Mom likes these kinds of novels? I thought she'd prefer more heroic stuff...

C: 从小到大，每次我们的飞行士从战场上凯旋，母亲总会提醒我：「永远不要忘记胜利的代价。」
E: Every time our pilots returned from the battlefield, my mother would tell me never to forget the cost of victory...

C: 谢谢你，我度过了很好的一生…但别让晴霓走上这条道路，别让她…成为斗舰飞行士……
E: Thank you, Yukong — I've had a good life... but please... don't let Qingni walk the same path... Don't let her... become a fighter pilot...

C: 我们不会丢下你的！
E: We won't leave you here!

C: 我不记得你。
E: Well I don't remember you.

C: …你休想骗我。众兄弟，将这人拿下！
E: ...Don't you think of fooling me. Everyone, take them down!

C: 是重力发生了变化，这和跃迁的一瞬间身体感到沉重是一回事。
E: There was a gravitational shift. The same thing happens when we warp jump, only we feel heavier.

C: 我听说仙舟居民普遍拥有极长的寿命，那么，心理层面的健康管控一定非常严格…所以……
E: I heard that residents of the Xianzhou have extremely long life spans, which would require them to make great efforts to preserve their mental health... meaning...

C: 看码头的线路，终点是星槎海的中枢。嗯，到那儿我们就安全啦。
E: Judging by where it's docked, it must be heading for Central Starskiff Haven. Nice, we'll be safe there.

C: 丹恒先生小心为妙，这位大姐姐可难缠的很……
E: Be careful. Don't underestimate her...

C: 干什么！虽然我平日读书不多，但受训战略时可是被将军逼着读了好些馆藏古籍。记得其中有一册名叫《涯海星槎胜览》，作者就是这个名儿。
E: Hey! I don't read much, but the General forced me to finish a bunch of ancient volumes during my training. I remember one called Views of the Universe From a Starskiff — the author's name was "Baiheng."

C: 她那张乌鸦嘴也是，连蒙带猜说出口的坏事，十有八九都要应验成真。一来二去，云骑里敢和她同行的人也不剩几个了。
E: She also possessed an uncanny ability to predict future events... inauspicious ones, at least. Every ill omen that came out of her mouth would sure enough come true. Very few Cloud Knights had the courage to accompany her on missions.

C: 在梦中，你曾见到那个面目模糊的男人，他倨傲不恭地立在安放「击云」的枪架前。
E: In your dreams, you see a man with an indistinct face, standing arrogantly and irreverently in front of the spear rack where the "Cloud-Piercer" is placed.

C: 不必了，就算龙女大人的医术通神，对长生种的宿命恐怕也是无可奈何吧？
E: Very well. The fate of a long-life species is inevitable, even with the best doctors.

C: 你我都无法彻底结束对方的性命，放弃吧。
E: Neither of us can end the other's life. Just give up.

C: 离开罗浮这么久，这府中的杀气不减反增，倒是令人欣慰。
E: After all this time away from the Luofu, the Seat of Divine Foresight has only become more hostile. It's quite reassuring.

C: 我离开仙舟时，听说他们夺去了你的鳞角，迫使你蜕生，又将你打入幽囚狱中。
E: When I left the Xianzhou, I heard they took away your scales and horns, forced you into a hatching rebirth, and detained you in The Shackling Prison.

C: 丹鼎司已恢复了秩序，你来这儿干嘛？
E: Order's already been restored to the Alchemy Commission... Why are we here?

C: 离开
E: Leave

C: 「苍城」？我怎么没听过，六座仙舟里有叫这个名字的吗？
E: The Cangcheng? There's a ship called the Cangcheng? Why haven't I heard of it...?

C: 好胆色。
E: You have courage.

C: 正是。所谓风起于青萍之末…我虽然只是地衡司一介小吏，但长期在一线工作，总能率先嗅到些危险的味道。
E: That appears to be the case — no smoke without fire, as they say... Despite being just a servant of the Realm-Keeping Commission, spending a considerable amount of time on the front lines has sharpened my senses to potential dangers...

C: 「请勿擅动设施资产」。
E: Sacrosanct. It means this place is important.

C: 身体素质不错。大部分人受穷观阵影响时，多半会因为过量的信息冲刷而感到晕眩。
E: You have a strong constitution. Most individuals feel nauseous after being presented with the dizzying excess of information provided by the Matrix.

C: 可以试着和那边的「符玄」对话一下，看看那位太卜有什么话说？
E: Try communicating with the Fu Xuan you see over there, we should hear what the master diviner has to say.

C: 我不能答应！
E: I cannot allow that to happen!

C: 这段经历…我有头绪了！是在我们遇到{NICKNAME}之前啊。
E: ...I know this memory! This is before we met {NICKNAME}.

C: 失忆之前，也就是登上列车以前吗……
E: From before the memory loss, before the Express...

C: 这样也好。我着人将东西送往穷观阵的阵基处。三月小姐，准备好了就站到阵心去。推演随时可以开始。
E: It should indeed, I'll have someone place the material in the base terminal of the Matrix. Miss March, please position yourself in the Matrix core — we may begin our inference whenever you are ready.

C: 抱歉，你没办法带上{F#她}{M#他}。你是穷观阵所观测演算的中枢，{NICKNAME}的加入只会带来冗余的情报。
E: I'm sorry, that would be highly inadvisable. You form the nexus of the Matrix's inference — {NICKNAME} would only introduce redundant data to the system.

C: 杨叔！你好呀！
E: Mr. Yang! Hi there!

C: 但你什么都不记得了，不是吗？
E: ...And yet, memories are precisely what you seek, no?

C: 丹恒？人怎么不见了？
E: Dan Heng? Where are you?

C: （再等等）
E: (Wait)

C: 三月七，星穹列车无名客的一员。
E: March 7th, one of the Nameless aboard the Astral Express.

C: 去探索吧，去开拓吧，不要用回头来玷污无名客的荣誉。
E: Explore, trailblaze, but do not dwell on the past... you'll tarnish the reputation of the Nameless.

C: 干扰你的人始终在阻挠你前进……
E: The interferer has been thwarting your progress this whole time...

C: 在你打开这扇门的同时，穷观阵也会开始对你的过去进行演算。
E: As soon as you open this door, the Matrix of Prescience will start calculating your past.

C: 老朽决定将这柄孤云托付给罗浮工造司修复，作为本次罗浮演武仪典守擂胜者的奖品。它将被用于斩杀孽物、卫蔽家园，如此便不负卡勒瓦拉使团迢迢还剑之情。
E: I've decided to entrust this sword, Guyun, to the Luofu Artisanship Commission for restoration. Furthermore, it will serve as the prize for the champion of the Luofu Wardance. This sword will be wielded against abominations, to protect our homeland, and live up to the mission of the Kalevalan delegation that returned it from so far away.

C: 你觉得我会允许你继续闯祸？
E: You think I'm just going to let you cause more trouble?

C: 然而爷爷说过，好剑之人，必伤于剑。
E: However, just like Grandpa said, those who excel with the sword will eventually suffer by it.

C: 异邦旅人如同泥沙俱下，求剑而未得之人，得剑而未尝所愿之人，亦或是单纯想巧取豪夺之人…在含光亲手铸造的混沌中，一柄剑锋刺向了他。
E: The palace was overrun with visitors from afar. Some left empty-handed, others got swords that didn't fulfill their desires, and some even resorted to stealing. And in the midst of all the chaos my father created, he ended up being stabbed by one of the swords he forged.

C: {NICKNAME}，你要是找到什么线索，就当着大家的面说说。
E: If you've found any clues, {NICKNAME}, feel free to tell everyone.

C: 我受够了那些人龌龊的念头，我也不愿再为任何人行杀戮之事。
E: I grew tired of their wicked intentions. I didn't want to kill for anyone anymore.

C: 大家…觉得呢？
E: What do you all think?

C: 即便没有过客触碰琴弦，它依旧时不时迸出几个音符，像是在为某人哼唱不成调的曲子。
E: Even without a human's touch, it occasionally bursts out notes, as if humming an untuned melody for someone unseen.

C: 后来过了很久，公输师傅表示工造司已经验收了宝剑，至少到那刻为止，云璃是没有嫌疑的。
E: And much later, Master Gongshu told me the sword was confirmed safe. So up until that point, Yunli couldn't have stolen it.

C: 玫瑰…花瓣？呃…多半是我搜查时大意了。这东西怎么会在剑匣里？
E: A... rose petal? Hmm... I must have missed it during the search. But why was there a petal inside the case?

C: 那你的意思，是要拒绝咯？
E: So you mean you're refusing?

C: 面具中提到的地址就是这里，只是没想到…花火小姐口中的游戏竟是在匹诺康尼街头「大开杀戒」。
E: The address that the mask gave you is right here. But you never would have thought... that when Miss Sparkle mentioned a game, she was talking about wanton slaughter on the streets of Penacony.

C: 你已经看出凶手是谁了？
E: Have you found out who the killer is?

C: 钟珊以德报怨，想用借来的领带帮花火大人把戒指挤出来，可惜还是…回天乏术！
E: Zhongshan repaid evil with kindness, and tried to borrow a tie to help Miss Sparkle squeeze out the ring. But sadly... she couldn't be saved.

C: 何必那么认真呢？花火大人是假面愚者，不是假面天才，想要有挑战性的谜题，请出门右转博识学会，我们只负责娱乐性拉满的推理体验！
E: Why take it so seriously? Miss Sparkle is a Masked Fool, not a Masked Genius. If it's a challenging puzzle you want, please go out there and turn right until you get to the Intelligentsia Guild. We're only responsible for providing an entertaining detective experience!

C: 这里竟发生了令我们都感到棘手的<color=#dbc291ff>密室杀人事件</color>！
E: <color=#dbc291ff>A murder in a locked room</color> has left us all stumped!

C: 那俩东西一直不肯说话，不知道二位能否撬开它们的嘴。
E: Those two have clammed up. I wonder if you two could help pry open their mouths.

C: 谢谢，我没有其他问题了。
E: Thank you. I don't have any further questions.

C: 还是不玩了吧，我们的时间也没那么充裕。
E: I'd rather not play around. We don't have very much time.

C: 现场没有其他人，看来花火小姐用了相同的手段，把梦中的人「送回」现实了…我们先和那两位谈谈吧。
E: There's nobody else at the scene. Seems like Miss Sparkle used the same method to "send" dreamers back to reality... Let's talk to those two there then.

C: 对了，阵基重新启动了吗？为何「穷观阵」仍然没有反应？
E: So, have you activated the terminals yet? Why is the Matrix of Prescience still unresponsive?

C: 真的吗？那就好，我可不想在你记忆里是很糟糕的样子。
E: Really? That's good. I wouldn't want to affect your image of me.

C: 你在说谎。
E: You're lying.

C: 符卿会部署云骑，而我想请各位先行一步，取道「工造司」的捷径，再与符卿会合。
E: Lady Fu will deploy the Cloud Knights, but I would like you to set off in advance. Take a shortcut through the Artisanship Commission and convene with Lady Fu further down the line.

C: 那是由「丰饶」星神药师留在罗浮仙舟上的古物。能任意型塑生命，征服死亡的神迹。
E: It is an ancient artifact that was planted on the Xianzhou Luofu by Yaoshi, the Aeon of Abundance. It has the power to shape life and subdue death at will.

C: 停云小姐是在害怕危险吗？
E: Are you afraid of the danger, Miss Tingyun?

C: 按律法，未经许可擅闯工造司，少则判上个三五百年，重则流徙几千光年以外的蛮荒世界……
E: Our law states that trespassing into the Artisanship Commission can result in a prison sentence of between <unbreak>300</unbreak> to <unbreak>500</unbreak> years... Serious violations may result in exile on a barren planet, thousands of light-years away...

C: 就算对我有救命之恩也没用，实习统统不及格！
E: Even if you rescue me, it won't change anything — all of them will fail their internships!

C: 或许这些根系就是要害。
E: Maybe the root system is the key.

C: 据说被岁阳寄体的凡人，在无形中便被它们夺走了自由意志，变得越发狂乱。
E: It's said that mortals parasitized by heliobi would lose their free will imperceptibly, before gradually going berserk.

C: 那是代表神策府给你的酬劳，而这是代表我个人送给你的谢礼。你为罗浮…为仙舟做了很多事，身为策士长，这是我应有的答谢。
E: Those were rewards from the Seat of Divine Foresight — these are gifts from me, personally. You've done so much for the Luofu... for the Xianzhou. This is the least I could do.

C: 不必客气，你为罗浮…为仙舟做了很多事，身为策士长，这是我应有的答谢。
E: Please, take them. You've done so much for the Luofu... for the Xianzhou. This is the least I could do.

C: 需要我做什么事？
E: What can I help you with?

C: 我有两包零食…
E: I have a couple of snacks...

C: 有{NICKNAME}在，不必害怕了。
E: You don't need to be scared anymore, {NICKNAME} is here.

C: 正因如此，在下才会对她说那些话…那些话在你听来一定很刺耳吧？可是，与她未来会遭遇的一切相比，在下那番话只能算是和风细雨。
E: That's the reason I said what I said... You might mistake my words for being hurtful — but the truth is, no amount of words can prepare her for what lies ahead.

C: （倒不是信不过丹枢…但这种东西，真的可以随便吃吗？）
E: (It's not that I don't trust Dan Shu... but this doesn't seem like something I should take lightly.)

C: 不知道各位怎么想？
E: How does that sound, everyone?

C: 行吧，你们要我做什么？
E: Fine. What do I have to do?

C: 找我？
E: Looking for me?

C: 那么，无机生命？
E: How about inorganic beings?

C: 大家约定在鳞渊境这片生机盎然的乐土里见证你完成入会试炼。
E: We've agreed to witness the completion of your newcomer trial on the thriving land of Scalegorge Waterscape.

C: 机械…生物。这确实是个从未思考的角度。不过，创造它们的技术太弱后了！
E: Mechanical... creatures. That's a whole new way to look at this matter. Still, I must say the technology used to manufacture them is too outdated!

C: 收下这笔酬金吧，这是你应得的。
E: Here is your reward. You deserve it.

C: （告知真相）
E: (Tell the truth.)

C: 桂乃芬小姐，现在正在执行公务中……
E: Miss Guinaifen, I'm on official duty right now...

C: 这不是一般的机巧？
E: These are no ordinary ingenia.

C: 附身藿藿的那家伙…似乎消失了。吾不知道该替藿藿高兴还是难过……
E: The one possessing Huohuo... seems to have disappeared. I don't know if I should be happy or sad for her...

C: 所幸十王司已备妥了镇伏岁阳的法器，届时将以此处废园结成阵法，囚缚岁阳。今日的仙舟，算是渡过一劫了。
E: Thankfully, the Ten-Lords Commission had prepared other sacred vessels to suppress the heliobi. We will construct a matrix all over this abandoned garden and seal the heliobi within. The Xianzhou will live to see another day.

C: 吾等皆是十王司的判官，自然是同僚关系。
E: We are both Judges of the Ten-Lords Commission. Evidently, we are colleagues.

C: 我问得差不多了。
E: That's all I have to ask.

C: 看看这件灰色的大衣。
E: I'd like to take a look at this gray overcoat.

C: 做好准备再来。
E: Come back when you're prepared.

C: 你才来了多久，就知道他们是什么样的人了？
E: You've only been here for a little while. How would you know what kind of people they are?

C: 那首歌…呵，或许都称不上一首完整的歌…不过是件残次品。
E: That song... Hah, it probably can't be called a complete song... It's nothing but a third-rate defective piece of work.

C: 我还有最后一个请求，{F#女士}{M#先生}……
E: I also have one last request, {F#miss}{M#mister}...

C: 莱斯利•迪恩的眉眼纠缠在一起，开始轻微地抽搐。你的行为似乎让他陷入了无名的悲伤和痛楚。他好像感受到了你的存在，然后勉强睁开了眼睛。
E: Lesley Dean's brow scrunched up, and he began to twitch gently. Your actions seemed to have cast him into some unknown pain and sadness. Seeming to have sensed your presence, he forced himself to open his eyes.

C: （那么，这个房间的主人大概也是……）
E: (So, the owner of this room must be...)

C: 这个房间的客人去哪了？
E: Where did the guest in this room go?

C: 您会回来找我，这是不是意味着…您对我在现实中的境遇已经有所了解了？
E: The fact that you have come back to see me, does this mean... That you have come to some understanding of my situation in reality?

C: 逃离那个笼罩他的阴影…逃离挚友已经逝去的事实。他以为只要找到了我，实现了他们儿时的梦想，往日的影子就会消散。
E: Running away from the shadow that kept him trapped... Running away from the truth that his best friend had died. He thought that if he only found me and fulfilled their dream, then the dark shadow of their past would disappear.

C: 莱斯利•迪恩是完美的。他没有缺陷，他不可能有任何瑕疵。
E: Lesley Dean is perfect. He has no flaws, absolutely none.

C: …明天的拍摄原定早上十点开始，我会去和剧组沟通，推迟开机时间。
E: ...The shoot was scheduled for <unbreak>10</unbreak> AM tomorrow. I will contact the crew and have them push it back.

C: 莱斯利的声音变得虚弱了，他的皮肤和衣物渐渐变得如轻纱般透明。
E: Lesley's voice is growing weaker, his skin and clothing slowly growing as transparent as light muslin.

C: 是您啊，{NICKNAME}{F#女士}{M#先生}。很高兴能在这座梦想之城与您相遇。
E: It's you, {F#Ms.}{M#Mr.} {NICKNAME}. I'm so happy that I got a chance to meet with you in this City of Dreams.

C: 就选你了。
E: I'll pick you then.

C: 这个地方…依我看，应该摆上您的雕像才好，好叫来往客人和船员们，都能一目了然：谁才是这艘空艇的主人。
E: This place... I'd add your statue to it if it were up to me. Passing visitors and crew members will instantly understand at a glance: This is the master of this airship.

C: 遵命！
E: Aye-aye, Cap'n!

C: 唔，的确是男女老少合家欢的首选。要我说，没毛病！
E: Well, it's certainly a family favorite for all ages. I'd say, no issue!

C: 我有个研究梦泡的堂兄，给了我一个装置，能记录人脑海中的细化出来的一些意象，拿来做涂装倒是方便。
E: I have a cousin who studies dream bubbles. He gave me a device that can record detailed imagery from human minds. Handy when needed for painting.

C: 请随我来——
E: Please follow me...

C: 托您的福，苜蓿草家系的那位秘书为您准备了一幅画像，您看要不要摆上去？
E: The secretary from the Alfalfa Family has prepared your portrait as a sign of graciousness. Do you want to hang it up?

C: ——工作交接怎么办？！
E: ...What about the handover procedure!?

C: 在客人看来，它集入住、退房、导航服务于一体，是带来便捷的完美工具；但在你眼中，它是夺走无数年轻人工作岗位、彻底掐灭服务行业人性光辉的罪恶机器。
E: To a guest, its one-stop-shop services of checking in, checking out, and navigation service make it a perfect tool of convenience. But to you, it is a monstrous machine that has robbed countless job opportunities from aspiring youths, completely rending the service industry of glorious human touch.

C: 唔…您好？
E: Mmm... hello?

C: 还发生了什么怪事？
E: What other weird things have been happening?

C: （毕竟经历了那么多大事，前台今天还真是冷清……）
E: (After going through all those major events, the front desk seems rather empty today...)

C: 我现在可是老板，牛仔！
E: I'm the boss now, cowboy!

C: 眼前的皮皮西人露出了一幅委屈的表情，晶莹的液态物质开始在他的眼眶周围打转……
E: The Pepeshi shoots a pitiful look, and a sparkling liquid gleam begins to swirl around inside his eyes...

C: 这就开始翻旧账了？我不过一片好心，希望大家一起赚钱罢了…这种极小概率的意外怎么能怪到我头上呢？
E: Are we going to start digging up old scores now? I was just being kind and hoped that everyone can make a little money together... How can an accident as rare as that be blamed on me?

C: 我是宇宙凝缩而成的精华！
E: I'm the essence of the universe!

C: 您，您是…之前那位大堂经理？
E: A—Are you... that lobby manager?

C: 骑士之速是什么玩意？巡海游侠才是速度的象征！
E: Speed of a knight? The Galaxy Rangers are the fastest!

C: 身为匹诺康尼的大救星，遐迩闻名的银河球棒侠，你真的没法独自解决眼前这个*小麻烦*吗？
E: As the savior of Penacony and the renowned Galactic Baseballer, surely you can handle this small issue on your own, right?

C: 要是时间凑巧，我们应该是能在星槎海港口上见面的。
E: If the timing is right, we should be able to meet them at the Starskiff Haven port.

C: 你想他们远道而来，回到其他仙舟肯定也要花不少时间，这个时候口渴了，就可以喝上地道的罗浮口味……
E: If they're visitors from afar, then I imagine returning to their Xianzhou will take a long time. If they get thirsty, they can drink this and get a taste of authentic Luofu flavor...

C: 我不擅长在这种场合下发表感受，就交给你和三月了。
E: I am not good at expressing my feelings at times like this. I'll leave the talking to you, March.

C: 罗浮之行的目的已经达成，虽然呼雷一事出乎预料…但好在一切解决的法子尚且圆满。
E: Our objective upon the Luofu has been completed. Although the situation with Hoolay got a little out of hand... Everything was wrapped up nicely in the end.

C: 让铖杰自己判断吧。
E: Let Chengjie decide for himself.

C: 要不你等会儿再吃…我们先带铖杰去别的地方转转。
E: How about you wait a bit and eat later... We'll lead Chengjie elsewhere and take a stroll.

C: 只要不太麻烦的话……
E: As long as it's not too much of a hassle...

C: 终于是了却一桩难题，多谢了。我好累啊，我也先回去了，之后再联系吧。
E: Finally, that's resolved. Thank you so much. I'm exhausted, so I'll go back now too. Talk to you later.

C: 再见了星槎！
E: Goodbye, starskiff!

C: 自从莱恩那小子走了之后，我也是很久没看到你小子钻研新技术了。但是这么久了，你小子根本就没来问过我，只顾闭门造车，实在是孺～子～不～可～教～
E: Since Ryan passed away, I haven't seen you working on something new for ages. I'm so upset that you've never approached me but chose to do it alone before this!

C: 但学徒都是这样的，你要是不来问不来学，一辈子都不会被人看得上。
E: But all apprentices have to go through the same thing. If you refuse to ask questions and learn, you won't ever be respected.

C: 出乎意料地，高大的金人接过手稿，随即将它撕成了碎片；还未等铖杰师傅反应过来，纸片像飞起的花瓣一样，随着风离去了。
E: To everyone's surprise, the enormous aurumaton takes the manuscript and tears it into pieces. Before Chengjie can react, the pieces of paper have gone with the wind like flying flower petals.

C: 真搞不懂那家伙……
E: I really don't get him...

C: 嗯，原本应该发出警报的无人机突然成了哑炮…值得留意。还有别的补充吗？
E: Hmm, a drone that was supposed to sound an alarm suddenly went silent... Worth remembering. Anything else?

C: 大奔——你回来了，大奔！
E: Big Ben! You're back!

C: ——那就拜托你当裁判了，希儿！俱乐部的规矩你再清楚不过了。
E: You can be our referee, Seele! You know the rules of the club inside out.

C: 感谢三位的指点，我们这就去金人巷采风。也许过两天，我们会在那里再度相遇。
E: Thanks for the suggestion. We'll head to the Aurum Alley to gather materials. Maybe we'll run into each other there in a couple of days.

C: 怎么啦，三月小姐？
E: What's up, Miss March?

C: 我们才离开了几个月时间。
E: We've only been away for a few months.

C: 彦卿，你真是越来越有大人的模样了。
E: You look much maturer now, Yanqing.

C: 云璃姑娘，你二话不说带走了我的剑，怎么还能若无其事地拒绝物归原主？
E: Hold on a sec, Yunli. You took my sword without even asking, and now you're refusing to give it back?

C: …什么美名。总有好事之人热爱编撰虚名，为云骑乱立山头。云璃只是个孩子，面薄怕生，行事无礼之处还望各位见谅。
E: ...Such grandiose names. Some folks love to spin these fancy titles, trying to set the Cloud Knights apart. Yunli is still just a young girl, a bit awkward and hot-tempered. So please forgive her if she's being rude.

C: 我向诸位保证，云骑不会放任这艘舰船离开。
E: If that's the case, I can assure you the Cloud Knights won't let your ship leave.

C: 也难怪公司的人不愿意让咱们开箱查验。我会联系十王司，请判官前来权衡判断。
E: No wonder the IPC were trying to obstruct our inspection. I'll contact the Ten-Lords Commission and ask the judges to come and give their final verdict on this.

C: 灵砂大人，您来了。容我提醒一句：在罗浮，龙师与丹鼎司之间关系紧密，这样避而不见，恐怕不符合一直以来的惯例……
E: There you are, Master Lingsha. Just a reminder, the Alchemy Commission on the Luofu has always had a close relationship with the Preceptors, so avoiding a meeting like this doesn't align with our long-standing practices...

C: 可惜，她虽然精通医术，却并不懂人心，全然不知如何切除潜藏于丹鼎司深处的毒痈。最终，恩师遭人构陷驱逐，远放朱明仙舟。我也受此牵连，不得不离开罗浮。
E: Unfortunately, even though she was skilled in the art of healing, she didn't understand the human heart or how to eliminate the sickness lurking within the depths of the Alchemy Commission. In the end, she was framed and exiled to the Zhuming. I was also implicated and had to leave the Luofu.

C: 灵砂姐姐，你可回来啦！我等了好久！
E: Lingsha, you're back! I've been waiting ages for you!

C: 准备好了吗，各位？
E: Are you all ready?

C: 啊呀，飞霄大人，您怎么在这儿？龙女的看诊结束了吗？
E: Aha! What brings you here, Lady Feixiao? Have you finished your health consultation with the Dragon Lady?

C: 你说是不是啊，{NICKNAME}？
E: You think so too, right, {NICKNAME}?

C: 各位是证人，无妨。在我看来，元帅很清楚景元召开仪典的用意，也知晓他所面临的局势。她这么说，显然是认为二者并重。
E: No need for that. You're all important witnesses. The Marshal is well aware of Jing Yuan's purpose in holding the ceremony and understands the situation he is facing. She mentioned it because she believes both issues are important.

C: 方才我看这位三月小姐对你们俩擂台剑斗之事颇为上心。不如就由你们教导她剑术入门。
E: I noticed just now that Miss March seemed quite interested in the outcome of your sword fight, so I thought why not teach her the art of swordplay?

C: 还是得你来做决定。
E: It's all up to you, though.

C: 金人巷中，飞霄等来了她多年未见的战友。
E: In Aurum Alley, Feixiao meets with her old comrade-in-arms whom she hasn't seen for many years...

C: 来自仙舟「曜青」的云骑将军。\n受元帅之命前来「观礼」演武仪典。不过她此行真正的目标是观察罗浮在建木灾异之后的情况。\n这位将军予人的第一印象直爽而凌厉。想在<color=#dbc291ff>言语上欺瞒她</color>，也许并不是什么好主意。
E: The Cloud Knight General from the Xianzhou Yaoqing.\nShe came to "observe" the Wardance under the orders of the Marshal. However, the true purpose of her trip is to observe the situation on the Luofu after the Ambrosial Arbor crisis.\nThe first impression of this general is that she is straightforward and stern. Therefore, trying to <color=#dbc291ff>deceive her</color> is probably not a good idea.

C: 你该不会忘了昨天我们应承怀炎将军的事情吧？彦卿不敢怠慢，我特地起了个大早，来教授三月小姐剑术。
E: You haven't forgotten about our promise to General Huaiyan, have you? I woke up especially early, so I could start teaching Miss March swordplay.

C: 别听彦卿的，大力出奇迹！
E: Ignore him. Strength is everything!

C: 这些年来，「毁灭」的爪牙摧残了数之不尽的世界，联盟也有所防备，只是未曾想他们竟会与「丰饶」的残党联手。
E: Over the years, the Destruction's minions have wreaked havoc on countless worlds, and the Alliance has been keeping an eye on them. But no one expected them to join hands with the remnants of the Abundance.

C: 天击将军请慎言。对无名客的问话不应变成同僚间的猜疑。那名星核猎手也曾是老朽的弟子，你是否也要考验我的忠诚？
E: Please be cautious with your words, Merlin's Claw. Let's avoid sowing doubt among our comrades. That Stellaron Hunter used to be my disciple, so are you putting my loyalty in question, too?

C: 我向来相信直觉，自然不会怀疑各位光明磊落的侠士。但眼下罗浮面对的质疑难关也确凿无疑。因此我打算确保最关键的一点，给联盟一个交代。
E: I've always had faith in my instincts, so I don't doubt your good intentions. But the Alliance has its fair share of questions and doubts about the Luofu. So, my plan is to come up with an acceptable answer to satisfy the Alliance.

C: 正是。我要带走关押在罗浮幽囚狱中的步离人巢父「呼雷」，移交曜青仙舟看管。步离人近日的动向足以证明他们将有大图谋。我们必须及早因应。
E: Exactly. Hoolay is locked up in the Luofu's Shackling Prison. Since he is the Brood Lord of the borisin, I want to transfer him onto the Xianzhou Yaoqing and imprison him there. The recent movements of the borisin suggest they're planning something big, so we must act preemptively.

C: 此处是幽囚狱众多临时便于出入的穴门之一。两位并非犯人，自不能循押解犯人的门入内。客人，请入内。
E: This is one of many entrances used for temporary access. Since you're not actual prisoners, it makes sense for you to use this entrance. Please come on in, dear guests.

C: 用不了几天，你就会再见到我的。
E: You'll see me again in just a few days.

C: 两位，吾名唤雪衣，奉十王司锁字部通令在此候命。
E: Guests, my name is Xueyi, and I'm here on orders from the Incarceration Division of the Ten-Lords Commission.

C: 判官大人……
E: Your honor...

C: 判官尚未抵达，两位请稍作等待。
E: Her Honor hasn't arrived yet. Please wait a moment.

C: …不，除去步离人之外，这里的遗骸中我没瞧见长得像狐人的死者。
E: ...No, I haven't found any foxian bodies, only borisin ones.

C: 你们不是正在找我吗？
E: Aren't you looking for me?

C: 狱中犯人暴动，重犯…呼雷不知去向！
E: The prisoners have revolted, and the criminal Hoolay... is nowhere to be found!

C: 我本打算带三月和云璃一同去迴星港观望竞锋舰，但没想到，那地方竟出现了一群来历不明，却持有官方身份的狐人。
E: I was planning to take Miss March and Yunli to Stargazer Navalia to see the Skysplitter up close, but we stumbled upon a group of suspicious foxians carrying official identities.

C: 将军一直没回答我的问题呢，「为何呼雷被囚禁在罗浮而非曜青」。您如此三缄其口，莫非这一处置并不是什么荣耀？
E: You haven't answered my question about why Hoolay was imprisoned in the Luofu instead of the Yaoqing, General. You've been reserved in your response. Could it be that such an arrangement wasn't an honor?

C: 这位先知颁下预言：步离人分裂太久了，只有您的归来才能统合所有猎群，重现往日的辉煌！我们这才得知您还活着…一定是长生主显灵！
E: The Prophet made this proclamation: The borisin have been divided for too long, and only your return can unite all the packs, restoring us to our former glory! That's when we learned that you were still alive... It must have been a manifestation of the Master of Immortality!

C: <color=#dbc291ff>去港口看看，然后回来告诉我。</color>看看你一心期盼的封锁有没有出现。
E: <color=#dbc291ff>Head to the port and report back to me.</color> Let's see if they really closed it like you expected.

C: 有个问题始终困扰着我。为什么受刑七百年，你依旧还能安然无恙地活着？步离人不该有如此长久的生命…也不可能有如此顽强的复原能力。
E: Here's the question that's been bothering me: How have you managed to survive and endure centuries of torture? Borisin aren't supposed to live that long or possess such regenerative abilities.

C: 椒丘…我找到你了。
E: Jiaoqiu... I've found you.

C: 步离人有句古谚「在森林里，猎人与猎物的身份随时改变」。眼下我们自居猎人，但盲目追着他们跑，到头来我们反倒会成为呼雷的猎物。
E: There's an old saying among the borisin: "In the forest, the hunter may easily become the hunted." While we may call ourselves the hunters now, chasing them blindly will only make us become the prey.

C: 你难道没有发觉，这片自动运行的区域里，今日的人有些多的不太寻常？
E: This is an automated area, so don't you think that there are a bit too many people here today?

C: （询问竞锋舰的情况）
E: (Ask about the Skysplitter)

C: 谢谢你的支持，我有更重要的事情要去做。
E: Thank you for your concern, but I have more pressing matters to attend to.

C: 要不，还是把彦卿叫回来吧！
E: Why don't we call Yanqing back?

C: 你听听，这是我的同道中人。
E: Hear that? This person gets it!

C: 朝我这儿看看？
E: Take a look at me?

C: 知己知彼，其中就包括了解自己对吧？接受采访就能很好了解自己。
E: Know yourself and know your enemy, right? If you accept my interview, you'll learn all about yourself!

C: 感情问题。
E: Relationship trouble.

C: 你登台交手的时候，维持这样的平常心就好。
E: Just make sure to maintain this composure when you go in the ring.

C: 将军，看那儿…
E: General, look there...

C: 随着云骑开赴各处，封锁与排查迅速展开。\n\n此时，在长乐天，云骑正列阵待命……
E: As the Cloud Knights set off to various locations, they swiftly began to cordon off areas and start inspections.\n\n At that time, the Cloud Knights are waiting in formation in the Exalting Sanctum...

C: 别再藏头露尾了！呼雷，出来面对我！
E: Enough hiding, Hoolay! Come out and face me!

C: 很遗憾，他看不到这一幕了。
E: What a shame he will never get to see that.

C: 做得很好，不过我还得和你再次确认一下——
E: Very good. Although, there is one thing I want to confirm with you...

C: 紧急登舰请求？
E: An emergency boarding request?

C: 好啊！那么老朽也该动动身子骨了。我会与天舶司一同紧守玉界门，以防局势失控。
E: Very good! Then I'd better dust off my weary bones, too! I will go with the Sky-Faring Commission to guard the Jade Gate and ensure that things do not spiral out of control.

C: 难道罗浮仙舟上没有其他够格的战士了吗？
E: Does the Xianzhou Luofu not have any worthy warriors?

C: 不错！但还远远不够！
E: Not bad! But it will take much more than that!

C: 所以，快走吧！我们可以逃走的！
E: So, you have to run, quickly! We can do it, we can escape!

C: 宁可抗拒你本应成为的样子，从自由的狼沦落为受人豢养的狐，只为…多一个人？
E: You would resist becoming the person you were supposed to be, lower yourself from a free wolf to a domesticated fox just for... the sake of one person?

C: 这一切全都是拜您的前世之身所赐啊。若不是你当年任意妄为，我又何须为了担起举族解脱之道另寻险径，将自己变作这般不人不鬼的模样。
E: All of this is thanks to your past life. Had you not been so rash, I wouldn't have had to walk such a dangerous road to free our clan, becoming this specter of my former self.

C: 灵砂，对您失望之极。您的所思所想已是非人。云骑！
E: I am deeply disappointed in you, Elder. Your thoughts and intentions are completely devoid of empathy. Cloud Knights!

C: 丹恒，我自来讨厌你的不识时务，转世重生，你一点也没变。
E: Dan Heng, I've always disliked your inability to see the bigger picture. Rebirth hasn't changed you one bit.

C: 你不认得自己的皇帝，说明你对「黄金的时刻」不甚了解…无妨，如果你也想帮忙，就一起来吧。多个人手总是好的。
E: That you don't recognize your own Emperor, shows that your understanding of the Golden Hour is meager... No matter, if you wish to help as well, come with us. It's always good to have more helping hands.

C: 感谢你，忠诚的臣民。朕会记得你的帮助。
E: Thank you, my loyal subject. I will remember your aid.

C: （怎么突然就跑了？赶紧追上去看一眼…她要是在我眼皮底下遇刺，那真是把无名客的脸丢尽了。）
E: (Why did she suddenly run off? Gotta hurry and keep up with her... If she was assassinated right under my nose, I'd totally run the Nameless' repute through the mud.)

C: 我来帮你。
E: Let me help.

C: 先离开这里。
E: Let's leave this place first.

C: 开车离开
E: Take the car and leave

C: 想要对朕不利的人，仿佛越杀越多。
E: It felt as if I had to kill more and more people who opposed my rule.

C: 还能怎么样？公平的审判，仁慈的处决。
E: What else can we do? A fair trial, and lenient judgment.

C: 走吧，蒂索克二世。
E: Let's go, Tizocic II.

C: 所以朕必须成为下一位皇帝，确保善意尽可能长久地留存。
E: Hence, I must become the next Emperor, to ensure that kindness will endure.

C: 他如一尊雕像般端坐着，连呼吸的迹象都难以察觉——盯着他，你也不由得屏住了气。然后，你惊讶地发现，人在梦境里是不必呼吸的。
E: He sits upright like a statue, even his breathing is hardly perceptible. You can't help holding your breath when staring at him. To your surprise, you realize that one does not have to breathe in the dreamscape.

C: 只靠我自己是无法脱离这种影响的。必须要依靠某种强而有力的外力介入…比如…比如「天才俱乐部」。
E: I can't free myself on my own. Some sort of powerful external force has to intervene. Like... like the Genius Society.

C: 哼…顺带还夸了我一下，谢谢啊。
E: Thanks for throwing in a compliment for me.

C: 直到黑塔女士接到了您的信息。
E: Until Madam Herta received your text.

C: 不…不对。他的确履行了承诺，他没有辜负我的信任。消失的人是我…我的耳朵和嘴巴都被堵住了，眼睛也被蒙上……
E: Wait... No. He did fulfill his promise, and he didn't fail me. I was the one who went missing... Both my ears and mouth were covered, and I was blindfolded...

C: 没错，查德威克博士。以这里作为起点，我们——{RUBY_B#公司部门}技术研发部{RUBY_E#}和你的团队——将共同开创银河的未来。
E: Yes, Dr. Chadwick. Starting from here, we, the {RUBY_B#IPC department}Technology Department{RUBY_E#}, and your team will shape the future of the galaxy together.

C: 我也一样，孩子…那天以后，我再也不敢向镜子投去哪怕一瞥。
E: Me too, child... Ever since that day, I don't dare to even glance at myself in the mirror.

C: 嗯？这顶帽子…看来你已经找到「钟表匠」留下的「{RUBY_B#遗产}宝藏{RUBY_E#}」了。
E: Hmm? This hat... Looks like you've found the {RUBY_B#Legacy}treasure{RUBY_E#} that the Watchmaker left behind.

C: 它和我在美梦小镇里见到的样子完全不同，它的身上缺了很多折纸小鸟该有的东西！
E: It's completely different from when I saw it in Dreamville. It's missing something that an origami bird should have!

C: 书架上放着一本名为《梦境施工指南》的手账册，上面字迹杂乱，似乎有不少人同时在使用。
E: On the bookshelf is a handbook named Dreamscape Construction Guide. The scribbling on it is haphazard, like many people were perusing it at the same time.

C: 奥尔拉…真希望他没事。
E: Orla... I hope he's all right.

C: 你没有阻止。小鸟轻盈地朝着光飞去，飞向其他小鸟的身边。在光芒中，你恍然看到鸟变为一位少年，他转头向你轻轻微笑。
E: You didn't intervene. The bird flies gracefully toward the light, joining the other birds in flight. Within the radiance, you witness the bird's transformation into a young man, who turns his head and offers you a gentle smile.

C: 在这儿待得也够久了。走吧，该走了——
E: I've stayed here long enough. Come on. It's time to go...

C: 哈！真是能说会道。但你以为有了这番说辞，他就不用赔钱了吗？
E: Ha! How ludicrous. You think your outrageous rhetoric will acquit him of having to compensate me?

C: 此事说来话长。我们应该找个能坐下的地方，舒舒服服地谈论这个议题——就选<color=#dbc291ff>云石天宫的浴场</color>吧，我是那里的尊享客户。
E: It is a long story. We should look for a place to speak about this more comfortably. How about <color=#dbc291ff>Marmoreal Palace's baths</color>? I am a privileged patron there.

C: 它对公民来说也许是美德，但出现在外邦人身上，就只剩下麻烦了。
E: It may be a virtue to citizens, but with the outlanders showing up, it's spelled nothing but trouble.

C: 哦哦哦，如此热血的台词！
E: Ooooh! That line's got me all fired up!

C: 这些外邦人已经挺过了最艰难的旅程，只要一点简单的帮助就可以活下去。对此，我有一个想法……
E: The worst of the journey is over for these outlanders. They just need a little help to live on. I have an idea...

C: 谨、谨遵师命……
E: A—As you wish, teacher...

C: 好。你要把这些食物带到哪儿去？我帮你送一程吧……
E: Okay. Where do you want the food delivered to? I can help you with that...

C: 货比三家之后，总算意识到我所言非虚了吧？
E: After browsing the various shops, you must have realized that my words ring true, no?

C: 不不不，如果不能躺在椅子上、按照步骤用餐，食物的风味就会被浪费……
E: No no no, if they don't lay back in chairs and eat the meal in order, the food's flavor will go to absolute waste...

C: 不好了，英雄！吾师，吾师他，他…药，药！
E: Grave news, hero! Master, Master, h—he... med, medi—!

C: 谢谢…如此一来，我也就没什么遗憾了。
E: Thank you... I will have no regrets now.

C: 他又没有从中获利。
E: He stood to gain nothing from his acts.

C: 倘若为苏克提瑞斯网开一面，你就会见到更多「迫不得已」的犯罪者，甚至可能会有人偷药去救治大地兽……
E: If we grant Soctires leniency, you will encounter more "compelled" criminals. There may be someone who might even steal medicine to save the dromases...

C: 想要放眼未来，必先考虑当下。
E: To look forward to the future, one must first consider the present.

C: 但我相信这微小的努力也会产生影响，正如水滴也能贯穿顽石。
E: But I believe that this tiny effort can make a difference, just like how water drops will eventually wear through stone.

C: 「天谴之矛」麾下居然有败逃的懦夫，真是可笑…还是多亏英雄出手相助，我们才能全身而退。
E: The fact that the Lance of Fury underlings would be so cowardly as to flee in defeat. Pathetic... Thank you for saving us, hero. We would not have made it out of here alive without you.

C: 那东西可不一般，是{RUBY_B#浪漫的泰坦}墨涅塔{RUBY_E#}的圣物——她亲手创造的<color=#dbc291ff>蜕生金丝</color>！
E: This is no mere ordinary object. It's a divine object of {RUBY_B#Romance Titan}Mnestia{RUBY_E#}. It is the <color=#dbc291ff>Golden Thread of Rebirth</color> that she weaved herself!

C: 你听说过这个故事吧——在造物世，墨涅塔将世上的爱与自己的残茧捻作丝线，作为赠予{RUBY_B#理性的泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}的礼物。
E: You must have heard this story? During the Era Creatura, Mnestia wove together the love of the world and their own cocoon to create silk as a gift to {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#}.

C: 待会报酬多给点就行。
E: Just pay me extra.

C: 但这句话的另一层意思是——刚才那一幕的一切，她都已然知晓。
E: However, what this does mean... Is that everything that happened here... she knew it was coming.

C: 你身上遍布圣城军与悬锋军的枪伤，你在这没有友亲的战场上寻找着失约的友亲——
E: As your body is covered in wounds dealt by both the army of the holy city and that of Kremnos, you search for the kin that missed his appointment in a battlefield bereft of kin...

C: 嗡嗡——我是「浪漫」的使者，顺应「浪漫」的渴望而来，代表「浪漫」予以信徒回应。
E: Buzz... I am an envoy of Romance. I respond to those that long for Romance as its disciple.

C: 阿…亚…斯……
E: Ar... ca... Paris...

C: 同行的人一个个都消失在黑暗里，饥饿、恐惧逐渐成为绝望。可这时，{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}的眷属却出现在我们面前。
E: The people with us disappeared one by one in the darkness. Hunger and fear gradually turned into despair. But then, {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx's{RUBY_E#} Titankin appeared in front of us.

C: 朋友，我妈妈的身体看起来还好吗？
E: My friend, how did my mother's figure look?

C: 很瘦。
E: Skinny.

C: 要怎么做？
E: What should we do?

C: 然后呢？
E: Go on.

C: 只可惜，不尽轮回，徒留银河一闪，万千追忆，化作故事一页。翁星就此归于原点。
E: Yet, alas, after all has been said and done about the endless cycle, all that remained was but a flash across the cosmos, thousands upon thousands of memories dissolving into a single page of story. Amphoreus returned then to its origin.

C: 船长，快看我，我是操控杆，最擅长操控人心。
E: Captain, look at me! I'm the control stick, and I'm an expert at controlling hearts!

C: 这叫王道。就因为看了还想看，这类题材才会经久不衰。
E: That's what you call a classic formula. People keep coming back for more, and that's why this theme never gets old.

C: 作为权杖的「心」，在铁墓席卷宇宙的瞬间，她也充盈万界，成为了群星的「记忆」。
E: As the "heart" of the Scepter, she, too, filled the cosmos in the instant when Irontomb swept across all of existence. She became the memories of the stars.

C: 翁法罗斯…我要是也能模拟出一个世界就好了。
E: Amphoreus... if only I could simulate a world like that.

C: 左转…右转…再左转…呜呜？
E: Turn left, and then turn right, and then left again... Wooo?

C: 外面的世界那么大，我真该出去看看。嗯，现在就回去收拾行李好了！
E: The world outside is so big and I really should go out and have a look. Right, I should starting packing now!

C: 在埃美丽说话间，一张购书清单从她口袋里滑落。
E: As Emily speaks, a shopping list of books slips out of her pocket.

C: 对，这玩意还在保修期内呢！
E: Yes! This thing is still in its warranty period!

C: 要是一般的设备，我早就动手了，但说明书上写了——
E: I'd have taken them apart ages ago if they were some ordinary gadgets, but the manual says—

C: 我有些拿不准…你能帮我个忙吗？帮我去记录一下机器人的报错信息。
E: I'm not sure about it yet... Can you give me a hand and record the robots' error logs?

C: 定位装置啊…我想想要怎么修。
E: Positioning device... Lemme think about how to fix that.

C: 固件尚未更新，远程连接断开。
E: Firmware not updated. Remote connection has been disconnected.

C: （向她告知先前的事）
E: (Tell her what happened)

C: 一位天才科员怀揣着对于科研的期待，迎接了自己人生中第一个亲手负责的奇物研究项目。
E: A genius researcher, full of anticipation and hope towards making scientific discoveries, embarked on the first Curio research project that he was personally responsible for.

C: 正当你准备离开时，奇怪的声音却从门边传来。
E: As you are about to leave, you hear a strange sound from beside the door.

C: 小小的马桶？
E: A small toilet seat?

C: 听说你需要帮助。
E: I hear you need help.

C: 渊源…？奇怪了，我怎么从来没听说过……
E: History...? Strange, I've never heard of him...

C: 这样啊…原来如此。听你这么一说，为了她自身的仕途考虑，曼娅女士确实有充分的理由不和我做朋友。
E: I see. Ms. Manya does have every reason not to be friends with me for the sake of her own career.

C: 你能否带着照片去帮我问问，看看她愿不愿意和我做朋友？
E: Could you show the photo to her and ask her if she's willing to be my friend?

C: 塔米拉不想和你做朋友…
E: Tamila doesn't want to be your friend...

C: 将和塔米拉的谈话内容转述给了华劳斯……
E: You convey what Tamila said to Wallace...

C: 又一张明信片…不可思议，难道我的一举一动都在他的注视下吗？
E: Another postcard... Unbelievable. Has he been watching me?

C: 是发生了一些事呢。最近，有奇怪的说法在诊所里传开了，说是…「只要把心意写在纸上，让信鸽带向天空，就能将声音传递给阿丽娜」什么的……
E: Yeah, something did happen. Recently a strange rumor has been circulating in the clinic that "If you write your wish on a piece of paper and let a pigeon carry it to the sky, your wish will be conveyed to Alina..."

C: 那我就直说了，这都是客人透露给我的。我只是用了点小手段，撬开了他们的嘴巴…嘿嘿。
E: Well, I'll just tell you. One of my customers tipped me off. It took me some time, but with a few tricks, he opened up to me... Hehe.

C: …那「鼹鼠党振兴计划」的目标说不定就能提前达成咯，很棒吧？
E: ...Then the goal of The Moles Reinvigoration Plan might be achieved ahead of schedule, isn't it great?

C: …咳咳，我知道了，我收回刚才的话。
E: ...Ahem, I see, I take back what I just said.

C: 你为什么叹气？
E: What's with the sighing?

C: 哦，原来你有凭证啊…可惜，还以为我终于能在信里写些特别的事了……
E: Oh, so you have a pass... What a pity, I thought I could finally write something special in the letter...

C: 年轻人，你怎么不懂呢…这种只需要熬资历就能得到的东西才算不上什么荣誉，只会更被人看不起……
E: Youngster, why don't you understand... You can get one of these just by staying long enough. It is not considered an honor. And it won't bring me any respect...

C: 莉拉……
E: Lila...

C: 我真是个死脑筋，居然一直在逃避自己的家人，还编出那些没谱的谎话……
E: I've been so stubborn... avoiding my own family, making up such ridiculous lies...

C: 都准备好了。请拿好您的「球牡丹」——欢迎下次再光临「长夏」花店。
E: Here are your Ball Peonies. Thanks for the purchase, and have a lovely day!

C: 都准备好了。请拿好您的「初雪八落」——欢迎下次再光临「长夏」花店。
E: Here are your First Snows. Thanks for the purchase, and have a lovely day!

C: 鉴于这是您第一次参与高强度的答题，有紧张情绪也是可以理解的。今天我就破例再给您一次机会吧。
E: It's understandable that you're a little nervous, given this is your first time taking part in a high-intensity quiz like this. I'll make an exception for you today and give you another chance.

C: 您今天特地前来，是有什么事务需要教育部协助吗？
E: For what purpose have you come today? What task requires the support of the Ministry of Education?

C: 该怎么帮助你呢？
E: How can I help you?

C: 不过很可惜，我又给她推荐了几本类似的书，她好像都不太满意。
E: Unfortunately, the few books I recommended to her, she doesn't seem to be satisfied with them.

C: 这样的话…我听说《雪国冒险奇谭》可能要解禁了，到时你可以读一读。
E: If that's the case... I heard the Tale of the Winterlands might be getting unbanned. You can read it then.

C: 于是我就想到了拍照这个点子——这样就能证明我确实是在外面工作了！
E: So I thought about taking a photo to prove that I'm in fact working during the day!

C: 这么理解可就太片面了！你想啊，「正当权益会社」是帮助人行使「正当权益」的，而我的工作则是确保别人的「正当权益」不受侵犯……
E: That's not the whole picture! Think about it — The Rightful Rights Society helps people to exercise their rightful rights, and my job is to ensure people's rights are not violated...

C: 呜、呜呜…我明白了……
E: *sob* O—Okay...

C: 合法…哎，哪儿有那么简单啊。
E: A proper job... Heh. Easier said than done.

C: 这也太被动了，既然信上提到了叫作「阿浮」的人，我会抽空问一下的。
E: We can't just do nothing! The letter mentions someone named "Fulie," I'll make time to go and ask them about it.

C: 我来写一封回信吧！
E: I'll write a reply!

C: 来来来，且等我为你泡一杯试试。
E: Why don't you come over and give it a try?

C: 喝就完事了！
E: Bottoms up!

C: ？什么情况？
E: Hmm? What's happening?

C: 桌上摆着精致的糕点，旁边的躺椅上还残留着潮湿的痕迹。
E: Exquisite delicacies line the tables, remnant traces of dampness still lingering on the lounger beside them.

C: 整座浴场用之不竭的水源均由此而来，法吉娜在信徒眼中是如此慷慨，只有她的赐福「倾泻而下」。
E: The infinite water supply for the entire bath comes from here. To the disciples, Phagousa's generosity knows no bounds, for it is their blessing that pours down unto them.

C: 再见。
E: Goodbye.

C: 为了唤醒明天，刻法勒负起太阳。
E: Kephale carries the sun to awaken tomorrow.

C: 命运是如此沉重，或许，我只足以纺织一缕游丝。
E: This is the great weight of fate. Perhaps, all I am fit to weave is a sheet of gossamer.

C: 尊贵的王，无论如何重复预言的步骤，都会是一样的结局……
E: Honorable king, it does not matter how you repeat the steps of the prophecy, the outcome will always be the same...

C: 王欧利庞，您还在犹豫什么！想象我们先前构想的伟业，您是永远的王，悬锋城将万载延续…与这相比，一名婴孩的性命又算得了什么？
E: King Eurypon, what are you waiting for!? Imagine the great undertaking that we conceived. You will be the eternal King and Castrum Kremnos will continue on for millennia... What is the life of a single baby compared to all of this?

C: {NICKNAME}当上了树庭之王。
E: {NICKNAME} has become the Sovereign of the Grove.

C: 你抚摸来之不易的王位，冰冷而坚实，就像是你此刻的心情。你的手指被锋利的边缘划伤，鲜血流了出来，金属纹饰染上殷红，仿佛某种不祥的诅咒。
E: You run your hand over the hard-won seat. It is cold and unyielding, mirroring your current mood. Your fingers are nicked by the sharp edges, drawing blood. The crimson stains the metallic patterns like a sinister curse.

C: 现在可不是休息的时候……
E: Now is not the time to rest...

C: ——微风将受狂啸淹没，愚钝的王纾尽千金，只为自己买下亡国的漂泊。
E: ...The gentle breeze shall be devoured by the roaring waves. The foolish king spends all his riches, only to purchase a life as a drifter after his nation is conquered.

C: 别争辩了，你从未辩得过我。正因我身为黄金裔，才更应该留下来阻击黑潮，尽可能拖到援兵前来。
E: Don't argue with me, you know you will never win. It is precisely because I am a Chrysos Heir that I must stay and fend off the black tide. I will endeavor to ensure we survive until reinforcements arrive.

C: 清风鼓动着风铃发出清脆的响声。不妨驻足，且听风吟。
E: The gentle breeze sets the wind chimes ringing, producing a clear, melodious sound. Maybe you should pause and listen to the wind's song.

C: 让我看看…「在拜谒步道之下，受拜谒者远去。」
E: Let me see... "Beneath the Worshiper's Footpath, the worshiped one departs."

C: 云羊乳！
E: Cloudsheep milk!

C: 事到如今，我不得不向你透露这个欺世之谎。我们早就背负着世界的命运，没有独善其身的余地。
E: At this moment in time, I have no choice but to reveal this grand lie to you. We've been shouldering the fate of this world all this time. There is no way for us to come out of this in one piece.

C: 嗯，好事，这代表我又能见到其他神驹们了。要是遇上那几个消极怠工的，我非得把它们的脑袋漆成绿的不可。
E: Eh, works for me. This means I get to see the other divine foals again. And if I run into those slackers, I swear I'm painting their heads green.

C: 可惜冥河水并非是真正的水，它只是一种特殊的现象，是带不走的。
