E: Unfortunately, the River of Souls isn't actual water. It's a phenomenon, something you cannot take with you.

C: 自然，这是基本中的基本。
E: Naturally. This is the most fundamental of fundamentals.

C: 顺带一提，那刻夏老师还负责你们的神话史概要。至于这门课可能会有*问题*嘛，我来说，还是那刻夏老师你自己说……
E: By the way, Professor Anaxa is also in charge of your History of Mythology course. As for the potential issue in that one... Should I tell them, or will you, Professor Anaxa?

C: 呵…我在这个地方游荡了许久许久，也早已把生前所有事情忘干净了。
E: Heh... I've wandered this place for so, so long, and I've forgotten literally everything about my life before.

C: 刚才的灯光秀可真酷炫。而且音乐也太好听了吧，简直就是天籁！
E: That light show was amazing. And the music was absolutely phenomenal!

C: 成为…能…极速…移动…的……
E: To become... able to... move... at extreme speed...

C: 路过的旅者哟，你不知道我有多困扰嗡。我每天都在数这里到底有多少金币，日日数，夜夜数，根本数不完……
E: Oh, passing traveler, you cannot imagine how troubled I am, buzz~ I spend every day counting these gold coins, day after day, night after night, and I can never finish...

C: 天哪，快看，那个人好像被一束光击中了！
E: Oh heavens, look! That person seems to have been struck by a beam of light!

C: 美妙的琴音啊…
E: Such a beautiful melody...

C: 那里什么也没有呀。
E: There's nothing there.

C: 现在的我不用再担心极寒和高热、痛痒饥渴、不必担心刀枪和太阳磁暴——我不再是人啦。
E: I don't have to worry about the cold, heat, pain, hunger, flesh wounds, or solar storms — I'm not human anymore.

C: 我想问别的…
E: I'd like to ask about something else...

C: 给我介绍下这轮演练的目标。
E: Fill me in on my target for this round.

C: 这一次的演练目标是——击败「少校」。
E: The goal of this drill is to defeat the Major.

C: 有奖励都好说。
E: As long as I'll be rewarded, I'm open to any missions.

C: 加油吧。
E: Keep up the good work.

C: （勇敢佩佩，努力探案！）
E: (Brave Peppy is hot on the trail!)

C: 见义勇为。
E: Lend a hand

C: 在你的指挥下，佩佩伸出短短的狗爪子，熟练地在种植区的土壤里刨了起来。
E: At your command, Peppy extends its short dog paws and skillfully digs into the planting area.

C: 对着门禁系统鬼鬼祟祟的人就是你！
E: The one that's acting suspiciously toward the access control system is you!

C: 质疑
E: Interrogate

C: 不，你不了解她，她其实很关心我们，这里的一切，事无巨细，我都会向她汇报。
E: No, you don't understand her. She actually cares a lot about us. Everything that has happened, even the most trivial details, will be reported to her.

C: 走吧。
E: Let's go.

C: 佩佩看起来有话要跟你说。
E: Peppy looks like it has something to say to you.

C: 在等你来搭话。
E: I was waiting for you to say something.

C: （你们一起上吧，我急着下班。）
E: (You guys get on together, I'm in a hurry to get off work.)

C: 只剩一个碎片了…急急急…
E: Only one piece left... Chop-chop...

C: 真威风…
E: That's awesome...

C: 能啊，怎么不能？不就是彗星吗，要是用这「匣里流光」作推进器，随随便便就能给它推回去。
E: Yes, it can. If we use this Luminflux Pyxis as a thruster, we can push a comet to wherever we want.

C: 走吧。
E: Let's go.

C: 他们受常乐天君的神启，每八个标准月随机抽选出某位星系居民的注册编号，开奖的当天让那人变成大富翁。
E: Inspired by the Joyseeker, they pick out a random social security number from an Abelane resident once every 8 standardized months, and the jackpot is enough to make you a millionaire.

C: 稍等，我还有点事。
E: Just a moment. I have something else to do.

C: 有什么事情快要暴露了吧。
E: You couldn't hide it anymore, could you?

C: 继续占算吗？
E: Shall we keep on running divinations?

C: 我好怕怕。
E: I'm soooo scared.

C: 我见你修好了我们四个…我就在想你能不能帮帮老大？我平时能处理刮刮碰碰，但这种大伤，我也只能看着干着急。
E: Now that you've fixed us four, do you think you could help our Boss as well? I can patch up scrapes and scratches, but I'm simply out of my depth with serious injuries like this.

C: 您知道私服吗？
E: Do you know what's a private server?

C: 有的有的，我身边的人都玩。
E: Yes, of course. Everyone around me is playing it.

C: 不过你知道吗，除了你以外，真的没有人在玩……
E: But let's be frank, aside from yourself, there's hardly anyone playing it...

C: 还行，比坐牢好一些。
E: The game is fine. At least it's better than doing nothing in jail.

C: 直接把奖励给我吧。
E: Just give me the prize.

C: 嗯…有位织者深信散落世间的残存神性对苦修大有裨益。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>天谴之锋的剑锋下</color>冥思苦想…或许它能有新的领悟？
E: Hmm... There is a weaver who believes that the remnants of divinity scattered across the world hold great power for asceticism. The golden thread brings tidings: They now meditate <color=#dbc291ff>under the Blade of Fury</color>... Maybe a new realization is unfolding?

C: 还好我是洗手套的人。
E: At least I wash my gloves.

C: 怎么，看不起我？
E: Hmph, think you're better than me?

C: 那帮{RUBY_B#天空之泰坦}艾格勒{RUBY_E#}的信徒看到启目集被偷，就像要了老命似的，忙不迭筹钱找人补上。
E: Whenever those followers of {RUBY_B#Sky Titan}Aquila{RUBY_E#} see the Enlightenment stolen, they act like it's the end of the world or something, scurrying around to raise money to complete the set again.

C: 嗯？扎格列斯老祖也不是我这种口风不严的主吧？唔…不对不对，有时候我的口风确实还挺严的！桀桀桀桀……
E: Hmm? Would ancestor Zagreus be this indiscreet? Wait... that's not right. Sometimes I can be extremely discreet! Hehehehe...

C: 黎明机器都完蛋了，你说它现在在哪？当骗子的诡计失灵，它也就只能献上自己的小命！桀桀桀桀……
E: Now that the Dawn Device is bust, where else would it be? When a trickster's plans collapse, only its life remains to give! Hehehehe...

C: 啊，慢着慢着…看你的眼神，仿佛就是在说——「我还真是活见鬼了？」
E: Whoa there, judging by that look, you're probably thinking, "Am I seriously seeing a ghost right now?"

C: 好啦，老巴特鲁斯也知道你不肯说实话。你身上有一种「我们」没有的味道——要是原因和我想的一样，那可就顶有趣啦！
E: Hah! I knew you wouldn't spill the truth. But you've carried a scent... one "we" don't share. And if it's what I think it is... oh ho, things are about to get very interesting!

C: 也不知道世界能够延续多久…我是挺希望把你们奋战过的场地都{RUBY_B#塞进肚子}收藏起来{RUBY_E#}，以后卖给…啊不是，以后放在纪念胜利的博物馆里，也算是不枉所有人为此付出的{RUBY_B#时间}一切{RUBY_E#}？
E: Who knows how much longer this world's got left in it... But I, for one, would love to collect every battlefield you've fought on and {RUBY_B#swallow them up}preserve them{RUBY_E#}. Later... no no, not to sell, of course, to display them in a victory museum someday! A worthy tribute to all the {RUBY_B#time}sacrifices{RUBY_E#} everyone made, right?

C: 人们都说世界很大…咱也不能把路走窄了不是？
E: People say the world is vast... So why box ourselves in, right?

C: 这种记忆不存在于过去，不存在于记录，只存在于你回忆起它的一瞬，存在于你心头涌起的特殊感情——桀桀，这种东西即便是泰坦那也偷不走啦！
E: These precious memories don't exist in the past or in records. They only exist in the exact moment you recall them, in those special feelings that flood your heart... Hehehe, such things are beyond anyone's reach, even Titans!

C: 不过——原来我一直等待的合作伙伴就是你啊！不错不错、这可真是太好了！
E: But... I guess you're the partner I've been waiting for. This is great news! Excellent news!

C: …几分钟后。
E: ...A few minutes later.

C: 唔，储备的战利品超过了7个呢。很好，再帮你挂一个上去吧。
E: Oh, you've gathered more than seven trophies? Perfect, let me add another to the display.

C: 哗啦啦，好大的宝箱。恭喜你，大家伙！让我们瞧瞧，祭司他到底藏了什么东西，竟然连我都不给看……
E: *whoosh* That's a huge chest. Congratulations, big guy! Let's see what the priest hid inside that even I wasn't allowed to see...

C: 秘锁消融、褪去，贮藏其中的物事缓缓显现……
E: The seals unravel, fading away as what lies within slowly comes into view...

C: 再试试，总能找到的。
E: Try again. We'll find it.

C: 昏光…庭院…那片湛蓝色的风鸣……
E: Twilight... Courtyard... the sound of wind in the deep blue sky...

C: 我又做梦了？
E: Am I dreaming again?

C: 空气再度毫无征兆地炎热起来，柔软的清风抓挠你的脚腕：「均衡。」陌生的声音在你耳边低语，「诸界已然改变，因为『均衡』至高无上；试炼会找上你。」它的话音落下时，一切又恢复了正常。
E: The air turns hot again without warning, and that soft breeze itches at your ankles. "Equilibrium." An unknown voice whispers into your ear, "The worlds are already changing, for equilibrium reigns supreme. Rest assured, the Trial of Equilibrium will find you." As its voice falls, everything returns to normal.

C: 你…真的是仙舟人吗？！别的星神不提，「{RUBY_B#「巡猎」的星神}岚{RUBY_E#}」与「{RUBY_B#「丰饶」的星神}药师{RUBY_E#}」的故事，你总该知道吧？联盟的夙愿，不就是消灭星神药师吗？
E: You... Are you really from the Xianzhou!? Other Aeons aside, surely you must know the story of Lan and Yaoshi? Isn't destroying the Aeon Yaoshi the Alliance's cherished aim?

C: 它会读取我的思想？
E: Does it read my thoughts?

C: 关于星神…
E: About the Aeons...

C: 黑塔搞的新把戏？
E: Is this a new trick by Herta?

C: 「干得不错，今天就到这儿吧。我和几位合伙人商量了一下，决定加大投入。等你下次来的时候，会玩到我们的『模拟宇宙』正式版本。」
E: "Great job. That's it for today. I've chatted with a few of my collaborators, and we've decided to re-double our efforts. Next time you come back, you'll enjoy our official version of Simulated Universe."

C: 「希望很快就能修复。」男人诚恳地说，「我真的很想你玩得愉快，真的。呃，再次向你道歉。」
E: "Hopefully very soon," the man says earnestly. "I really want you to have a good time, really. Um, once again, I'm really sorry about that."

C: 前面那个沉浸装置，它可以生成我之前说的「位面饰品」数据。
E: That immersion device in front can generate the Planar Ornament data that I mentioned before.

C: 继续…
E: Continue...

C: 你静待在原地，渴望跟上岚的速度。但时间缓慢流逝…什么也没发生。
E: You wait in place, hoping you can keep up with Lan. As time slowly slips by, nothing happens.

C: 没错，红色的！在赭红太阳的映照下，这片海洋变成了红色的！这一阵曼妙歌声，如同诱惑从剧烈海潮声中袭来…祂是在引你上勾，制造腴美的饵料。那生着獠牙、触角的脖颈如同山肉片海，蠕动的肉料反而要将你吞噬。
E: Yes, it's red! Under the scarlet sun, the ocean turns red! A beautiful and alluring singing voice comes from the choppy waves toward you... It is the Aeon's bait to lure you into a trap. The fanged and tentacled neck is as massive as the mountain and the sea, and its writhing flesh threatens to devour you.

C: 让我摸摸祂的嘴。
E: Let me touch THEIR mouth.

C: 还是算了吧。
E: Never mind.

C: 这照片有些古怪，一种不可违抗的恐惧叮叮铃铃地传来，你察觉命运如何抒写自我：曼德勒岛民在家人照片上的肩胛处画上彩色的翅膀，那种喷涌而出的彩色火焰就是生命的象征，他们用火焰互相连接、拥抱，最后孕育出新的生命。
E: There is something peculiar about this photograph that chimes an irresistible fear within you. As you gaze upon it, you detect how fate expresses itself: The Mandalan islanders draw on photos, creating colorful wings upon the image of their family members' shoulders. That multicolored flame erupting out is the representation of life itself. They connect and embrace each other with flames, culminating in the birth of new life.

C: 你身后始终跟着一位赏金猎人的「血罪灵」。你对这聒噪的背附灵感到厌倦…
E: Followed by a bounty hunter's Sin Thirster, you gradually grow annoyed by the presence of this talkative entity...

C: 「我一直怀疑有人在对模拟宇宙做小手脚，但…是谁？」黑塔出现了，「如果遇见什么怪东西，记得汇报给我。」
E: "I've always suspected that someone is trying to tamper with the Simulated Universe, but... who could it be?" Herta appears. "Report to me if you encounter anything unusual."

C: 一种纯粹的「仇恨」突然涌现。你打量着身边的芸芸众生：这些该受审的「罪名」…欺诈者、双面性的背叛、彻头彻尾的虚伪，以及无知的狂妄……
E: A pure kind of "Hatred" suddenly manifests. You take in the crowd around you. These "crimes" that should be judged... deceivers, two-faced betrayal, absolute hypocrisy, and ignorant egotism...

C: 一种纯粹的「仇恨」突然涌现。你打量着身边的芸芸众生：这些该受审的「罪名」…欺诈者、双面性的背叛、彻头彻尾的虚伪，以及无知的狂妄……
E: A pure kind of "Hatred" suddenly manifests. You take in the crowd around you. These "crimes" that should be judged... deceivers, two-faced betrayal, absolute hypocrisy, and ignorant egotism...

C: 一种纯粹的「仇恨」突然涌现。你打量着身边的芸芸众生：这些该受审的「罪名」…欺诈者、双面性的背叛、彻头彻尾的虚伪，以及无知的狂妄……
E: A pure kind of "Hatred" suddenly manifests. You take in the crowd around you. These "crimes" that should be judged... deceivers, two-faced betrayal, absolute hypocrisy, and ignorant egotism...

C: 原来这就是『寰宇蝗灾』！你站在天幕下，看见四周一片哀鸿遍野：你身旁的田野、公路上，声势浩瀚的异虫在繁殖、破茧，它们吞噬所有的粮食与物种，直到所有行进的道路都被各类虫嗣淹没……
E: So, this is the Swarm Disaster! Standing under the sky, you find your surroundings in a state of desolation. A massive swarm of mutated insects is reproducing and breaking free from their cocoons in the fields and roads around you. They devour all crops and animals until all the paths are flooded by their kinds...

C: 「等一下，斯蒂芬还没接进来。」阮•梅说。
E: "Hold on, Stephen hasn't connected yet." Ruan Mei says.

C: 他的虚拟胡子抽动着。他用手指不安地抚了抚背带裤的拉扣——但他抬头与你四目相对时，还是吓得躲到了黑塔身后。
E: Virtual mustache still twitching, he wraps his fingers gingerly around his overall's buttons. But when he locks eyes with you, he still hides behind Herta in fear.

C: 「下次见面时，我会争取让斯蒂芬脱掉他的伪装。」黑塔清了清嗓子，「螺丝，在吗？」
E: "The next time we meet, I'll try to get Stephen to take his disguise off." Herta clears her throat. "Screwllum, you there?"

C: 「没人不知道螺丝的伟大功绩。」黑塔毫不吝啬赞美，「行，见面仪式就到这吧。时间不早，我们该出发了，{NICKNAME}。不过我得提醒你，和塔伊兹育罗斯不一样，这里的每个天才都觐见过博识尊，所以我们知道——」
E: "Everyone knows of Screwllum's extraordinary merits." Herta is lavish with her praise. "All right. We'll adjourn the meet-and-greet here. It's getting late, and we should set off, {NICKNAME}. But I have to remind you — unlike Tayzzyronth, every Genius here has paid their respects to Nous, so we know —"

C: 「数据模型就是这样的。」黑塔不屑一顾，「没什么大碍，刚刚我们都死过一次啦，也就这么回事。现在，我已经把模拟宇宙的数据重新生成一遍了。{NICKNAME}，你还好么？」
E: "That's the way the data model's supposed to be," Herta says dismissively. "It's no big deal. We already died once just now, and we're fine. I've already reloaded the Simulated Universe's data. {NICKNAME}, are you all right?"

C: 在他们面前，一尊巨大的机械沉睡着。它面庞安静，而渺小的生命在颤抖中伸出双手：他们带着全副武装的手套与防毒面罩，无法理解*抽象*的洪流，只能凭借触碰感受存在……
E: In front of them, a huge machine sleeps. Its face is quiet, as tiny beings reach out their trembling hands: They are armed with gloves and gas masks, unable to comprehend the flow of the *abstract*, and can only feel its presence through touch...

C: 但又过了些时日，该推论被推翻：「赛普鲁戈星球」被证实隶属于古「技术部」<color=#dbc291ff>德•维恩</color>的麾下。
E: But after some time, the deduction was overturned. Cyprogo was confirmed to be part of the ancient Technology Division managed by <color=#dbc291ff>De Wayne</color>.

C: 「你恨无能为力去爱的人吗？」
E: "Do you hate people who are unable to love?"

C: 「终末」的预言：一片织物将带来终结——那是一片适合女性佩戴的「丝织物」。
E: Finality's prediction: A silk accessory suitable for women will bring about the end.

C: 「疑问：无机生命如何理解『痛苦』？反有机方程运作时，它们会理解『痛苦』吗？即使我将其复制成功，我也不愿启用它。」
E: "Question: How do inorganic lives perceive pain? When the Anti-Organic Equation is running, will they be able to understand pain? Even if I can replicate the equation, I won't be willing to activate it."

C: 花园曾被灼烧成焦土，你站在这里，像一个作曲家那样，将城市的明天缓缓构筑。
E: This garden has been burnt to smoldering crisp. You stand there like a composer, gradually piecing together the future of the city.

C: 我感觉好累。
E: I'm feeling so very tired.

C: 孩子们，快跑！
E: Kids, run!

C: 快逃！你仓皇地转过身，却不知道该逃向哪里。去新伦蒂尼恩！可你的飞船刚刚被路过的赏金猎人撞穿了一个引擎。笨，喀尔奇纳的面积比翁瓦克还要小，你完全可以划船划过去。
E: Quick, run! You spin around with no idea where to run. Let's go to the New Londinium! But your ship has just had one of its engines shot up by a passing bounty hunter. Fool! Karchyn is smaller than Vonwacq, so you could always paddle across.

C: 攻守易位了。
E: Who's seized the initiative now?

C: 学术的预测。
E: It was an educated prediction.

C: 这简直不自量力。
E: They're just blowing smoke.

C: 但此时此时，耳畔空余寂静。
E: But at this moment, there is nothing but deafening silence.

C: 「要不是您及时发现苗头，T<unbreak>500</unbreak>早被他们毁了，里面可是这颗星球从古至今全部的文明史啊。」
E: "If you hadn't discovered their plans in time, the T<unbreak>500</unbreak> would have been destroyed long ago. The T<unbreak>500</unbreak> can store all the history of civilization on this planet to this day!"

C: 有人甩开校长室大门，满脸涨红的乔尔丹诺教授冲了出来。下一个轮到你了。
E: As someone flings open the dean's office door, you see Professor Giordano storm out, face red with rage. Now, it's your turn.

C: 「知识奇点」？
E: Knowledge Singularity?

C: 几乎所有人都选择了第二个选项，四只秃鹫就此盘踞铸铁的王座。
E: Almost everyone chooses the second option, and thus four vultures dig their claws into the iron throne.

C: 震耳欲聋的欢呼为这场饷宴拉下帷幕，曾横扫寰宇的鲁珀特二世，他的威能皆掌握在你们手中。即使是最名不见经传的学士，也在会后兴奋地规划着「权杖」的使用，哪怕他们至死都不曾目睹遗产的真容。
E: Deafening cheers mark a close to the banquet. Rubert II, who once stormed the Cosmos, his power now rests in your collective hands. Even the most obscure scholar will be elatedly planning on using the Scepters, even if they would never glimpse the legacy's true visage even when on their deathbed.

C: 把骗子通通赶走。
E: Chase out every last deceiver!

C: 「宇宙是一轮精密的钟表，现在，天才们停止挣扎的『时刻』就要到了。」波尔卡擦拭着手术刀，缓步向你们逼近。
E: "The universe is an exquisitely precise clock. Now, the 'Instant' where the geniuses stop struggling is about to arrive." Polka polishes her scalpel, slowly sauntering towards you.

C: 一个温暖的世界，整个宇宙就封装在一个瓶子里，没有外星球、外星人。那些骇人耸听的故事，都是编出来骗小孩的把戏。
E: A world of warmth, where the entire universe is sealed inside a bottle. There is no such thing as other planets or aliens. They are all sensational stories made up to trick children.

C: 「不知道。」黑塔耸了耸肩，「玩就是了，也许它什么时候会冒出自由意志吧。」
E: "I don't know." Herta shrugs. "Just enjoy it, and maybe it'll develop its own free will someday."

C: 践行「行者之道」，走在各位前路人已踏好的行迹上，努力接近星神！不用担心，按自己的性子去践行命途就行。
E: Continue along the Trail of Pathstrider, and walk along the traces already paved by those who came before you, and try your hardest to get closer to the Aeons! Don't worry! Just carry out the Paths in the way you want to.

C: 「我在星空图书馆呆了十个琥珀纪…独自一人！」虚构史学家来回踱步。「我创造悖论、谬误、自相矛盾和含糊不清的说辞。」
E: "I've been living at the Starry Library for ten Amber Eras... all by myself!" The History Fictionologist paces. "I concoct paradoxes, fallacies, and statements that are contradictory and vague."

C: 「我们遵循阿哈的意志，接下来要寻点乐子。现在加入擂台的是弗朗斯先生，他带着他的专属安保集团。」酒侍说道，「另一边是亚威拉壮汉，他的佣兵集团块头很大，不可小觑！」
E: "In keeping with Aha's will, we will have some fun next. Mr. France and his team of bodyguards will be the next to join the arena. His opponent will be Avila. He and his mercenaries are burly and not to be underestimated!"

C: 无名客的列车停靠布达安尔利站台，后厢上有无穷馈赠。戴着毛毡帽的旅行者靠在车厢前，他衣着破烂，毛靴沾着泥土。
E: The Express of the Nameless makes a stop at Budley with an abundance of gifts in its rear carriage. A traveler wearing a felt hat is leaning against the front of the carriage. His clothes are tattered and his boots mud-stained.

C: 然而，一些穿灰色长袍囚衣的流刑犯也在这里…你盯着他们脚上的镣铐，打了个寒颤。你绕了过去，来到较为安全的吧台前。
E: Yet, some exiles dressed in gray prisoners' robes are here too... The sight of the shackles on their feet makes you shudder. You bypass them and walk to the bar with its comparative safety.

C: 他见到你，犹如见到有潜力被发展的同好，立刻面露喜悦！他把自己的「藏品」——咕咕钟塞到你手里。
E: His face brightens up the moment he sees you, as though he has just found a potential fellow enthusiast. He places his treasure — a cuckoo clock — into your hands.

C: 你看了看手中紧握的地图…你的行进方向被阻塞了！你正准备绕路离开，却发现它的身旁聚拢着一些刚诞育的*孢子*。一些充满勇气的想法从你的心中绽开……
E: You check the map in your hand... and find that your way ahead is blocked! As you are about to take a detour, you notice some newly born *spores* gathering around the Lord of Eternal Slumber. A daring idea blossoms in your mind...

C: 你准备继续向前…你应当十分谨慎、小心。
E: You are ready to move on... You should be acting very cautiously.

C: 「程序已启动，开始确定造物需求——您所需要的物品，是否具备虚数真空性？」
E: "Protocol activated, initializing creation request. Does the item that you have requested utilize imaginary vacuum properties?"

C: 你证明了自己作为传奇的实力，还有身为骇客的勇气。
E: You have demonstrated both your prowess as a legend and your courage as a hacker.

C: 加油，年轻的骇客，相信你会有成功的那天！
E: Keep persevering, young hacker. Your triumph will come one day!

C: 草地的湿润与泥土的香气，都在告诉你，危险已离你远去。你张开双臂，手却骤然触摸到一块冰凉的东西。
E: The dampness of the grass, the fragrance of the earth... they all tell you that danger is far behind you. You stretch your arms, only for your hands to abruptly touch something cold.

C: 更别提，错误的撰写人，还是树庭中赫赫有名的学者。你看向眼前正在分裂繁殖的小家伙们，苦恼是否要修正培育方案中的错误。
E: Not to mention that the one who made the erroneous entry is a prominent scholar of the Grove. You look at the tiny critters multiplying before you, conflicted over whether to correct the error in the breeding scheme.

C: 让我们回顾一场未曾落幕的战争，亦是世间的第一场战争。
E: Let us reflect on a war that never ceased, the world's very first war.

C: 因此，当国王德索斯暗中派遣信使与喀诺尔停战，却又出尔反尔，率领悬锋城的军团兵临城下，尼卡多利第一次向它的子民降下天谴。
E: When King Desos secretly brokered a ceasefire with Canor only to betray them, leading his forces from Castrum Kremnos to their gates, Nikador unleashed divine fury on their own people for the first time.

C: 墨涅塔最厌恶的泰坦。
E: Mnestia's most despised Titan.

C: 可千万要小心戏耍人间之神，自它降临以来，世间便充斥纷乱。
E: Beware The God Who Teased Mortals. Their arrival brought relentless turmoil.

C: 这告诫世人，死亡从不会包庇罪恶。
E: This reminds mankind that death never covers up evil.

C: 命运泰坦们喜爱温和的酿造，它们常为法吉娜带来警示与指引。晨昏之眼被灌得烂醉如泥，落下漫天大雨，作为法吉娜对大地的挑衅。
E: The Fate Titans enjoy gentle brewing. They often bring warnings and guidance to Phagousa. The Eye of Twilight, drunk to stupor, showers the earth with heavy rain, as Phagousa taunts the land.

C: 是知识的胜利？
E: Is it a triumph of knowledge?

C: 三天后，你收到了树庭的信件「恭喜您通过面试！您现在已经是神悟树庭的实习学者了，请携邀请函前往树庭报道。」
E: Three days later, a letter arrives from the Grove of Epiphany: "Congratulations! You have successfully passed the interview. You are now an Intern Scholar of the Grove of Epiphany. Please bring your invitation and report to the Grove."

C: 是去农田运输粮食还是去港口运输材料，你陷入了沉思。
E: To transport crops from the farmland or to transport materials from the port? You find yourself lost in thought.

C: 其一为庞恩培拉的毁灭，那是屹立于大陆西侧的强盛城邦，建筑皆由坚固的花岗岩堆砌而成，却在顷刻间坠入深渊。
E: The first was the destruction of Pompeia, a prosperous city that stood on the western side of the continent. The buildings were built from sturdy granite stones, but they fell into the abyss in an instant.

C: 平衡将牵动生生流转。
E: Balance sets the cycle of life in motion.

C: 可敬的献身。
E: What a respectable sacrifice.

C: 于是它睁开更多的眼睛，在头颅上，在翅膀上。艾格勒每睁开一双眼睛，世界都会变得清晰一些。最终，当睁开第一百双眼睛的时候，艾格勒终于看清了它所在的世界。
E: So they opened more eyes, on their head and wings. With each pair of eyes Aquila opened, the world became a little clearer. Finally, when they opened the hundredth pair of eyes, Aquila could at last see the world they inhabited.

C: 只听一声响彻天地的轰鸣，似有雷霆炸响，随即地面震颤，半晌才得平息。而当一切尘埃落定，尼卡多利手中的矛完好无损，而盾牌却已经化作了万千碎片。
E: A thunderous roar split the heavens. The earth trembled as if struck by divine wrath, quaking for what felt like an eternity before settling into silence. As the dust cleared, the spear remained unscathed, but the shield had shattered into countless fragments.

C: 也是，万一把奇物拍烂了，传出去影响多不好。
E: After all, if you hit it the wrong way, it could lead to unfortunate consequences.

C: 未来的路有同伴相随，对你来说，一枚光锥能算什么。
E: Your path ahead will be full of companions. What's one measly Light Cone worth to you?

C: 你这人怎么乱翻别人东西啊？
E: Why are you rummaging through other people's things?

C: 你有些懊恼，觉得好像失去了什么…但回想起那次开会经历，你已经领悟了开会的精髓。
E: You are a little chagrined and feel as if you have lost something. But then you think back to the experience of that meeting before and feel like you've already grasped the essence of meetings.

C: 你很清醒！
E: You're wide awake!

C: 指尖划过书脊，最终在《星神之下：作为意志与表象的低维世界》的封皮上停下。
E: Your fingertips run over the book spines before landing on Beneath the Aeons: The Low-Dimensional World As A Will and A Surface Phenomenon.

C: 再浅尝一口。
E: Take another sip.

C: 话音将落，她将纤长的手指探入披风，自那绸缎下托出一逸散光彩的锐利物件。你感到眼花缭乱，刚想定睛观瞧，却又被女人开口搅乱了思绪。
E: The woman then reaches underneath her silk cloak with her slender fingers and takes out a gleaming, sharp object. Dazzled by the glow, you try to take a close look, only to be distracted again by the woman's voice.

C: （告知你所了解的情况）
E: (Recount what you know)

C: 没问题！能跟拯救了贝洛伯格的「开拓者」一较高下，这绝对是千载难逢的机会！
E: Of course! Being able to trade notes with the savior of Belobog would be a rare opportunity!

C: 你听到它们正在室内横冲直撞，疯狂穿行…你听到那如铁钩般的肢足与钢甲似的甲壳正躁动不止，发出令人发狂的锐响……
E: You can hear them dashing madly around the room... you can hear the constant movements of their iron-hooked limbs and armor-like carapace, producing a piercing noise that drives one into insanity...

C: 你瘪瘪嘴。「那他们喊我们来做什么？」你本想痛骂他们一顿，却一时不知该说什么好。「一群*怂包*…」半晌，你悻悻地拿起手边的报告读了起来。
E: You pout. "Then why did they get us to come here?" You originally wanted to scold them, but now are at a loss for words. "These SCAREDY CATS..." After a while, you angrily pick up the report next to you and read it.

C: 你在紧张什么？
E: What're you nervous about?

C: 他那因惊恐而颤抖不已的双眸给你留下了深刻印象。
E: Those eyes of his, quivering from sheer fear — they leave a lasting impression on you.

C: 决定了——就以太太的尊容为蓝本雕琢喀！
E: I've made up my mind — I'm using my lady's visage as the subject of this sculpture!

C: 吭哧吭哧…
E: Toil, toil away...

C: 你看这棒球棍可以吗？
E: How about this baseball bat?

C: 敌意和臭味一同消散了。你眼前只剩下一个空空如也的宝箱。
E: The hostile presence and stench dissipate. An empty chest lays in front of you.

C: 请、请您千万别贴我罚单！
E: P—Please don't give me a ticket!

C: 这窗户怎么看不清里边？
E: This window is frustrating. Why can't I see inside?

C: <size=36>啊！这眼睛！</size>
E: <size=36>Ah! The eyes!</size>

C: 我还没有。
E: Not yet.

C: 我们的灰发勇士一路开动脑筋，终于来到了隐藏的宝箱房间喀。等待{F#她}{M#他}的将是丰厚的奖励……
E: Our gray-haired warrior friend racks their brains the whole way over before finally making it to the hidden treasure vault. Riches beyond {F#her}{M#his} wildest imagination await...

C: 这座塑像的脚边放着一口彩陶罐，历经磨损仍不失光泽，并且看上去挺有艺术水平。
E: A colorful dolium is placed by the feet of this statue, its sheen undiminished even with the wear of time. And its artisanship is remarkable too.

C: 他的笑容十分僵硬。
E: His smile is stiff as a board.

C: 你迅速作出决定——玩游戏就是要赢——而你，为了赢，可以不惜一切代价！
E: You make a snap decision. You play to win, and no price is too high for victory!

C: 换个地方。
E: Find another spot.

C: （吓虎克一跳）
E: (Scare Hook)

C: 它们一定是嫉妒我有潜力喀！与其信那些打击虫的鬼话，不如信我身后这堵坚硬的石墙会崩塌喀！
E: Ha! They're obviously just envious of my potential! I've got more faith in this wall crumbling than in their stupid criticisms, crrk!

C: 蝶…解决不了。
E: I... cannot resolve them.

C: 据说在这里许愿时系上风铃，负日者就能听见我们的愿望。
E: It's said that tying a wind chime while making a wish here allows the Sunbearer to hear our desires.

C: 走位~看不见~
E: Moving~ Invisible~

C: 「直到维持身形的躯干破碎」……
E: "Until his torso that had held his body together shattered..."

C: 我一步一步，跨过浓浓的黑暗、孤独和寒冷，终于抵达了巅峰——现在，我谁都不放在眼里了！
E: Step by step, I climbed through darkness, loneliness, and cold. Finally, I reached the peak — And now? No one else matters to me!

C: 水手，你还未曾见过这样的惊涛骇浪吧？
E: Sailor, have you ever seen waves like these before?

C: 我要从这里飞下去自毁，告别我短暂的鸟生，请你不要来劝我了，我心意已决。
E: I plan to fly down from here and end my existence. I will say goodbye to my short avian existence. Don't try to deter me. I've already made up my mind.

C: 随后，梓桥检查了物流机巧鸟的工作情况，发现你所说的一切属实——在那个时间点，有一只机巧鸟重新接回了物流系统。
E: After listening to your story, Ziqiao examined the work status of courier cycranes. She discovered that everything you said could be verified. At that moment, a cycrane got reconnected to the logistics system.

C: 你这人也太……
E: You, you're such a...

C: <color=#dbc291ff>你只能提两次问题，提问结束之后，我就会向你询问答案。</color>只要你猜对了，我就算是你赌赢了。
E: <color=#dbc291ff>You can only ask two questions, and then I'll ask for your answer. </color>If you get it right, you win the bet.

C: 对呀。
E: I thought so.

C: 修完，我再再再再感谢你……
E: I'll r—r—reward you...

C: 喂，你在找我对吧？
E: Hey, are you looking for me?

C: 看到你跑来跑去的，我的心情虽然稍微好了一些，但也有一丢丢愧疚了…这是给你的报酬，你就收下吧，有缘再见。
E: Seeing you run all over the place makes me feel a little better, but also kinda guilty... Here's something for you. Take it, and may we meet again.

C: 我应该分到多少钱呢？
E: How much should I get?

C: 你倒是门清…
E: Penetrating insight...

C: 男人突然陷入了沉默，他将回忆的眼神埋入眉头紧皱的阴影里。
E: The man suddenly falls silent as he buries his memories deep within the shadow of his furrowed brows.

C: 所以，如果是来约我喝茶看戏什么的就免了吧。
E: So, if you're here to invite me out for tea or theater, forget it.

C: 岩明终是略逊一筹，趁着他词穷转念的间隙，夕葵将一卷文档推进了岩明怀中，犹如剑尖刺中了死穴。
E: Yanming finally breaks for pause, just as Xikui takes the chance to shove a pile of documents into Yanming's hands — as if piercing him straight through the heart with a rapier.

C: 胜负已分。岩明愣了片刻，垂头丧气地离开了。司辰宫千年来办公室政治戏中一场微不足道的幕间剧落幕了。
E: At last, victory. Yanming is stunned, before he slinks away, dejected. The curtain falls on another trivial scene from the Palace of Astrum's millennia-old office drama.

C: 你以余光观察着其他两位选手。那位男子依旧寡言，望着笼屉里香喷喷的包子；而那位女孩依旧从眼中射出兴奋的光芒，也望着笼屉里香喷喷的包子。
E: You peek at the other two contestants out of the corner of your eye. The guy remains tight-lipped, gaze fixed on the luscious buns in their bamboo steamer. A look of radiant excitement betrays the girl as she also stares at the bamboo steamer.

C: 你吃，你吃！一通慌手忙脚的胡吃海塞过后，你惊喜地发现——自己竟又多吃了两个包子。
E: You eat and eat! After frantically stuffing your face, you are pleasantly surprised to discover that you've eaten two extra buns.

C: …那么，{NICKNAME}选手宣告退赛！
E: ...Then {NICKNAME} has withdrawn from the contest!

C: 你们不会是又想找我来吧？
E: Don't tell me you're asking for my help once more?

C: 我引以为傲的风扇涡轮被毁了喀！
E: My precious fan turbine... shattered to pieces, crrk!

C: 没有我不知道的事…
E: There's nothing that escapes my sight...

C: 哎，我什么都没说。
E: Ugh, nothing.

C: 哈，太好了。还是按景元将军说的，让十王司来处理它吧。
E: Hah, great. Just listen to General Jing Yuan and let the Ten-Lords Commission handle it.

C: 我把危险的包裹销毁了。
E: I've destroyed the dangerous parcel.

C: 嗨，{NICKNAME}！你醒啦？
E: Hey, {NICKNAME}! You're awake!

C: 这个冒牌货真是没品，来都不敢来，枉我一大早就打了星槎过来…哼哼，这几天拜访工造司的人太多，停泊口都按单双号来管制了。
E: This impostor has so little integrity, he didn't even show up. I came all the way here early in the morning by starskiff... Hmph, there have been so many visitors to the Artisanship Commission in the past few days, the dock has implemented an odd-even number restriction system.

C: 没有，我估计是还没到吧。不过没关系，他迟到是他的事，反正我提前跟云骑打过招呼了。
E: No, I guess he's not here yet. But worry not. Him being late is not my concern. I already did my due diligence by informing the Cloud Knights.

C: 好奇心会害死谐乐鸽。
E: Curiosity killed the Charmony Dove.

C: 你发出一声难过的*哼*。
E: You grunt sadly.

C: 你可算来了，没事吧？
E: You're finally here. You all right?

C: 多亏尼卡多利保佑。
E: All thanks to Nikador's blessing.

C: 命运泰坦没这么说过。
E: The Fate Titans made no such claim.

C: 圣女赐福的神圣水果…
E: Holy fruit with the Maiden's blessing...

C: 最近求神谕的人有点多…
E: Many come seeking prophecies these days...

C: 我会为你献上胜利的…
E: I will offer you victory...

C: 世界…在崩解？
E: The world... it's collapsing?

C: 幸好锤子，没断。
E: Thankfully, hammer, unbroken.

C: 在沙发上发现了绒毛…
E: I found some tufts of hair on the couch...

C: 所以她找到了对吧，还好，帕姆知道大家都是好孩子……
E: So she found it, right? Luckily Pom-Pom knows that everyone is a good person...

C: 可是「莓莓果汁」里不太像是会加入胡萝卜的样子呀？总感觉怪怪的……
E: But I don't think carrots are meant to go into Berry Juice. Do you? It feels weird...

C: 唔，谁能想到打个瞌睡都能把腿睡麻呢。
E: Who would have thought that the legs can go numb when sleeping?

C: 关于「资源补给协议」…
E: About the resource supply agreement...

C: 哎，现在列车上的乘客越来越多，什么人都有——呃，我不是在说你，不是每个乘客都像你一样乖巧懂事。
E: There are more and more passengers on the train now, and there are all sorts around. Pom-Pom is not talking about you. Not every passenger is as well-behaved and sensible as you.

C: 听起来虽然很庞杂，但实际做起来会很有成就感。诀窍的话，就是细致。
E: It sounds complicated, but doing it can be very rewarding. The trick is to be meticulous.

C: 请收下我们的谢礼。
E: Please, take this as thanks.

C: 选项一，蛮攻。只要击败在封锁线上巡逻的所有铁卫士兵和军官，大门就会开启。
E: Option 1: Brute force. Just beat up all the Silvermane soldiers and officers patrolling along the blockade, and the gate will open.

C: 不知道你有没有听过这句话：论迹不论心。
E: Have you ever heard the line, "Judge someone on their actions, not their thoughts"?

C: 到了这个地步，我也没什么好叮嘱你的了。去战斗吧，{NICKNAME}！
E: At this point, I have no more advice to give you. Just put your best foot forward, {NICKNAME}!

C: 估计这里的异象很快也会结束。
E: I think the anomaly here will subside soon.

C: 有啊，当然有！
E: Ah, yes!

C: 不仅如此，你还在黑夜里化身义士，四处打击犯罪、劫富济贫，甚至还受过大守护者亲自接见。只可惜，这一切的一切，都非你的本愿……
E: More still, you fought crimes, helped the poor, and even met the Supreme Guardian. However, that's not your true aspiration...

C: 不是「地下」擂台吗？
E: Isn't this supposed to be an "underground" fighting ring?

C: 肃静，肃静！{NICKNAME}初来乍到，先让本主持人介绍一下参赛选手和规则。
E: Quiet, quiet! It's {NICKNAME}'s first time, so let me introduce the competitors and the rules.

C: 什么？！汤姆竟然出了布！
E: What? Tom chose paper!

C: 什么？！汤姆竟然出了剪刀！
E: What? Tom chose scissors!

C: 啊…姐姐……
E: Ah... Big Sis...

C: 我告诉你——你每打碎一件补给容器，禁区的某位铁卫兄弟就得多加班三个小时，把新的容器放到原处……
E: You should know, for every supply vessel you break, that's three hours of overtime for someone in the restricted zone to replace it...

C: 毫无疑问，在你面前的东西是一个衣柜。
E: Without a doubt, what's in front of you is a closet.

C: 再加上那似乎是手的结构连接着一根似乎是球棍的大棒——画面中的人物究竟是谁已不言而喻。
E: Coupled with a structure that appears to be a hand gripping a baseball bat, it's instantly clear to whom the figure refers.

C: 狂野？你是在说我画的这些吗？
E: Wild? You mean these paintings I did?

C: 「贝洛伯格人都不在乎地理吗？」——这样的疑惑跳入你的脑中。但你仔细回想了一下这颗星球的境遇，发现人们对「地理」这门学科兴致寡淡倒也情有可原。
E: "Don't Belobogians care about geography?" This question crosses your mind. However, given what this planet has been through, it's not all that surprising that people here have little to no interest in geography.

C: 看向东方。
E: Look to the east.

C: 好在你在旅途中一路积善行德，曾收获不少来自道德层面的赞许。这点小小的缺德事怎会让你困扰？显然不会。
E: Luckily, you've built up a record of good deeds and praise along the way. Surely this little slip-up won't bother you? Obviously not.

C: 你似乎不太满意。
E: You don't seem very happy about it.

C: 没有破风声，只有金属坠地的碎响。
E: There's no swishing sound, just that of metal clanging onto the ground.

C: 我的祖传宝刀！怎地被你伤成了这样？！你、你得赔我！
E: My heirloom sword! How could you damage it like this!? P—Pay me back!

C: 一口价，五百信用点！
E: <unbreak>500</unbreak> credits!

C: <unbreak>250</unbreak>信用点。
E: <unbreak>250</unbreak> Credits.

C: 太怪了，赶紧关掉。

C: 帮他合上展阅。

C: 目前，你尚不知道这一切是否真的有任何意义——何不过后再来看看呢？
E: Right now, you have no idea whether or not this means anything — Why not come back to check it out later?

E: But before that...

C: 哎，{NICKNAME}太可靠了！我会向驭空大人多夸夸你的～
E: Oh, {NICKNAME}. You're so reliable! I'll sing your praises in front of Madam Yukong!

C: 呼…这下这几个家伙可就跑不掉了。
E: Phew... Now, they have nowhere to go.

C: 授事厅

C: 信号监测系统提示，当前区域可疑的信号已经全部确认。

C: 这里真的没有铁盒吗？
E: Are there really no iron boxes here?

C: 这是鳞渊境洞天特产的药材，价格不菲，但我这一罐「鲛人泪」品质粗糙，也卖不到什么好价格，怎么处置就交给你了。
E: It's a herbal specialty from Scalegorge Waterscape. It's usually quite pricey, but this jar of Draconic Tears here is of lower quality. I won't get much for it, so why don't you take it?

C: 别让我说出来嘛。
E: Don't make me say it.

C: 这个包裹里就是「那位老师」需要的东西。他已经付过钱了，您直接拿给他就好。
E: This parcel here, it's got everything "that teacher" needs. He's already paid for it, so you can just take it over for him.

C: 毕竟魔方秘社只是一个隐秘的组织，即便是在工造司内，也鲜少有人知道我们的成员结构，成员之间都是用代号称呼彼此的。
E: After all, it's just a secret society, and not even the rest of our Artisanship Commission colleagues know who our members are. We all call each other by our code names.

C: 抱歉，光顾着自己说话了，你肯定有很多疑惑，你可以随便问我。
E: Sorry, I've been waffling on. You must have a lot of questions, so ask me whatever you'd like.

C: 之后有机会的话，你说不定能看见我的更多行头呢~
E: If you get the chance later on, you might just get to see a few more of my fits~

C: 救命——
E: Help —

C: 遇到处理不了的怎么办？
E: What if you run into a problem that you can't handle?

C: 眼前的男子突然开始嚎啕大哭起来——成年人的崩溃往往只在一瞬间。
E: The man suddenly starts to shriek out loud — the adult's entire collapse is in mere seconds.

C: 抱歉，我只是忍不住牢骚几句…您快去吧，他们还在等您呢。
E: Sorry, I just can't help but complain... Go on. They're still waiting for you.

C: 哦，你没法理解，我不怪你。这种感受…有些事不曾亲身经历过的话，确实很难理解。
E: Oh, you have no way of understanding, and I don't blame you. This feeling... Some things are impossible to get unless you experience them for yourself.

C: 那么，你喜欢听什么样的故事？
E: So then, what kind of stories do you like best?

C: 在生命的最后时刻到来前，他们将至关重要的信息——可能是史书，也可能是对星核的研究——以文字形式{RUBY_B#记忆}记录{RUBY_E#}在了这些小行星表面。
E: Before the final moments of their lives, they {RUBY_B#memories}recorded{RUBY_E#} vital information — maybe histories, or research into Stellarons — in the form of glyphs carved into the surfaces of these asteroids.

C: 没有。原本我确实想着要赚公司一笔，但见识了那样壮观的景象后，钱已经无足轻重了。
E: They sure did. I had been focused on making a score, but after witnessing such a grand sight, money no longer seemed to matter.

C: （保持沉默）
E: (Keep silent)

C: 毕竟，二人的执念只是银河中的万千联系之一。宇宙很精彩，不是吗？
E: After all, their infatuation is just one of uncountable connections throughout the cosmos. The universe is truly wonderful, isn't it?

C: {M#小子}{F#丫头}，情况紧急…你赶快把东西交给我，具体的过后再解释。
E: {M#Boy}{F#Girl}, it's urgent... Please get me that stuff ASAP. I'll explain everything to you later.

C: 发生甚么事了？
E: What happened?

C: 倘若她真是通缉犯，我们兄弟俩就相当于帮匹诺康尼拆掉了一颗炸弹…顺道还能赚点外快；倘若她不是，那也不过虚惊一场。稳赚不赔的事啊！
E: If she really is a wanted suspect, then the two of us have pretty much defused a ticking time bomb for Penacony... while making a little bank on the side. And if she isn't, then it would all just be a false alarm. It's a guaranteed way to make a profit!

C: 我虽不再是无名客，但骨子里依旧流淌着冒险的热血。
E: I may not be a Nameless any longer, but I've still got the spirit of adventure in my bones.

C: 确实保护了一段时间，说长不长、说短也不短…大概半个琥珀纪吧。
E: They were enough for a while. I can't say whether it was a long time or a short time... but it was about half an Amber Era.

C: 不只是在朋克洛德内部，其他星系的很多老粉丝都在批评我们不思进取，只会抱着几个老IP不放，天天吃老本。
E: Our long-time fans from both Punklorde and other star systems have been criticizing us for resting on our laurels and not having the drive to innovate something new.

C: 看着兴致不高啊。
E: You seem to be in low spirits.

C: 要是您…嘿嘿…要是您不嫌弃我这个醉鬼…就陪我聊几句吧？就几句，求您啦！
E: If you... hee-hee... don't find my tipsy state off-putting, you're welcome... to chat with me. Just for a while, please!

C: 「猎犬」家系针对此事展开了全面而迅速的调查，并在有关人员的积极配合下，顺利将嫌犯逮捕归案。
E: The Bloodhound Family has conducted a thorough and prompt investigation into the matter and arrested the suspects with the help of relevant personnel.

C: 但成熟可不意味着每天浑水摸鱼虚度光阴，稳重也不代表要胸无大志心如死水！
E: But being senior doesn't mean you can start idling away your time and losing the drive to aim high!

C: 哼，怪不得人家说高个子种族没有慧根呢……
E: Heh, no wonder they say tall folks lack wisdom...

C: 斯坦威游隼，加长型豪华飞车。运行平稳，乘坐舒适……
E: Steinway Falcon, extended luxury speedster: Soar in Style, Embrace Luxury...

C: 咻咻…结论：包括车身、底盘、纵梁、内饰、发动机等<unbreak>98.7%</unbreak>的结构均无专利侵权风险。
E: *Beep*... Conclusion: <unbreak>98.7%</unbreak> of the structure, including the main body, chassis, beam, interior, engine, and other parts, is free from patent infringement risk.

C: 你、你不能这么对我！我答应了凯瑟琳，今天要带她在黄金的时刻兜风！你这是，你这是…啊啊啊啊啊啊！
E: No! Y—You can't do this to me! I promised Catherine that I'd take her for a ride in the Golden Hour today! You... you are... you... Aaarrrggghhh!

C: 这是比喻，对吧？
E: It's a metaphor, right?

C: 为了你，我什么都愿意…哪怕得不到回应，哪怕这份感情注定要归于虚无…我也愿意为你的倒影燃烧这宝贵的二十分之一生命！
E: I'll do anything for you, even if I don't get a response, or even if my love is doomed... I'm ready to dedicate that precious one-twentieth of my life for your reflection!

C: 在我们关系的最后，她终于愿意道出实话了：她从来就不认可我的厨艺，我一直以来的行为都只是惨淡的自我感动罢了。

C: 可世上哪有那么多主角——我没有过人的天赋，没有非凡的出身，也没有绝佳的运气。付出十年血泪，最终还是一个廉价的龙套，在梦境的角落无人问津。
E: But there can't be that many stars out there. I had no outstanding talent, no special background, and no supreme luck. After ten years of struggles, I still ended up being a cheap extra, forgotten in the corner of the Dreamscape.

C: 是的，它曾经是一个宇宙中的艺术天堂，但如今已不复存在。

C: 但女神退隐世间后，祂留下的赐福也逐渐碎裂…就在两个琥珀纪前，镜壁彻底坍塌。门达希亚如同刚羽化的蝴蝶卷入风暴，不久便被一只可怕的星际巨兽吞噬。
E: However, as the Beauty disappeared, the blessings she left behind gradually crumbled... Approximately two Amber Eras ago, the Wall of Mirrors collapsed entirely, and soon after, like a vulnerable butterfly, Mendasia was swallowed by a terrifying interstellar beast.

E: No, I don't understand it a bit. Why don't you explain what makes this song so remarkable?

E: Dear {M#sir}{F#lady}, I'm afraid you will be the last listener of the Song of Beauty. I will tuck it away and never perform it again... and continue singing those vulgar lies, deriving satisfaction from the applause and cheers.

C: 这句话让我怒气填胸，却一句话也没有说出来，只能默默看着她走出剧场。因为…因为我没法反驳她，她是音乐的专家，是匹诺康尼「主流」的代表……

E: Are you okay...

E: You found me, tweet! Congratulations, lucky one! Welcome to the most magical stall on The Radiant Feldspar / The Trailblaze's Stern / The Tatalov / The Soaring Clock Hand!

E: Aren't you in the way of the diners?

E: Let me think... Oh yeah, there's one play-obsessed child who loves games and installed lots of entertainment facilities in the hotel. You might be able to find them near the <color=#dbc291ff>"Pool Table"</color>, tweet~

E: Thank you for everything you've done. Here's a little token of gratitude. Please accept it, tweet!

E: I go by Young Master Gold, and I'm the second-greatest nest architect in Dreamville after Professor Owl, tweet!

E: The Goldleaf Plaza was built from gems and gold branches and leaves — there's no place any more charismatic, tweet!

C: 狭路相逢…今天你我就要决一胜负了。
E: This confrontation was inevitable... Today, we will settle this once and for all.

C: 好吧。
E: Fine.

E: About you yourself...

E: About Clock Garden...

E: Hmm... That's right, there is one assistant that is great with movie soundtracks, they love making their own music all over Clock Garden~ Maybe if you <color=#dbc291ff>find the music notes</color>, you can find them, tweet~

C: 哼哼…贫穷也是没办法的事情呢啾。
E: Heheh... Poverty can't be helped, tweet.

C: 唉，如果我是钟表小子就好了，一定很快就能找到哈努兄弟啾。

E: That's it, I'll ask Lady Vermilion for some feather-care tips, tweet.

E: You bought your ticket yet?

E: Can a bird also be a VIP guest?

E: Tweet! I—It looks broken, tweet.

E: *sniffle* I'm a truly incompetent birdie, tweet.

C: 钟表小子说，他的朋友会开来一辆很大很大的车，能把美梦小镇的大家全都装进去，我猜呀，这个老爷爷肯定就是那位列车长啾。
E: Clockie said his friend would be driving a huge car here that fits everyone in Dreamville. My guess is this old man is that conductor, tweet.

C: 啾，朋友，你认识这个奶奶吗？
E: Tweet, you know this granny, friend?

C: 该你上台了。
E: It's time for you to get on stage.

C: 要我说，猩猩绝对秒杀恐龙啾！
E: In my opinion, the gorilla would definitely crush the dinosaur, tweet!

E: Was that to your satisfaction?

E: Twenty-five points, tweet!

E: So these arrows are arranged and there's me, who will guide you along, tweet.

C: 快来！快来啾！
E: Come on! Come on, tweet!

C: 你这是抢钱，我不交！
E: This is robbery. I'm not paying!

E: Who am I? Where am I?

C: 根据我查到的一些散碎的资料和你的见闻…我怀疑它被禁止是因为，使用它的人会在潜意识里对它情感投射，甚至将它人格化。
E: Based on what we've found together... I suspect it was forbidden because this tome's user would subconsciously project emotions onto it and even personify it.

C: 翻开书的一瞬间，你感受到一阵强烈的刺痛。
E: The moment you open the book, you feel an acute, penetrating pain throughout your body.

C: 我也不知道…可能是想在这里给自己盖棺定论吧……
E: I don't know... Maybe I just want to get a final conclusion this time...

C: 那就别抽了…
E: Why don't you just stop...?

C: 您找个由头把阿幸叫过来吧。
E: Now, please call A-Xing over.
Huh!?

C: 对呀，写的清清楚楚啊，我就是小风。

C: 我得在这里再听一会儿……
E: I have got to listen here for a little while longer...

E: So then, let's start!

C: 没有的事，总有人会喜欢戏曲。
E: No matter what, there'll always be people out there who like opera.

C: 女主角是一个充满魅力，又极度危险的岁阳。它引诱男人们和她结婚，又在新婚之夜将对方的情绪吞噬殆尽。
E: The female lead is a charming but deadly heliobus, luring men into marrying her, before ravenously feasting on the groom's emotions on the wedding night.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>骨为灯芯肉做香。</color>

C: 「抄袭」吗…听说在人类的社会里，如果做了什么与别人一模一样的事情，就会被追究法律责任。人类的法律这么严格吗？
E: So, plagiarism is it...? I've heard that in human societies, you can be held legally liable if you do the exact same thing that someone else has done before. Is human law really this strict?

C: 等下次不太严肃的场合时，我再突然冒出来。除非你是个「一直很严肃」的人。
E: I'll pick a time in the future when it's less serious to suddenly pop out, then. Unless you're one of those "always serious" types.

C: …不过，我还挺喜欢跟恚炎捉迷藏的，唉。
