C: 请叫我银河球棒神探。
E: You can call me the Galactic Baseballer Detective.

C: 挺搞笑的，但是在匹诺康尼，倒也正常。
E: That's hilarious — but in Penacony, it's totally normal.

C: （保持沉默）
E: (Remain silent)

C: 对不起，小佩…我知道你的感受，爸爸全都明白。只是我……
E: I'm sorry, Pennie... I know how you feel. I understand. It's just that...

C: 后来，从某一天开始，她变了。她不再去看画展，也不再拿起画笔。她好像对生活中的一切都失去了兴趣。
E: Then, one day, she changed... She would no longer go to exhibitions, nor would she lift her brushes. It was as if she had lost all interest in everything life had to offer.

C: 这地方不是也声称不对宾客开放吗？咱们还不是进来了。这点挑战可难不倒咱们父女俩。
E: Didn't this place claim to not be open to guests? We still managed to get inside. A little challenge like this is no match for our father-daughter duo.

C: 我得尽早独立才行。先学会养活自己，再想办法回报他。
E: I need to become independent. I need to learn to care for myself and find a way to repay him.

C: 随手丢在原地。
E: Leave it where it was found.

C: 然而，从它们各自摇摆、飘荡的韵律中，你还是发觉了暗藏在这幅梦幻景象之下的不和谐音……
E: Yet, from the way they sway their bodies, you can still discern a hint of dissonance lurking beneath the surface of this magical scene...

C: 这样啊…好吧，那我只能再等别人来帮我这个忙了。
E: I see... Guess I'll have to seek help from others.

C: 不对，感觉格局还是低了…要不干脆把目标定成谐乐大典吧！听说到时候全宇宙的名流都要聚在一块，那场面，绝对气派！
E: No, I think we should aim higher... How about we go to the Charmony Festival? I heard that all the famous figures from the universe would be there. It's definitely going to be grand!

C: 等到我们三瓶争个酒死瓶破，你再来坐收渔翁之利，把我们统统都倒进下水道去，自己成为最香醇的酒，你一定打着这样的算盘吧！
E: You would wait for us to descend into battle and smash each other to pieces, then seize your moment to pour us down the sewers and become the finest wine yourself! That must be your plan!

C: 说你的生产厂商不行。
E: They said your manufacturer is counterfeit.

C: 哈哈哈，我们二瓶的友谊坚不可摧！
E: Haha, we two have an unbreakable friendship!

C: 一起加油吧。
E: Let's do our best.

C: 神秘优雅的黑天鹅…没准她现在就在这里，只是没显形呢。
E: The mysterious and elegant Black Swan... She might even already be here. She just hasn't shown herself.

C: 没错，纵观整个银河，还有哪位神明像桶王一般视子民为己出。
E: Exactly. Throughout the entire Cosmos, which other gods regarded THEIR people as THEIR own like the King of Cans?

C: 银河巨星。
E: The cosmic superstar.

C: 有点意思。
E: Not bad.

C: 为了感谢老大，我们特地用赚到的第一桶金给你买了份礼物…东西很便宜，还希望你不要嫌弃。
E: To thank you, we used our first profits to buy ya a gift... It ain't nothin' fancy, so we hope ya don't mind.

C: 你说，咱们现在是不是成正规组织了？
E: Does that mean we're like a proper organization now?

C: 能在此时此刻相见于此地，想必也是神主希佩在可怜我的遭遇。
E: Meeting you here, I am certain that the Great One Xipe is taking pity on me for my tough times.

C: 来吧，让我接受你枪林弹雨的洗礼。
E: Come, let me feel your baptism of bullets!

C: 这是一本手札。纸张边角已经泛黄，绝大部分手记已被红锈似的渍印污染，无从辨明。
E: A notebook — its corners are yellowed and the majority of the notes within have been rendered incomprehensible by some kind of red rust-like stains.

C: 应该没人注意到这边，我们聊聊吧。怎么样，有什么发现吗？
E: I don't think anyone noticed us. Let's talk. Did you find anything?

C: 嗯，我明白。不过…我一定不会退缩的——一如既往。
E: Yes, I understand. But... I'll never back down — nor have I ever.

C: 我说，你不会还不知道吧？能在梦境里引起这么大轰动的，当然只有一件事——知更鸟小姐的新专辑《空气蛹》终于发售了！
E: Surely you know, right? There's only one thing that could ever cause a big ruckus like this in the dreamscape, and that's Miss Robin finally releasing her new album, INSIDE!

C: 嗨，这么认真干嘛，都是为了挣信用点。再说，要不是有我帮忙，你们还抢不到这张专辑呢。收不收？没兴趣我就去问其他人了。
E: Hey, why so serious? I'm just earning a few credits here. Besides, you'd never get a copy of the album without my help. Do you want it, or not? Otherwise I can always go ask someone else.

C: 在你的盛意邀请下，柯柯娜鼓起勇气站在台上。
E: Spurred by your sincere invitation, Cocona musters up her courage and stands on the stage.

C: 你能表演下你们的拿手曲目吗？
E: Can you perform the song you're the most famous for?

C: …罢了，事已至此，先开箱吧。
E: ...Oh, whatever. It is what it is. Just open the package.

C: （不知道包裹里是什么呢…还是过去签收一下吧，万一放过期了就尴尬了……）
E: (I wonder what's in the package... I'd better go sign for it. It'll be so awkward if I only pick it up after the hold period.)

C: 请问您想邀请哪几位住客呢？我这就帮您去邀请他们过来。
E: Which guests on board would you like to invite? I'll send for them right away.

C: …啊，抱歉，我以为您想邀请的亲朋也在空艇上，是我的理解出现了偏差。
E: Oh, my apologies. I'd assumed the friends you'd like to invite were also on board. I'm sorry for the misunderstanding.

C: 你想起在匹诺康尼认识的砂金，你邀请砂金通话，但对方的状态为「正在开会」，勿扰模式自动切断了你的来电。
E: You think of Aventurine whom you met in Penacony and decide to call him. His status, however, indicates that he's "in a meeting," and the "Do Not Disturb" feature automatically ends the call.

C: 拿走。
E: Take it.

C: 啊，我之前囚室旁边押来了一名犯人，他说话好酷好酷的…不对，我不该说这么多话，你别问我了。
E: Ah, there was a prisoner who was locked in the cell beside me. He spoke in a really cool way... No wait, I've mentioned too much, stop prodding me.

C: 不会出什么事吧？
E: This won't cause any trouble, will it?

C: 嘁…礼炮神经。
E: Pfft... cannon nerd.

C: 喂——！这位朋友，这里可不是你该随便来的地方啊。
E: Heyyyy! My friend, this is not a place for you to be wandering around.

C: 观众都往下看，向上看伤脖子。
E: The spectators were all looking down, as looking up hurts your neck.

C: 大哥，你轻点，你不是在抢劫。
E: Be gentler on people, that felt like a robbery.

C: 咱也将毕生所学留在了这里，希望这里的观众抬起头时，能想起她曾经的使命。
E: We also gave this place all of our life-long knowledge. I hope that when the spectators raise their heads to the skies, they will remember the great mission she once carried.

C: 无妨！老夫养孙千日、用孙一时，灰毛高手，让我的下个孙子出手吧！
E: No need to fear! I have raised these grandsons for years for this very moment. Gray-haired master, send in my next grandson!

C: 那…那就靠你了，灰毛高手！事成之后，我收你为我的义孙！
E: Then... Then I'm counting on you, gray-haired master! Complete this mission and I shall take you as my adopted grandson!

C: 当然，作为那个「被选中的无名客」，你在折纸小鸟面前素来享有特权；但这并不影响你完全无法理解眼前的小鸟究竟想要表达些什么。
E: Of course, as that Chosen Nameless, you've always enjoyed perks before Origami Birds, but this does not hinder the fact that you completely don't understand what this bird is trying to communicate.

C: 演员为了诠释角色，将自己的生命燃烧殆尽…很符合电影剧情，我喜欢这个结局。
E: To fully interpret her character, the actor burnt her life to cinders... A fitting movie plot, I like this ending.

C: 只见变身后的绿选手随便摇了摇瓶身，喷涌出的无数气泡便将他推到了舞台顶端，那是何等迷人的姿态，任何酒瓶都无法与这份闪耀相媲美！
E: The now-transformed Greenie nonchalantly shakes its body, spraying forth countless bubbles that push him towards the top of the stage. That mesmerizing stance... no other bottle can achieve such a pinnacle of sparkling beauty!

C: 哇，好厉害，我也想快点长大！
E: Whoa! Awesome! I want to grow up fast too!

C: 但在你触碰后，圣烛顶部竟升起璀璨的烛焰，那光芒越发强盛——
E: But after you touched it, a bright flame rises from the tip of the holy candle, and the radiance grows ever stronger...

C: 你经常空有一身的「开拓力」，却不知道该使在哪儿。
E: You have a lot of "Trailblaze Power," but you don't know where to use it.

C: 生活的欢悦和痛苦都使你乐在其中，你并不执着于解开这个名为「自己」的谜题。
E: The joys and sorrows of life captivate you, and you're not fixated on unraveling the puzzle of "thyself."

C: 难道「你也可以成为心理诊疗大师——一百堂公开课」里的步骤是错的？
E: Is it possible that the steps in "You Can Become a Master Psychotherapist — <unbreak>100</unbreak> Open Classes" are wrong?

C: 你自信满满地挺起了胸膛。「星穹列车」，简直是为你量身定制的答案。
E: You confidently puff your chest — it's the Astral Express. This was a riddle that was simply tailor-made for you.

C: 阿格莱雅的金线。
E: Aglaea's golden thread.

C: 狮口悲伤地纹丝不动，每一根石头雕刻的鬃毛都被沮丧的情绪凝固了。
E: The lion's maw remains sadly still, every stone-carved mane frozen in abject dejection.

C: 使用传信石版求助。
E: Ask for help with the teleslate.

C: 即使在折纸大学，你也从来没有系统接受过高等数学的试炼。那么，奥赫玛里的谁看起来像是数学比较好的人呢？
E: You never once systematically experienced the trials of advanced mathematics, even while at Paperfold University. Then, who in Okhema looks like someone who's good with numbers?

C: …问问白厄？
E: ...Ask Phainon?

C: 好哇！敢私下买卖大地兽？
E: The gall! How dare you illegally sell dromases!

C: 听起来是挺幽默的，但用刻法勒开玩笑，你总感觉自己似乎犯了渎神的罪过。再问问其他人的看法吧。
E: It's pretty funny, but you feel like you've committed the sin of blasphemy by making Kephale the butt of the joke. Let's ask what someone else thinks.

C: 试试问下遐蝶。
E: Try asking Castorice.

C: 吼吼？这视角…十分有趣，但本狮无法认可你的答案！毕竟本狮压根没法下班吼！
E: Ho-ho? This... is a very interesting perspective. But I do not accept your answer! I never get off work after all, ho!

C: 吼？居然答对了？吼，吼…这样啊，吼…别以为这就算证明你的智慧超过本狮了吼？
E: Ho? You actually got it right? Ho, ho... I see, ho... Don't think that it makes you smarter than me, got it?

C: 使用传信石版求助。
E: Ask for help with the teleslate.

C: （把手伸进狮子嘴里）
E: (Put your hand into the lion's mouth)

C: 妙啊，但很遗憾，巧合也要分好坏，若是{RUBY_B#诡计之泰坦}扎格列斯{RUBY_E#}暗中作怪，撞了大霉运，可就完全不可爱了。答错了吼！
E: Very good. Alas, there are both good and bad coincidences. If {RUBY_B#Trickery Titan}Zagreus{RUBY_E#} is pulling the strings behind the scenes, the outcome would be unpleasantly un-cute with a surge of bad luck. Wrong answer!

C: 点击「查杀病毒」！
E: Click "Check for Viruses"!

C: 你说吧…
E: Go ahead...

C: 呼呼，虽比不上初始的火种，但也能帮我再撑段时间了。感谢你，好心的人。
E: *crackle* This is no primordial Coreflame, but it will last me for a while. Thank you, kind soul.

C: 呼呼…救救……
E: *crackle* Help...

C: 当然。呼呼，表现出你的虔敬与诚意，大地自会有赠礼。
E: Of course. *crackle* Show your reverence and sincerity, and the land will reciprocate.

C: 钱。
E: Money.

C: 不错，你已经掌握了我最新发明的垃圾桶定理——看来这定理还是挺简洁的。
E: Not bad, you've mastered my latest discovery, the "Trashcan Theorem"! Well, this name sounds quite concise.

C: 你这厮，竟敢消遣洒家，看打！
E: You dare mock me? I'll teach you a lesson you won't forget!

C: 是啊，垃圾桶的一生怎么会有意义呢…我们总是充满喧哗与骚动，却不知一切只是一场幻梦……
E: Indeed, how could a trashcan's life be meaningful...? Everything is but a fleeting dream of insignificance...

C: 什么也不做…那不就是我现在的状态吗？太好了！
E: Do nothing... Isn't it what I've been doing? Wonderful!

C: 嘘，别被它们发现了。
E: Shh, we have to keep this a secret from them.

C: 想真正让人长教训，必须得这样！
E: To ensure the perpetrator really learns their lesson, there's only one way to do it.

C: 什么？你，你居然将我的劝告当作耳旁风！是时候代表禁地对你降下惩罚了！
E: What? Y—You dare throw my heed of caution to the wind! I will mete punishment unto you on behalf of the forbidden ground!

C: 侮辱神使，口出狂言，无视秩序，当受天罚！
E: You insult the oracle, spout nonsense and disregard Order. Prepare to be judged by the heavens!

C: 吃垃圾长大…这不是骂人吗？
E: Grew up eating trash... Isn't that an insult?

C: 来，展示吧！
E: Come, show me what you're made of!

C: 你是一瓶苏乐达。
E: You are a bottle of SoulGlad.

C: 你应当理解柔弱之人的心境，就像…这样。
E: You should be more understanding of the mental state of the weak, just like... this.

C: 白厄的历险，说来话长了。
E: Phainon's journey is gonna take a long while to tell.

C: 最后是结尾…咪发迷不知道该如何打扫树屋，替它解决困扰吧。
E: And for the ending... Mifamem has no clue how to clean their treehouse. Time to help them out.

C: o((•'ω´• )っ「他乡遇故知，当然要惺惺相惜啦。」)∋
E: o((•'ω´• )っ "When you meet a kindred spirit far from home... you don't fight. You vibe." )∋

C: 转移它的注意力。
E: Distract its attention.

C: 你抄起几块泥土，打算吸引大地兽的注意力，但收效甚微……
E: You scoop up some clumps of dirt and try to get its attention, but... no luck.

C: 事已至此，只能用球棒解决问题了……
E: No other choice. Time to let the bat do the talking...

C: 触碰忆泡。
E: Touch the Memory Bubble.

C: 虽然还有些许疑惑之处，但螺丝咕姆先生带来的这份礼物，想必有助于我们联络上{NICKNAME}和丹恒。
E: While I still have some questions, Mr. Screwllum's gift will surely help us reach {NICKNAME} and Dan Heng.

C: 暂时只有这些啦。更多的秘密，就等我们一起揭开吧。
E: That's all for now. As for the rest of the secrets, we'll uncover them together.

C: 事实的确如此。
E: Indeed.

C: 不过，还真是美丽的麦浪呀。等到收割的日子，它就会平息，变成一片金色的湖面……
E: But these ripples of wheat are gorgeous. On harvest day, they will finally subside and turn into a golden lake.

C: 昔涟不再言语，转头静静地望着远方。
E: Cyrene falls silent, turning her head to look into the distance.

C: 他是…灰色头发和胡子的男性…挺老的，不像是会打仗的人……
E: He... He is a man with gray hair and a gray beard... He's quite old, and he doesn't look like someone fit for battle...

C: 罢了，你走吧，我没时间再去听那些胡话…祝你早日康复。
E: Forget it. Just go. I have no time to indulge your nonsense... May you recover your sanity soon.

C: 您不回答…是困了？…您还在吗？喂…喂……
E: You aren't responding... Are you tired? ...Are you still there? Hello... Hello...?

C: …去往「拉冬城」的那个。
E: ...The one bound for Ladon.

C: 没什么想问的了。
E: That's all I wanted to know.

C: 哈。哈。或许我曾误入歧途，但现在的我已幡然醒悟。「门径」指引方向，催促我们踏上前路，风雨兼程；「理性」却能辨明真理，告诉我们终点何在。
E: Ha. Ha. I may have lost my way once, but now I see clearly. While "Passage" guides our steps through the tempests and showers, "Reason" reveals the truth and shows our journey's end.

C: 「令人悲伤的事」
E: A sad truth indeed

C: 飘渺的声音仍在空中回荡，但那匹木马早已不在身旁——它确实将你送达了新的场所。
E: The mysterious voice still lingers in the air, but the wooden horse has disappeared — having successfully transported you elsewhere.

C: 而且，即便灵魂能抵达来世，来世会从哪一刻开始，如今我们拥有的记忆又会不会消失？未免也太过含糊其辞。
E: Moreover, even if souls can reach the afterlife, when exactly does the afterlife begin? And will the memories we hold now simply vanish? It all feels far too vague and ambiguous.

C: 明明是你硬是在我旁边指指点点，说什么不该这样吃、不该那样吃，一脸不屑，摆明是看不起我们这些外邦流民！
E: It was you who kept pointing and lecturing beside me, saying I shouldn't eat this way or that way, looking down on me with disdain! It was obvious, you have no respect for us outland refugees!

C: 汪汪~汪汪汪！汪汪！
E: Woof woof~ Woof woof woof! Woof woof!

C: 好的孩子，以后有空，可以多多来聊聊。
E: Good. Kid, come and chat with me if you have time.

C: 你有见过那位大人吗？
E: Have you seen that lord?

C: 小友若是还有任何想了解的事情，也可以问我。
E: If you have any questions, please do not hesitate to let me know.

C: 安全区就是过渡计划的产物，作为我们逐步夺回的舱段失地，最终将如星星之火，连为一体。
E: The safe zone is the result of our transition plan, for us to take back all the lost zones. I am confident all the dots will eventually be connected.

C: 做秘书，最重要的就是完成方方面面的维护。工作的涵盖范围肯定就会广泛一些，边界也会相对模糊……
E: As his secretary, the most important thing is to keep track of everything. The scope of work can be large and the lines can be blurry sometimes...

C: 虽然辛苦，但是多复习几次，肯定不会再出错了。
E: Although it's hard, I believe practice makes perfect.

C: 只是提交一些文件，没有什么问题的……多走一些路罢了。
E: I just need to submit some documents. I'll be fine... I just need to walk a bit further.

C: 你看上去很焦虑。
E: You look anxious.

C: 抬起你们骄傲的头颅吧！不要再自欺欺人地忽视那些就在你们眼皮子底下的惨状！
E: Raise your proud heads! Don't try to deceive yourself by ignoring the tragedies right in front of your eyes!

C: 最简单的方面——上次的军团入侵。人们都慌不择路，却没有人去关心那些奇物的安危！
E: Let's start from the most simple aspect — the last Legion invasion. People were desperate to escape but no one cared about the safety of the Curios!

C: 我势单力薄，影响力或许会让你失望。
E: I am powerless on my own. My influence may disappoint you.

C: 空间站其他人对于你的行为怎么看待？
E: What are the other people's perspectives on your actions?

C: 一闭上眼睛，脑子里出现的都是她的容貌……这下子还怎么能好好工作啊。
E: Whenever I close my eyes, all I can think of is her face... How am I supposed to work?

C: 我只不过比她晚出生一些日子，但无论是才学还是实践，我都比她强。
E: I was only born a bit later than her. I am better than her no matter in talent or practice.

C: 应物科都是按照什么规矩分发奇物？
E: What is the Department of Implement Arts' regulations in terms of distributing Curios?

C: 有没有打算扩招防卫科？
E: Any plans to hire more hands for the Security Department?

C: 我不知道，但小姐那边还没有出现过密钥无法支付的情况。
E: I'm not sure. But so far Lady Asta has encountered no problems using it to make payments.

C: 他不知道该怎么和你相处。
E: He doesn't know how to get along with you.

C: 下次阮•梅女士回来的时候，她就能够在更舒适的环境下工作了。到时候她一定会很开心的！
E: Miss Ruan Mei is coming back to a more comfy working place. I'm sure she'll be thrilled!

C: 阮•梅女士是我们的创造者，我们不能离开她。
E: Miss Ruan Mei is our creator. We can't leave her alone.

C: 祝你好运，下次再聊。
E: Good luck and let's talk another time.

C: 阮•梅的造物们都是好朋友，让我们来手牵手~
E: Ruan Mei's creations are all good friends. Let us all hold hands~

C: 星光？我的心里灰扑扑的，连星光都不愿意照耀我…你不喜欢我…阮•梅也不喜欢我，呜呜……
E: Starlight? I feel so down that even the starlight is avoiding me... You don't like me, and neither does Ruan Mei... *sob, sob*

C: 我受够了，为什么换个零件这么复杂！
E: I'm so sick of this! Why is it so difficult to replace the part?

C: 萍萍姐说是因为我这种口味天生缺乏安全感，好像是少了一味什么材料，这我就不懂了，或许有机缘的话，能去问问创造我的阮•梅女士吧。
E: Ms. Wenfry said I was born to be insecure because of a missing ingredient. That, I don't know. Maybe I should ask my creator, Miss Ruan Mei, about it if I have the chance.

C: 这名字也太尴尬了…
E: That name is so awkward...

C: 它们知道你是它们的领导吗？
E: Do they know you're their leader?

C: 我很好奇你是什么口味的？
E: I'm very curious what you taste like?

C: 尼卡多利战无不胜，用它的战矛碎片重铸而成的长矛，锐不可当，无坚不摧！各位朋友若是不信，大可以试试。
E: Nikador was ever-victorious. Brandishing a lance forged from the lance shard that the god once wielded, you will be unstoppable and unrelenting! If anyone here is in disbelief, feel free to test it for yourself.

C: 没想到矛和盾竟然都碎了，这下可全赔进去了。
E: To think the lances and shields have all been destroyed. I've lost my entire fortune.

C: 哎呦，客人，是您啊，好久不见了！
E: Oho, it's you, dear customer! Long time!

C: 异乡的智者啊，莫要被诡辩术迷惑了你的思考。跟从感官的结果固然轻松，但别忘了，理性才是灵魂的主宰。我将为你讲述我的见解。
E: Wise one from elsewhere, do not allow your mind to be clouded by sophistry. Though it is easy to follow one's senses, do not forget that reason is the master of the soul. Allow me to explain my understanding.

C: 就到这里吧，智者连续两次驳倒了我的论证，无话可说，确实是位厉害的辩论家。以后还请多与我们交流你的观点。
E: Let us leave the argument here for now. You have successfully rebuked my arguments twice in a row now, wise one. I have no choice but to admit that you are a great debater. I hope that you will continue to share your perspectives with us in the future.

C: 哈，我就猜到你准会相信他那套言论。要是在奥赫玛公然质疑阿卡索斯的真实性，是要引起众怒的。但没关系，我愿意为我的论点辩护。
E: Hah, I knew that you would favor his argument. If Okhema were to publicly doubt the truth of Icatus' existence, it would be certain to incite outrage. I do not mind, however. I am willing to defend my theory.

C: 假使有位学者生活在阿卡索斯，对这座城邦有着充分的了解，他知道城市的面积、人口、统治者、全部历史，甚至所有街道的模样。
E: Imagine there was a scholar who lived in Icatus. He has a deep understanding of the city and knows its area, population, rulers, all of its history, and even every street and road.

C: 世界永远不可知——唯有怀疑，以及我正在怀疑，才是确定无疑的事。
E: The world can never be fully known — the only things that are free of doubt are doubt itself, and the fact that I am doubting.

C: 即便如此，我依旧不后悔…与其像个傻子似的被蒙骗，不如早些认清他的真面目。
E: Even so, I still don't regret anything... I just wish I'd seen through his mask a lot earlier instead of allowing myself to get played like a fool.

C: 宁芙……
E: Nympha...

C: 我随万敌殿下抵达奥赫玛的第一夜，就有刺客前来企图夺走我的性命，那时我还只是个懵懂的孩童。后来，万敌殿下向元老院提出抗议，他们才不情愿地收了手。
E: The first night I arrived in Okhema alongside Lord Mydei, an assassin made an attempt on my life. I was just a child back then... Lord Mydei lodged a complaint with the Council of Elders, and they reluctantly put a stop to things.
Let's go!!!

C: 我可保证不了能做到什么。
E: I can't promise anything.

C: 那个黑衣剑士…就跟在后面，击溃了所有还在抵抗的人……
E: The black-clad swordmaster followed closely, overwhelming all those who still dared to resist.

C: 他不是失去理性的怪物，是专程来摧毁树庭的！
E: He's not just a mindless beast. He was on a mission to obliterate the Grove!

C: 可是你昨天还嚷嚷着要减肥……
E: But you were just hollering yesterday about wanting to lose weight...

C: 最近这么多人受伤，又要连轴转了。
E: So many people have been getting injured that we've had to work around the clock.

C: 听说你们科室搞了个什么创新咖啡，还赚了不少？
E: I heard your department has a new coffee start-up, and it's raking in cash?

C: 嗯，按着操作手册上的流程，全部检查过了。
E: Yeah, I've checked over everything according to the manual's workflow.

C: 失控的大地兽，在热闹的城邦里狂奔，总有天要出事的。可它的力气太大，工坊的栅栏挡不住它，速度又太快，普通人根本追不上…谁能帮帮我呀？！
E: A rampaging dromas running wild in a bustling city-state is bound to cause trouble someday. But it's too strong for the workshop fences to hold it back, and it's too fast for an ordinary person to catch... Who could help me?

C: 正当你还在消化这些信息时，那头疯狂的大地兽再次从你们的面前飞奔而过。
E: Just as you're trying to process this information, the rampaging dromas dashes past you again.

C: 那就拜托您了！要是找到了这头大地兽原本的主人，我非得让他给您道歉！
E: I'll leave it to you! If we find this dromas's original owner, I'll make sure they apologize to you properly!

C: 嗡嗡…呜嗡嗡！
E: Grumph... Grumphhh!

C: …这不是虔诚就能解决的事吧？
E: ...This isn't something sincerity can solve, right?

C: 好吧，你想你已经明白这群人的身份了。
E: Alright, you think you've figured out who these people are.

C: 发生什么事了，是啊，我也曾想这样大声地问！
E: "What happened?" *bitter laugh* I asked myself the same question that day, screaming it until my voice gave out.

C: 我，伊俄，同时认识你忒斯庇斯，和《被缚的埃德加》的埃德加。反过来说，埃德加能借助我，伊俄，认识你《被缚的埃德加》的编剧，忒斯庇斯。
E: I, Eio, am connected to both you, Thespis, and The Shackled Edgar. Therefore, Edgar, through me, gains awareness of his creator, Thespis.

C: 机会难得，我带你稍微逛逛吧。
E: This is a rare opportunity. Let me show you around a bit.

C: 谢谢你的夸奖！要是过会儿，刻法勒真的能回应我就好啦……
E: Thanks for the compliment! I really hope Kephale will respond to me soon...

C: 现在，大家都对奥赫玛的未来更有希望啦！
E: Now, everyone feels more hopeful about the future of Okhema!

C: 出去巡征追猎！
E: Let's pursue and hunt them down!

C: 但是，矛和盾本不该相向。当它们调转方向面向共同的敌人时，又会发生什么呢？
E: But lance and shield were never meant to oppose one another. What do you think would happen if they turned together to face a common enemy?

C: 此前在后厅中避难的公民大部分安然无恙。虽然有些捉襟见肘，但克拉特鲁斯阁下让我们带了些物资和药物过来，伤者已经得到了治疗。
E: Most of the citizens sheltering in the back hall are safe. Despite our limited supplies, Lord Krateros sent provisions and medications, and we've treated all the wounded.

C: 无论如何，也太莽撞了。
E: Regardless, they were too reckless.

C: 孩子们，怎么不去避难？
E: Kids! Why aren't you at the shelters?

C: 这是第几波了…走吧，准备作战。可不能让圣城的孩子们失去笑容啊！
E: Which wave of battle are we on now... Let's go. Let's get ready. We can't let the kids of the holy city lose their smiles!

C: 阁下如果不嫌弃的话，我为你讲些小维吉妮娅的往事吧。
E: If you don't mind, I'd like to tell you some stories about little Verginia.

C: 只是，她的天性从小得不到包容。她害怕打仗，害怕震耳欲聋的吼声，害怕金属交击的脆响……
E: However, her nature was never accepted since childhood. She feared battles, feared the deafening roars, feared the crisp clang of clashing metal...

C: 委托名「我那喝多的同伴哪去了」，推演结果是「昏睡于排幽处，望珍重」。
E: Request: "Where did my drunk buddy go?" - Extrapolation Result: "Passed out by the vents. Handle with care."

C: 在法吉娜陨命后，祭台的神力已经愈加微弱，现在产出的「专属心酿」可谓寡淡如水，仅能尝出一点点蜜酿香气。
E: With Phagousa gone, the altar's power has diminished significantly. Now our "exclusive soul brew" tastes like nothing but water with barely a whisper of honey brew fragrance.

C: 天空一族没太有饮用蜜酿的习惯，毕竟葡萄在高海拔地区无法生长——所以，这是一瓶水汽蒸发「云酿」…就是蒸馏水。
E: The Sky people never developed a taste for honey brew, as grapes simply won't grow at these altitudes. So what we have here is "Cloudbrew," made from condensed vapor... basically just distilled water.

C: 拜托了，阁下。走上祭台，再制造一瓶心酿吧。
E: Please, Great Deliverer. Step onto the altar and craft another bottle of soul brew.

C: …对不起，窗外的风景实在是太…我稍稍有些走神了。
E: ...Sorry, it's so beautiful outside... I got a little lost in thought.

C: 虎克觉得，列车被很多星星包围着，就像是在糖果中穿梭的移动游乐园……
E: All these stars surrounding us... The Express is like a traveling theme park warp-jumping through candy...

C: 如果我们能把自动机兵像「卫星」一样部署到太空中，就能在战斗中取得优势。
E: If we could launch our automatons into space like satellites, it'd definitely give us an edge in combat.

C: 坐着不如躺着。
E: My advice — stop sitting and start lying down.

C: 思维的放松果然也很重要…换一换环境竟然可以有如此大的效果。
E: It's important to slow down and unwind... A change of scenery is sometimes the best medicine.

C: 啊…抱歉，还未自我介绍。我是星际行商，在仙舟的注册名是「罗刹」。
E: Oh... Forgive me, I forgot to introduce myself. I'm an interstellar merchant — my Xianzhou registered name is "Luocha."

C: 你有话直说！
E: If you have something to say, say it!

C: 至于结果，当然是一次就得了五星——也就是头等奖。
E: As for the result, I got a five-star prize in one go — the top prize.

C: 想送你件礼物…
E: I have a gift for you...

C: 帮助？对没错，你看上去的确需要一些小小的帮助。
E: Help? Right, you do look like you need some help.

C: 如果你心中还有困惑，可以随时来找我。当然也可以写信，我喜欢那样传统的交流方式。
E: If you still hold confusion in your heart, please, come find me anytime. Of course, you may also write to me. I like that kind of classical communication method.

C: 不过幸好，我的人生还不算彻底黯淡无光。毕竟我还拥有你，以及真正理解我的人。
E: Thankfully, my life is not completely devoid of light. After all, I still have you and those who really understand me.

C: 因为平时和他们来往颇多，彼此也算是互相了解。经过引荐内推之后，也通过了几个研究项目的面试。大概之后，就会以「科员」的身份和你打招呼啦。
E: We knew each other because of our frequent interactions before. They got me to apply for some internal positions, and I managed to pass the interviews for a few projects. I'll probably be a "researcher" by the next time we meet.

C: 虽然不知道这些东西价值几何，但很是好看，拿来送给老师，也许是再合适不过的礼物了。
E: I don't know if they're worth anything, but they look pretty. Here, I think they'd make a nice gift for you.

C: 哎，算我倒霉，我也不知道怎么就感染这玩意。
E: Ugh, this is so unfair. I have no idea how I even got this darn thing.

C: 好了，没别的事你就先走吧。我还要等三月七呢……
E: Alright, if there's nothing else, then move along. I'm waiting for March...

C: 啊…但是…智库…智库还没……
E: Ah...? But... the data bank... It hasn't been...
*snoring*

C: …哦，就是近大远小的意思呗？这我懂！
E: ...Oh, like how things look big when they get closer? I get that!

C: 需要药茶的配方吗？
E: Do you need the herbal tea recipe?

C: （还是别去打扰她了……）
E: (Let's not disturb her...)

C: 为什么不直接问帕姆？
E: Why don't you ask Pom-Pom directly?

C: 他们说不定也在等着列车到来呢。这么一想，你们肩上的包袱也很重啊，对吧？
E: Maybe they're also waiting for the Express to arrive. You guys really carry a lot of weight on your shoulders, don't you?

C: 这种浑然天成的松弛感，就连仙舟上也不多见，真是难得……
E: Such a natural state of composure is rare — even on the Xianzhou... Inspiring...

C: 就是一种气定神闲的状态，看上去无忧无虑，但你知道对方胸有成竹，定有一番担当。
E: It is a state of being relaxed while maintaining a focused mind. The individual may look carefree, but they harbor a constant readiness.

C: 你也是遭遇意外，进入十王司…
E: You mean because you didn't mean to join the Ten-Lords Commission...?

C: 我也喜欢「开拓」的故事。
E: I like the "Trailblazing" stories, too.

C: 喏，送你了，保不准什么时候能用上。
E: Here, they're for you. Maybe they'll come in handy sometime.

C: 各种片段的组合：清爽的雨后森林、青草地和小狐狸…
E: All kinds of sights: A lush forest after a cooling rain, green pastures and little foxes...

C: 乐子人调查乐子事件，我敢打包票，绝对不会出现事故的！
E: A fun-seeker investigating fun things in the universe — I guarantee there's no way that could ever go wrong!

C: 样式我已经想好啦，但得先保密！这样下次见面的时候才有惊喜可言！你说对不对？
E: I've even thought of the design already, but it's a secret! Then it'll be a surprise the next time we meet! Don't you think so?

C: 哇！喜欢！
E: Whoa! I love it!

C: 若干系统时后，文字会转变为大家都能够读懂的普遍样式。
E: After some system hours, the words will turn into a common language that everyone can understand.

C: 正如我的内心被喜悦所驱动，希世难得号只差一拳距离就追尾了列车。
E: Just as my heart is driven by joy, the One and Only was but a fist's distance away when it crashed into the Express' rear.

C: 它并非买卖所得，而是怪物——「凶恶绒球」的战利品。
E: It wasn't a purchase, but a prize from a monster — the Ferocious Fluff Ball.

C: 没想到第一次为友人购置礼品，就出现了这样的失误，万分抱歉。
E: I never thought I'd make such an embarrassing blunder when buying a present for a dear friend for the first time. A thousand apologies.

C: 好…好重的黑眼圈。
E: You... you have very dark circles under your eyes.

C: 那小女子便要厚着脸皮再多来几次，定能亲眼瞧见星星诞生时的闪动。
E: Then I'll shamelessly invite myself here a few more times and make sure to catch that spark at the moment of a star's birth.

C: 识别错误，识别错误。所以…这到底是何缘故？
E: Verification error, verification error. So... what is the cause of this?

C: 密封的圆柱体实验舱，你只在影视作品里见过。
E: The sealed cylindrical experimental pod is something you have only seen in movies.

C: 我才不要跟你好……
E: I don't wanna be friends with you...

C: 呼噜…呼噜呼噜……
E: *snore*

C: 给我有话直说！
E: Stop beating around the bush!

C: 你就是我一直梦寐以求的「朋友」？
E: You're the friend I've been craving all this time?

C: 谢谢，我现在确实没有心情思考这些…
E: Thanks. I'm just really not in the mood to think about all this...

C: 还是专注于培养优秀的作者吧。
E: We should focus on training good writers instead.

C: 那个新人编辑就特别擅长这一手，她有门绝活，就是把一句话翻来覆去地写，洋洋洒洒几百行，本质上就十个字。
E: That newbie is a natural for this. She can write a hundred pages for what could have been described using a few words.

C: 十个字能说清楚的事，谁又想写几千字呢？不过，从专业的角度来看，这也是一门谋生技术，所以把位置让给尼古莱，我也心悦诚服……
E: Who wants to write an essay when it could be done with just ten words? But when you write professionally, it becomes a useful skill. Nika was better at this. That's why I had no objections to giving my position to Nika...

C: 我不打扰你了。
E: Thank you for your time.

C: 你不去下层区采采风？
E: Will you go to the Underworld to collect materials?

C: 房源信息可靠吗？
E: Are you certain about the info of the property?

C: 只要能造出时间隧道，我就能震惊全世界！
E: The world will be left in awe when my time tunnel is completed!

C: 再见。
E: See you later.

C: 阿尔乔姆是谁？
E: Who is Artem?

C: 那时的我有什么事都是自己扛着，从来没和人分享过自己的感情和想法。但在这机械屋就不一样了——希露瓦小姐和我兴趣相投，我们现在可是好闺蜜呢！
E: I had to handle everything by myself. I was never able to share my thoughts and feelings with anyone. But being here at the workshop is totally different. Serval and I have similar interests. We're close friends now!

C: 那你是真的厉害。
E: Wow, I am soo scared.

C: 还是说，你也想加入「深蓝骗局受害者互助会」？
E: Or do you want to join the Dark-Blue Scam Victims Association?

C: 我当然知道。
E: Of course, I've heard.

C: 十来岁的姑娘当领导，五十岁的老头儿干后勤……
E: Get a teenage girl to be the boss, get a <unbreak>50</unbreak>-year-old geezer to do logistics...

C: 哦，等会儿，看你这身奇异的装扮，莫非……
E: Wait a minute. The way you're dressed... Are you...?

C: 我才不跟你这种人签约。
E: I'm not signing up with you.

C: 自己排队买票去，我史考特做生意向来公私分明，别以为跟我聊几句混个脸熟了，就能免票入场。
E: Go buy a ticket. I'm an honest businessman. Exchanging a few words with me won't get you free admission.

C: 我只希望大家能够和睦相处…呜呜。
E: I just hope everyone can get along...

C: 我还以为是什么大事呢。
E: I thought you talked about something important.

C: 你到底忘记什么事了？
E: What did you forget?

C: 我不知道。
E: I don't know.

C: 比如说——有位逃婚的大小姐穿着睡衣从二楼客房跳窗逃跑，听说她自此下落不明……
E: For example, a lady from a rich family escaped her wedding and jumped out of the window on the second floor in her pajamas. No one ever heard from her since...

C: 行啊，我平时也没什么事，难得有人愿意来陪我说会儿话。
E: Sure. I'm usually quite free. I'd love to have a chat with someone.

C: 哈哈，在你这种年轻人面前，还是不谈这个了。好好生活吧。
E: Haha, I shouldn't be talking about such stuff with a young'un like you. Live well!

C: 推荐菜？来，你把柜台边上那本食评册拿来，看看对里边哪个有兴趣，我给你好好讲讲——这可都是我的得意之作！
E: Dishes? Check the food review book on the wardrobe and see what interests you. They are all my masterpieces!

C: 我想看看其他的…
E: Any other dishes...

C: 那个，现在暂时没看到有洞螈活动的迹象…请问你有什么想聊的吗？
E: Well, I don't think there are signs of olm activities right now... is there anything else you want to chat about?

C: 诸位出发去找托帕以后，我立即通过贝洛伯格的城市广播进行了宣讲。
E: When you went in search of Topaz, I immediately made an appeal to the people on the Belobog city radio.

C: 反倒是流浪者那边——据我所知，他们中的大部分都步入正轨了，但也免不了有些混球想借这个机会发笔横财。
E: But the vagrants — most of them are on the right track as far as I know, but naturally there're a few ne'er-do-wells who are trying to line their pockets with ill-gotten gains.

C: 先前的那场战斗…
E: Your last battle...

C: 先聊到这儿吧。
E: Good chatting with you.

C: 生意？那是什么？
E: Business? What's that?

C: …等老弟下次回来，我一定得拉上佩拉一起，给他好好打打气。
E: ...When he comes back next time, I'll definitely bring Pela along and we'll back him up.

C: …啊，你是说之前在永冬岭发生的事吧？
E: ...Ah, you mean that thing back at Everwinter Hill?

C: 上车的事，不改主意了？
E: You don't regret joining us?

C: …这位听众，打断他人的演讲是极不礼貌的行为——我作为筑城者的代表，必须对你表示谴责！
E: ...This congregation member... Interrupting a sermon is extremely rude — As a representative of the Architects, I must express their condemnation!

C: 当然，还是没法排除他们单方面反悔的可能性。银鬃铁卫会严加监管这些人的动向。
E: Of course, we cannot rule out the possibility of them backing out of this. The Silvermane Guards will be monitoring their movements closely.

C: 这么冷淡…她可是把你当救命恩人呢。
E: How indifferent. You should know that she sees you as her savior.

C: 不胜感激。希望你能享受此次贝洛伯格之行……
E: I would be deeply grateful. I hope you will enjoy this trip to Belobog...

C: 严肃的话题就先到这里吧。我正准备稍事休息，想聊聊其他的话题吗？
E: But enough of this stuffy topic. I'm about to go on a break. Do you have something else you wish to talk about?

C: 大家都很善良…人类和机器人，在这里可以和谐相处。所以，大家就把这里叫作「机械聚落」啦。
E: Everyone was so kind... Humans and robots, living in harmony here. And that's why everyone called this place the Robot Settlement.

C: 以我的算力，暂时还无法解读对方发来这条信息的目的。
E: With my current computation power, I am still unable to decipher why the other party sent this message.

C: 当然啦，毕竟是我漆黑的虎克大人的鼹鼠党！
E: Of course, I'm Pitch-Dark Hook the Great of the Moles!

C: 喂，你这说的是什么话！我可是鼹鼠党的老大，当然得记住组织里的每个成员啦！
E: Hey, what kinda talk is that! I'm the boss of The Moles. Of course, I'll remember everyone!

C: 欸，不聊天了吗？嘿嘿，我知道了——肯定是虎克懂的知识太多，把你震惊到了吧！
E: Oh, done talking? Heehee, I've got it. My overwhelming knowledge must've caused a mental overload for you!

C: 就先聊到这儿吧。
E: Nice chat.

C: 她自顾自忧愁，想着现状有多糟糕
E: Fixating, hating, these problems never really abating

C: 费斯曼先生也来帮忙了啊。
E: Are you here to help, too, Mr. Fersman?

C: 虽然日日夜夜站在这里接待各路玩家，我这身体确实有点吃不消…但考虑到这可是《以太战线》，我也就感觉没那么难受了。
E: While standing here day and night to greet players does take a toll on my body, but... hey! It's Aetherium Wars! Whenever I think of that, it doesn't feel so bad anymore.
...Arf?

C: 小熊表现得意犹未尽。也许你可以试着表现得更亲密些……
E: The cub seems to be in a great mood. Maybe you could try befriending it...

C: 人力成本越来越高了。
E: Labor costs have been getting higher and higher.

C: …坏了。
E: ...Drat.

C: 是啊是啊！
E: Yeah. Yeah!

C: 去参加鼹鼠大探险咯！
E: Let's join the Moles' big adventure!

C: 无糖脱脂，呵护你的健康！
E: Sugar-free skim milk: Take care of your health!

C: 别起哄！
E: No heckling!

C: 你确定是这条路？
E: Are you sure this is the way?

C: 唔，该怎么训练呢……
E: Hmm, how should I train it...

C: 放弃吧，你赢不了我！
E: Give it up! You can't defeat me!

C: 不要干扰铁卫工作。
E: Don't interfere with official Silvermane duty.

C: 至于我们这座历史文化博物馆嘛，展品谈不上多——原因你也知道，寒潮、裂界…它们带走的东西实在是太多了。
E: This museum in particular doesn't have much in its collection, and you know the reason for it — the Eternal Freeze, the Fragmentum... They took so much from us.

C: 曾经的我也天真过，以为自己可以完全不理会他们就把工作进行下去。
E: I used to harbor that naive thought too, believing that I could just block them out and go about my duties.

C: 建木的事总算过去了…
E: Finally, the Ambrosial Arbor crisis is behind us...

C: 你好。
E: Hello.

C: 你有没有可能是个机器人？
E: Could you actually be a robot?

C: 哎…武赫，消停点吧。别让人看热闹了。
E: *sigh* Wu He, calm down. Let's not put on a show for people.

C: 反正差不多就是那一套肤浅的东西吧……
E: Pretty much, it's trivial pap...

C: …现代传媒将每个具有审美能力的灵魂焚毁、煅烧、熔炼，然后铸造成一条「创意生产线」，再得意洋洋地对我们说：「创意生产线不需要创意」！
E: ...Modern media breaks down, pulverizes, and distills every soul capable of aesthetic beauty into a "creative assembly line" — then has the cheek to turn around and tell us "The creative assembly line doesn't need any more creativity"!

C: 我问它，要我的毛干什么用？它说步离人毛发特别结实，用它们搓出来的绳子，在这幽囚狱里可是千金难求的好东西。
E: I asked what it wanted to do with my fur. It said that borisin fur is known to be durable, and that rope made from borisin fur is a rarity in The Shackling Prison.

C: 透露出生活气息的小物件。
E: Small ornaments that make this place feel alive.

C: 客人，刻板印象可要不得呀～
E: It's not good to believe in stereotypes, dear customer.

C: 想问你几个问题。
E: I have a few questions for you.

C: 在下是地衡司的广大，只是个区区小勤务罢了。如果您有什么要事，不妨移步公廨内部……
E: I'm Guangda, a lowly orderly from the Realm-Keeping Commission. If you have any issues to handle, I suggest you visit our Chancery offices...

C: 太可惜了。
E: Shame.

C: 怎么会不知道，前几天还拉我们去和云骑军一起配合安抚民众呢。
E: You bet. A couple of days ago, we were asked to appease the public alongside the Cloud Knights.

C: 哎，你这人说话怎么这么不中听！我要真心想吃白饭，何必还要摊那三分的账啊，对吧？
E: Oh, what a mean thing to say! If I was trying to leech off of you, would I offer to chip in <unbreak>30%</unbreak>? No way!

C: 你不是说这是机密吗？
E: Didn't you say this was top secret?

C: 卑职虽为神策府侍卫长，但工作倒也算是清闲。毕竟这堂堂神策府由将军亲自镇守，敢打它主意的宵小之徒可是少之又少。
E: I may be the chief guard around these parts, but it's actually quite a leisurely role. After all, the general himself is also based in this office so nobody dares to bother us.

C: {NICKNAME}大人您又来了啊，今天是有什么事要办吗？
E: Esteemed {NICKNAME}! You're back again! Do you have any business you wish to resolve today?

C: 三个人怎么了嘛，三个人里也有可以有一位隐藏王牌嘛。
E: What about it? There can be a trump card hidden among three people.

C: 那时候我还年轻，充满了热情…但维森纳女士摇了摇头，对我说：「还太早，你先到人间去吧。」
E: I was still young back then, and brimming with exuberance... But Madam Wiesener shook her head and told me, "It's still early. Go to the human world, first."

C: 这次这个就当做是谢礼送给您了，如果想要试试手气，可以再来找我。我这里囤积了很多呢。
E: This time, I'll gift it to you as thanks. If you ever wanna try your luck, come find me again. I have stocked up quite the backlog.

C: 他们现在手里都积压着不少赛伯邑超导合金，想要卖到罗浮…虽然这超导合金颇为珍贵，但只在工造司生产的一些精密仪器中应用，需求量很小。
E: They've been stockpiling lots of Cybercity superconducting alloys and plan on selling them off to the Luofu... It might be valuable, but it's only used in a few hyper-precision instruments over at the Artisanship Commission, so there's little demand for it.

C: 所以你明白了吗？「决斗」可不是什么「野蛮的习俗」！而是我们彰显尊严的方式！
E: So do you get it now? Dueling isn't a barbaric custom at all! Rather, it's our display of human dignity!

C: 去天舶司里打听打听如何？
E: What about making inquiries over at the Sky-Faring Commission?

C: 结果到最后只有我一人来到了这仙舟罗浮，这也不打紧，只要我能把生意谈成了，家乡那几位也不会觉得血本无归。
E: I ended up being the only one who made it to the Xianzhou Luofu, which was no big deal. People back home wouldn't feel like they were losing their shirts as long as I can get some business going for us.

C: 这件事不能等，所以老爷你看，那位叫作茂贞的老哥就被我天天追问。
E: This matter can't wait though, so you will see me chasing up that guy named Maozhen every single day.

C: 接着，我猜那里面是挚友或者亲人，是一种「不幸的象征」，他必须怀着愧疚心拖着棺木负重前进，但是无人提及棺中是否有腐蚀气味。
E: Then I guessed that it was a close friend or family member. A "symbol of misfortune" that forced him to drag the coffin out of guilt. But nobody mentioned any rotting stench emanating from within.

C: 看上去你和那位辛克莱不对付？
E: I'm guessing you and that Sinclair guy don't get along?

C: 枪手有着不幸的过去，脸上总是露出被背上回忆笼罩的表情。我一度以为棺材可能是空的——每当别人问他棺材里放着什么，他总是回答是自己。
E: The gunslinger had this troubled past that's etched onto a face clouded by memories. At one point I thought the coffin would be empty — every time someone asked him what was in the coffin, he replied that it was himself.

C: 至于我，业内都知道我这人做事是最心细的。但凡开工，我都会遵循着严格的安全标准来，这样对人对己都好。
E: As for me, everyone in the business knows I'm the most careful person out there. Every time I start a project, I'll strictly follow safety guidelines and procedures. That typically works out best for both me and the customer.

C: 我的业务自然不止装卸集装箱这么简单，什么货物入港、清关报关、货物检查的，这些该走的手续我都可以代办。
E: Naturally, I don't just handle packing and unloading — that's far too simple. I also handle all kinds of procedures, like cargo entry, customs clearance, and quarantine inspections.

C: 好了好了，我就这么一说，您就这么一听，我说话也没过脑子，请您也别往心里去。我这人气性就这样，送您一点儿小礼物，我会改正态度的。
E: Alright alright, I'm just letting off some steam and rambling here. Don't take me too seriously. It's just how I am! So why don't you hold onto this? It's a little gift, and it'll get me feeling better.

C: 您说的没错。这建木生发之后，太卜司内全力运作，可以说是忙得手忙脚乱。
E: That's right. Since the Ambrosial Arbor's new growth, we've been firing on all cylinders here at the Divination Commission. Just flat out busy.

C: 好了，没什么事的话以后再聊吧，我手里还有一大堆活儿没做完呢。
E: Okay, if there's nothing else, then let's talk again later. I've still got a mountain of work to get through.

C: 听说有持明族不服管制。
E: Speaking of which, I've heard there are some Vidyadhara who refuse to comply?

C: 我若当真是个值得骄傲的父亲，那他压根就不会……
E: If I had been a father that he was proud of, he wouldn't have...

C: 我看您面色红润身手矫健，想来也没什么毛病，还是算了吧。
E: You look full of life and vigor. There's nothing wrong with you, so don't worry about it.

C: 阁下是域外来的贵客，机缘巧合下也成了景元的特使，罗浮上上下下都会给足您面子。
E: You are a distinguished guest from beyond the sky who became a special envoy to General Jing Yuan by sheer serendipity. You'll be accorded dignity all over the Luofu.

C: 我是驻扎在丹鼎司洞天，专为持明族提供蜕生陪伴业务的管理者。凡是族内有自觉行将转世的同胞，向龙师们禀报后，在各处浮岛上找到像我这样的人，就能准备入海蜕生。
E: I'm the manager assigned to the Alchemy Commission delve to provide hatching rebirth assistance for the Vidyadhara. Whenever one of our race volunteers to undergo hatching rebirth, they can report to the Preceptors before coming to someone like me on the floating isles, then get ready to submerge into the waters for hatching rebirth.

C: 大多数人蜕生前都不愿放手的东西，多半跟他们自己的人生经历有关。都是些旧情难忘的小物件：什么定情的挂坠、老友的书信、或是自己的作品……
E: Most things people are unwilling to part ways with are connected to experiences from their life. It's really all just small sentimental trinkets: Engraved love pendants, letters from old friends, or even works they've personally created...

C: 你多保重，再见。
E: Take care and goodbye.

C: 这到底是怎么回事啊？
E: What exactly is going on?

C: 丹枢大人她真是…世事难料啊……
E: About Lady Dan Shu... Life truly is unpredictable...

C: 那我继续越狱了。
E: Then I'll get back to my jailbreaking.

C: 他们建木受灾还得靠太卜司协助做清算，这说明我们之间关系还是挺好的。
E: We helped them to calculate the damage after the Ambrosial Arbor disaster. This shows that our relationship is fine.

C: …呃？你是慕名而来的游客吗？这种地方到底有什么好逛的…还是说你是来咨询的？
E: ...Huh? Another tourist lured in by those ads? What's so great about this rundown alley anyways... Or are you here to ask something?

C: 而剩下的商户在我看来，都是些卖破烂的…关于这点，我的想法没有变。
E: But, to be honest, the other merchants here are just selling junk. My opinion on that hasn't changed a bit.

C: 你要是缺钱想找事做，你可以来跟我混。
E: If you're having a case of empty pockets, then you can come and hang with me.

C: …我听说仙舟罗浮的街头治安状况良好，原来是我有些误会。
E: ...I've heard the Luofu streets are pretty safe, but now it seems I was mistaken.

C: 听说燕翠师傅身手了得？
E: I heard you're a skilled fighter, Master Yancui?

C: 我要购物！
E: I want to buy something!

C: 我想问…
E: I'd like to ask...

C: 让我连线，我现在就要连线。
E: I love planning stuff. I wanna do it now!

C: 客户群吧，还是以前那批固定班底，没怎么扩展。反倒是货源越来越丰富了。
E: My customer base pretty much stays the same, but the sources of my goods have become more diverse.

C: 没什么事，下次见。
E: That's all. See you next time.

C: 我想和你随便聊聊。
E: I'm just here for a casual chat.

C: 好得很，这都是因为你和素裳姑娘的努力。要是没有你们，我这金人巷啊…还真不知道会何去何从呢。
E: I'm doing great because of you and Sushang. Without you two, who knew what would happen to our Aurum Alley?

C: 又和您见面了。希望我的音乐也能让你感觉到内心平静。
E: Hello again. I hope my music will soothe your mind.

C: 美中不足就是有些客人，也不知道是什么地方来的，特别不守我这的规矩…我赶他走，他还不乐意，我还落埋怨。心累啊。
E: The downside is, there are customers who don't follow the rules here, and I don't even know where they come from... When I ask them to leave, they become upset and start complaining. I'm tired of things like that.

C: 没其他事了，你去忙吧。
E: That's all from me. I'll leave you to work then.

C: 你想在神策府里见到我，可以同青镞预约。商定时间，我便会出现。
E: If you want to see me here, you can schedule an appointment with Qingzu. I'll show up at the agreed time.

C: 将军说，心有不甘是件好事，能督促我继续精进武艺…下次见面的时候，彦卿的剑术一定会有进展的！
E: The general told me it was good to feel defeated, as it could motivate me to keep honing my skills. I'm sure I'll become a better swordsman the next time we meet!

C: 是你呀，本姑娘还在这里听西衍先生的新话本呢…他讲的「云上五骁」和我小时候听说的还不一样，不会是又在添油加醋吧？
E: Oh, it's you! I was just listening to the new story by Mr. Xiyan about the High-Cloud Quintet... It's different from the version I heard when I was little. He doesn't make up the extra details, does he?

C: 啊，不是「费眼」吗？感觉读音都差不多，你理解下我是什么意思就行——反正就是夸你有眼光。
E: What!? "Talon," "Talent"? They sound the same to me, though. Anyway, it's fine as long as you get what I mean — I was just trying to give you a compliment for your good taste.

C: 我该走了。
E: I've got to go.

C: 「我们」是合众、是大群、是信息体集群、是集合了十万七千三百三十六个信息体的矩阵。
E: We are Unity. A collective, a data cluster, a matrix comprised of <unbreak>107,336</unbreak> data entities.

C: 这是好事还是坏事呢？总感觉，最近翘家游玩不像过去那么刺激痛快了…唉。
E: Is that a good sign or a bad sign? Sneaking out for fun seems less of a thrill now than before... *sigh*.

C: 感谢你诚恳的建议，可憎的有机体。但放弃从不是「我们」的选择。
E: We appreciate your advice, loathsome organic lifeform, but giving up is not a choice.

C: 汝为何不笑？
E: Why aren't you laughing?

C: 十王司还会留在绥园里吗？
E: Will the Ten-Lords Commission remain in Fyxestroll Garden?

C: 我该走了。
E: I've got to go.

C: 好啊，聊点什么呢？
E: Great. What do you want to talk about?

C: 所以，十王司必须保证自己的独立性和纯洁性。任何和表层社会之间的利益关系，都可能构成动摇联盟的巨大隐患。
E: Hence, the Ten-Lords Commission must remain independent and clean. Any benefits established between the commission and functional society can pose a potential risk that will destabilize the Alliance.

C: 请问有什么事吗？
E: How can I help you?

C: 这不是抄袭那个…
E: Isn't that plagiarism...

C: 不过嘛，亲亲要是用过了玉兆就明白了，「虽然小贵，但是很好用」。
E: However, once you use a jade abacus, you'll get what I mean, cutie pie. "Just a bit expensive, but extremely useful."

C: 哈哈哈哈，一见面我就知道客人慧眼如炬，小店也不便卖弄了。
E: Hahaha, I knew at a glance you had a keen eye. I shall refrain from my shenanigans then.

C: 他说将这把枪瞄准目标曾驻足的地方，扣动扳机，能跨越光阴一枪击杀猎物。
E: He said that if you aim this gun where the target once was and pull the trigger, you could traverse time and kill your target with a single shot.

C: 势利交怀势利心，斯文谁复念知音。台上说书台下友，结缘便值万两金。
E: Snobs they come and snobs they go, and good friends and manners are hard to come by. A storyteller on stage and a friend below, an acquaintance is worth more than thousands of gold.

C: 咱们得先讲到幽囚狱，这一天，关押了一名异星来客，因为当街击杀了七八名云骑士兵，作为重犯被押至牢狱深处。
E: We must first speak of the Shackling Prison. On this day, a visitor from another star was jailed for slaying seven or eight Cloud Knights Soldiers, and was thrown into the depths of the prison for this heinous crime.

C: 这个过程里，有任何一步不满意，我都不会上菜。这也是为什么「至味盛苑」没有菜单，一天只能接待一桌客人。
E: Any step that's not up to snuff in this process, and I'll dump the dish entirely. This is also why the Garden of Gourmet has no menu — we only serve one table a day.

C: 哎！那边那个！聊两句差不多得了。
E: Hey! Over there! That's enough talk.

C: 什么叫有点儿风，这风可大了，整整刮了一宿啊！
E: What do you mean by "just a little wind" — it was gale force, and it kept on blowing for the whole night!

C: 跟我聊聊神仙姐姐吧。
E: Tell me about this celestial lady.

C: 村里人都觉得神仙姐姐漂亮可亲，就是脑袋有些问题。刚到村子里的时候，她连句整话都说不利索。当时村子里读书最多的长老给她起了个名儿……
E: Everyone thought the celestial lady was beautiful and nice, but there was something wrong with her head. When she first arrived, she couldn't even talk in a complete sentence. The most well-read elder gave her a name...

C: 聊天？好啊，我正好歇歇脑子。况且和仙舟上不同的人聊天也算是我研究的一部分。
E: Chat? Alright, I can use a break now anyway. Besides, chatting with different people aboard Xianzhou also forms part of my research.

C: 没别的事了，你忙吧。
E: That's all, I can see you're busy.

C: 嗯，我们各忙各的去吧。如果你看到了什么有趣的历史遗存，记得通知我一声。
E: Yes, let us part ways here. If you see any interesting historical relics, give me a holler.

C: 你平时都做些什么？
E: What do you usually get up to around here?

C: 您好…哦，我记得您。这次您预约了寄件吗？
E: Oh, hi... I remember you. Have you booked a delivery with us?

C: 平时的工作很忙吗？
E: Do you get very busy at work?

C: …仔细想想，这些事情凌解真的都经历过吗？春分也不是很明白。
E: ...Hmmm, now that I think about it, did Ling Jie really experience all of these things? I'm not really too sure.

C: 我没事了，你好好玩吧。
E: I'm good. You have fun!

C: 你知道我是驭空大人的秘书吧，负责好看也是我在天舶司的工作内容之一。
E: You know I am Madam Yukong's secretary, yes? Looking good is also part of my job in the Sky-Faring Commission.

C: 「景元将军钦点的大善人」？
E: "General Jing Yuan's appointed savior"?

C: 好像…也许可以理解？
E: Maybe...?

C: 水坝？
E: The dam?

C: 领导派我来的呗。
E: Boss' orders.

C: 你这水果保甜吗？
E: Is your fruit sweet?

C: 完全不知道，别问我……
E: Not at all. Don't ask me about it...

C: 那请你假装自己是当事人，拜托了……
E: Oh... Then can you pretend that you were involved in it? Please...!

C: 后来我接了一篇关于赌拳赛打假拳的报道。我没采访到参与者，就把打假拳的过程杜撰了一下，结果反倒大受好评。
E: Later, I took on a gig pursuing a lead about betting on fixed boxing matches. I couldn't score any interviews with the parties involved, so I cooked up a story about the match-fixing process. Guess what? People just lapped it up!

C: 见过？我估计这里顶着羊角的人也没有第二个了，我怎么没遇到过。
E: You have? I doubt there's a second person with a ram's horn stuck on their head, but I haven't seen him.

C: 我们赞助了本次演武仪典。
E: So we're sponsoring the Wardance this time.

C: 没关系，朋友，无限制格斗的大门永远会为你敞开。
E: Don't worry, my friend. The doors of the Lawless Brawl are always open to you.

C: 你不是来释放我的，你只是来这儿浪费身为短生种宝贵的光阴。
E: You're not here to release me, are you? You just want to waste that precious short-life species time of yours.

C: 别唠叨了。
E: Shut up.

C: 我还行，你还好吗？
E: Pretty good. Yourself?

C: {F#小姑娘}{M#小子}你别走啊！
E: Hey! Don't go, {F#m'girl}{M#boy}!

C: 我逃出来的时候，有阵子附在一个从来不出门的家伙身上，这家伙不是在网络上挑衅别人，就是威胁着要把对方真实身份开了盒……
E: When I escaped, I took possession for a while of this guy who never went outside. If he wasn't flaming people online, he was threatening to dox others...

C: 真希望你能活久一些，见证我的复仇啊，小虫子。
E: I truly hope you can live long enough to witness my revenge, you tiny gnat.

C: 真是的，现在的人还真是少见多怪。公共场合的木人桩能有什么恶心的？
E: Honestly, people are so easily shook nowadays. What's so disgusting about a wooden dummy in a public area?

C: 总之少在外面乱晃！
E: In short, stop lurking about outside!

C: 建木，好大——
E: The Ambrosial Arbor... It's massive...

C: 我好想爬上去看看。
E: I wanna climb up and see the view.

C: 发了全司道歉信！
E: Issue a letter of apology to the entire company!

C: 虽然不好吃但是能拍照…
E: It tastes awful, but it looks good in the photo...

C: 几个包子就吃饱。
E: The buns are huge — just a few and you'll be full!

C: 看看这些*仙舟粗语*小吃…
E: Look at these *Xianzhou profanity* snacks...

C: 黄岐解毒丸，拘挛复原丸…
E: Health Detox Pill, Spasm Recovery Pill...

C: 丹鼎司要一直戒备下去？
E: Is the Alchemy Commission gonna be under watch forever?

C: 你们店里那个伙计不在？
E: Is that guy working today?

C: 她提前发作了魔阴身…
E: She had an early-onset mara attack...

C: 够了啊，你这一天叹了多少次气了。我说你年纪轻轻的，叹什么气啊？
E: That's enough sighing for one day. Why are you sighing at such a young age?

C: 金人看不见的视线扫过了你，你感到毛发耸立。
E: The aurumaton's invisible gaze sweeps over you. You can feel your hairs stand up on end.

C: 我的家人都叫我宝宝。
E: My family calls me baby.

C: 等急了么？晚饭马上就好。
E: Getting impatient? Dinner's almost ready.

C: 就从黎明机器的惊天骗局开始？
E: Shall we start with the Dawn Device's mind-blowing scam?

C: 别操心啦，奶奶。那帮家伙，连碰到我衣角的能耐都没有~
E: Don't worry, granny. Those guys don't even have what it takes to touch the hem of my clothes~

C: 哈哈，多亏了你。如果不是你肩负起这份重任，我恐怕还在绝境里徒劳徘徊吧？
E: Haha, all thanks to you. If you hadn't shouldered this burden, I'd probably still be wandering aimlessly in desperation, wouldn't I?

C: 「凯撒」下棋没输过，老友的纠结也没停过。
E: The Imperator has never lost a game of chess, and her old friend has never stopped fretting either.

C: 有结识新的人类朋友吗？
E: Have you made any new human friends?

C: 神血蜜露，你应该还记得它的味道。不记得也没关系，我可以帮你回忆起来。
E: The Dew of Divine Blood, you should still remember its taste. Though, it's fine if you don't, I can help you recall it.

C: 干杯，小灰鱼儿。
E: Cheers, Little Gray Fry.

C: 希望铭记的东西…呀，看灰宝期盼的表情，是想要翁法罗斯纪念品，对吧？
E: Something to remember...? Oh, judging by Grayie's eager expression, you want an Amphoreus souvenir, right?

C: 近一点。
E: Closer.

C: 看你们这狼狈的样子，不会也是被门口的黄牛带进来的吧？
E: Were you two brought here by the scalper at the front door too?

C: 听着好怪。
E: Sounds so odd.

C: 没注意一学期是十八年…
E: Didn't realize one semester is <unbreak>18</unbreak> years though...

C: 演武仪典周边贩售！
E: Wardance merch sales!

C: 重犯呼雷的囚室，哪怕是石头的孔洞和缝隙里，也残存着难以消除的血腥味。
E: The cell of the criminal, Hoolay. From the cracks and holes in the stones, a lingering stench of blood remains, its presence nigh impossible to remove.

C: 合成兽。
E: A chimera.

C: 颓废的巨人。
E: The decadent giant.

C: 这符合科学吗？
E: Is this even scientifically possible?

C: 四角方正的硬质屏幕，因此得名「四方览镜」，不过是民用版。仙舟语言真的很好懂。
E: The Foursquare Mirror, which is the civilian version, is named after its screen in square shape. The Xianzhou dialect is very easy to understand.

C: 跪缚的囚徒。
E: The bound convict.

C: 你打开卷轴，看到其中的仙舟文字飘逸如画。这很有可能是仙舟民常说的「书法」作品，但是数字化产物。
E: You open the scroll and find Xianzhou words written in artistic style inside. It is likely to be a work of calligraphy, as the Xianzhou citizens often call it, but it is in digital form.

C: 你好你好，我总感觉有人藏在这里，能拜托你找一下吗？
E: Hello, hello. I keep getting the feeling that someone's hiding here. Can you help me find that person?

C: 你看看，明眼人就是这样的。
E: There, the bright-eyed stranger has spoken.

C: 没错没错，不仅要滚出竞锋舰，他们应该滚出仙舟，应该坐牢！
E: Yeah! Not just that, they should get out of the Xianzhou too, and be arrested!

C: （枘凿六合，哎……）
E: (Hexanexus... *sigh*...)

C: 动作不到位，达不到效果的。
E: Your stance is off, and that won't get you anywhere.

C: 你不是说稳赢么？输啦！
E: Didn't you say it was a guaranteed win? It's an L!

C: 这是大喜的日子，你们不许哭！
E: Today is a joyous day, so stop your tears!

C: 一艘小型货运星槎，看起来要比通常的星槎笨重许多。
E: A small freight starskiff that looks way bulkier than a normal starskiff.

C: 有棱有角的玉兆晶石，是大衍穷观阵的重要组分。
E: The angular jade abacus crystal is a key component of the Matrix of Prescience Ultima.

C: 金人设计大赛的宣传画。看来工造司的工作时间一定不饱和。
E: It is the poster for the Aurumaton Design Competition. It seems like those working at the Artisanship Commission have quite a lot of free time.

C: 「受步离人的蛊惑，慧骃族常常担任其冲锋时的先驱，身着生物外骨骼装甲，能在冲撞间轻易击杀敌人。」
E: "Houyhnhnms are often induced by the borisin into acting as the forerunners at the frontline. They can kill enemies easily by ramming into them with their exoskeleton armor."

C: 「岁阳一族为不定形的纯能量生物，充满恶意，极为致命。其记录上可追溯至仙舟漂泊的『孤航时代』。岁阳降临仙舟，引发了『夺舍之祸』的一系列灾难。」
E: "Heliobi are shapeless creatures formed of pure energy. The history of this hostile and deadly creature can be traced back to the 'Lone Voyage Era' when Xianzhou was still wandering around. The arrival of heliobi in Xianzhou has triggered the 'Possession Tragedy.'"

C: 你信手抽出了其中一枚卷轴。展开时，一个丝绢质感的合成声音自你脑内成形。
E: You pull out a random scroll. When you open it, a synthetic voice as smooth as silk forms in your mind.

C: 你信手抽出其中一枚卷轴。展开时，一个丝绢质感的合成声音自你脑内成形。
E: You pull out a random scroll. When you open it, a synthetic voice as smooth as silk forms in your mind.

C: 「在被摧毁的瞬间，这些军团造物都会迸发出激烈的逆火，将敌人一同拖入湮灭。」
E: "When destroyed, these creations of the legion will implode with an intense backfire, dragging their enemies along with them to their destruction."

C: 其实宣传栏上的内容能够解决人们<unbreak>90%</unbreak>的问题，但从来没有人仔细阅读过它。
E: The content on the bulletin board can solve ninety percent of the problems faced by the citizens, but no one has ever taken the time to read them.

C: 假期打算怎么过？
E: What are your plans for the holidays?

C: …你怎么不去抢啊！
E: This is no better than daylight robbery!

C: 素雅的宣传画，若不仔细看会以为是某种新式瓷器的宣传广告。
E: The poster is simple yet tasteful. If you don't look at it closely, you will assume it to be an advertisement for the launch of a new type of porcelain.

C: 这页介绍了名为仙舟坠子的曲艺形式。
E: This page introduces the folk art called Xianzhou Chordophone.

C: 棱角分明的新鲜水果，牙口不好的吃不得。
E: Fresh fruit with distinct edges. Those with weak teeth should stay away from it.

C: 你将手点在蚌珠色泽的卵壳上，听到一个又一个音阶波动。宫、商、角、徵、羽…流水般的乐声涌入你心头……
E: You tap on the pearl-colored eggshell and hear the sounds of different notes. Do, re, mi, fa, so... Music, like flowing water, pours into your heart...

C: 你突然回忆起自己谱下的曲子，你为它起名「饮月垂虹」。那是你目睹龙尊丹枫唤得鳞渊潮动的奇景，以此为灵感写下的曲子。
E: Suddenly, you recall the song you composed and called "Lunae Arcus." You were inspired to write this song after witnessing the high elder Dan Feng being able to command the waves in Scalegorge Waterscape.

C: 它当然倒映不出你的身影，因为你是罗浮最好的魔术师，而这正是你最得意的把戏。在镜子前使自己的倒影隐形——全银河只有你能做到这件事。
E: Of course, the mirror cannot show your reflection, because you are the greatest magician on the Luofu. This is the trick on which you pride. You are the only one in the cosmos who can make your reflection invisible in a mirror.

C: 你通知了地衡司。他们对此相当重视。
E: You inform the Realm-Keeping Commission and they take this report seriously.

C: 是新组建的乐队？
E: They're a newly-formed band?

C: 好不容易挤到了前排…
E: And I finally managed to squeeze my way to the front row too...

C: 「而那些对箱中财物出手的人，也无一例外遭到了厄运。」
E: "Whereas those who attempt to poach the treasures inside the boxes will, without exception, meet their doom."

C: 换言之，这并不是「几个空箱子」而是「一个奇形怪状的空箱子」。
E: In other words, they are not just "a few empty boxes." They are "a strangely-shaped empty box."

C: 那我不做岁阳了！
E: So, then I don't wanna be a heliobus!

C: 那时候的口感特别好。
E: They taste so good during those times.

C: 在某些星球上，曾经有一对父子在暴风雨天气中外出，利用风筝将雷电装进了储存静电的容器之中，他们获得了无数名誉——可是风筝得到了什么。
E: On a certain planet, a father-son duo went out on a stormy day and used a kite to contain lightning in a vessel for storing static electricity. As such, they gained a remarkable reputation — but what did the kite gain?

C: 有人说所有礼物背后都已经标好了价格。对这间房而言，价格或许是「浪漫」。
E: People often say that there is a price behind every gift. When it comes to this room, perhaps the price is "romance."

C: 那也不代表你可以在偶像直播中搓脚皮！
E: But that doesn't mean you're free to rub the skin from your feet during the live stream!

C: 你凑近望远镜，未曾想城市的灯火昏花了你的眼睛，你感到心神缭乱、头晕目眩…你终于明白——这叫光污染。
E: You get close to the binoculars, not expecting the city lights to be so blinding. You feel dizzy and lightheaded... You finally understand — this is light pollution.

C: 威武的鸟类雕像，或许是梦境的某种象征。
E: A majestic statue of a bird. Perhaps it's a symbol of the Dreamscape.

C: 现在？你怕不是在开玩笑吧？
E: Now? You must be kidding me, right?

C: 「该死的重力！」飞得最低的那把椅子说。
E: "Darn gravity!" says the chair that's flying the lowest.

C: 猎犬的姿态与卡通动画中的哈努兄弟有几分神似——沉默寡言，恪尽职守——每一匹狼在被驯化之后都能获得如此可贵的品格。
E: The Hound's posture resembles that of Hanu from a cartoon — silent and loyal, a characteristic belonging to domesticated wolves.

C: 这是可以说的吗？
E: Is that something you can divulge?

C: 这种心情很难描述，失望、悲哀、恼怒…太多情绪搅混在一起，就像被随意倒进锅里的、不同口味的糖浆……
E: It's hard to describe the feeling. Disappointment, misery, anger... Too many emotions are mixed together, just like syrup of different flavors being randomly poured into a cauldron...

C: 呼，和你聊天真开心，好久没人仔细听我说话了。我要给你颁发我制作的证书，称号就叫…就叫——”笨罐之友“！怎么样，是不是特气派！
E: Phew, it was fun talking to you. It's been a long time since anyone really listened to me so earnestly. I hereby award you with a certificate I created. It's called... Let's just call it "Piggy Bank's Friend"! How's that for a stylish name!

C: 给你，都给你…喜欢苏乐达的人，肯定不是坏人。
E: Take it, all of it... Someone who likes soda can't be a bad egg.

C: 抱歉，这个笑话很有趣——但我宁愿相信钟表小子真实存在。
E: Sorry, it's a funny joke, but I'd rather believe that Clockie really exists.

C: 明知梦境会破灭，却始终不愿迎接现实的阳光……
E: Knowing that dreams will get crushed, yet still welcoming the blinding rays of reality with open arms...

C: 那么，您希望获悉和这个梦境有关的真相吗？
E: Then, you wish to obtain the truth to this Dreamscape?

C: 让做梦的人看清楚，这繁华背后究竟有多不堪！
E: I'll show those Dreamweavers the ugly truth behind all this wealth!

C: 这里是皮皮西人专属的俱乐部！比我高的生物一律不得入内！
E: This is an exclusive club for Pepeshi only! No creature taller than me may enter!

C: 抢在切诺说出对皮皮西人的第五句赞美之前，你赶紧逃开了。
E: You quickly run off before Cielo can finish saying her fifth line proselytizing the greatness of the Pepeshi people.

C: 我是未成年人，我要退款！
E: I'm a minor. I want a refund!

C: 可以，但不许涉及敏感话题。
E: Sure, but no sensitive topics.

C: ——然后又要让这嗓疾夺走我的音律，让我不得不放弃我人生中唯一热爱的东西…颂歌神啊，你何等残酷……
E: ...and then let this illness take away my melody, forcing me to give up the one thing I've ever loved in my life... O god of serenades, how cruel you are...

C: 但并非所有道具都能成为「美梦剧团」——为了确保每名客人都能得到最好的梦境体验，只有最惹人喜爱的物件才会被家族改造。
E: However, not all props can become part of the Sweet Dreams Troupe. To ensure only the best Dreamscape can be experienced by our customers, only loveable items will be remodeled by The Family.

C: 咳…好吧，我承认训练活动的观感可能有些不尽人意。
E: Ahem... fine. I admit that the training routine may not be acceptable to some.

C: 有点怪异。
E: It's weird.

C: （一口吃掉脆筒）
E: (Eat the cone in one bite)

C: 那只破手套，已经过去六个月了，连个瓶盖都捡不起来！
E: That tattered glove can't even pick up a bottle cap after six months of training!

C: 我想…我大概这辈子都成不了像他那样的人吧。
E: I think... I can never be a person like him.

C: 不对，它、它从来都不是我的父亲！它怎么会是我的父亲……
E: No. I—It's never my dad to begin with! How can he be my dad...

C: …得意？应该没有那样的作品。
E: ...My favorite? I don't think there is.

C: 他说：「虽然我打不到你的脸，但你会主动弯腰给我打的，对吧？」
E: He said, "While I'm not tall enough to punch you in the face, you will voluntarily bend over and let me punch you, won't you?"

C: 钢琴家嘴角含笑、恣意轻松；被齐声合奏的乐器们环绕、拥簇其中。
E: The pianist appears serene and content, enveloped by the harmonious music of the instruments.

C: 你说这么大个匹诺康尼，就真连个贸易蓝海都没有？
E: Is there truly no room for new trade products in such a vast market like Penacony's?

C: 先聊到这吧。
E: That's enough chit-chat for now.

C: 金钱当然是万能的……
E: Money is omnipotent of course...

C: 朋友，任何一名演奏家都会对这种东西感到愤怒的——他们就是一群亵渎音符的破铜烂铁，只会进行没有灵魂的演奏。
E: My friend, any virtuoso would be outraged by this — nothing more than scrap metal desecrating the art of sound and playing soulless music.

C: 别急嘛，我正要给你呢。
E: What's the hurry! I was just about to give it to you!

C: 仿佛播碟机切到了一张劲爆的专辑，丹西的脸突然换上了一副激动的表情。
E: Dancy's expression suddenly became super excited, as if a CD player had suddenly started blasting a power ballad.

C: 其实原本我只是来这里采风的，可很快却发现，这里的动漫产业和我理解中的完全不同。
E: I actually originally came just to perform interviews, but I quickly realized that the anime industry here was completely different to how I had understood it to be.

C: 看来你听到了我的自言自语，真是羞愧。
E: I see you've overheard me talking to myself. How embarrassing.

C: 呃…啊哈哈，那就祝您有美好的一天吧。
E: Well... Ahaha, well then, have a pleasant day.

C: 闹了半天，你连规则都不懂？
E: Hold up, you don't even know the rules?

C: 欢迎光临梦境贩售店，爱德华医生竭诚为您服务！
E: Welcome to Dreamscape Sales Store! Dr. Edward at your service!

C: 你这里的梦都是哪来的？
E: Where did you get your dreams?

C: 我是辆车，而你是个人类，你的任务是让我的内部熊熊燃烧，我的职责就是让你体验在空中飞驰的感觉。嗯…不觉得这样的双向奔赴，很浪漫吗？
E: I'm a car, and you're a human. While you're responsible for keeping the combustion inside me going, I'm in charge of offering you a flying experience. Hmm... Doesn't this sound like a romantic love story?

C: 这是你赠送给我的吗？
E: Is this a gift for me?

C: 还是不换了吧。
E: I'll stick with you then.

C: 没问题！无论何时，无论要去往哪里，我都会帮你顺利抵达！
E: No problem! No matter the place, I'll ensure that you reach there on time!

C: 你没见到过吗？没关系，只要<color=#dbc291ff>在梦境的世界里勤加探索</color>，你迟早会拿到它的！
E: Haven't you come across it? It doesn't matter. You'll get one sooner or later by <color=#dbc291ff>exploring the Dreamscape</color> more frequently!

C: 哦，顺带一提，你在美梦小镇一般的商店里是不能用「金表钞」买东西的喔！如果你擅自把那种钞票掏出来，指不定还会被人盯上！
E: For your information, you can't use Clock Credits to buy stuff in regular stores in Dreamville! You might even get yourself targeted by pickpockets if you try using them in public!

C: 刚刚真是失礼了——您是「家族」的贵客，请向里走吧！会有人来接待您的。
E: I can only apologize for my rudeness before — As a VIP guest of The Family, please enter! Someone will be along to greet you shortly.
