E: White linen, please.

C: 请稍安勿躁，您点的这道「古典拼盘」是奥赫玛的传统美食，历史上人们在食用这道菜时，为了能充分享受其美味，都会按照……
E: Please calm down. This "Classical Platter" you ordered is a traditional Okhema dish. Historically, to fully appreciate its flavors, people used to follow...

C: 这个嘛，「躺食」其实是奥赫玛的一种传统习俗。在遥远的黄金世，人们曾认为侧躺在椅子上进食，能够更好地与大地泰坦产生共鸣。
E: Well, "reclining dining" is actually an old tradition here in Okhema. Back in the ancient Era Chrysea, people believed that reclining on chairs while dining helped them resonate with the Earth Titan.

C: 你久久沉醉于这美妙口感带来的享受中，难以自拔。
E: Engrossed in the wonderful flavors, you relish each and every bite.

C: 你狠狠吃了个爽。
E: You dig in and enjoy it to your heart's content.

C: 眼前一黑。
E: Everything goes black.

C: 土不了，亻尔感至刂自己的手止不亻主土地在亶页扌斗，这木不秘酉良的后劲非常弓虽力，你已经彳切底认不氵青这些歹衣刂开的字了，救求攵……
E: Wait, your haaaands moooove on their own, as if not en tirely under your control. The am bro sia's aftereffects are ki cking in hard, leaving you disori ented. The words before you are nothing more than a jum ble, their mea ning slipping through your fin gers...

C: 那我就先离开了。对了，懂事的小奇美拉可千万不要碰「法吉娜盲盒」哟。
E: Well, I'll leave you to it. By the way, a wise little chimera should definitely not drink the "Phagousa Blind Box."

C: 它一定存在着什么隐藏效果！
E: There must be some hidden effect here!

C: 抽卡运气能不能再好一些？我{F#大姐}{M#大哥}问你话呢。
E: Can {F#she}{M#he} get some better luck in the pulls? You heard {F#her}{M#him}.

C: 这种蜜果原本已经随着城邦的覆灭而绝迹多年，但三年前有支探险队成功深入麦迪特瑞恩城的废墟，带回了尚未腐烂的枯种。
E: This fig had been extinct for years after that city's fall, but three years ago, an expedition braved the ruins of Mediterrana and retrieved withered seeds that hadn't rotted.

C: 问问他们怎么聚会。
E: Ask about how they have gatherings.

C: 你都知道什么诗歌？
E: What kinds of poetry are you familiar with?

C: 那当然啦，利波还出版过自己的诗集呢！不仅如此，承蒙恩师的教导，利波还会用泰坦语写诗呢！这可不是谁都能做到的哦~
E: Certainly! I've even penned my own collection of poems. Under my mentor's tutelage, I even ventured into crafting poetry in Titan language! Quite the extraordinary feat, if I may say so myself!

C: 举手！想更了解缇安一些！
E: I'd like to get to know a bit more about Trianne!

C: 我还好，我只是…有点头疼…过去的事有点模糊不清，我再想想……
E: I'm okay. I just... My head hurts... The past is a blur. Give me a moment...

C: 奥赫玛真繁荣啊。
E: Okhema truly is prosperous.

C: 你、你到底想不想做生意了？！
E: D—Do you want my business or not!?

C: 其实，您别看我对奥赫玛感觉各种不习惯、不适应…但在这个很多城邦都自身难保的年代，人家愿意收留我们，那已经是最大的善意了。
E: Actually, please don't think I'm not used to or well-suited to Okhema... In this day and age of cities struggling to protect themselves, being willing to take someone else in is the greatest kindness you could show a fellow person.

C: 算了算了，不说这些了，天塌了总归有黄金裔顶着呢。我还是继续想办法推进研究吧，现在在这儿一个劲地瞎操心也没用。
E: Forget about it, let's change the topic. If the sky fell down, there will always be Chrysos Heirs to prop it up. I had best keep pushing on with my research. There's no use worrying in vain about things now.

C: 当然。不管客人您是否真没听懂，慎重些总不会错。
E: Of course. Whether you understand or not, being cautious can never be a bad thing.

C: 曾有位异乡的客人，被法吉娜的秘酿击倒，在池中躺了几时。这个故事来源于他的梦话。
E: There was once a customer from another land who was struck down by Phagousa's ambrosia. He lay in the pool for hours. This was a story he shared when he spoke in his sleep.

C: 这话有些偏激，但我确实提倡年轻人不要被规矩束缚。所以大家都叫我「狡猾的」尤利克赛斯。
E: That's a little extreme, but I do believe that youngsters should not allow themselves to be restricted by rules. That is why everyone calls me "Ulixes the Cunning."

C: 我看不惯这种亵渎荣耀的家伙，就当面向他提出决斗，结果被他用阴招放倒了…之后非找他堂堂正正再打一场不可！
E: I'm ever-disdainful of scum who desecrate glory like him, so I confronted him to a duel, but was bested by his conniving tricks... I will be sure to seek him out for another fight in future!

C: 我已经活过了整整三轮混战…之前那斗士竟然还敢挑战我，真是不自量力。
E: I have survived three full cycles of this melee... For that gladiator to even dare challenge me is utter idiocy.

C: 吓人，我走了。
E: Creepy, I'm leaving.

C: 不不不不…我是水里的鱼，很大的鱼…很大很大…有很多秘酿，好喝的秘酿被鱼喝光了……别喝了…我的…是我的，我要……
E: Nononono... I am a fish in water, a big fish... Large, huge... So much ambrosia, tasty ambrosia all drank by the fish... Don't drink anymore... Mine... It's all mine, I want it...

C: 黄金裔们，信得过我。
E: The Chrysos Heirs, trust me, they do.

C: 聊天说话，不擅长，别在意。
E: Chat, I do not well. Worry, you should not.

C: 小姑娘们，没有武器。但是，经常见到她们。
E: Weapons, little girls have not. But often, see them I do.

C: 感觉山之民有很多故事。
E: The Mountain Dwellers sure have a lot of stories.

C: 包见到法吉娜吗？
E: I'll definitely be able to see Phagousa?

C: 好的，收你<unbreak>300</unbreak>利衡币。
E: All right, I'll take <unbreak>300</unbreak> Balance Coins.

C: 在海上…不见人形…悦耳歌声…一串关键词触发了你的防御机制，你掏出口袋里的棉花团塞住了耳朵——
E: On the sea... No one around... Pleasing song... A string of keywords triggers your defense mechanism. You take out cotton balls from your pocket and stuff your ears...

C: 每次求取神谕，命运三相殿外都会大摆筵席，就连平民也可以在外围参与，遥望圣女的庄严身姿。
E: Each time a prophecy was sought, the Temple of the Three Fates would host a grand banquet, where even civilians could gaze their eyes upon the solemn figure of the Holy Maiden from the peripheries.

C: …没有故事，只有真事。
E: ...Only truths, no stories.

C: 所以卫士，会向彼此行礼。因为，每个卫士，都很塔兰顿。
E: Guards, salute each other. Each embodies, Talanton deeply.

C: 假使有位学者生活在阿卡索斯，对这座城邦有着充分的了解，他知道城市的面积、人口、统治者、全部历史，甚至所有街道的模样。
E: Imagine there was a scholar who lived in Icatus. He has a deep understanding of the city and knows its area, population, rulers, all of its history, and even every street and road.

C: 啊？这是我该考虑的事吗？
E: Huh? Is that something I need to worry about?

C: 你奋力跃向远方，差不多跳了…<unbreak>50</unbreak>米左右吧。
E: You leap toward the distance with all your might, jumping about... <unbreak>50</unbreak> meters or so.

C: 我见过很多外乡人，也知道不少事情，但瞧瞧你——前所未见的服装样式、与众不同的言谈举止、还有……
E: I've seen a great many outsiders and know plenty of things, but judging from your novel appearance and unusual behavior, and...

C: 但我也不辞职，让他们去急。嘿嘿。
E: But I'm not resigning. Let them worry about it. Heh heh.

C: 在这奥赫玛能寻见的书，就都能在这图书馆里寻见。不是老头子我吹嘘，哪怕树庭的圣树里刻下的典籍，都不一定有这全。
E: Any book you can find in Okhema, you can find here in this repository. I'm not bragging, but even the scriptures carved into the sacred trees of the Grove may not have as complete a collection as we do here.

C: 奇美拉有什么不好吗？
E: What's wrong with a chimera?

C: 在浴场演讲不太合适吧？
E: Not very appropriate to lecture at the bath, is it?

C: 可你看看奥赫玛，泰坦的奇迹随处可见，凡人有什么资格收费？知识为什么要付费？法吉娜会对泉水收费吗？刻法勒会对光照收费吗？
E: But look at Okhema — the Titans' miracles can be seen throughout her streets. What right do mortals have to charge a fee? Why is knowledge behind a paywall? Would Phagousa charge for their springwater? Would Kephale make you pay to bask in its light?

C: 知识只会让我头疼，抱歉……
E: Knowledge only hurts my brain, sorry...

C: 我走了，你别喝太多。
E: I'm leaving. Don't drink too much.

C: 喂，出来！
E: Hey, come out!

C: 锈迹堵塞了锁眼，就再也打不开了。唉，神驹…难道就只剩我了吗？
E: The keyhole is rusted over, and it can no longer be unlocked. *sigh* O, divine foals... Am I really the only one left?

C: 「扎格列斯之手」挡在你面前，你试着推了推它，但它就和列车上的某些门一样纹丝不动。还是去找<color=#f29e38ff>操作石台</color>吧。
E: The Hand of Zagreus impedes your path. You try to push it, but it is unyielding, just like certain doors on the Express. Best that you find the <color=#f29e38ff>stone operating platform</color>.

C: 你要登台了吗？
E: Are you about to go on stage?

C: 是世界在造物世的诞生，是天空、大地、和海洋的膨胀，才把它们从这里推到了无比遥远的边境之地。
E: It was the birth of the world during the Era Creatura, the expansion of the skies, the earth, and the sea that pushed them to the distant borders where they now stand.

C: 啊，抱歉，我…我不是在反驳或是质疑您，也非常感谢您的善心！
E: Ah, sorry, I... I'm not trying to argue with you or interrogate you. I'm very grateful for your kindness!

C: 聊聊科洛埃。
E: Tell me about Clio.

C: 聊聊你自己。
E: Tell me about yourself.

C: 要是我不拿，最后不都便宜了那些祭司。圣女能留下什么呢？什么都没有！
E: If I don't take them, they'll just end up benefiting those priests. What would the Holy Maiden have left? Nothing!

C: 「为使门径璨璨生辉，继任者将息心隐居，免受叨扰」——那是前前前代圣女踏上朝圣之旅后的第一条神谕，数百个光历年前，由命运三相殿的祭司代为传达。
E: "To keep the passage radiant, the successor must live in seclusion, undisturbed." This was the first prophecy issued centuries ago by the Holy Maiden countless generations ago, conveyed through the priests of the Temple of the Three Fates hundreds of Light Calendar years ago.

C: 最近对你的印象有改变！
E: Lately, my impression of you has changed.

C: 叫两声给我听听？
E: How about you bark a few times for me?

C: 其实我也是外乡人。
E: Actually, I am an outworlder, too.

C: 我曾经与你们一样，你们终将与我一样。
E: Tu fui, ego eris.

C: 直到，塞纳托斯，因嫉妒他的功绩，将他逐出了这行。
E: Until Thanatos, jealous of his achievements, drove him out of the business.

C: 我没什么想问的了。
E: That's all I wanted to ask.

C: 哦？你提醒我了，说不定是有的…有空我去问问看。
E: Oh? You make a fair point, that may be true... I shall ask when I have the chance.

C: 算了，来都来了，就让我们继续履行职责吧。记得好像是捉虫之类的……
E: Never mind. Since I'm here, let's continue our duties. I think it's something about catching bugs...

C: {NICKNAME}{F#女士}{M#先生}，你还记得缇宝大人的口头禅吗？
E: {F#Miss}{M#Mister} {NICKNAME}, do you recall Lord Tribbie's favorite saying?

C: 你怎么看待「再创世」？
E: What do you think about the "Era Nova"?

C: 不过，乐曲虽会不断反复，但每一次演奏，每一次移调、变奏，都会来带新的乐章。
E: However, though music repeats itself, each performance, each key change and variation creates new movements.

C: 有人发疯，冲了出去。佩特拉，去救人，却倒下了。
E: Some went mad, ran outside. Petros went to rescue them, but fell.

C: 发生什么了？
E: What happened?

C: 想不到情况竟然严峻到了这种地步…幸好卫士们反应迅速，否则我带的那些麻布怕是不够用呢。
E: I never imagined the situation had become this severe... Fortunately, the guards reacted quickly. Otherwise, the cloth I brought wouldn't have been nearly enough.

C: 每当有人问我：希瑞雅，希瑞雅，这样的日子什么时候是个头，我们到底要怎么办？我就说：安心等待就好啦，刻法勒一定会回应我们的信仰。
E: When they ask "Serena, Serena, when will this end? What should we do?" I say: "Wait peacefully – Kephale will answer our faith."

C: 他自己？
E: Ourselves?

C: 来不及休息，来不及疗伤，不断看着身边的伙伴倒下，却无法收殓遗体。可是黑潮永无休止——
E: There's no time to rest or tend to our wounds. We watch our friends fall, unable even to retrieve their bodies. And still the black tide continues relentlessly—

C: 甚至，你能在其中看到刚刚倒下的伙伴的面影。
E: The worst part? Sometimes you recognize the faces of your fallen comrades among these creatures.

C: 不过，我理解。能力越大责任越大，我应当背负的责任，实在是太沉重了！
E: But I get it. With great power comes great responsibility, and the burden I must shoulder is truly tremendous!

C: 我会的。
E: Sure thing.

C: 我想你应该知道，勇气和莽撞是两回事。
E: I think you should know that courage and recklessness are two different things.

C: 嗯…有位织者蒙受召唤。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>描绘着多目的盲者的壁画上</color>，等待聆听凯旋的消息呢。
E: Hmm... There is a weaver who's been summoned. The golden thread brings tidings: They are on <color=#dbc291ff>the mural of the many-eyed blind one</color>, awaiting the sound of triumph.

C: 嗯…有位织者笃信宿命。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>石柱上</color>，等待命定之人找到它呢。
E: Hmm... There is a weaver who believes in destiny. The golden thread brings tidings: They are <color=#dbc291ff>on a stone pillar</color>, waiting to be found by the destined person.

C: 我找齐了这里的所有若虫。
E: I've found all the nymphs here.

C: 好舒服的风呀，真希望生活每天都能像海面一样平静。
E: Wow, the breeze is so pleasant! I wish every day was as peaceful as the surface of the sea.

C: 注意动作和节拍迷~
E: Mind the moves and rhythm, memi~

C: 我本来要找他好好说道说道，但那小子今天一大早就不见人，准是知道我要揍他，提前躲出去了。
E: I was about to have a real talk with him, but to my surprise, he vanished first thing this morning. Must've known what was coming and ran off early.

C: 哟，老妈。我回来了。
E: Hey, mom. I'm home.

C: 还是老样子，一刻不抓，上房揭瓦。就连我最近没收的小玩具，也比白厄那个时候花样多多了——
E: Same as always — turn your back, and they're climbing the curtains. Even the toys I've confiscated lately are way more creative than in Phainon's time.

C: 「咪」！最庄重、最神圣的音符！
E: "Mi"! The most solemn, the most sacred note of all!

C: 我其实想荡秋千…
E: I actually wanted to try the swing...

C: 一时没什么想法呢…有了，不如随性些，四处看看吧？
E: Hmm, I'm drawing a blank right now... Oh, I know! How about we take a walk and see where spontaneity leads us?

C: 嘿嘿，别在意，只是一些浪漫的幻想。每个孩子都有天马行空的念头呀。
E: Oh, don't mind me, it's just some whimsical fantasies. Every kid has a wild imagination, you know.

C: 想四处看看，多了解这里。
E: We could hang around here and get to know this place better.

C: 没问题！闲逛之余，也做点什么吧。回忆总在不经意间留下，不是吗？
E: Absolutely! And while we're hanging out, let's do something fun. Memories are often made when we least expect them, aren't they?

C: 要做的事也很多……
E: And we still have lots to do...

C: 就算枯萎了也不要悲伤，轻轻吹一口气，让它们回归土壤就好啦。
E: Even if it withers, don't weep. A gentle breath will help it return to the soil where it belongs.

C: 但我喜欢一切浪、浪漫的事物！我喜欢好看的头巾，喜欢泡在图书馆看故事，最、最喜欢的是吟诗！
E: But I loved everything r—romantic! I loved beautiful headscarves, loved burrowing in the library reading stories, and most of all, I l—loved reciting poetry!

C: 默默走开。
E: Silently leave.

C: 答，错了——本狮打包票，在斯缇科西亚城里，你找不到半个苹果…
E: W—Wrong. I guarantee that you'll never find even a slice of apple in Styxia city.

C: 有一天，她只点了四杯，然后全喝掉。本狮更好奇了，问，问她为什么，她说——
E: One day, she only ordered four cups and finished them all. I was even more curious, s—so I asked her why. She said—

C: 多么美丽的颜色…
E: Such gorgeous colors...

C: 你到底懂不懂规矩？
E: Do you understand the rules or not?

C: 我觉得，做菜，味道也很重要。
E: I think that flavor is also very important when cooking.

C: 但我们的根本目的不还是学知识吗…就您这个训练强度，怕不是要把我们都培养成竞技场英雄……
E: But we came here to learn... With such intense training, I'm afraid we would become arena champions instead...

C: 命运圣城的风景…果然不一般啊。这趟朝圣老年跟团游，来得真值。
E: The Holy City of Fate's scenery... is truly extraordinary. This pilgrimage with the senior group is really worth it.

C: 奇美拉奇美拉奇美拉…
E: Chimera chimera chimera...

C: 你这么做很不尊重法吉娜！
E: That's disrespectful to Phagousa!

C: 如果你有兴趣，可以加入界种科，进行深度学习。
E: You can join the Department of Ecology to study it if you are interested.

C: 乖孩子，你看上去并不是密卷科的成员。我不能这样随意麻烦你。
E: You're such a good kid. You don't look like you are from the Department of Insight. I shouldn't trouble you.

C: 原本我是屹立于大地之上的，不知道什么时候就飞起来了…好像是脚底下的石头变透明了喀！
E: I was standing firmly on the ground, then suddenly I was floating... I think the stones under my feet turned transparent, crrk!

C: 我说的「她」是吾主瑟希斯喀。
E: When I say "them," I mean our master, Cerces, crrk.

C: 冲树…冲树…
E: Charging at the tree... charging at the tree...

C: 别看我别看我别看我…
E: Don't look at me, don't look at me, don't look at me...

C: 只要躲在这里…
E: If I just stay hidden here...

C: 我失去了关于自己的所有记忆，唯独没有遗忘我的使命：搜集若虫。
E: I've lost all memories about myself. All but one: my mission to collect nymphs.

C: 怎么办？我的学术数据…
E: What should I do? My research data...

C: 那太好啦，我就想变得像你一样英勇又可靠！
E: That's awesome! I want to be brave and reliable, just like you!

C: 多简单啊，先开个预售呗，然后根据预约量再决定送多少食材过来？
E: Easy-peasy! Why not start with a pre-sale and then decide how many ingredients to ship here based on the pre-registration numbers?

C: 我从旁人那听说了些悬锋城外的美食，可真是琳琅满目，馋得我口水都快流出来了。
E: I've heard about all the amazing food outside Castrum Kremnos from others. There's such a mouthwatering variety. I'm practically drooling just thinking about it!

C: 能帮我也弄个席位吗？
E: Can you get me a spot too?

C: 您吃过有什么用啊！哎呀，您是……
E: What's the point of having eaten it before! Oh wait, you're...

C: 所以，我们必须刻苦练习，绝不能掉以轻心，把舞会的桂冠拱手相让迷！
E: So, we must practice hard and never let our guard down. We can't just hand over the dance crown to them, mem!

C: 天外的救世主，与你也差了一句：「好久不见」。
E: The Deliverer from beyond the sky, this is for you too, "long time no see."

C: 凯撒观察报告，堂堂出炉！
E: And now, presenting... my official Imperator Observation Report!

C: 那时…往昔的涟漪会带着故事——与你再度{RUBY_B#初见}重逢{RUBY_E#}。
E: At that time... the ripples of past reverie will carry stories and {RUBY_B#first encounter}meet{RUBY_E#} you once again.

C: 原先，我想把「侵晨」托付给你，但它见证了太多无谓的杀戮，恐怕不是件合适的礼物。
E: Originally, I wanted to entrust Dawnmaker to you, but it has witnessed too much pointless bloodshed. I fear it wouldn't make for an appropriate gift.

C: 那遐蝶带来的手工制品？
E: What about the handmade stuff from Castorice?

C: 如你所愿，史诗的道标已然显现。
E: As you wished, the saga's benchmark has revealed itself.

C: 这里为什么会有若虫？或许是「权杖」不怕Bug吧。
E: Why are there nymphs here? Perhaps the Scepter is not afraid of bugs...

C: 有机会再慢慢跟你说吧。
E: I'll tell you about it some other time.

C: 哎呀，看来这个世界也是危险重重；打从星穹列车启航，每个被星核污染堵塞的世界，都是这么麻烦。
E: Hah, it seems this world is a dangerous place, too. Ever since the Astral Express embarked on this journey, every world contaminated by the Stellaron has been problematic.

C: 哔嘟…您想何时前往「星际和平家电」门店？查宝将为您在日历中生成提醒事项。
E: Beep, beep, beep... Findie will create a calendar reminder for when you want to visit an Interastral Peace Appliances store.

C: 找齐了有什么好处吗？
E: What benefits would there be if I find all the pages?

C: 说真的，我还是不相信这本书还有后续，等{M#大哥哥}{F#大姐姐}收集齐了之后再告诉我吧。
E: Seriously, I still don't believe there is more to this book. Tell me when you've found it.

C: （应该不是这里，到别处再找找看吧。）
E: (It shouldn't be here. Look elsewhere.)

C: 稍等，我还有点事。
E: Sorry, I have something else to do.

C: 预祝小徒弟出师。
E: Hope your apprentice graduates soon!

C: 不错啊！来，先给你点报酬。
E: Nice! Come on, let me give you a little something.

C: 滴、答，气死我了，我要把它的润滑油换成辣椒油，或者悄悄把它的螺丝拧松……
E: Tick, tock, I'm so mad! I'll swap out their lubricant for chilli oil, or maybe loosen one of their screws...

C: 滴答，什么美梦小镇，不过是一群人的自我感动罢了！
E: Tick-tock, Dreamville? Bah! It's just a bunch of people feeling good about themselves!

C: 滴、答，战争，我们需要一场战争！我们要不计代价地阻止他们、战胜他们、撕烂他们！
E: Tick, tock. War, we need a war! We must stop them, defeat them, and tear them to shreds, no matter the cost!

C: 宾客，你要做什么？
E: What are you doing, guest?

C: 怎么样，{NICKNAME}？您挑战过「星芒战幕」了吗？
E: What's up, {NICKNAME}? Have you had a go at Stellar Flare?

C: 有入侵者！快跑！
E: Intruder alert! Evacuate!

C: 你对这个黑客了解多少？
E: How much do you know about this hacker?

C: 我和艾丝妲聊过了。
E: I chatted with Asta.

C: 另外，这是约好的稿费，也麻烦你拿给他了。
E: Also, here's the fee we settled on. Please pass it on for me.

C: 谢谢你，不知名的好心人！有了你的帮助，我的绘画灵感开始如博物馆门口的喷泉般疯狂涌动！
E: Thank you, oh kind-hearted stranger! Thanks to you, I can feel my artistic inspiration surging up like the fountains outside the museum!

C: 我这就去找于尔丹安排展出的事——之后别忘了到展厅里欣赏欣赏自己的劳动成果啊！
E: I'm off to touch base with Uldan then about exhibiting them — don't forget to come back to the exhibition hall when you get the chance to check out the fruits of your labor!

C: （数据似乎已经记录下来了……）
E: (The data seems to have been recorded...)

C: 哈哈，不错！我的大宝贝这下又能收集到新的战斗数据了——
E: Haha! Good! Another chance for my sweetie to pick up some new combat data —

C: 多亏了你，总算是解决这个麻烦了。
E: Thanks to you, that's pretty much done.

C: …很高兴你能这样回答。
E: ...I'm glad to hear that.

C: 但她从未遗忘治愈世界的梦想。但却因某些原因在精神上持续遭受折磨，最终积劳成疾，变成了你熟知的、那无情而寡欲的模样。
E: However, she never forgot her dream of healing the world. But due to certain reasons, she suffered continued torment, both mentally and physically, which eventually led to her becoming the unfeeling and indifferent person you knew.

C: 银鬃铁卫的加农火炮。这种武器或许有些落后，但其威力足以捍卫贝洛伯格的安宁。
E: Silvermane Guards' cannon. This weapon might be a little outdated, but its firepower is enough to defend the peace in Belobog.

C: 一幅摄影作品，记录了贝洛伯格边境的铁卫禁区。
E: A work of photography that captures the Silvermane Guard Restricted Zone on the edge of Belobog.

C: 一台自动机兵，型号名为「甲虫」。
E: An automaton of the model Beetle.

C: 你们将岁阳及捉鬼小队的事告诉了晴霓。
E: You and the others tell Qingni about the heliobi and the ghost-hunting squad.

C: 可每个人都有柔弱的一面。
E: But everyone has a soft side.

C: 帝弓垂怜，能再次见到记忆中的你，真好。但是，我不能驻足在这一刻，我仍要带着对你的记忆往前进。
E: The Reignbow took pity on me, allowing me to once again meet the person you are in my memories. For that, I'm grateful. But I must not stay stagnant in this moment. I want to move on with my life while holding on to my memories of you.

C: 等等，咱们没提过晴霓吧？
E: Hold on. We didn't mention anything about Qingni.

C: 你说吧。
E: Just say it.

C: 以后再拍新的吧。
E: Take some new photos later.

C: 嗯？你在这干吗？
E: Hmm? What are you doing?

C: 不拍了。
E: Don't take it.

C: 放虎克进来。
E: Let Hook in.

C: 好吧，但错过了这次就要收费了哦！
E: Alright, but next time it's gonna cost you!

C: 你撬开了扑满的嘴巴，看到它如黑洞般深邃的咽喉，慢慢抚摸它光滑的肚皮，轻轻按压……
E: You pry open the Trotter's mouth to see its deep, dark gullet akin to a black hole. You slowly stroke its shiny belly, and softly press on it...

C: 扑满挣扎着吐出了你的照片，仓皇地逃走了……
E: The Trotter struggles and spits out your photo, then flees in a panic...

C: 好啊，要是我打赌输了怎么办？
E: Okay... and if they can't?

C: 哈哈哈，这肯定能省下不少货运支出。
E: Hahaha, this will certainly save us on shipping costs.

C: 你确实有些本事，不过要我说啊，光是提高码货的效率也没有用。「鹤运物流」他们不送货，我们也只能干等着。
E: Impressive... but if you ask me, inventory efficiency isn't enough to save us. If Heron Express doesn't deliver the goods, then they're just gonna sit around collecting dust.

C: 我肯定是希望你能来帮忙的。
E: I really hope you can help out.

C: 你好，我就是大救星。
E: Hi, I'm that "someone" who can save y'all.

C: 你要不要自己解释一下原因？
E: Would you like to explain yourself?

C: 你为什么强调这事和自己没有关系？
E: Why do you emphasize that this matter has nothing to do with you?

C: 再加上商会无力支付租金，我方认为商会应该主动放弃码头经营权，并支付额外赔偿。
E: Coupled with the Merchant Guild's inability to pay the rent, we believe the Guild should voluntarily relinquish operating rights to the dock and pay additional compensation.

C: 我们和他们，还是有些区别的。
E: There's a difference alright.

C: 如果人类无法从历史里学会经验，那金人会教给你们。
E: If humans are unable to draw wisdom from history, aurumatons can teach them.

C: 什么？！那…我我我的好处还是不能少啊！
E: Wh—What? I still get the free meals, right?

C: 欢迎常来金人巷！
E: Welcome to Aurum Alley!

C: 这句话真是太万能了。
E: One slogan to rule them all.

C: 看来这次不需要别人转述了。
E: Good to speak to you directly.

C: 金人巷需要在历史的演进中抓住机遇，转变自己的职责。「金人巷」在公司选择的未来里，会成为最有分量的名字。
E: Aurum Alley needs to adapt and reimagine itself. The future that the IPC offers will ensure its name is known in the most remote corners of the galaxy.

C: 你走了，金人巷怎么办呢？
E: Who'll look after the Alley while you're gone?

C: 嘿嘿嘿。
E: Hehe.

C: 您慢走，以后要是有什么事，还要仰赖朋友你帮忙呀。
E: Farewell then. If anything comes up later, I'll be relying on your support, my friend.

C: 求你了，我这也是病急乱投医。
E: Please, I'm desperate here.

C: 追问
E: (Continue questioning)

C: 借助宣传礼品、虚拟购物券等等手段，前往金人巷消费的游客比以往增加了一倍还多。你看，美食街在大家的心中仍然有重要的地位。
E: By sending out coupons and gifts, we attracted twice as many customers as we normally would. This shows that food is still a big reason why people visit the Alley.

C: …看什么看，没见过处理公务吗？
E: ...What are you looking at? Never seen anyone handling official business before?

C: …真志摩？
E: ...Majima?

C: 有没有好心人帮我呀？
E: Is there any kind soul out there who can help me?

C: 这你就不懂了，只要能够反向应用，我就不会再遭遇任何一场交通事故。
E: You don't get it. As long as you can apply things in reverse, I should never encounter another traffic accident ever again.

C: 那我们现在怎么办？要不打个星槎过去？
E: What do we do now? Should we catch a starskiff over?

C: 我光是回复大家投诉物流的消息就快手抽筋了，正巧你在，我听明曦和素裳姑娘说过，你胆大心细，身手又敏捷——
E: Now I'm almost overwhelmed by all the complaints from our customers about our delivery service. It's a good thing you're here — Mingxi and Sushang were just telling me that you're a thoughtful and swift helper...

C: 总之呢，古代斗技分为「固、烈、流、震、刚、心、气」七种流派。
E: Anyway, the ancients split their Martialism up into seven different schools: "Solidity, Heat, Flow, Thunder, Firmness, Heart, and Gust."

C: 我没什么想要了解的。
E: There's nothing I would like to ask about.

C: 第二轮的实验还是围绕「虚卒•践踏者」进行的，不过侧重点不再是它的四足，而是它的「尾巴」。这次的课题就叫做《浅析践踏者的尾巴是否防水》！
E: The second round of experiments still revolves around "Voidranger: Tramplers." However, the focus is no longer on its legs, but on its "tail." This time around, the research topic shall be "A Brief Analysis of the Hydrophobic Nature of Tramplers' Rear Appendage"!

C: 这个图案你并不陌生，尤其是它发抖的模样，最为熟悉。
E: You're not unfamiliar with this illustration, especially when it shivers and tremors.

C: 我来教你用。
E: I can teach you how to use it.

C: 这个东西啊…
E: This thing...

C: （应该不是这里…换个帐篷看看吧！）
E: (This isn't it... Let's look in another tent!)

C: 光是什么？例子是什么？科普是什么？
E: What is light? What is par-day-kal? What's a baysick?

C: 难道……
E: Could it be...

C: 这不比听科学研究有意思？你收我为徒吧！
E: Isn't this so much more interesting than listening to scientific studies? Take me as your apprentice!

C: （售货机里的商品之前没有见到过，再仔细看看到底是什么。）
E: (You've never seen these goods being sold in the vending machine. Take a closer look at what they are.)

C: 邮寄送礼？
E: Mailing gifts?

C: 关于美食庆典…
E: About the food fest...

C: （毕竟梦泡还是需要以客人的体验为重——如果哈努兄弟靠着自己把一切都完成了，这部作品不就少了很多可玩内容吗？）
E: (After all, first-hand experience is what a dream bubble is all about. If Hanu does all the work, then there will be very little playable content in this dream bubble.)

C: 发出一声不屑的*哼*。
E: Let out a disdainful grunt.

C: （不过这样的密钥似乎有许多把，看来得全部集齐才行。）
E: (There seem to be many keys like this. I should probably collect them all.)

C: 一点也不像钟表小子…
E: You look nothing like Clockie at all...

C: 这片空间里的线索大概都收集完了吧？应该没漏什么东西了。
E: I think we've collected all the clues in this area, right? Looks like that's all of them.

C: 你试图换台，播放乌玛和她的同事们录制好的节目，但屏幕闪烁了片刻后，却没等来你想要的频道与画面。
E: You try switching the channel to play the pre-recorded show done by Uma and her colleagues. The screen flickers for a while, but the channel you want still doesn't come on.

C: 哈哈，满分的幽默感。不错不错，你果然很适合做调饮师！
E: Haha, you've got a great sense of humor. You're really cut out for this!

C: …所以我是心理咨询师？
E: ...That makes me a counselor?

C: 我也想听听听你说的声音嘛。嘻嘻，就一小会，行不？
E: I want to hear the "sound" you mentioned, too. Hee-hee, it'll be really quick, okay?

C: 要是随便将心里话讲出来，可是很容易受伤的。
E: It's easy to get hurt if you just tell others what's in your heart.

C: <size=28>吼——！！！</size>
E: <size=28>Roarrr!!!</size>

C: 不用了，不用了…我们现在就离开梦境酒店，打扰了……
E: No... of course not... We'll leave right now. Sorry for the disturbance...

C: 这就是灯下黑。
E: This is why the spot underneath the lamp is always the darkest.

C: 高手啊，学到了。
E: A superb move. I'll remember it.

C: 而你！你没法保护这里一辈子，你已经失去了力量，失去了朋友，你还会失去更多！更多！
E: But you! You won't be able to defend this place forever. You've lost your powers and your pals. Mark my words, you're gonna lose even more! More!

C: 你在干嘛？
E: What are you doing?

C: 世界上怎么会有这种又肥又滑的生物…根本抓不住啊……
E: What on earth is this plump and slimy creature... I can't even get a hold on it...

C: 哼，但是「钟表匠」先生……
E: Hmm, but Mr. Watchmaker...

C: 影片为克劳克影业带来了巨额收益，影城也逐渐恢复了原状……
E: The film generates a windfall for Clock Studios, and the theme park gradually regains its former status...

C: 道歉就够了？我们一定要替「钟表匠」好好教训你这个没良心的东西！
E: Do you think an apology is enough? We must teach you ingrate a lesson on the Watchmaker's behalf!

C: 有点过分了。
E: That's a little harsh.

C: 我…我没事…
E: I... I'm fine...

C: 嘿，小灰毛，这是你拍的动画？挺厉害的嘛！
E: Hey, Gray Hair, is this your animation? Not bad!

C: 我当时喝得醉醺醺的，被人拽到了深处的客房，在那里看到一个头戴礼帽、身着华服的绅士坐在窗边，遥望绚烂的梦泡之海。
E: I already had a little too much to drink when I was dragged to a guest room deep in the corridor, inside of which was an immaculately dressed gentleman wearing a hat. He sat next to a window, staring into the distance at the colorful ocean of dream bubbles.

C: 我记得这瓶苏乐达！
E: I remember this bottle of SoulGlad!

C: （观看影片）
E: (Watch the film)

C: 我谨代表鸢尾花家系感谢影城的各位，相信《美梦仙踪》上映后，票房一定能再创记录。
E: I'd like to thank everyone at the theme park on behalf of the Iris Family. I trust that once the Dreamjoy Ascension is released, box office records will hit a new high.

C: 我真不是……
E: I'm really not...

C: 这次叫的和上次不一样，你发现了吗？
E: Have you noticed? This bark isn't quite similar to the last one.

C: （外传的制作告一段落，该回去继续剪辑《美梦往事》了……）
E: (The Extra's commercial is done. Time to continue editing Dreamjoy Memoir...)

C: 「观众朋友们，汽水先生的故事要从钟表小子造访之前讲起。那时的美梦小镇还被称为『噩梦小镇』，镇民们被石头老板所奴役，而汽水先生是这里的……」
E: "Ladies and gents, Mr. Soda's story starts before Clockie arrived. Back then, Dreamville was still known as 'Nightmareville,' and Boss Stone ruled the townsfolk with an iron fist. Here we find Mr. Soda, who was a local..."

C: 这个故事想想就有点不对劲，但真相是什么，估计除了「钟表匠」也没人会知道了……
E: There's something not quite right about this story. Whatever the truth is, anyway, I suspect no one will ever get to know besides Watchmaker...

C: 导演觉得「罪犯」、「勇者」、「野狼」这三个形象谁才是真正的「哈努努」呢？好好想想一下吧，我将根据你的回答来创作哈努兄弟的故事。
E: Which of these three prototypes — "criminal," "hero," or "wolf" — do you think was the real Hanunue? Think carefully about it. I'll write a Brother Hanu story based on your answer.

C: 如果是这个主题，那应该就是木头老爷逐渐被权欲吞噬，走向了偏执的道路……
E: If that's the theme, then Old Man Wood would gradually be swallowed up by a ravenous lust for power, spiraling toward a path of paranoia...

C: 美梦失去了自由。
E: The dreams lost their freedom.

C: 机密嘛，不被泄漏的算什么「机密」呢？
E: What's the point of a secret if it never gets leaked?

C: 「现实是笼中的梦，我们的命运无法倒带。想要推动生命的剧情，就必须不停选择，继而被自己的选择束缚，没有任何反悔的资格。」
E: "Reality is a dream trapped in a cage, our destiny cannot be rewound. To propel the plot of life, one must constantly choose, only to be bound by their own choices, with no right to regret."

C: 二位——准备好了吗？
E: You two, are you ready?

C: 可以，非常激动！然后到了故事下一幕——你们找到了一份修铁路的工作，但日夜辛劳、体力不支，最后倒在了沙漠深处……
E: Very good! Very intense! And then we cut to the story's next scene — you find a job mending the rails, but the days are long, and your endurance can't keep up, and you finally collapse in the endless expanse of desert...

C: 我将，点燃匹诺康尼！
E: I shall... set Penacony ablaze!

C: 我成为大亨，她穷困潦倒。
E: I became a big shot, but she ended up destitute.

C: 奇人擂台战，等你来夺冠！欢迎来到动作明星的秀场！
E: The champion's crown awaits you on the stage! Welcome to the arena of Action Stars!

C: 看来，以我们现在的样子是上不了楼梯的……
E: It appears we can't climb the stairs in our current state...

C: 可是…我们现在还是没有趁手的武器……
E: But... we still don't have any weapons in hand...

C: 应该都搞定了吧？
E: That should be all of them, right?

C: 呼，这下我们都能安静一会了。
E: Whew. Finally, we can have a moment of peace.

C: 愿苏乐达的甜美常伴你左右，愿你的未来如同苏乐达一般香甜美好！
E: May the sweetness of SoulGlad be with you, and your future be as sweet as SoulGlad!

C: 导演\n「芮克先生」
E: Director\nMr. Reca

C: 吃饱了才有力气。
E: Can't fight on an empty stomach.

C: 你还搜集了哪些末日的忆泡？
E: What other Memory Bubbles of the apocalypse are in your collection?

C: 的确——在当时的我看来，这些无可计数的故事只是构成「有机生命」的数字，就像是程序里的0和1。
E: I must admit that, at the time, those countless stories to me were mere numbers constituting "organic beings," similar to the 0s and 1s in our programs.

C: 体验还顺利吗？{NICKNAME}{F#女士}{M#先生}。
E: The experience went smoothly, I assume, {F#Ms.}{M#Mr.} {NICKNAME}.

C: 三月小姐不仅说话像幻戏和小说里的大侠，连善良之心也和大侠一样，梦茗完全被你给迷住了。
E: Not only do you speak like a hero from an immersia, but you also have a kind heart. Your charisma has completely won me over, Miss March.

C: 教学研讨留在考试之后进行吧…
E: Guys, let's save the seminar for later...

C: 我听说三月小姐最近游历了不少，至于其中有多少能化为剑招，只能拭目以待了。
E: I've heard you've traveled a lot, Miss March. I'm excited to see how you incorporate your experiences into your swordplay moves.

C: 毕竟一般说「会赢的」都输了。
E: Yep, those who boast "they'd win" usually end up losing.

C: 怎么了嘛，三月七也可以说一些故作高深的话！
E: Hey, even I can say things that sound profound and mysterious!

C: 不够，继续给我加！丢我的脸就相当于丢公司的脸，丢琥珀王的脸，你们丢得起吗？
E: No, it's not enough! Reinforce it more! If I lose face, it's like losing face for the IPC and the Amber Lord! Can we afford to let that happen?

C: 恭喜三月加入战胜彦卿俱乐部。
E: Congrats! You're now officially a member of the "Bested Yanqing" club!

C: 你刚才怎么说的，学猪叫呢？
E: Hey, remember what you said? What about squealing like a pig?

C: 哼哧！呼噜呼噜！哼——
E: Oink! Oink, oink! Oink...

C: 斯科特专员，你怎么了！
E: Specialist Skott, what's wrong with you!?

C: 也很大…？三月七小姐最近遇上了什么压力很大的事情了吗？
E: Too...? Have you run into something that's been weighing heavily on your mind, Miss March 7th?

C: 没错，受害者太少了，这共通点没有说服力。
E: That's right, we have too few victims. This similarity isn't convincing enough.

C: 原来这就是身体跟不上脑子了吗？
E: So this is what it means when the body can't keep up with the mind?

C: 学习的捷径是有的，不在这里。
E: There is a shortcut to learning, but it's not here.

C: 「恃强凌弱、傲慢无礼的大罪人，斯科特先生。」
E: "Mr. Skott, a great sinner of arrogance and insolence."

C: 椒丘大夫，椒丘！三月小姐马上就要去和斯科特决战了，你在干什么呢！
E: Doctor Jiaoqiu? Jiaoqiu! March is about to face off with Skott! What are you doing?

C: 太卑鄙了，「鄙人」医生。
E: How despicable, Doc "Despicable."

C: 三月七使用银狼改装的剑具直接控制了公司机甲，以其人之道还施彼身获得胜利。
E: March 7th uses the sword modified by Silver Wolf to directly control the IPC Mech, turning the tables and achieving victory.

C: 太卜司的卜者而已，有什么了不起吗，我还是星际和平公司的专员呢！你就说说吧，你是手下比我多，还是你挣的信用点比我多，你有什么了不起的。
E: Heh, what's so special about being a diviner from the Divination Commission? I'm a specialist at the Interastral Peace Corporation! Tell me, what makes you think you're so great? Do you have more minions than me? Or do you earn more credits?

C: 要求斯科特问问兄弟！
E: Tell Skott to ask his underlings!

C: {NICKNAME}，你先不要说话了，说服不行，看来还得靠剑斗啊。
E: {NICKNAME}, it looks like talking sense isn't working. Looks like it's time to settle this with a good old-fashioned sword fight.

C: 谢谢你们，差点我就和你们交手了，我真是不应该啊。
E: Thank you, guys. I almost went too far, which would have been a mistake.

C: 好好吃啊！椒丘先生果然是个厨子吧。
E: It's so delicious! Mr. Jiaoqiu, you must really be a master chef!

C: 难道灵砂大人之前…通体发黑？
E: Then you were... completely coated in black?

C: 喂——！椒丘，你知道你说的「赤龙」是什么吗？
E: Heyyyy! Jiaoqiu, you know what the Crimson Dragon you said is?

C: 您这医士懂的诈骗技巧太多了…
E: You know too many shams for a healer...

C: 罹难者无人见过「机械灵魂」，却证明了它的存在。
E: None of the victims had witnessed the Mechanical Soul, yet proved its existence.

C: …要给金人召唤机械灵魂，我的脑子要转不过来了。<color=#dbc291ff>下次再来工造司，看看事情会变成什么样吧。</color>
E: ...Summoning a Mechanical Soul for an aurumaton. Oh my, I feel like my brain's getting fried. <color=#dbc291ff>We should return to the Artisanship Commission and see what happens next time.</color>

C: 你应该问我吗？
E: Shouldn't I be asking you?

C: 看到设计稿时，老夫才回想起来，原来阿休是只随处可见的机巧鸟。
E: Upon reviewing my blueprint, it finally dawned on me that A-Xiu is nothing more than a ubiquitous cycrane.

C: 我放下了杂念只想「先完成它」。时隔多年，我的阿休终于做出来了。
E: I cast aside all distractions, dedicating myself solely to the task of "bringing it to completion." And at long last, after so many years, I have succeeded in crafting my A-Xiu.

C: 这么说也有道理。那么事不宜迟……
E: Well, when you put it like that... There's no time to waste!

C: 这些年我一直在为这个课题奔忙，按照既有的资料，除去仙舟人的特殊生理外，他们的记忆与情绪因素也在魔阴狂症的发作上有着举足轻重的影响。
E: I've been working on this research topic for the past few years and according to the materials I have so far, it is not just the unique physiology of the Xianzhou people that plays a decisive role in the development of mara, but their memories and emotions as well.

C: 总之，{NICKNAME}，如果你有空了，记得来找我啊。
E: Either way, {NICKNAME}. If you have time, remember to come back and see me again.

C: 我打算对捕捉的忆质进行分析，看看其中映射的情绪是否与魔阴身的病因有所关联——可惜，我还没有得到接触病人的许可，只能先在街巷里展开研究。
E: I plan to analyze the memoria we have collected and see if the emotions present within have a connection with being mara-struck or not... Unfortunately, I still lack the permission to meet with a mara-struck patient. So, all I can do for now is conduct research on the streets.

C: 只不过它们天生大脑缺根筋，不懂正常的交友思维，只知道使用武力胁迫他人，又误将对方因恐惧展现出的服从视作「友谊」。我们都被它们嚯嚯了一遍，弄得桶心惶惶的。
E: But there's something missing in their brains. They don't know how to make friends normally. All they know is using their brute strength to coerce others and mistaking others' fearful subservience for "friendship." We have been attacked and harassed by them and are scared to the core of our little garbage hearts.

C: 依我看，只有一个办法——教会它们什么才是真正的友谊，所以……和我一起使用「友谊魔法」，净化它们吧！
E: If you ask me, there's only one thing we can do... We have to teach them what true friendship is! So... Use the Magic of Friendship with me to purify them!

C: 原来你能听见他说话呀。不过五月九是怎么回事啦。
E: So you can hear him talking, too? Wait. Hey! What do you mean "May 9th"?

C: 这就是…我的「友谊魔法」？
E: This is my... Magic of Friendship?

C: （佩拉有些沮丧。）
E: (Pela seems a little disheartened.)

C: 你那些贝洛伯格的同伴都在哪里？
E: Where are your Belobogian buddies?

C: 我觉得我大概也许可能是准备好了！
E: I think, I, more or less, maybe, perhaps I'm ready!

C: 你没有尽全力吧，托帕小姐。你就这么轻视我吗？
E: You pulled your punches, Miss Topaz. Do you think so little of me?

C: 太好了！我们太期待了！
E: Fantastic! Looking forward to it!

C: 玲可小姐都跟我说了。她还说了自己手头有个稀罕的古董，想让我给她看看能不能修好。
E: Miss Lynx has told me everything. She also said she found some rare antique that she hopes I can fix.

C: 没事卢卡，咱们积极治疗。
E: Don't worry, Luka. Let's stay positive and focus on the treatment.

C: 没有啊！现在是比赛期间，我要控制饮食，可不敢乱吃东西。
E: Of course not! I have to watch what I eat during a match. I can't be stuffing myself with junk.

C: 我的意思是，不必吃药。你在罗浮上多逛逛，接受新鲜事物的冲击，还有，不要再喝好梦气泡饮了。用不了多少天，你的症状就会逐渐消失。
E: What I mean is that you don't require medication. Just stroll around the Luofu more and take in the barrage of new sights and sounds. Just stop drinking Sweet Dreams Soda and your symptoms will disappear in a few days.

C: 真的太感谢了。这一路来受了联盟不少恩惠…我一定会回报各位的。
E: I can't thank you enough. All throughout my journey, I've received so much help from the Alliance. I will definitely repay everyone.

C: 你要干什么…
E: What are you up to...

C: 卢卡哥哥，绝对不可以输哦！你说好要带虎克去「咸粥萝卜」上面玩的！
E: Luka, you absolutely cannot lose! You promised to take me up to visit the Sianjo Lowfoo!

C: 我这次来，是为了确认你在这场比武盛会中是否有实力去面对来自不同世界的选手。而现在，我认可你的实力。
E: My reason for coming to this martial tournament was to verify if you were good enough to contend against competitors from other worlds. And now I see you're good enough.

C: 布洛妮娅大人…您好？不好意思，我是在下层区长大的，不懂什么礼仪……
E: Lady Bronya... Hi? Sorry, I grew up in the Underworld, so I'm not versed in etiquette of any sort...

C: 哈哈，怕什么！我跟着师父维护下层区治安的时候，遇到的凶恶罪犯也不少啊！「磐岩镇黑鳏夫」还是我亲手抓获的呢！
E: Haha, what's there to be afraid of! When I was defending the Underworld with my master, I also met many hardened criminals! I even personally apprehended the Dark Widower of Boulder Town with my own two hands!

C: 对不起了，杰帕德先生，布洛妮娅小姐…我，我只是个没用的废物。
E: I'm sorry, Mr. Gepard, Miss Bronya... I, I'm just a useless piece of nothing.

C: 这是你不想去打比赛的理由吗？
E: Is that the reason you don't want to fight?

C: 靠你了，尾巴大爷。
E: I'm counting on you, Mr. Tail.

C: 找找找找找到了！卢卡选手！名单！复活赛！有他！
E: I—I—I—I found it! Luka! The list! The repechage! He's in it!

C: 但她很努力地做了一切该做的事情，她一直在向病魔挥拳…一拳接着一拳，她才是最棒的拳手！在我心里，玛吉赢了！她赢得很漂亮。
E: But she tried her best in everything she did, and she was always putting up a fight against her sickness... One punch after the next, she was the greatest boxer there ever was! In my heart? Margie won. And she won in style.

C: 老熟人了。
E: He's an old pal of mine.

C: 又见面了，{NICKNAME}。你的姿态还是那样令人着迷。
E: Good to see you again, {NICKNAME}. Your demeanor is still as captivating as ever.

C: 嗯，我一定牢记于心…然后回去再理解消化一下，哈哈。
E: I'll keep that in mind... and try to digest its meaning when I'm back home, haha.

C: 当「仙舟联盟」这个名字出现的时候，我甚至幻想事情会这样展开——云骑军驰援雅利洛-Ⅵ，把上面的烬灭军团全部消灭，雅利洛-Ⅵ的人就这样度过了危机。
E: When the name Xianzhou Alliance was mentioned, I imagined things unfolding like this — the Cloud Knights went to Jarilo-VI as reinforcements and eliminated the Ruin Legion, and the people of Jarilo-VI emerged from the crisis.

C: 他呜呜伯的，你个小机灵鬼！你让我想起一个朋友，一个叫「乱破」的丫头。她和你一样，特别认死理。
E: Dog my Wubbaboos, you're forking sharp, boy! You remind me of a friend, a girl called Rappa. She's set in her own ways just like you.

C: 尽管卢卡选手潇洒坦然地接受了失败，但全场观众的热情依旧没有受到任何衰减！他们用不绝的掌声，献给了这位坚韧的贝洛伯格拳手。
E: Though Luka takes his defeat in stride, the audience's passion stays strong! Their constant applause is a salute to this resilient Belobogian fighter.

C: 杰帕德先生，准备好了吗？我来归还你借我的「胜利」了！
E: Mr. Gepard, are you ready? I'm here to return that victory you lent me!

C: 主持人的话音被狐人僧侣的声音打断。
E: The host is interrupted by the voice of the foxian monk.

C: 乐意奉陪。
E: Happy to oblige.

C: 质疑：杀戮之上的力量，是否存在？
E: Interrogation: A power beyond slaughter... does it exist?

C: 驭空大人，我不是仙舟人，不知道过去发生了什么，没法对你们的决定指手画脚。
E: Madam Yukong, I am not a Xianzhou native, and I don't know what happened here in the past, so I cannot point fingers at your decision.

C: 这梦貘有用吗？
E: Does this tuskpir do anything?

C: 梦貘呆呆地看着你，看起来快要睡着了。
E: The tuskpir stares at you blankly, looking like it's about to doze off.

C: 那么，后来我注意{NICKNAME}教练及时作出了战术调整，最后正是因为这次调整，卢卡选手一举获胜，请问教练有什么可以分享的吗？
E: Later on, I noticed Coach {NICKNAME} making a tactical change, and it is because of this change that Luka won. Is there anything you can share regarding this?

C: 请这位「八卦记者」注意提问礼仪。
E: Might I remind the Tabloid Journalist to pay attention to your interview etiquette.

C: 急了急了急了！
E: Someone's getting upset!

C: 你没有提问的机会了。
E: Your chance for any more questions is over.

C: 开始比赛。
E: Begin competition.

C: 确实，主要是跑得太快了，很难追得上。
E: Mainly because they're slippery and hard to catch.

C: 我有所耳闻，「朱明三不」是朱明的三个民间武术家。这三个人虽然算不上绝顶高手，但也不可小觑。
E: I heard through the grapevine that the Tri-Dis of Zhuming comprise a trio of civilian martial artists from the Zhuming. Although these three might not be top-tier masters, do not underestimate them.

C: 岁阳也会有这样的梦想吗？倒是也能理解啦。
E: Do heliobi have such dreams too? I can get behind that.

C: 怎么，你们是在质疑我的专业能力吗？
E: What, you all doubting my professionalism?

C: 真是多谢了你啊。
E: I really must thank you.

C: 知道啦知道啦，看把你得意的。
E: Yes yes, I got it. Look at you all smug.

C: 现在只要转身离开，就什么都不会发生，快逃吧！
E: Just turn around and leave! Nothing will happen! Run!

C: 所有人都在讨厌我，我是不是真的应该退赛？好累，我想回家。
E: Everyone hates me. Should I just quit? I'm so tired. I wanna go home.

C: 太好了！我就知道你会感兴趣的！
E: Awesome! I knew you would be interested!

C: 别问，问就是没弄到机巧鸟的形象授权。
E: Don't ask. The answer is that we didn't secure the image rights to the cycrane.

C: 我刚还在想呢，这无人问津的交感幻戏里怎么出现了另一个真人玩家…想来除了{NICKNAME}，也不会有别人这么闲了。
E: And here I was thinking, why is there another real player in this abandoned Empathic Immersia... I guess no one else would be this bored besides you, {NICKNAME}.

C: 我还想再逛几家幻戏馆，你在这里慢慢玩吧。等我有空了再来找你。
E: I'm going to stop by at a few more immersia theaters, so you take your time and have fun. I'll come look for you when I've got time.

C: 所以，祭典的「忍首」应是能够肩负忍徒期望之人，不应由诸位用外物定夺！
E: Therefore, the Chief Ninja of the Festival should be one capable of shouldering the hopes of ninja way and not be decided by external means!

C: 再等等吧…
E: Wait a moment...

C: 再等等吧…
E: Wait a moment...

C: 你还没走？
E: You haven't left?

C: 可以和你聊聊吗？
E: Can we have a chat?

C: 准备乐队演出。
E: Prepare for the band performance.

C: 所以盛会巨星不用有压力，按自己的想法尽情去演出就好啦！
E: So please don't be pressured, Festive Superstar! Just go with your gut and play your hearts out!

C: 嘿嘿嘿，现在我也是忍者了。咳——在下必定完成任务，不辱使命！
E: Heehee, now I'm a ninja too. Ahem... I will surely complete the mission without fail!

C: 然后呢，那群科员上班都没什么精神，黑眼圈很重，好像晚上完全没睡觉似的。
E: And then, those researchers are all listless when they're at work, with heavy dark circles, like they hadn't slept all night.

C: …打铁？
E: ...Perfect timing?

C: （收集到了佩佩的节奏记录，发给乱破听听吧。）
E: (Collected Peppy's rhythm record. Should send it to Rappa for a listen.)

C: 后续还有两次作战，请主公与诸位音忍并肩前行，共同将本次祭典的氛围推至最高潮吧！
E: There will be two more battles from here. Please advance alongside the sound ninja and get this festival's atmosphere pumping to the max, Sound Master!

C: 来就来！
E: Here I come. I'm not scared!

C: 嗯…在下明白了。看来阁下是一位「忍道」明晰的忍徒，认为在下的决断阻碍了阁下的忍道。
E: Hmm... I understand your predicament. I see you are a ninja with a clear tenet. You feel that my decisions are standing in the way of that path.

C: 音律•修行不可半途而废，请阁下随……
E: Sound training cannot be abandoned like this. Please, follow...

C: 好了，我说得很清楚。祝你们找到更合适的人选。
E: Alright, I have made myself very clear. I hope you find more suitable candidates.

C: 确实有点糟糕。
E: That is actually pretty bad...

C: 股东{F#小姐}{M#先生}，我也想知道您有何见解？
E: {F#Miss}{M#Mr.} Shareholder, I would like to know your opinion on the matter.

C: 危！何等的大危机！修行尚未结束，诸位音忍却都心生退意，形势不妙！
E: Crisis! We have a major crisis! The training hasn't even finished yet, and all the sound ninja are talking about quitting! We are in dire straits!

C: 哟，小天才们回来了。欢迎！看各位的表情，演出反响应该挺好的吧？
E: Ooh, the little geniuses are back. Welcome! From your looks, I gather the show went quite well?

C: 是啊，你当然不怕。但你的乐队成员呢，他们的前途可都掌握在学院手里啊。
E: Hah, of course you're not afraid. But your bandmates... their futures are in the hands of the academy.

C: 这还不简单——第一场不唱，第二场不唱，第三场还是不唱。
E: That's easy: We don't sing in the first, second, or third acts.

C: 我什么都不会怕的。
E: I'm fearless.

C: 明白。要是学院那群人打算动粗，我会拦住他们。
E: Understood. If those people from the school decide to choose violence, I will hold them off.

C: 嗯。编曲方面来不及的话，我也可以帮忙。
E: Yes, if there's not enough time for composition, I can help out too.

C: （接受挑战）
E: (Accept the challenge)

C: 有发生什么好玩的事吗？
E: Anything fun happened?

C: 只要能让自己产生新的想法的东西，都算是灵感。
E: As long as it's something that can help you create new ideas, that counts as inspiration.

C: 飞龙•忍者
E: Ninja Hiryū

C: 准备好了吗？我要启动了——
E: You ready? I'm starting it up...

C: ——哎，怎么越说越像现实生活呢，不成不成。
E: ...Oof, that sounds eerily similar to real life, and that won't do.

C: 失败的菜肴。
E: Failures of cooking.

C: 呼～眼前的工作终于暂告一段落了，喝杯咖啡休息一下吧。
E: Phew, the work at hand is finally coming to a temporary close. Time for a coffee break.

C: 没办法了…看来为了大家的冰淇淋，我得用出些真本事了。列车长，请把我的工具箱拿来。
E: No choice then... Looks like I'll have to exert my true skills for everyone's ice cream. Conductor, please bring me my toolbox.

C: 星际和平公司不会这样在航路上叫卖吧？总觉得…不是假货就是赃物。
E: I don't think the IPC would need to hawk its wares out here, would they? I've got a feeling... They're either fake or fenced goods.

C: 哇，这个游戏题材是不是有点地狱了？
E: Woah, isn't this theme a little dark?

C: 哎，我一猜你就会用说怪话来打太极…你是懂端水的。
E: *sigh* I knew you'd come up with weird answers to deflect the question... you always know how to stay neutral.

C: 它的叫声怎么有这么大信息量？
E: Its barks can convey that much information?

C: 按照给定的课题摄影，还要把照片传到线上，接受大家的点评？也太丢人了！
E: The photography task states that we still have to upload the photo online for everyone to comment? That's so embarrassing!

C: 好耶，我已经摩拳擦掌了！
E: Alright, I'm raring to get started!

C: 「匹诺康尼演武仪典」。
E: "Penacony's Wardance."

C: 这边的门进去就是了。
E: It's through this door.

C: 睡蕉小猴的「模因病毒」应该已经被清除了才对…难道还有漏网之鱼？
E: The Slumbernana Monkey memetic virus should have been removed... Was the cleansing not thorough enough?

C: 你聪明的头脑迅速判断了局势。很显然，和这古老物种对抗并非明智之举。
E: Your smart mind quickly assesses the situation. It's obvious that confronting the ancient monkey species was terribly unwise.

C: 「花火大人的绚丽写真」。
E: "Miss Sparkle's Splendiferous Memoir."

C: 真是惟妙惟肖呢。
E: It's just like the real thing.

C: 总结：在完成最后的更新迭代后，<color=#dbc291ff>「人间喜剧」的课题也将就此结束。</color>
E: Conclusion: After completing the final iterative update, <color=#dbc291ff>the research project "The Human Comedy" will come to an end.</color>

C: …确实呢。
E: ...True.

C: 怎么路边小孩也在讲谜语？
E: So some weird kid is dishing out riddles now?

C: 你该不会是想转嫁责任吧。
E: You're not trying to absolve yourself of your burden, are you?

C: 爽快！拿来吧，权利就得用东西来换。那边的小姑娘，你可要记好了！
E: You're a forthright one! Take them. Authority must be exchanged for something. That little lady over there, you best remember this scene!

C: 小奇美拉是很聪明的生物，听得懂我们的话语。它们有自己独特的想法，也能做出选择。
E: Chimeras are very smart creatures and understand our language. They have their own unique way of thinking and will make their own choices too.

C: 呼…终于解决掉了。我算是明白阿格莱雅女士和元老院打交道时候的心情啦。
E: Phew... Finally settled. Now I know how it feels when Lady Aglaea interacts with the Council of Elders.

C: 正是在下。
E: I am.

C: 呃，灰宝…这只小奇美拉，是不是有点不太一样？
E: Err, Grayie... Doesn't this chimera look a little different?

C: （换套别的话术试试）
E: (Try a different approach)

C: 可惜，现在的翁法罗斯没有给我们这个机会呢。
E: Alas, we don't have that chance in present-day Amphoreus.

C: （讲点正经的…）
E: (Say something serious...)

C: 嘿！你这年轻人，怎么说话的？
E: Hey! Watch your tongue, young one.

C: 哦？想亲自挑战大哥吗？你需要有<color=#dbc291ff>至少<unbreak>20</unbreak>只</color>小海豹！
E: Oh? You want to challenge me? You'll need to have <color=#dbc291ff>at least <unbreak>20</unbreak></color> baby seals!

C: 提摩斯三人面面相觑，只好灰头土脸地离开。
E: Timos and his team exchange glances, then leave in defeat, heads hanging.

C: 不要乱动了，我会负责把你俩带回昏光庭院的。
E: Don't move. I'll make sure to get you both back to the Twilight Courtyard safely.

C: 谁说咱「十敌」数学不好啊？这数学可太好了。
E: How dare you question Yourdei's grammatical genius! His wit and rhetorical talents are without equal!

C: 不对不对不对，啊…对的对的。
E: No, that's not right, no, I mean... y—yes, that's correct.

C: 说完你的退场台词赶紧走吧。
E: Oh please, just say your exit line and scram.

C: 没问题，乘胜追击！
E: Absolutely, strike while the iron's hot!

C: …总觉得今晚要做噩梦。
E: ...I can already tell I'll have nightmares tonight.

C: 欢呼吧，公民们，{NICKNAME}为我们赢回了「金海豹杯」！{F#她}{M#他}是这份荣耀理所应当的拥有者！让我们再次恭喜——
E: Cheer, citizens! {NICKNAME} has brought the Gold Seal Cup back home for us! {F#She}{M#He} is the true and rightful bearer of this glory! Congratulations again!

C: 与此同时，在奥赫玛某处……
E: At the same time, somewhere in Okhema...
Heh...

C: 哎，你就坦率一点吧，裁缝女。你其实是在担心，经过千年时光，我跟你一样慢慢流失了人性，变成所谓「非人非神」的怪物了吧？
E: Ah, just be honest, seamstress. You're worried about whether I've slowly lost my humanity after a millennium, and whether I've also become a monster "neither human nor divine" just like you.

C: 没错，你要是对自己的实力有自信，来浴场找我吧。
E: That's right. If you're confident about your skills, come find me at the baths.

C: 不错！灰子，和我想的一样。
E: Great minds think alike, eh, Gray Mystery?

C: 没错！很高兴你还记得那位小小的勇者——
E: That's right! I'm glad you still remember that teeny hero—

C: 《银河球棒侠传说》？
E: Legend of the Galactic Baseballer?

C: 「在狡猾『公爵』的诡计下，正直的球棒侠一时不察，坠入了连通着茫茫多未知世界的黑洞。」
E: "Under the cunning tricks of the Duke, the righteous Baseballer is caught off guard and falls into a black hole that connects to countless unknown worlds."

C: 恭喜，你成功击败了魔王，但银河不会因此而变得和平…你的冒险，还没有结束……
E: Congrats, you've succeeded in defeating the Demon King, but the cosmos will not see peace... your adventures will continue...

C: 我来不及给「十三幺」补离境手续了，丢在匹诺康尼也是浪费，不如就给你吧！
E: No time to file exit papers for Thirteen Orphans. Better you take it than let it grow mold here.

C: 它诞生的那天，整个工造司都低语着它的名字——「十三幺」。
E: The day it rolled out, the entire Artisanship Commission whispered its name: Thirteen Orphans.

C: 别这么说嘛，你都拿到该拿的任务奖励了，别这么挑剔嘛。
E: Don't say that. You've already received the mission rewards you were supposed to get. Don't be so picky.

C: …幽灵小鸟问你，是不是也想和它做「朋友」？
E: ...The Ghost Bird is asking if you want to be its "friend" too.

C: 我也挺幽默的。
E: I'm pretty witty too, you know.

C: 那个忆泡…他是你的朋友吗？
E: That Memory Bubble... Is he your friend?

C: 你也不怕翻车。
E: You're not worried this'll blow up in your face?

C: 如果还有什么想问的，我也可以为你解答一二。
E: If you've got questions, I can spare a few answers.

C: 实不相瞒，我可是声振寰宇的调饮大师「闭嘴」的关门弟子。
E: If I may be honest, I'm the apprentice of the legendary drinksmith master Shush.

C: （暂时离开）
E: (Leave For Now)

C: 账账的意思是：感谢你的招待，回头见！
E: Numby says: Thanks for the hospitality, see you around!

C: 这个配方就试到这里吧。
E: Let's stop testing this recipe here.

C: 一切准备就绪，可以开张了！
E: All set up and ready to open!

C: 多谢将军提醒。我会向十王司着重交代此事。
E: Thank you for the reminder, General. I'll make sure the Ten-Lords Commission gets the message loud and clear.

C: 虽远，必诛！
E: Far or near, we shall strike them down!

C: 你掏了掏背包…但本应放着球棒的地方空空如也。
E: You reach into your bag... but the spot where your bat should be is unoccupied.

C: 综合看来…我想谁是真正的{NICKNAME}，答案已经很明显了。
E: Well, taking everything into account... it's pretty clear who the real {NICKNAME} is.

C: 好啦，别在意这种细节，给它起个一听就非同凡响的名字吧？
E: Anyway, don't sweat the details and help me name it! Something catchy and out of this world!

C: 为什么随便乱按？
E: Why press a random button?

C: 口味怎么样？
E: How did it taste?

C: 还能是什么，咸的海风、阳光和橘子的味道。
E: What else could it be? The flavor of salty sea breeze, sunlight, and oranges.

C: 机密和叽米谐音。
E: I'm confident you shouldn't.

C: 一阵急促的来电声响起。
E: A sudden, urgent ringtone starts playing.

C: 该向舒翁提交「特调配方」了，稍后再来调饮吧。
E: Time to submit the "Special Mix Recipe" to Siobhan. Drinksmithing can wait for a bit.

C: 毕竟机器不需要休息，也不会厌倦。当然，她永远比不上我，顶多算是我的一个影子。
E: The beauty of machines is they never need breaks or get tired of repetitive tasks. Naturally, she won't compare to the real me, she's merely a shadow of my brilliance.

C: 你趁机挤兑谁呢？我发质可好着呢！咳咳…庇尔波因特人多眼杂，可不是个干大事的地方，还是在咱们自家的地盘比较安心。
E: Who are you trying to pick on? My hair is perfectly fine! Ahem... Pier Point's too crowded with prying eyes, not the place for big moves. We're better off sticking to our own turf where we can breathe easy.

C: 不过也别太担心，风险高的地方收益也高，我相信你一定能找到法子解决！
E: But don't worry about it. Where there's a risk, there's a reward. I have faith in your problem-solving ability!

C: 我怕它烫死我。
E: I'm afraid it would roast me alive.

C: 这剧情引入有点敷衍吧？
E: Aren't you just jumping the shark here?

C: 「{NICKNAME}静下心来，感悟幻境中遗留的感情…那感情温暖、轻柔、令人心旷神怡。毫无疑问，那便是初代司鼎的那颗『医者仁心』。」
E: "{NICKNAME} calmed right down to sense the feelings left behind in the fantasia... And those feelings were warm, gentle, and liberating. There was never any doubt that this was the soul-cleansing grace from the first Cauldron Master of the Alchemy Commission."

C: 你获得了「风雷天根」，可喜可贺。
E: You got a Whirlbolt Pneumatophore. Well done.

C: 有个叫丹恒的伙伴…
E: There's one called Dan Heng...

C: 你这是寻宝？你这是破坏古迹！
E: You call that trailblazing? You're trail destroying!

C: 请您不吝赐教！
E: If you could please enlighten us!

C: 您可别说这丧气话，在下刚才稍微构思了一下…您的建议很有道理，您的诉求也很好满足……
E: Hey, don't be so demoralizing! I've just come up with some new ideas right now... Your feedback is well-received, and it's easy enough to make adjustments accordingly...

C: 战斗力升级有些夸张了…
E: That power level increase sounds a little extreme...

C: 真是一场艰苦的旅程啊，{NICKNAME}。眼下万事齐备，可以开始铸造那碎星绝尘剑了…
E: It's been a rough journey, {NICKNAME}. But now that everything's in hand, we can start with the business of forging this Star-Shattering Blade of Truth...

C: 武器差不多成型了…下一步该装柄材了。该怎么装来着？
E: The weapon's almost finished... The next step is installing the hilt. How does that get done again?

C: 不是，我只是想用评书录音来吸引游客。
E: No, not at all. I just want to attract more tourists with those recordings.

C: 那怎么行，这个摊子我支起来多少年了，主打的就是新鲜出炉这一点。要是关掉摊子专职做外卖…这么多年的心血岂不是白费了？
E: But this stall has been my bread and butter for years. Freshly baked snacks are my specialty, and if I shut down my stall and do takeout, all those years of hard work will go down the drain, right?

C: 别别别，你别急，虽然是得砸，但是你得用谛听找到真正的古董才行。
E: No, no. You'll need to use Diting to find out the true antiques and smash only the fake ones.

C: 这究竟是怎么看出来的，神奇！
E: This is amazing! How did the appraiser spot that?

C: 等会儿去逛逛也好。
E: Yeah, we can go check it out later.

C: 游戏推广，看起来还挺有意思。
E: It's an ad for a game. Looks pretty cool.

C: 宇宙各地的玩家将在这段时间内齐聚一堂，相互交流，共同享受游戏的快乐！
E: Gamers will come together to relax, share tips and tricks, and have a blast playing the game!

C: {NICKNAME}，别难为人家啦。「公司」的名声会变成现在这样，也不是他一个人导致的。
E: Ugh, do we have to start an interrogation right now? I know the IPC aren't exactly our friends, but that's not just his fault.

C: 而我作为本次赛事的全权赞助人，前来大赛会场检查运营状况，也是顺理成章。
E: ...and as the sole sponsor of this event, it's only natural for me to come to the tournament venue and check on its operations.

C: 唔…这家伙虽然戴着面具，一副怪里怪气的样子，还是个大人物……
E: Hmm... weird mask, strange vibes, a little out of touch...

C: 没什么想问的了。
E: No further questions.

C: 啊？！托帕小姐她…居然这么不择手段？
E: Huh!? Would Miss Topaz stoop so low? I can't believe she'd be that desperate...

C: 就决定是你了！
E: Nah, sounds fine to me!

C: 公司的一小撮员工似乎也想把这个小家伙抢到手。我们是为了保护它才把次元扑满 / 扑满 / 泡泡 / 毛球 / 白色恶魔 / 肥大 / 扑满侠 / 扑神带在身边的。
E: ...but it seemed like some IPC troublemakers were out to get them — that's why Warp Trotter / Trotter / Bubbles / Puffball / Ivory Menace / Chunky Chops / Turbo Trotter / Trotterlord is tagging along with us — we're looking after them.

C: 哼哼，那咱们俩想到一块去啦。
E: Great minds really do think alike!

C: 好不容易回来一趟，我还挺想念他们家那枕头的呢～
E: I mean, it's not often we get the chance to stay there — and I really miss their pillows!

C: 好累，根本睡不醒…
E: Ugh... I'm tired... Please, five more minutes...

C: 哼哼…哼！
E: Oink... Oink!

C: 话说回来，你手里的这以太灵，模样甚是可亲可爱…到底是在哪里弄到的？看得老夫我真是心痒痒啊。
E: The Aether Spirit in your possession is incredibly charming — I can't help but wonder where you found them...

C: 感觉…确实有可能。但这么做是为了什么呢？
E: I mean... it's possible. But I can't help but wonder why he's so keen for us to speed up.

C: 哈？你们有完没完！我们怎么招你惹你了呀！
E: Don't you guys have anything better to do!? What did we do this time?

C: 呃，你怎么还蹬鼻子上脸了……
E: Ugh, do trailblazers not understand sarcasm?

C: 但这只次元扑满的数据却神奇地逃过了这一环节，被直接传到了游戏服务器上——其中包含独立性格的字段也没有被剔除。
E: However, this Warp Trotter somehow managed to bypass this process, meaning they were directly uploaded to the game server with all their personality traits still intact.

C: 看，呜呜伯！它一定拿着我们要找的<color=#dbc291ff>凭证</color>！
E: Another Wubbaboo! It's definitely holding onto another <color=#dbc291ff>pass</color>!

C: 道歉要是有用，公司还要「人才激励部」干什么？你们几个犯的事，我已经收到报告了——我会考虑把报告结果纳入绩效考评的。
E: If apologies were enough, there'd be no need for a Talent Motivation Department, would there? I've received a report about your misdeeds — I may have to include the results in your performance reviews.

C: 哎呀，乔瓦尼先生不是说过了嘛，那位玩家击败了上届冠军首席……
E: Don't you remember what Mr. Giovanni said? This player beat the last reigning champion — it can't be her...

C: 这附近应该有可以点燃的灯炉——只要把<color=#dbc291ff>热能核心</color>装进去，应该就能把那个灯炉也点亮了吧？
E: There should be a lamp nearby. Inserting a <color=#dbc291ff>thermic core</color> should do the trick.
Arf... Arf...

C: 激战过后，佩佩露出了遗憾的神情。
E: After a ferocious battle, Peppy's face looks regretful.

C: 精彩、精彩！就让我们把这场表演推上高潮吧！
E: Superb! Now it's time for the crescendo!

C: <size=36>开拓者！开拓者！开拓者！</size>
E: <size=36>Trailblazers! Trailblazers! Trailblazers!</size>

C: 哈哈哈，你们居然没有被这荣誉冲昏头脑，真不容易！没错…根据乔瓦尼先生的设计，这场决赛还不是庆典的终点。
E: Haha, you haven't let the victory go to your heads! And you're right, according to Mr. Giovanni's plan you've still got a little more to do.

C: …谢谢你，{NICKNAME}。
E: ...Thank you, {NICKNAME}.

C: 你试着踢开这扇门，但门却像焊死了一样纹丝不动。你的脚很疼，非常疼。
E: You try to kick the door open, but it won't budge, and your feet hurt.

C: 在其他事情上也许未必，但在岁阳一事上，答案已经很明了了。
E: In most matters, I would say no. But when dealing with heliobi... I think the answer is quite clear.

C: 别跑！
E: Wait, stop!

C: …还是我们眼下该称呼你「犀焰」了？
E: ...Or perhaps we should call you Keralum?

C: 被岁阳寄生后，会有些不适的，不过服些丹药应该就能无恙了。
E: It's normal to experience some discomfort after being possessed by a heliobus, but nothing a few medicinal pellets can't take care of.

C: 不过我猜你会回答「人并非机器」「世界不只一条道路」！
E: But you're probably thinking: "humans are not machines, there is more than one path in the universe!"

C: 那时候我只是个没用的胆小鬼，一有风吹草动就要躲起来。尾巴总是一边嘴臭我，一边帮我解决麻烦……
E: Back then I was a useless coward — I'd hide at the first sign of trouble. Tail would always complain about it... but he'd also get me out of danger.

C: 即便不为这个，身为判官也不能令岁阳占夺这个孩子的身体，令他犯下将来后悔莫及的大错。
E: Even if it wasn't for the general's sake, as a judge, I can't let a heliobus take over someone as dangerous as Yanqing.

C: 稍微再准备一下…
E: Let me get ready first...

C: 那是自然。它可是「燎原」的武胆，也是咱们这些碎片中最好斗的一份。不过嘛，这位叫作「彦卿」的剑客是谁？
E: Naturally. Among the heliobi, Apyra manifests the courage and warring spirit of Ignamar — they are the most aggressive of all the fragments... but who is this swordmaster? Who is Yanqing?

C: 彦卿…不会后退。
E: I... I won't back down.

C: 本大爷在的时候，藿藿老是嫌弃老子，动不动唠唠叨叨数落我给她带来了多少麻烦，她有多讨厌现在的生活。
E: When I was with Huohuo, she'd constantly rant about me — whining about all the problems I'd caused her, how I'd ruined her life.

C: 我终究不是燎原，我只是…一团黯淡的火焰，无用之物。
E: I am no Ignamar... I'm nothing... nothing more than a faint flicker.

C: 很神秘。
E: It's very mysterious.

C: 老师就算是输了，变成手下败将的样子，彦卿会用手中的剑将老师救出来的～
E: Even if you lose and end up like those she's defeated, I'll use my sword to rescue you.

C: 可现在…她却回来了。
E: And yet... here she was again.

C: 情况不是不可能…可是，当时他们把她的玉兆和阵亡通知书都寄了回来。文远兄还按狐人的习俗举行了奠仪。我记得清清楚楚。
E: It's not entirely impossible... But back then, her jade abacus and death notice were both mailed back. Old Wenyuan even held a foxian memorial ceremony, as is custom. I remember it crystal clear.

C: 这位先生，你被岁阳骗了。
E: Excuse me, mister: You are being deceived by a heliobus.

C: 文远，别这么说，{M#他们}{F#她们}是十王司的人，只是…公事公办罢了。
E: Wenyuan, don't say that. {M#They}{F#They} are from the Ten-Lords Commission, so... they do things by the book.

C: 为了等你回来，我已经苦苦支撑了三十年。也许要不了多久，又可能需要很久很久，我才能等来最终的解脱。
E: I've already spent thirty long hard years waiting for you to come back. Maybe it'll be quick, or maybe it'll take forever before I can finally find relief.

C: 把藿藿交给我，把工作交给{NICKNAME}吧，素裳在的话，肯定也会同意的。
E: Leave Huohuo with me, and leave the work to {NICKNAME}. If Sushang were in, she'd be sure to agree with me.

C: 走吧，我们回去把它带到镇妖塔里吧。
E: Let's go back and put it inside the Suppression Tower.

C: 嗨哟，这是太卜司要变天了啊！
E: Looks like the Divination Commission is in for a big change!

C: 你该不会是又被太卜贬了一顿，打算自暴自弃了吧？
E: You're not just letting yourself give up because the master diviner humiliated you again, are you?

C: 太卜在人情方面还真是老派。
E: The Master Diviner really is old-school when it comes to repaying favors.

C: 我正上着班呢？看看气氛好吗？
E: I'm working! Read the room.

C: 帝垣琼玉需要一次革命。
E: Celestial Jade needs a revolution.

C: 嘿，你还别不信。
E: Hey! You still don't believe me?

C: 正当你以为无人认识这位化外民之后，企图变卖他的房产，却发现「凶宅」真的闹鬼了，这让你感到害怕……
E: Just when you thought that no one would know who this outworlder was, you tried to sell off his property. But, realizing this "haunted house" really was haunted, you got scared...

C: 真的假的？密码是在「T」九宫格上的笔顺？
E: Seriously? The password is the stroke order for "T" on a nine-square grid?

C: 你面前的幽府武弁发出一阵吃力的嘶吼声。你和你的同伴观望许久，但什么都没发生。
E: The Wraith Warden belts out a strained roar. You and your companions watch on for ages, but nothing happens.

C: 你打算往哪儿走？不是说好了只要把你放出来，跟我走也没关系吗？岁阳还真是狡猾啊！
E: Where do you think you're going? Didn't you promise that you'd do anything so long as we helped you get out of there? Heliobi really are tricky!

C: 有办法了，{NICKNAME}方便跟我来一趟吗？我、我有个想法。
E: I've an idea. {NICKNAME}, can you come with me? I—I thought of something.

C: 喂，那边的小东西，这两人是你的棋子吗？分我一个如何？!
E: Hey, little fellow. Are these two your pawns? How about giving one of them to me!?

C: 真实的想法……
E: What I really think...

C: 就让我来当小火苗的导游吧。
E: Let me be your guide today, little ember.

C: 原来是这样吗……
E: Is that so...

C: 不见不散。
E: See you there.

C: 之前是多亏大家帮忙，才拿到了银色奖牌，没想到这才多久啊…这么快就突破到百万粉丝了——当然，还是多亏了大家的帮忙。
E: Thank you so much to everyone who helped us get our silver medallion. It seems like just yesterday... but now we've already smashed through the million subs mark — and of course, it's all thanks to everyone's support, too.

C: 哪有什么「嘎吱响的空荡货仓」啊，这附近连个人影都没有。
E: Where's this "creaky old empty warehouse" then? There's not a soul around.

C: 真倒霉，这次也扑空了…
E: Bad luck. I missed out this time, too...

C: 我还没准备好。
E: I'm not ready yet.

C: 在休息区的就要保持安静，刚刚在进食区吃饱了的，玩累了的，可以直接过来呼呼大睡。
E: Those in the Rest Area should be keeping quiet. Those who are done eating in the Dining Area or who have worn themselves out playing can come here for a good sleep.

C: （呃，糟糕，好像喷错了…还是赶紧改回来吧。）
E: (Er, drat... I think that's the wrong symbol... Better change it back, quick.)

C: 好恶心……
E: So gross...

C: （呃，糟糕，好像喷错了…还是赶紧改回来吧。）
E: (Er, drat... I think that's the wrong symbol... Better change it back, quick.)

C: 接驳车站吗？那边是挺危险的…可怜的小妹妹，等等，她还活着吗？她该不会……
E: The shuttle station? It is quite dangerous over there... Poor girl... wait, is she still alive? Could she have...

C: 呃…外科手术，开肠破肚？
E: Um... Through an opening? Maybe open the beetle up?

C: 真是只脾气古怪的鸟……
E: What a strange and moody bird...

C: 那没事。你去告诉它，我回来了，让它速速迎接。
E: Well, no need to make a commotion. Inform her of my return and request her immediate presence.

C: 啊？岂有此理！我去亲自问问它！
E: What? How outrageous! I shall personally inquire of her!

C: 不服管教的孩子可不能惯着…得适当让他们吃点苦头。溺爱可是最糟糕的教育方式，切记，切记。
E: I never spoil misbehaving kids... They need to face the consequences. Pampering them is the worst way to teach them, remember that.

C: …好吧。那就让你眨三次眼睛好了。
E: ...Alright, then... blink three times.

C: 脱离家族的管控后，我们过得很快乐。
E: We've been leading a happy life ever since we broke free from The Family's control.

C: 你想要掏出你最熟悉的那根球棒，却怎么都找不着。皮鞭重重打在你的身上，一下又一下，不算很痛，屈辱的滋味却是那般真切。
E: You try to grab your trusty baseball bat, but it's nowhere to be found. The whip keeps hitting you, not really causing much pain, but the humiliation is so real.

C: 梅芙恩的邀约啊，那撕掉也没关系吧？
E: An invitation from Maeven, huh? So it's okay if I tear it up. Don't you think?

C: 以前写剧本的时候，我就特别讨厌给角色取名字，想想啊…你的骰子上印着图案，长得又很黑，干脆就叫你「黑桃」好了。
E: Well, I was terrible at naming characters when I wrote scripts... I see you have some spades on your die, so maybe I'll just call you "Spade"?

C: 我忘了准备调制饮品用的材料。
E: I forgot to prepare the ingredients for mixing the drink.

C: 你想做什么？
E: What would you like?

C: …想要什么口味的，我都能给你调。
E: ...Sure, I can make whatever you want.

C: 就选小的！
E: Small all the way!

C: <size=28>在我已经说明，我是这家酒吧的老主顾后，你居然还没有向我表达该有的敬意。这是服务员该有的样子吗？啊？！</size>
E: <size=28>Even after I told you how I was a regular of this lounge, you still didn't show me respect. Is that how a server should act? Huh!?</size>

C: （掏出球棒。）
E: (Take out the baseball bat.)

C: 说不定，这家酒吧很快就要倒闭了。
E: Perhaps this lounge will go out of business soon.

C: 没有理由，但我就是这么觉得。我看不到它的未来，也就无法接受它的现在。
E: I don't know why, but it's just a feeling I have. I'm unable to see its future, and I struggle to accept its present.

C: 令人心动的味道。轻易就掌握住了人家的喜好，您果然是位经验丰富的老手呢！
E: A tantalizing taste, indeed. You must be a seasoned drinksmith who can easily grasp your customers' preferences!

C: 嘻嘻，人家和您可才刚认识，不能进展这么快的啦。
E: Hehe, I'd love to, but let's not rush things. We've just met, after all.

C: 很多事本来就是徒劳无功的。
E: Many things are doomed to futility.

C: 我说什么你都不会相信吧。
E: You won't believe anything I say anyway.

C: …分层？
E: ...Layering?

C: 这家酒吧建立的时间并不长，但还是留下了不少回忆。
E: This lounge hasn't been around for long, but it's already filled with so many memories.

C: 用来采撷灵感的氛围已经足够，请——给我调份<color=#dbc291ff>怀旧风格，超大杯，带着微微甜，味道又特别强烈</color>的饮料吧。
E: I have enough atmosphere to generate inspiration now. Please, make me a drink that brings feelings of <color=#dbc291ff>nostalgia, in an extra large glass, and is slightly sweet. Its taste should be particularly strong</color>!

C: 说实话，会有一定的风险，家族始终希望能清理掉那些怪物。但我相信你的判断。
E: To be honest, this is a bit risky, as The Family always intend to wipe out those monsters. However, I have faith in your judgment.

C: 我很好相处的，处不好在自己身上找找原因哇！
E: I'm pretty easygoing. If you don't get along with me, maybe the problem lies with you!

C: 继续
E: Keep going

C: 汪汪
E: WoofWoof

C: 汪  汪  汪汪汪
E: Woof  Woof  WoofWoofWoof

C: 佩<rhythm>佩
E: Pep<rhythm>py

C: 聊天<rhythm>真<rhythm>开心
E: Chatting <rhythm>is <rhythm>happy

C: 刚才说到哪儿了？噢，梦境酒店，那地方可不太平。
E: What was I saying? Oh, the hotel in the Dreamscape is not safe.

C: 我站在里面疯狂嘲讽，他们气得直冒烟呢，只能灰溜溜地走了。你说有意思不！
E: I stood inside and started wildly mocking them. They were so mad that smoke was coming out of their ears. All they could do was walk away with their tails between their legs. Pretty interesting, right?

C: 伯顿小心翼翼地把两份报表放在一起，纸质的文件上，密密麻麻的数字飞速闪动。
E: Burton carefully pieces the two parts of the statement together, and the numbers on the paper rapidly flash.

C: 还是先从这里出去吧，在办公室里吐出来要扣钱的。
E: Let's just get out of here. We'll lose money if we end up puking in the office.

C: 那么现在，事不宜迟，我们先来进行基础的新手教学吧？
E: Shall we get right to the tutorial for newbies now?

C: 我刚刚更新了一下ID卡里的数据，现在继续？
E: I just updated the data in the ID card. Wanna keep going?

C: 个鬼啊！知不知道什么叫先来后到！
E: Yeah, right! Ever heard of "get in line"!?

C: 你怎么在这里？
E: What are you doing here?

C: 还记得你在晖长石号 / 开拓之尾号 / 塔塔洛夫号 / 飞翔时针号上见过的街机吗？现在家族打算在那玩意的基础上开发一款新游戏。
E: Remember those arcade machines you saw on The Radiant Feldspar / The Trailblaze's Stern / The Tatalov / The Soaring Clock Hand? The Family plans to develop a new game based on them.

C: 我考虑考虑…
E: I'll think about it...

C: 但和勇者一同冒险的那种身临其境的感受，直到今天仍然记忆犹新。
E: At any rate, that feeling of immersion like I'm still adventuring with the hero is still fresh in my mind even now.

C: 既然您已率先集齐了四台街机，那么请让我为您送上本次测试的纪念奖励——「折纸小鸟街机·限定豪华款」！
E: Since you managed to collect four arcade machines first, allow me to give you the souvenir for this test: A limited-edition deluxe version of the Origami Bird Arcade Machine!

C: 那么，在本次测试流程的最后，请允许我向诸位介绍一位贵客——
E: Well then, as we come to the end of the test, allow me to introduce a guest to all of you...

C: 无妨。时间还早，我们不如换个地方好好聊聊。难得恰好彼此都有空闲，不是吗。
E: It's not a big deal. Since it's still early, why don't we chat somewhere else? After all, you have time to spare, right?

C: 所以…你们找我有事吗？
E: So... you were looking for me?

C: 他看过来了！你别那么大声！
E: He's noticed us! Keep it down!

C: 求之不得！
E: Wouldn't have it any other way!

C: 有什么好辩解的？原本相信你的人，不需要听你的辩解，打定主意不相信你的人，又不会听你的辩解。
E: What is there to explain? Those who initially believed in you don't require your explanations, and those who are determined not to believe won't listen to your explanations.

C: 但这也不代表所有人都希望看到你失败的，卢卡先生！你刚才说过，有支持者会为你辩护。在网上，不友善的声音听起来总会特别响亮刺耳，让支持你的声音反而显得微不足道。
E: But that doesn't mean everyone wants to see you fail, Mr. Luka! There are supporters for you. Online, unfriendly voices always seem particularly loud and harsh, overshadowing the supportive voices.

C: 到现在了你才跟我们说这个？你对得起我们这些支持你的老粉吗，铄金？！
E: And you're telling us this now? How are you going to face us, your longtime supporters, Shuojin!?

C: …正如各位刚才看到的那样！卢卡选手使用「玛米图<unbreak>17</unbreak>ProPlus战斗用外骨骼」，甚至击败了公司最新研发的「次世代动力战斗装甲ARMS」！真是令人大跌眼镜的矛盾大对决！
E: ...As you just witnessed, Luka used Mamitu <unbreak>17</unbreak>ProPlus Combat Exoskeleton to defeat the IPC's latest Advanced Reinforced Mechanized Suit (ARMS)! Truly a jaw-dropping clash of contradictions!

C: 成为无名客，意味着你不再留恋过去，而是选择开拓未来。
E: Becoming a Nameless signifies leaving the past behind to blaze a trail into the future.

C: 全剧终
E: The End

C: 请注意，格式化设备将清除用户餐饮习惯、热量规划、代谢效率等所有数据！
E: Warning: Reformatting me will wipe all user data, including their eating habits, energy expenditure plans, metabolic rates, and more!

C: 走！带你看看去！
E: Okay! It's this way. Follow me!

C: 卧榻之侧岂容末日兽鼾睡？
E: How could I allow a Doomsday Beast to slumber next to me?

C: 放心，{NICKNAME}乘客。帕姆明白，你这里还在装修，肯定不会太整洁。列车长会充分考虑目前的情形，做出公正的评判。
E: Don't worry, Passenger {NICKNAME}. Pom-Pom understands that you're still renovating, so it might not be very tidy. I will take the current situation into account and make a fair assessment.

C: 你把头伸过来，我给你增加点智慧！
E: Come closer, and I'll add a bit of wisdom for you!

C: 你们向地宫深处走去，脚下是凝结了不知多少历史的砖石。
E: You head deeper into the hypogeum. Along the way, you step on countless bricks, each a slice of history condensed over untold years.

C: 我就不问你都经历过什么奇遇了。收好吧，它们毕竟是你的战利品。
E: I won't ask you to elaborate on what you have experienced. Keep these priceless treasures safe, for they're yours now.

C: 说罢，它便将剩下的红土全吃了，天知道它那小身板是怎么装下的。
E: Then it gobbles up all the remaining redsoil. Nobody knows how that tiny body can hold so much.

C: 一天之内连续遭受两次打击，真是太爽了！人生就该充满惊喜！
E: Two hits in one day? Oh, just peachy! Life should be full of surprises like this!

C: 多年后，奥赫玛城中出现了一只无比成功的大地兽。
E: Years later, an incredibly successful dromas appears in the city of Okhema.

C: 还是先庆祝顺利通过检查吧。
E: Let's celebrate passing the check first.

C: 呜嗡！呜嗡——！（我也想啊！虽然可爱点也挺好的…但我还是想长大啦——）
E: Grumph! Grumph—! (If only I could! Cuteness is great, but I want to grow up already—!)

C: 呜…（{F#妈妈}{M#爸爸}，我想问，你…害怕失败吗？）
E: Grumph... ({F#Mama}{M#Papa}, can I ask you something? Do you ever fear failure?)

C: 呵，你成功引起了我的兴趣！
E: Heh, now you've piqued my interest!

C: 它用迅雷不及掩耳的速度窜了出去，顺道撞碎一个飞天坛递，获得了超级加速。
E: It shot out at lightning speed, smashing a Flying Amphora along the way and gaining a super speed boost.

C: 看着孩子这么努力学习，作为家长，你心中五味杂陈。
E: As a parent, watching your child work so hard fills your heart with a complicated mix of emotions.

C: 呜嗡~（铁锅炖大地兽，大家都是配菜。）
E: Grumph~ (Iron pot dromas stew with everyone else as side dishes.)

C: 我们特意为驮子 / 小地兽 / 大撕垃 / 地宝 / 开拓者二世 / 大奇美拉 / 乌拉诺斯 / 地大地大准备了旅团迎新餐——看看这些土块的色泽，多么诱人啊。尽管吃吧，小家伙。
E: We've prepared a special welcome feast for Beast of Burden / Mini Dromas / Dromasilla / Dromy / Trailblazer Jr / The Great Chimera / Uranus / Dromasmas. Just look at the appetizing color of these dirt clumps. Go ahead and dig in, little one.

C: 呜~嗡？（我在想，要是让一些属性登峰造极，我会变成什么样子呢？）
E: Hmm~? (I wonder what I'd become if some of my stats were maxed out?)

C: 交给{F#妈妈}{M#爸爸}啦！
E: Leave it to {F#Mama}{M#Papa}!

C: 查看待鉴定宝物。
E: Check the treasures waiting for appraisal.

C: 你来得正是时候。今早刚开门，有个人急忙送来这杯子，还支付了三倍鉴定费加急，也不知道在急什么……
E: Your timing couldn't be better. Right after opening this morning, someone hurried in with this cup, paying triple the usual fee for an urgent appraisal. I'm still puzzled by the rush.

C: 材料没带着吗…我这会儿不太方便走开，要麻烦你去取过来了，真不好意思。
E: You don't have the materials with you? I'm tied up at the moment, so you'll need to go get them. Sorry for the inconvenience.

C: 告诉我更多仲裁官的事。
E: Tell me more about the Arbitrator.

C: 谢谢！我就知道，{NICKNAME}最好啦。
E: Thanks, {NICKNAME}, I knew it! You're the best!

C: 不出所料…
E: As I expected...

C: （鼓掌声）
E: (Applaud)

C: 热心工作是好事，但{NICKNAME}还有许多事要忙吧？就别兼职啦。
E: Love the enthusiasm, but {NICKNAME}, you've got a lot on your plate too. Better leave the heavy lifting to us.

C: 放心。*我们*不会让小灰失望的！
E: Don't worry. We won't let you down!

C: 营业目标完成，就到美食评审会的时间啦。走吧，*我们*去把甜蜜蜜带给阿蝶！
E: Now that we've hit our sales target, it's time for the food review. Let us go bring some sweetness to Cas!

C: 小灰，有事想拜托你。这次的送审菜品，能让*我们*来决定嘛？
E: Little Gray, can we ask you a favor? Can we decide which dishes to submit for judging?

C: 还有位评审员似乎中途有事离开了。按照规则，我宣布，本次评审会的结果是——
E: Looks like one judge had to step out halfway. So by the rules, I'll go ahead and announce the winner of this culinary showdown—

C: 今天便是揭晓胜负的时刻。吞下失败的苦果前，你还有什么想说的？
E: Today is when the victor will be decided. Any last words before you taste the bitter sting of defeat?

C: 唔，我倒是去问过了。肉类和特殊食材可以买到，但蔬菜还是得从地里种才行呢。
E: I've already asked her. We can stock up on meat and rare ingredients, but when it comes to veggies, well, those still need to be grown in the fields.

C: 那刻夏老师，突然叫我们过来，是有什么急事吗？
E: Professor Anaxa, you called us so suddenly. What's the emergency?

C: 看好了，这便是此世最伟大的——
E: Observe carefully, for this shall be the most magnificent—

C: 叫我阿那克萨戈拉斯老师。
E: That's Professor Anaxagoras to you.

C: 要是能让那群小动物相信，这是瑟希斯种出来的神奇果实，有着延年益寿、益智健体的功效，那也行，只是实行起来比较麻烦。
E: I mean, we could tell the critters these are Cerces's magical fruits that'll make them live longer, get smarter, and stay healthy. Though that would be such a pain to actually do...

C: 无稽之谈。尽管这位农业专家…呵，理念极为独特，但他的品行倒是不必怀疑。
E: Preposterous claims. While our agricultural expert admittedly has... peculiar methodologies, his integrity is unimpeachable.

C: 好漂亮，谢谢你们迷！
E: Beautiful! Thank you, mem!

C: 快下来迷！这是用来吃饭的地方，村长发现要生气了迷。
E: Hurry down, mem! This is the dining area. If Chief sees, they'll be mad, memim!

C: 没人主动举手了吗？那*我们*要点名了哦。
E: No hands up? Then we are going to start calling out names!

C: 所以，现在到*我们*啦！
E: So, we are up next!

C: 迷！宴会开始！大家，开吃！
E: Mem! The feast has started! Everyone, dig in!

C: 关于「主厨角斗」…
E: About the Chef Showdown...

C: 你的行为已经激起对应命途的回响……
E: Your actions have aroused a corresponding echo of Paths...

C: 开启钟表把戏
E: Activate Clockwork

E: Extroverted Slumbernana Fan

E: Oronyx

E: Furiae Praetor

C: 英雄的回响
E: Hero's Echo

C: 悬锋士兵B
E: Kremnoan Soldier B

C: 悬锋士兵C
E: Kremnoan Soldier C

E: Crude Ladonian

E: Cyrene Etched in Memory

E: Combat Rating Enthusiast

E: Cowardly Pepeshi

E: Outlander Leader

C: 果蔬摊的梅塔涅拉
E: Metanella of the Fruit Stall

C: 「搬运工」老巴特
E: Old Bart the Porter

C: 被修好的机巧鸟
E: Repaired Cycrane

C: 煞火
E: Burnie

E: SoulGlad Vendor

C: 魔王爪牙•拦路双杰
E: Demon King's Minions: Intercepting Heroes

C: 评审员妖精
E: Judge Fairy

C: 人工智能回复
E: AI Reply

C: 钻钻娃推销员
E: Diamond Doll Salesman

C: 愤慨的安保
E: Outraged Security Guard

C: 「副导演」
E: "Assistant Director"

C: 医护模样的女子
E: Woman Appearing As A Healer

C: 你的狂热粉丝
E: Your Fanatical Fan

C: 胆小虫
E: Coward Nymph

C: 修理虫
E: Fixer Bug

C: 知道虫
E: Knowing Bug

C: 誓言虫
E: Vow Bug

C: 潜水萤
E: Diverworm

C: 难逃虫
E: Trapped Nymph

C: 怯懦的声音
E: Timid Voice

C: 克里斯普斯
E: Crispus

C: 虔诚的家徒
E: Pious Domestic Worker

C: 天真的孩子
E: Naive Child

C: 「药王秘传」信徒
E: Disciple of Sanctus Medicus

C: 风堇
E: Hyacine

C: 乱破（？）
E: Rappa(?)

E: Feixiao

C: 人们的神陷入癫狂，\n城邦也迷失在雾中。
E: When their god descended into madness,\nthe city likewise became shrouded in fog.

C:
<color=#9e5738>不死之躯</color>，
从不等同「全无缺失」，
为寻命门，
男人数次只身涉险。
E:
<color=#9e5738>A body immortal</color>,
Equals not "perfection."
The man braved dangers endless,
Simply to seek his weakness.

C: 女孩对惊诧的老妇露出笑靥——\n「今天，我可不是空手而返。」
E: The girl smiles at the old woman, now stunned in shock —\n"I actually did return with some catch."

C: 骗术、佻窃、夜盗，\n总在最后关头露怯。
E: Deception, theft, and night heists—\nBut her nerves failed her when it mattered most.

C:
但时间不会为欢宴停留，
深海殷红、日轮偏斜，
神礼观众躬身，
战火随之燃起。
E:
But time will not pause for feasting.
The sea's depths burn crimson, and the sun begins to tilt.
The Theoros bows in reverence,
as the flames of war are fiercely kindled.

C: 我许愿…让你被记忆的镜面照亮，\n银河会看见这缕光芒，\n为无尽的回环捎来一个顿号。
E: I wish... for you to be illuminated by the mirror of memories,\nso that the cosmos can see this ray of light\nand bring a pause to the endless loops.

C: 它梦见星间的碎银，\n倒映出另一条巨龙的身影。
E: They dreamed of silver shards amongst the stars,\nReflecting the form of another giant dragon.

C:
黎明…黎明？
若这毁灭的傀儡所念者为黎明，
那逐火的终末…
是何光景？
E:
Dawn... Dawn?
If this puppet of destruction yearns for Dawn,
Then what awaits...
At the end of the Flame-Chase?

C: 「坚忍对生存无益。」\n开山者总如此评价他的好友，\n而巨龙只答以低吟。
E: "Endurance does not help with survival."\nMountainbreaker always speaks of his friend this way,\nWhile the Giant Dragon only responds with a low growl.

C: 一片汪洋的星球里，\n新生了喜欢碰撞的海豹。
E: In an ocean-covered planet,\nA new species of seals evolved, with a penchant for bumping into things.

C: 有人说她是尼卡多利的宿敌，\n有人说墨涅塔也为她着迷，
E: Some say she was Nikador's nemesis,\nWhile others say Mnestia was infatuated with her.

C: 「将领竟亲自踏入险境？」\n霸主冲向王翼露出的漏隙，\n转瞬落入烈焰与箭雨的陷阱。
E: "The leader herself actually dares to step forth and face peril?"\nThe tyrant charged toward the exposed gap in the king's flank,\nAnd instantly fell into a trap of raging flames and iron rain.

C: 曾被世人仰望的旗帜，\n与群英的折戟一同成为墓碣。
E: The banner once revered by the people,\nAlong with the broken spears of the heroes, now a tomb.

C: 宴客偶尔将她提起，\n也只是举杯间的祝祷——
E: Guests at the banquet sometimes spoke of her,\nBut it was only a prayer between their cups —

C: 乐手在泉中引弦，\n圆舞的裙摆掀起水浪，\n掀起了无数过往。
E: The musician plucks her strings in the spring,\nAnd the waltzing hem stirs the water into waves,\nRevealing memories in throngs.

C:
她唱起了自己，
一盏骨鲠做的酒杯，
总在待人将杯中的虚无驱散，
为她斟满命运的蜜酿。
E:
She sang of herself,
A cup made of fish bones,
Ever waiting for someone to banish the nihility within,
Pouring the honey brew of fate for her to the brim.

C: 庭院之外，闲言透过树梢传入学者耳旁，\n他在心中给每个回答打上了分数，\n但正确的答案无人知晓。
E: Outside the courtyard, the gossip flows into the scholar's ear.\nHe silently gives a grade to every question and argument,\nBut none know the true answer, according to his judgment.

C: 「多此一举。」\n对此，他嗤之以鼻，
E: "Pointless notion."\nHe dismissed in derision.

C: 「德谬歌」
E: Demiurge

C: 欢呼和议论声在酒馆里此起彼伏。执棋的少女打了个哈欠，将「皇后」掷上棋盘。
E: Cheers and chatter ebbed and flowed throughout the tavern. The girl playing chess yawned and tossed the Queen piece onto the board.

C: 「至少你出现了。」
E: "At least you showed up."

C: 「就算艾格勒掉下来，我也会帮你们撑住的。」他诚挚的目光似乎在说明这并非虚假的承诺。
E: "Even if Aquila falls, I'll help hold things together for all of you." His sincere gaze seemed to indicate this was no empty promise.

E: March 7th and █████

E: NeiKos<unbreak>496</unbreak>

C: NeiKos496和PhiLia093幻想中的英雄形象。 推测为智能奇点临近的表征，二者开始学习并试图成为「真正的生命」。 星穹列车到来后，「心中的英雄」逐渐与开拓者重合。 管理员批注：该形象与开拓者具备高度相似性，此事疑点重重，绝非实验自然结果。具体原因尚未查明。
E: A heroic figure born from the imaginations of NeiKos496 and PhiLia093. It is believed to be a sign of approaching the Intelligence Singularity, as the two began to learn what it meant to be "a real life form" and tried to reach that goal. After the Astral Express arrived, "The Hero Within" began to converge with the Trailblazer. Admin Note: The image's resemblance to the Trailblazer is striking. This is a questionable matter, for it is not a natural result of the experiment. The exact cause remains unknown.
