C: 我会一直盯着你…一直…一直…一直…盯着你……
E: I'll have my eye on you at all times... all times... all times... all times... eyes on you...

C: 豁然开朗
E: Opportune Breakthrough

C: 获得新装饰
E: New Decoration Obtained

C: 你对激动人心的旅行没有什么想法，反正都是随大流跑来跑去罢了。真没想到，在这方面你居然是个毫无主见的漂流派——和你平时爱出风头的做派完全不同。\n不过仔细想想，一个团队里总要有几个习惯依附于他人想法的人，意见领袖过多往往不见得是什么好事。有姬子和瓦尔特在，你只要当一只跟在他们身后的乖乖浣熊就够了。
E: You have little interest in thrilling adventures. You're just going back and forth with the tide anyway. Who would have thought that you're a passive drifter when it comes to this — Such an attitude is entirely different from your usual showy self.\nThough, come to think of it, every group needs those who are willing to adhere to the will of others. Having too many cooks in the kitchen is often not a good thing. With Himeko and Welt around, all you need to do is to be a nice little raccoon that follows after their coattails.

C: 我们早就熟悉彼此…有意思的是，我也有同感。\n但正确答案果真如此吗？别心急，等到一同见证尘埃全部落定，我就会向你表明真身。
E: We've known each other for a long time... Interestingly, I feel the same way.\nBut is this truly the correct answer? Don't be in a hurry. When we have witnessed the end of this business together, I will certainly reveal to you my true identity.

C: 你与少女共同见证了幻梦中的流星雨——但你知晓这只是颠簸旅途中的短暂温存。\n你会为了恰如其分的美好瞬间露出笑容，但那并不意味着你对任何人或事物过度依恋。短暂的插曲与漫长的乐章，你深知二者之间的差别。
E: You and the girl witness the meteor shower in this fantastical dream together. However, you know this is but a brief tenderness along this bumpy journey.\nYou'll smile for the moments you deem appropriately wonderful, but that doesn't mean you'll overly cling to anyone or anything. You know the difference between short interludes and long symphonies quite well.

C: <color=#f29e38ff>「储物仓库」</color>本层探索中，可获得大量道具。
E: <color=#f29e38ff>Storage Room</color>: In this level, a large amount of items can be obtained.

C: <color=#f29e38ff>「闭境自守」</color>具有「镇守」能力的敌人，会根据周围的区域强化自身，击败它后可获取门卡。
E: <color=#f29e38ff>Lair Protector</color>: Enemies with the Garrison ability will strengthen themselves according to the surroundings. Defeat them to obtain the Door Card.

C: 精英•藏宝能力•炸弹
E: Elite: Treasure Ability — Bomb

C: 第四遗迹
E: Ruin 4

C: 可使用任意2个红钻/蓝钻进行合成，可获得财富宝钻。
E: Perform synthesis using any 2 Red Gems/Blue Gems to obtain a Wealth Gem.

C: 「货币战争」中，你拥有初始职级。\n挑战标准博弈模式的<color=#f29e38ff>当前最高职级难度</color>成功时，可根据结算时剩余<color=#f29e38ff>小队生命值</color>获得<color=#f29e38ff>对局评价</color>，提升职级。
E: In Currency Wars, you start with an initial rank.\nSuccessfully challenging the <color=#f29e38ff>current highest rank difficulty</color> in the Standard Gambit mode will earn you a <color=#f29e38ff>battle rating</color> based on your remaining <color=#f29e38ff>squad HP</color>, allowing you to rank up.

C: 星际和平公司荣誉出品的寻物仪，昵称为<color=#f29e38ff>查宝</color>。可以根据它<color=#f29e38ff>指引的方向</color>找到特殊物品，但需要注意放置距离。
E: An object finder produced by the Interastral Peace Corporation, lovingly known as <color=#f29e38ff>Findie</color>. You can find treasures by following <color=#f29e38ff>the direction indicated by Findie</color>. However, it won't find things that are too far away.

C: <color=#f29e38ff>照雪灯炉</color>是银鬃铁卫技术部发明的作战辅助装置，它由<color=#f29e38ff>灯炉基座</color>和<color=#f29e38ff>热能核心</color>两部分构成。
E: <color=#f29e38ff>Snowshine Lamp</color> is a combat support device invented by the Silvermane Guard Technology Division. It consists of two parts: The <color=#f29e38ff>base of the lamp</color> and the <color=#f29e38ff>thermic core</color>.

C: 开启跟踪玩法时，<color=#f29e38ff>玩法提示器</color>将出现在画面上方。
E: When Trailing Mode is active, the <color=#f29e38ff>Gameplay Prompter</color> will appear on top of the screen.

C: 在电影模式中，影片长度是有限的，下方的进度条代表着<color=#f29e38ff>拍摄的进度</color>。
E: The film's length is limited in Movie Mode. The progress bar below indicates <color=#f29e38ff>the filming progress</color>.

C: 靠近<color=#f29e38ff>「梦泡酒塔」并与之交互</color>可以获得<color=#f29e38ff>「梦泡充能」</color>次数。
E: Approach <color=#f29e38ff>Bubble Tower and interact with it</color> to obtain <color=#f29e38ff>Bubble Charges</color>.

C: 开火命中石头老板的金币，能够将金币反弹回去，让石头老板自食恶果
E: Firing at the Boss Stone's coins can deflect them back, thus giving him a taste of his own medicine

C: 用手中的圣火<color=#f29e38ff>点亮祭坛</color>，让世界获得光明吧！
E: Use the holy flame in hand to <color=#f29e38ff>light up the altar</color> and bring light to this world!

C: <color=#f29e38ff>集齐一个区域的若虫后</color>，「衣匠」便会开始解读预言，可能提供意想不到的信息，导向某些未知的惊喜。
E: <color=#f29e38ff>After collecting all the nymphs of an area</color>, the Garmentmaker will begin deciphering the prophecy and may provide unexpected information to unknown surprises.

C: 可以利用「欧洛尼斯祷言」让镇球塑像溯回至基座完好的状态。
E: Oronyx's Prayer can be used to rewind the Ball-Holder Statue to when its base is undamaged.

C: 「识之花」有时会受到侵蚀，即使将其回溯，它也会自行回到发动能力前的状态。
E: Cognos Bloom sometimes becomes corrupted. Even after it has been Rewound, it will still return to its state before the ability was used.

C: 对物体进行<color=#f29e38ff>回溯</color>时，该物体<color=#f29e38ff>不会受到时间停止区域的影响。</color>
E: While <color=#f29e38ff>rewinding</color> an object, that object <color=#f29e38ff>will not be affected by the time-stopped zone.</color>

C: 提高的<color=#f29e38ff>属性值</color>可以在本遗迹的<color=#f29e38ff>浅层探索和深层探索</color>中生效。
E: Increased <color=#f29e38ff>stats</color> can take effect in <color=#f29e38ff>both Surface Exploration and Deep Exploration</color> of the ruins.

C: 在战斗中，角色的每次<color=#f29e38ff>行动</color>都会积累「战意值」。\n每个关卡均设有独特的<color=#f29e38ff>「战意机制」</color>，触发「战意机制」可大幅增加「战意值」，迅速提升「战意阶段」。
E: Every time a character <color=#f29e38ff>takes action</color> in combat, Grit Value will be accumulated.\nEvery stage will have unique <color=#f29e38ff>Grit Mechanics</color>, and triggering them will greatly increase Grit Value, thus allowing you to quickly elevate your Grit Phase.

C: 「开拓，友谊魔法！」活动中，熟悉的角色们将会作为「魔法师」登场，与「小桶宝力」并肩作战。
E: In the "Trailblaze: Friendship Is Magic!" event, familiar characters will appear as the Magician, fighting side by side with Litter Pony.

C: 在值日过程中，将会遇到「普通」、「稀有」和「特殊」三种「行动卡」。「稀有行动卡」可以获得更多值日经验与列车基金；「特殊行动卡」会提供各种特殊效果。
E: During the duty periods, you will encounter three types of Action Cards: "Normal," "Rare," and "Special." Rare Action Cards grant more Duty Experience and Express Funds, while Special Action Cards provide various special effects.

C: 停留在格子上会触发对应效果，在选择行动卡时，尽量停留在有利的格子上。
E: An effect will be triggered based on the tile you stop on. When selecting Action Cards, do your best to end up on advantageous tiles.

C: 在有限的重整思路与提交汇报次数内，尽可能提高帕姆评分，换取更多列车基金吧！
E: Get as high of a score as you can from Pom-Pom within the limited number of "Mental Reset" and "Submit Report" attempts. Do your best to earn Express Funds!

C: 移动地面的阵枢，使阵法的星纹与<color=#f29e38ff>昭示图案</color>一致，以完成谜题。
E: Move the base terminals on the ground and align the matrix's star patterns with the <color=#f29e38ff>displayed pattern</color> to complete the puzzle.

C: <color=#f29e38ff>攻击</color>该敌人使其【战甲】层数降低至0层后，该敌人将立即<color=#f29e38ff>吸收</color>相邻目标并将目标消灭。
E: After <color=#f29e38ff>attacking</color> the enemy and reducing their "War Armor" stacks to 0, the enemy will immediately <color=#f29e38ff>absorb</color> adjacent targets and defeat them.

C: 对战道具有各种各样的效果，使用道具<color=#f29e38ff>不会消耗行动步数</color>，但每种道具在每场对战中<color=#f29e38ff>可使用次数有限</color>。
E: Battle items have different effects. Using an item <color=#f29e38ff>will not consume a move</color>. However, each type of item has <color=#f29e38ff>a limited number of uses</color> per fight.

C: 这是<color=#f29e38ff>广告牌</color>，\n撞倒广告牌会带来<color=#f29e38ff>减速</color>效果。\n请不要得罪广告商！
E: This is a <color=#f29e38ff>Billboard</color>.\nYou will be <color=#f29e38ff>Slowed</color> when you run into a Billboard.\nPlease don't offend the advertisers!

C: 在双人对战中，玩家将与对手在<color=#f29e38ff>同一场地</color>上进行对战。
E: In a Duo Duel, the player and their opponent fights on the <color=#f29e38ff>same field</color>.

C: 小桶初始拥有1点生命值，我方角色每<color=#f29e38ff>降低</color>或<color=#f29e38ff>回复</color>一定生命值时，小桶会回复等额生命值。\n生命值回复至上限时<color=#f29e38ff>进化</color>，进化后为我方全体提供<color=#f29e38ff>伤害提高增益</color>。\n处于【究极金】形态时，每当我方角色攻击敌人，小桶损失生命值，生命值为1点时退化为【金】。
E: Minicans start with 1 point of HP. Every time allied characters <color=#f29e38ff>lose</color> or <color=#f29e38ff>restore</color> a certain amount of HP, the minican will heal for an equivalent amount.\nWhen the HP restored exceeds the can's max HP, the <color=#f29e38ff>minican evolves</color> and provides <color=#f29e38ff>DMG Boost buff</color> for all allies after evolution.\nWhile in Ultra Gold form, the minican loses HP each time an ally attacks an enemy. When its HP reaches 1, it regresses to the Gold form.

C: 我方角色施放<color=#f29e38ff>终结技</color>后，小桶获得<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>点【动能点】。当【动能点】达到<unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak>点时，小桶获得额外回合并召唤<unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak>个小桶，并使该次攻击变为【自爆冲击】。每个小桶自爆可以造成<unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak>点固定数值的冰属性伤害，如果该次【自爆冲击】消灭目标，剩余的小桶进化为【究极金】状态，同时获得额外回合并进行【超级自爆冲击】。每个小桶自爆可以造<unbreak>#5[i]</unbreak>点固定数值的冰属性伤害。
E: After an ally uses their <color=#f29e38ff>Ultimate</color>, minicans gain <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> Kinetic Points. When Kinetic Points reaches <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak>, minicans gain an extra turn and summons <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> minicans, changing this attack into Self-Destructive Impact. Each minican's explosion deals a set amount of <unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak> Ice DMG. If this Self-Destructive Impact defeats the target, the remaining minicans will evolve into Ultra Gold form, receive an extra turn, and deliver Super Self-Destructive Impacts. Each minican's explosion deals a set amount of <unbreak>#5[i]</unbreak> Ice DMG.

C:
世末的昕旦，英雄举起映着斜晖的剑，搦战追逐着黄昏的夜色。
那人的胸膛跃动着闪耀的星，灼目如死去的日轮，向苍夷的大地射下银针。
他隐去名字，不闻声华，将往昔葬于凝固在记忆里的乡，誓死捍卫新的黎明。
哪怕那黎明将烧却一切。
E:
When the world's end descends, a hero raised a sword glinting in the setting sun and challenged the night that approached dusk.
His heart pulsed with the brilliance of stars, and his eyes blazed like a fallen sun, casting silver needles upon the scarred earth.
He shrouded his name in obscurity, burying the past in the homeland frozen in memory and vowing to defend the new dawn.
Even if that dawn would consume all in its fire.

C: 「记忆」战技•二
E: Skill 2 (Remembrance)

C: 如果让列车长听到那段「七休日」的主张，不知道会是什么反应呀。
E: I wonder how the conductor would react if they heard about his "seven rest days" proposal.

C: 小小的缇宝老师，却有大大的能量！为了不让她们失望，我练习了好久好久，终于把欧洛尼斯的祷言背得滚瓜烂熟！不信？哼，我背给你听……
E: Tribbie may be small, but they have lots of energy! I didn't want to disappoint them, so I practiced for a super long time and finally memorized Oronyx's prayer! You don't believe me? Hmph. I'll recite it for you then...

C: 怎么啦，要来一杯咖啡提神么？
E: Hey there. Tired? How about a coffee?

C: 这也是「开拓」的收获。
E: This is also the reward of trailblazing.

C: 有一句我很喜欢的话，也想送给他：「这片银河容得下任何的可能性，而人的命运也不应当只有上天给予的那一条道路。」
E: There is a quote I like very much that I would like to share with him: "The galaxy is vast beyond compare, containing an infinite number of possibilities. An individual's fate shouldn't be limited to a single path ordained by heaven."

C: 嗨，星穹列车。我们携手作战的机会，看来不少呢。
E: Oh, the Express Crew. Looks like we'll be joining forces quite often, huh?

C: 把头埋在抱枕里午睡和捏可爱的东西。
E: Burying my head under a pillow for a siesta, and pinching cute things.

C: 骇入空间站的时候，我随手改了下螺丝咕姆的画像，不过…最后还是改回去了。
E: When I hacked into the space station, I thought I may as well make some changes to Screwllum's portrait... but I changed it back in the end.

C: 每次夸奖她的时候，她都很努力地板着脸，不让自己露出开心的表情…我看得出来，因为我也这么练习过。
E: Whenever I praise her, she does her utmost to keep a straight face and hide any trace of happiness she might be feeling... I can tell, because I've practiced the same thing.

C: 援助来得很及时。
E: Your assistance is timely.

C: 据说「煦日节」最早是为了庆祝春至设立的节日，但对现在的贝洛伯格人来说，它不过是几天普通的假期而已…我想为「煦日节」找回它原本的意义。
E: I heard the Solwarm Festival was first established to celebrate the arrival of spring, but Belobog citizens these days just see it as a few days off... I want to bring the original meaning back again.

C: 那孩子表面坚强，实际上很害怕自己变成累赘。所以他才那么努力地训练，战斗…希望他有朝一日能静下心来，听听自己的声音。
E: That kid puts up a strong front, but under the surface he's afraid of becoming a burden — that's why he trains and fights so hard... I hope one day he's able to slow down and listen to his heart.

C: 红衣服小妹妹是真的厉害，她怎么能和那大铁疙瘩聊起来的？
E: Our little girl in red is truly impressive. How did she get that giant tinhead to listen to her?

C: 越强越好啊，合我胃口。
E: Good! The stronger the better.

C: 鼹鼠党，出动！勇敢鼹鼠向前冲！
E: Moles, Moles, leaving our holes, brave Moles, charge as a whole!

C: 放松，深呼吸。
E: Relax, deep breaths.

C: 别担心，医生！我不会在擂台上倒下。
E: Stop worrying, Nat — I'm feeling fine!

C: 身为将军，麾下云骑以命相托，不可有一日懈怠。
E: I always keep my mind sharp, for the lives of the Cloud Knights hinge on my decisions.

C: 许久不见…恩师。
E: It's been a while... Master.

C: 嗯，你好好休息…我还有些要务处理，恕不能远送。
E: Mmm, rest well... My apologies. There is still some work to be done and I can't see you out personally.

C: 不过是上万次痛苦中，最微不足道的一种。
E: One of the lesser sufferings I've endured.

C: 我活在炼狱中，而萨姆，擅长制造炼狱。
E: I live in an eternal purgatory. And Sam — he is good at creating purgatory.

C: 还不够……
E: Too little...

C: 我不清楚具体的缘由，但藿藿这么怕岁阳，那只岁阳大爷还能跟着她不敢乱动，说明她真的有一些天赋…很厉害！
E: I don't know how exactly, but Huohuo manages to keep that Tail of hers in check, even though she's terrified of heliobi... It proves she's got some serious talent!

C: 那词叫啥来着…兵、兵贵神速？总之抓紧点！
E: How does it go again? He who strikes first...? Ugh, just get on with it!

C: 将军亲临战阵，这一仗胜负我看是不用卜了吧……
E: General? No need to divine the result of this battle...

C: 起初我还当他是拿剑匣作武器，看着真有几分古怪…得想办法和他对上几招，逼迫他使出些真功夫来……
E: At first, I thought he always fights using that sword casket. That thing looks really strange... I need to figure out a way to fight him and get him to use his skills for real...

C: 剑形如水，不可久驻。
E: The sword is like water. It cannot remain still.

C: 生活呀，就是忙忙碌碌；人生呢，还要慢慢体会~
E: "Living?" that's all a big hustle and bustle. But life? Life's all about savoring the moment.

C: 罗浮上有很多好吃的，可是表演杂耍又要保持身材轻盈…真是自古忠孝难两全啊！啊？这俗语不是这么用的么？
E: There's so much good food on the Luofu, but for juggling one has to stay light and nimble. How does that ancient saying go... It's hard to be both loyal and filial? You can't serve two masters? Something like that?

C: 我曾以「刻骨铭心」的方式传授他剑艺。艺成之日，他发誓要奉还我这一剑之教。我期待这一天的到来。
E: I put him under great pain and suffering when I taught him. On the day his skills are perfected, he vows to return the favor. I look forward to it.

C: 无趣。
E: Tedious.

C: 每艘仙舟上的持明族都分得了「不朽」龙祖的恩赐。罗浮持明掌有御水行雨的奇术，名唤「云吟」。
E: The Vidyadhara that reside on the Xianzhou received a blessing from the Permanence — our dragon ancestor. On the Luofu, we wield a magic known as "cloudhymn" that allows us to manipulate water and control the rains.

C: 我代十王判罚。
E: I shall judge you for the Ten Lords.

C: 其实很久以前我们见过面…那时我正在放空自己，等回过神来的时候，我已经被素裳带到地衡司公廨，作为走失人员调查了……
E: Actually, we met a long time ago. I was outside getting some peace and quiet, when all of a sudden she dragged me before the Realm-Keeping Commission Chancery. She mistook me for a missing person...

C: 藿藿：不要啊救命啊——
E: Huohuo: Ahh—! Somebody help me!

C: 异香扑鼻，果然有宝物。
E: An exotic fragrance hits the nose — indeed, this must be treasure.

C: 冲锋陷阵是飞霄的工作，出谋划策是椒丘的工作，打扫「卫生」…是我的工作。
E: Feixiao's job is to charge at enemy lines. Jiaoqiu's job is to plot and scheme. My job is to... clean up "messes."

C: 嫉恶如仇？不不，下水道的清洁工会憎恨城市排出的污物吗？
E: Hate evil as one hates an enemy? No, no, would a sewer cleaner hate the filth the city discharges?

C: 太卜大人那副严厉而悦耳的好嗓子，我可忘不了…虽然不留情面，但又句句在理。
E: I could never forget the master diviner's stern yet pleasant voice... Though she spares no feelings, every word she says makes sense.

C: 让小女子来助恩公一臂之力吧。
E: Benefactor, let me lend you a hand.

C: 好了，成年人还有工作要做，自己去玩儿吧，开心点。
E: Alright, grown-ups got jobs to do. Off you go, make the best of it.

C: 黑塔的性格，或许有人觉得难以忍受，我也认同，但并不在乎——当然，黑塔也知道，所以我接受了她的邀请。
E: Some may find her personality unbearable — I can understand the sentiment, but I simply don't care. Of course, Herta knows this too, so I accepted her invitation.

C: 比起富人，和穷人打交道更容易些——前者总说什么都要，实际却根本不知道自己想要什么，但后者…他们可清楚得很。
E: I prefer the beggar over the rich man. The rich have no idea what they're after in life, but the beggar? Those folks — they know exactly what they want.

C: 输不了。
E: Can't lose this one.

C: 不用问，随便花。
E: Don't ask. Just spend.

C: 下次见咯，无名客~一定要注意安全，尤其是…再次见面的时候！
E: See you around, Nameless~ Try to stay out of trouble, especially... the next time we meet!

C: 不能动摇哦。
E: Don't move, okay?

C: 这世界像个马戏团，昼夜不停地上演着禽兽相争的滑稽戏：狗熊骑独轮车、狮子钻火圈、猴子顶碗…而我们「愚者」和其他人的区别在于，我们知道自己在表演~
E: This world's just like a big non-stop circus showcasing beasts brawling all day and night: Bears on unicycles, lions leaping through fire hoops, monkeys juggling bowls... The only thing that sets us "Fools" apart from the rest of you is we're already in on the act.

C: 她将那些刹那珍藏，将片刻组成永恒，在「记忆」的坟场哺育生命。相信我，如此灼热又满怀爱意的目光，永远会在回忆中璀璨如新。
E: She treasured the fleeting moments, wove instants into eternity, and nurtured life in the graveyard of the Remembrance. Trust me when I say that such a scorching and loving gaze will remain forever new and forever bright in memories.

C: 该启程了。此世如雨而逝，终归大地，希望再见时…已是天晴。
E: Our journey begins anew. Life passes like a fleeting rain, eventually merging with the ground. May our next encounter be... under a clear sky.

C: 抵达彼岸的路上，他们还会经历什么？
E: What will they experience on the journey to the other side?

C: 悄悄告诉你，钟表小子是真实存在的，不是我想象出的卡通伙伴哦！
E: Let me tell you a secret, Clockie is actually real, he isn't just an imaginary friend I made up!

C: 米沙要继续工作了。我们…还会再见的吧？
E: I should get back to work. We... we'll have another chance to meet, won't we?

C: 协定已成。
E: We have a deal.

C: 飞龙•忍者，有阁下相助，如得百人之力。
E: Ninja Hiryū, with your help, we have the strength of a hundred.

C: 壮绝的诗篇，也由一言半句织就。
E: Even the most majestic epics are woven from individual words.

C: 离预言中的胜利更近了。
E: The foretold triumph draws nearer.

C: 我最初的记忆，是在深渊中与黑暗搏杀，只因悬锋先王假借预言，将我掷入冥海献祭泰坦。但九个冬天后，这副身躯爬出了冥海…连死神也将其弃置不顾。
E: My earliest memory is of fighting the darkness in the Abyss. This was because the former king of Kremnos, under the guise of prophecy, threw me into the Sea of Souls as a sacrifice to the Titans. But after nine winters, this body of mine crawled out of the Sea... Even the Reaper themself had abandoned it.

C: 不堪一击…拿出你的全力！
E: Weakling... use all your might!

C: 每次想和她们解释神谕的自我实现性，但看着她们如今与幼童别无二致的身躯，很多话也就不必说了。
E: I keep wanting to explain to them how their divine prophecy is a self-fulfilling one. But now, seeing how they look no different from young children, I need not say anything more.

C: 也就你值得我多看一眼。
E: Now, maybe you deserve some of my attention.

C: 我仍记得，冥界中，属于「凯撒」的花总与他人不同。即便瘦小，那蓝色的花朵却总是能坚强地冲破土壤，绽放万中无一的花瓣。
E: I still remember how the flower belonging to the Imperator was always different from everyone else's in the nether realm. Though small and frail, that blue blossom was always able to burst through the soil and bloom into a peerless flower, rivaled by none.

C: 自从故乡毁于黑衣剑士之手，我便奔赴圣城寻找黎明。身为黄金裔，我的愿望未曾改变，只是背负他人的愿望，追逐火种，支撑起新的明天……
E: I left for the holy city to seek the dawn after the black-robed swordmaster laid waste to my homeland. My wish as a Chrysos Heir has never changed: I just want to shoulder the hopes of others, chase the Coreflames, and build a new tomorrow...

C: 与死亡开玩笑，同纷争捉迷藏，她以一己之力维系着谎言，这份忍耐和洒脱，令人钦佩。
E: She teased Death, toyed with Strife, and single-handedly upheld her Trickery. Her endurance and unrestrained spirit are truly admirable.

C: 听说灰宝在天外经历了好多精彩的故事，如果有机会的话，真想一起去更广阔的天外看看呀，毕竟我也是天空的子民嘛！
E: Apparently Grayie had lots of amazing adventures in the lands beyond the sky. I'd love to go with them to the worlds beyond if I can. After all, I'm a denizen of the sky!

C: 法吉娜唯一惧怕之事，便是那空无一物的寂寞。所以它成为一切江河的母亲、一切蜜酿的制造者、一切欢宴的主人，就像一尾孤浪永远无法拒绝与海水相伴…人类，也一样吧？
E: The one thing Phagousa feared was the vast emptiness of solitude. So they became the mother of all rivers, the creator of all honey brews, and the eternal host of all grand feasts, like a lone wave that cannot help but seek the company of the sea... Humans are like that too, aren't they?

C: 嘘，请在此驻足静听。
E: Shhh, stay here and listen...

C: 她循着光与热游向这里，寻找属于大海的「律法」。我们很少长篇大论，一张棋谱，一句旋律，就足以明了各自的心绪。
E: She came swimming, drawn by light and warmth, in pursuit of the ocean's Law. We seldom spoke at length. A single chessboard, a simple melody, and that was enough to understand each other's hearts.

C: 翁法罗斯，一颗悲剧的宝石，它与神相争的光芒吸引了那些觊觎记忆的窃贼。但那些伤痕累累的「岁月」，分明向我诉说着对「忘却」的渴求。
E: Amphoreus, a jewel forged in tragedy. Its defiant brilliance, daring to rival the divine, drew in thieves who covet memory. Yet in the scarred years of "Time," I hear a longing... for "Oblivion."

C: 「迷路迷境」的小妖精，是不是很可爱？当然啦，这可是「昔涟」写下的第一个故事。哆、徕、咪、发、嗦、啦、嘻，七种音符谱写出数不尽的歌谣，就像一成不变的岁月，也能创造不同以往的故事♪
E: Aren't the little fairies in the Membrance Maze cute? That's because it's the first story "Cyrene" wrote. Do, re, mi, fa, sol, la, ti... The seven notes can compose countless songs, just like how time, unchanging, can create the varied stories of the past ♪

C: 以强援弱。
E: Defend the weak.

C: 记着点。
E: Remember that.

E: In combat with Harbinger of Death: Swarm Nightmare, defeat all Juvenile Stings to force it out of the "Gene Duplication" state

C: 使1只奇美拉<color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>攻击力+<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak></color>，<color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=1 width=1 height=1>生命值+<unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak></color>
E: Increases <color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>ATK by <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak></color> and <color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=1 width=1 height=1>HP by <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak></color> for 1 chimera.

C: 使穿戴者受到的伤害降低<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>点，对战中首次受到的伤害额外降低<unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak>点.至少受到1点伤害
E: Reduces the wearer's DMG taken by <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>. The first DMG taken in battle is additionally reduced by <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak>. The minimum DMG taken is 1.

C: 同伴被击倒时：使<icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>攻击力最高的1名同伴<icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=1 width=1 height=1>生命值+<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>
E: When a companion is knocked down: Causes the <icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=0 width=1 height=1>HP of 1 companion with the highest <icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=1 width=1 height=1>ATK to increase by <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>

C: 同伴被击倒时：自身离场，并使该同伴恢复至<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>点<icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=0 width=1 height=1>生命值
E: When a companion is knocked down: This unit departs from the field and restores the companion to <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> <icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=0 width=1 height=1>HP.

C: 同伴被击倒时：自身<icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>攻击力+<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>，<icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=1 width=1 height=1>生命值+<unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak>
E: When a companion is knocked out: This unit's <icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>ATK increases by <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> and <icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=1 width=1 height=1>HP increases by <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak>.

C: 对战开始时：队伍中最强的猫咪神偷会偷取1只对手奇美拉至我方的召唤队列，随后离场。等级越高，偷取的奇美拉越强
E: At the start of battle: The strongest Master Cat-Thief in the team will steal 1 opponent chimera to ally team's summon queue, then departs from the field. Higher levels will steal stronger chimeras.

C: 对战开始时：向所有对手发射火箭
E: At the start of battle: Launches rockets at all enemies.

E: Let's all do our best~

E: Can we be friends?

C: 可以跟我回家吗？嗷呜？
E: Can you come home with me? Awoo?

C: 阿雅亲手织的衣服，喜欢~
E: I love this outfit that Agy weaved herself~

C: 出售
E: Sell

C: \n神将降临的祭坛，旺盛的生命在此肆意繁育。
E: \nAn altar where gods descend, where abundant life flourishes wildly.

C: 「梦主」的回信
E: Reply from the Dreammaster

C: 金血忆灵
E: Ichor Memosprite

C: 她醒了
E: She's awake

C: 遭到黑潮侵蚀的正阳狮鹫。对杀戮的渴求成为了空洞躯壳中仅存的意志。\n虽然失去了艾格勒的赐福，但黑潮中取之不竭的能量令它成为了更加恐怖的存在。
E: Noontide Gryphon corroded by the black tide, driven solely by an insatiable thirst for bloodshed.\nEven after losing Aquila's blessings, the inexhaustible energy within the black tide has turned it into something even more horrifying.

C: 黑潮朽弓
E: Black Tide's Decrepit Bow

C: 使自身召唤的【幼蛰虫】速度提高。
E: Increases the SPD of "Juvenile Sting" summoned by this unit.

C: 对指定我方单体造成物理属性伤害。
E: Deals Physical DMG to one designated target.

C: 发动数次攻击，优先对我方全体目标逐个攻击1次。
E: Launches several attacks, prioritizing attacking all targets 1 time.

C: 对指定我方单体目标造成大量虚数属性伤害，若目标持有护盾则削减自身韧性，该削韧效果不会使韧性低于1点。
E: Deals massive Imaginary DMG to one designated target. If the target has Shield, reduce this unit's Toughness instead. This Toughness Reduction effect will not reduce Toughness below 1.

C: 对指定我方单体目标造成大量虚数属性伤害，使目标降低生命值的一部分转化为【<u>侵蚀</u>】，若目标持有护盾则削减自身韧性，该削韧效果不会使韧性低于1点。
E: Deals massive Imaginary DMG to one designated target and converts a portion of the hit target's reduced HP into "<u>Corrosion</u>." If the target has Shield, reduce this unit's Toughness instead. This Toughness Reduction effect will not reduce Toughness below 1.

C: 渐宽广
E: Allargando

C: 复诵谜面的双关语
E: Brainteaser-Repeating Pun

C: 罪血啄食
E: Hemotort Graze

C: 每有一种火漆系列奇物，强化#2个该火漆所属命途的祝福。
E: For every type of Sealing Wax Curio, Enhance #2 of each Sealing Wax's Path's Blessing(s).

C: 我方角色及其忆灵获得【<u>执念</u>】时，为该角色累计相同层数的充能，充能达到一定层数后，进入【哀歌】状态。该状态下的我方角色发动攻击后，消耗充能层数并造成额外的【<u>回味</u>】伤害，消耗到0层时退出该状态。【哀歌】状态下也可累计充能。
E: When an ally character and their memosprite gain "<u>Obsession</u>," they accumulate an equal number of Charge stacks. Upon reaching a certain number of stacks, they enter the "Dirge" state. While in this state, after ally characters launch attacks, they consume Charge stacks to deal additional "<u>Aftertaste</u>" DMG. The state ends when Charge stacks reach 0. Charge stacks can still be accumulated while in "Dirge" state.

C: 击破特攻提高<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>。
E: Break Effect increases by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>.

C: 失声仍然非常严重，甚至连同谐的力量也开始出现异常，问问哥哥是否知道些什么吧。
E: The voice loss is still rather severe, and even the power of the Harmony has started showing anomalies. I should ask my brother if he knows anything about this.

C: 探寻梦主掩埋的罪行
E: Expose the Dreammaster's buried crimes

C: 难以置信的神情呢。和其他人一样，我不能透露太多。即使藏身于此，我们也逃不出无处不在的命运。
E: That's quite the incredulous look. Like the others, I can't reveal too much. Even if we are hidden in this place, we can't escape from omnipresent destiny.

C: 那么，你看到了什么？
E: So... what did you see?

C: …你确定？
E: ...Are you sure?

C: 遗骸消失了。果然只是忆质形成的幻影吗？
E: The remains are gone. Was it just an illusion formed by memoria after all?
...Hmm?

C: 如果海量回忆一同涌现，你会难以承受。
E: If too many memories come flooding back at once, it would be too much for you to bear.

C: …谐乐大典将至，宾客鱼龙混杂，{RUBY_B#「梦主」}歌斐木先生{RUBY_E#}必须全心投入筹备，无暇他顾。
E: ...The Charmony Festival is approaching, and with all sorts of guests mingling, {RUBY_B#Dreammaster}Mr. Gopher Wood{RUBY_E#} must focus entirely on the preparations, leaving no attention for other matters.

C: 哥哥，总是这样言不由衷啊。
E: Big brother, you're always hiding your true feelings like this.

C: 伙计们，她还有共犯！
E: Hey, look! She has an accomplice!

C: 行了行了，小子们——到此为止。
E: That's enough, boys.

C: 劳驾，前方是——
E: Excuse me, ahead is...

C: 不得不说，你是很有天赋，才会被选中成为「谐乐大典」的调弦师。
E: I'll give credit where it's due. You must be quite talented to have been chosen as a Chordmaster for the Charmony Festival.

C: 果然如此。
E: Just as I thought.

C: 她能够来到匹诺康尼，已经令我很惊讶了。
E: I'm surprised she made it to Penacony at all.

C: 我可以保护你们免受伤害，在忆域中，我也需要忆者的援助，以及…如果遇见家族，多一个人总能多一份解释。
E: I can protect you from harm, but in the Memory Zone, I'll need assistance from the Memokeeper as well. And... if we run into The Family, it wouldn't hurt to have one more person to explain the situation.

C: 星穹列车不是你的敌人，如果你的目标是「钟表匠的遗产」，就去调查家族。他们不仅掩盖了「死亡」的存在，还埋藏了梦境的过去与真相。
E: The Astral Express is not your enemy. If your goal is the Watchmaker's Legacy, then go look into The Family. Not only are they covering up the existence of "Death," but they're burying the past and the truth about the dreamscape.

C: 那就是你的下一站。
E: That's your next stop.

C: 可是，我找不到理由呢。迄今为止，还没有「石心十人」遇害的先例，真让人心痒难耐呢。
E: But I can't find a reason. So far, there hasn't been a single case of one of the Ten Stonehearts being killed. It's driving me crazy with curiosity!

C: 不错，恶徒从未醒悟，甚至彼此勾结，妄图成立一个家系。他们是何等狂妄，为此，竟请一位信使跨越迢迢寰宇，请求「主家」的许可。
E: Indeed, those villains never learned their lesson. They even conspired with one another, foolishly attempting to establish their own family lineage. Such arrogance! They went as far as sending a messenger across the vast cosmos to seek permission from the Main Family.

C: 我将行僭越之事，修缮神明的谬误——我会将缺失的{RUBY_B#恐惧}指针{RUBY_E#}置回众星的大钟，示人以死。
E: I shall commit an act of transgression, mending the errors of the gods. I will restore the missing {RUBY_B#fear}hand{RUBY_E#} to the celestial clock and show mankind death.

C: 令人赞叹，但你当真认为，自己能快我一步？
E: Impressive, but do you really think you can get ahead of me?

C: 这里的样子…必须抓紧时间了。
E: This place already looks... We need to hurry.

C: 我回到故事开头了？
E: I'm now back at the beginning of the story?

C: 匹诺康尼还醒着的「东道主」，就剩你一个啦，<color=#dbc291ff>所以，想不想来玩一场轮盘游戏——赌注是整个盛会之星</color>。
E: You're the last "festival host" awake in Penacony. <color=#dbc291ff>So, do you want to play a round of roulette? The wager will be the entire Planet of Festivities.</color>

C: 现在你会怎么选？要不眼睁睁看着我炸飞这里，要么就试试看，至少能救他们的命。
E: What will you choose now? You can either watch as I blow the entire place up, or you can try to save their lives.

C: 还不到留愿望的时候帕！
E: It's not the time to leave your final words yet!

C: 那么往后，你要成为谁？
E: Then, who will you become in the future?

C: 但愿死去后，能再见到她。她会因此知道，我也只是人而已…而人最终都能幸福。
E: I hope that I'll see her again after I die. Then she'll know that I, too, am only human... And all humans will find happiness in the end.

C: 银枝
E: Argenti

C: <color=#dbc291ff>加入星核猎手的所有可能里，你最终都会选择背叛。以「须臾」之名，成为毁灭「记忆」的绝灭大君。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>In all possible futures where you join the Stellaron Hunters, you will ultimately choose betrayal. You shall become a Lord Ravager named "Ephemera," poised to destroy the Remembrance.</color>

C: 但我有自己的理由，可以就让我自己留在这吗？
E: But I have my own reasons. Can you just let me stay here by myself?

C: 我们来到匹诺康尼时，梦境就已经开始与现实融合了。我以为自己在做梦，但同时，也行走于清醒的现实——这一样会让失熵症继续恶化。
E: The dreamscape had already started merging with reality when we arrived in Penacony. I thought I was dreaming, but I was actually also living in waking reality. It was causing my Entropy Loss Syndrome to worsen.

C: 不过，也可以假设我们素不相识，只是偶然在那里相遇。
E: That being said, we could also pretend we're strangers who just happened to meet there.

C: 你挥挥手，帮工们搬来衣柜、木箱和其他什物，将它们尽数倒入火坑，发出沉重的响声。思念随火光和烟尘徐徐上升，直到在空中消失不见。
E: With a wave of your hand, the workers bring over wardrobes, wooden crates, and other belongings, dumping them all into the fire pit with heavy thuds. Memories rise with the flames and smoke, slowly dissipating into the air until they vanish.

C: 鼓掌！灰宝做得好棒。怎么样，现在应该完全掌握奇美拉对战的诀窍了吧？
E: Applause! Well done, Grayie. So, have you completely mastered the tricks of chimera battles now?

C: 将它拖拽到队伍中的请假狂身上，就可以给它增加1点<color=#f29e38ff>经验</color>。
E: Drag it onto the Absentee Freak in your team to give them 1 <color=#f29e38ff>Experience</color> point.

C: 继续参赛，努力成为奇美拉大师吧！
E: Keep competing and strive to become a Chimera Master!

C: 当前均衡等级<6，强度差距过大
E: Current Equilibrium Level < 6. The power difference is too great

C: 额外挑战
E: Extra Challenge

C: 终结技•激活
E: Ultimate: Activate

C: 在你的记忆里，我看见了祂们的目光，看见了你旅途中所做的那些选择，还有你那生动而惊人的…本质。我当然会一直、一直追随着你，和你留在银河的那些足迹……
E: I see THEIR glances in your memories. I see all the choices you've made on your journey, as well as your lively and astonishing... essence. Without a doubt, I'll always, always... follow you and the steps you leave behind in the cosmos.
